I’m glad I caught you before you head out for Halloween, Peter. Tonight marks our consequential end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I want to be direct about what’s ahead. I’m already facing two Republican challengers, both backed by national GOP leadership eager to flip this district and reclaim control of the House. They’ve made it clear that CA-27 is one of their top targets for 2026. While they focus on partisan politics, I’m focused on results -- protecting affordable health care, defending Social Security and Medicaid, and making life more affordable for working families. That’s why I ran to flip this seat in the first place, and it’s why keeping this seat blue matters so much. CA-27 remains one of the most competitive seats in the country, and with new maps likely to expand the district, the stakes couldn’t be higher. If Republicans win here, they’ll win the House. Full stop. **[So, before our end-of-month deadline expires at midnight, I’m counting on your support to make sure we’re ready for whatever comes next. name: Ron Wyden
subject: Tariffs = Trump Tax

body:
Earlier this week, the Senate passed a resolution aimed at ending President Trump’s tariffs on Brazil.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118422514/579702935/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2UzOTRiNS1iNWI2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VoLJEvf177yI3xFnjjZtR6AmPnrTT9YHVtLOj2_f8w=&emci=7e73e52e-8bb6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c3e394b5-b5b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **This week, the Senate passed my bipartisan resolutions to end President Trump's tariffs on Brazil and Canada.** For months, Donald Trump has wreaked havoc on our nation's economy, farmers, ranchers, small businesses, and workers with his tariff chaos. Businesses are barely able to keep their doors open. Workers are left wondering if they'll have a job from one month to the next. And families are being forced to pay an additional Trump Tax on everything they buy, from cars to groceries to beer, you name it. It's overdue that Congress take action to rein in Trump's dangerous trade agenda guided by his own personal grievances. The Senate has passed my bipartisan resolution to end these tariffs. Mike Johnson has kept the House on vacation for over six weeks and running, with no end in sight. Republicans in the House could take immediate action to end Trump's tariffs once and for all if Mike Johnson brings them back to D.C. to do it. Families, farmers, and businesses across the country are desperate to get off the financial rollercoaster of Trump's tariffs. The House Republicans have the power to make it happen, and I'm calling on them to bring this up for a vote as soon as possible. **This won't be the last you hear from me on this issue. I've been sounding the alarm for months on Trump's reckless and harmful trade agenda. Now we have a real shot at bringing it to an end, and I'll be doing everything I can to get this across the finish line.** More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

clean_body: Earlier this week, the Senate passed a resolution aimed at ending President Trump’s tariffs on Brazil. | | | | This week, the Senate passed my bipartisan resolutions to end President Trump's tariffs on Brazil and Canada. For months, Donald Trump has wreaked havoc on our nation's economy, farmers, ranchers, small businesses, and workers with his tariff chaos. Businesses are barely able to keep their doors open. Workers are left wondering if they'll have a job from one month to the next. And families are being forced to pay an additional Trump Tax on everything they buy, from cars to groceries to beer, you name it. It's overdue that Congress take action to rein in Trump's dangerous trade agenda guided by his own personal grievances. The Senate has passed my bipartisan resolution to end these tariffs. Mike Johnson has kept the House on vacation for over six weeks and running, with no end in sight. Republicans in the House could take immediate action to end Trump's tariffs once and for all if Mike Johnson brings them back to D.C. to do it. Families, farmers, and businesses across the country are desperate to get off the financial rollercoaster of Trump's tariffs. The House Republicans have the power to make it happen, and I'm calling on them to bring this up for a vote as soon as possible. This won't be the last you hear from me on this issue. I've been sounding the alarm for months on Trump's reckless and harmful trade agenda. Now we have a real shot at bringing it to an end, and I'll be doing everything I can to get this across the finish line. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Showing up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Hi,

I’m back on the road this week, talking to Texans in counties that voted
for Trump last November. That includes Collin County last night — which he
won by more than 10 points — and Brazos County tomorrow where he won by
25.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251031-2.mLSWR-&refcode=ema20251031-240438&t=1002&akid=240438%2E444211%2EM_Yjo- ]Organizing rally in McKinney, Collin County

Organizing rally in McKinney, Collin County

Conventional wisdom says they’re “too red” – but we aren’t about to write
them off. The only way we can win big elections is by being with those who
will decide their outcomes.

We’ve built an extraordinary community of passionate volunteers with
Powered by People that’s focused on winning political power by literally
meeting people where they’re at.

This strategy isn’t driven by consultants. It’s not funded by corporate
interests. And it’s not directed by the DNC. It’s just us, the volunteers
on the ground, doing the work. We’re literally powered by people.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251031-2.mLSWR-&refcode=ema20251031-240438&t=1003&akid=240438%2E444211%2EM_Yjo- ]Beto with volunteer

But staying on the road in a state as big as Texas and holding these
organizing events on the ground takes real resources. If we’re going to
keep meeting people where they are, we need your help to keep the tanks
filled and this effort moving.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251031-2.mLSWR-&refcode=ema20251031-240438&amount=3&t=1004&akid=240438%2E444211%2EM_Yjo- ]Chip in what you can so we can keep showing up for every community.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251031-2.mLSWR-&refcode=ema20251031-240438&amount=3&t=1023&akid=240438%2E444211%2EM_Yjo- ]DONATE $3

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=240438%2E444211%2EM_Yjo-

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: Crunch time
body:
Right now is the most critical time to surge support for EMILYs List women up and down the ballot. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118422957/579706294/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ73_20251031_1WeekCloser_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057281&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjgyMzEyYy1iNmI2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SjK1P5rGyc55ZWCWecnJiDeXyROjXU1a6AH9gIn6rUQ=) Happy Halloween, Peter! I hope you're having a fun and cozy night. I don't want to interrupt the festivities, so I'll make this quick. With Election Day around the corner, _right now_ is the most critical time to surge support for EMILYs List women up and down the ballot. Let me explain:

Over the past week, I've been on the ground in New Jersey and Virginia. I've talked to voters, candidates, and volunteers. And I can tell you firsthand: our women's races will be _close_.

There's a concept in politics, beloved by fundraisers and field organizers alike: **the margin of effort**. When the polls are tight, and a race could go either way, what matters most is the heart, grit, and commitment of a candidate and her supporters. If we put in the work, we'll win. If we don't, we won't. It's that simple.

Critical races like **Abigail Spanberger's (VA-GOV)** , **Rep. Mikie Sherrill's (NJ-GOV)**, and **Justice Christine Donohue's (PA-SC)** now fall squarely within the margin of effort. And your support can help make sure we reach as many voters as possible before Nov. 4. ****[**Let's give it all we've got, Peter. clean_body: Right now is the most critical time to surge support for EMILYs List women up and down the ballot. | = Happy Halloween, Peter! I hope you're having a fun and cozy night. I don't want to interrupt the festivities, so I'll make this quick. With Election Day around the corner, right now is the most critical time to surge support for EMILYs List women up and down the ballot. Let me explain: Over the past week, I've been on the ground in New Jersey and Virginia. I've talked to voters, candidates, and volunteers. And I can tell you firsthand: our women's races will be close. There's a concept in politics, beloved by fundraisers and field organizers alike: the margin of effort. When the polls are tight, and a race could go either way, what matters most is the heart, grit, and commitment of a candidate and her supporters. If we put in the work, we'll win. If we don't, we won't. It's that simple. Critical races like Abigail Spanberger's (VA-GOV) , Rep. Mikie Sherrill's (NJ-GOV), and Justice Christine Donohue's (PA-SC) now fall squarely within the margin of effort. And your support can help make sure we reach as many voters as possible before Nov. 4. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for being part of this team, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? body:
You know what’s scaring me this Halloween? There are only FOUR Senate seats standing between us and taking back our Democratic majority in the midterms. BUT Republicans have _stockpiled over $200 million_ this year to defend these seats and defeat Democrats. Recent reports show that _Donald Trump “has secretly been spending money in political races_ across the country already.” **If we don’t pick up the pace in the next 4 hours, we’ll _narrowly miss_ our $30,000 October goal — and it will set us back on supplying resources for key red to blue Senate races across the country.** [**_So, I’m looking for 192 more supporters to rush whatever you can before midnight. Every single dollar will help propel our Democrats to victory in the midterms and take back the Senate from MAGA extremists._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118423005/579706757/-1797184696?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.31_EOM-Update_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmUxZDE2OC1iNmI2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_F5y_anjwklvl4HvKbqL-DdNSVum76ZpB9d-ZiCzOAU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118423006/579706758/-1797184696?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.31_EOM-Update_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmUxZDE2OC1iNmI2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_F5y_anjwklvl4HvKbqL-DdNSVum76ZpB9d-ZiCzOAU=) | | [ DONATE >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118423007/579706759/-1797184696?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.31_EOM-Update_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmUxZDE2OC1iNmI2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_F5y_anjwklvl4HvKbqL-DdNSVum76ZpB9d-ZiCzOAU=)

Republicans have control of all three branches of government and are dragging our country backward — but 2026 is our chance to take back power and protect working families.

name: Michael B.
subject: just 219 more donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
With any luck, the response from this email alone could be what puts us over the top.
| | |
---
I know it's late, friend – but with just four hours left, we're so close to reaching our 10,000-donation end-of-month goal by midnight. With any luck, the response from this email alone could be what puts us over the top.
From the ongoing government shutdown to sticker shock for working families when ACA open enrollment begins tomorrow – none of us can afford to sit on the sidelines. **If we're going to make Colorado the best state to live, work and raise a family,** **we all must step up in our state's defense against the cruel agenda of Trump and Republicans in Washington right now. **
In three days, we'll be one year out from the 2026 election. That means we need to kick our campaign's digital outreach, organizing, and community engagement efforts into high gear, starting today.
And since this is a _grassroots-powered_ campaign, if we're going to do any of that, let alone win, closing the last 219-donation gap tonight is key.

name: David Hogg
subject: I’m tired of being scared, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We only have a few hours to hit our goal and help our candidates win on Tuesday.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251031-2&t=1&akid=2795%2E587540%2Ekmeori)
Hi Peter,
Happy Halloween from myself and everyone at Leaders We Deserve! I know you’ve got costumes to get ready, candy to pass out, and plans for the night, so I’ll get right to it:
**Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is at midnight, and we’re so close to hitting it — but we aren’t there yet. We need your help to close the gap before midnight so we can win next Tuesday, power our movement, and 👻scare👻 the establishment.[Will you contribute $5 or anything you can now?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251031_2_halloween.blCa1D&refcode=em20251031-2795&amount=5&t=3&akid=2795%2E587540%2Ekmeori)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251031_2_halloween.blCa1D&amount=5&refcode=em20251031-2795&t=4&akid=2795%2E587540%2Ekmeori)**
Missing tonight’s goal would be scary. But do you know what’s even scarier?
If nothing changes, the same political establishment that has ignored young people on climate, housing, gun violence, and affordability will keep deciding our future for the next 30+ years. There might be different names in charge (or an 80-year-old Ted Cruz... now _that’s_ frightening!) but it’ll be the same agenda: protect incumbents, serve billionaire donors, and leave young people behind.
But that future is **not inevitable.** Not if we do something about it right now.
Leaders We Deserve exists to build a new generation of young, progressive leaders from real communities — people who will fight for _our_ future. And it’s working — we’re already winning races, shifting power, and creating change.
But right now, we’re at a critical crossroads, and we’re at risk of missing **tonight’s fundraising goal.**
Falling short means fewer resources to help our candidates win, _right_ before key elections next week.
If supporters like you step up before midnight, we’ll hit this goal and win next Tuesday. And for once, it’ll be the political establishment that’s spooked, not us.
So if you’re tired of the same old political horror story, this is our chance to rewrite how it ends.
**[Chip in before midnight to help us hit this goal, win next Tuesday, and give the establishment a Halloween scare they won’t forget.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251031_2_halloween.blCa1D&refcode=em20251031-2795&amount=5&t=5&akid=2795%2E587540%2Ekmeori)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251031_2_halloween.blCa1D&refcode=em20251031-2795&t=24&akid=2795%2E587540%2Ekmeori)**
We deserve a future to look forward to, not one we’re scared of.
Thank you for helping us build something better. Now I’m signing off for the night because I can hear the Trick or Treat mob heading towards my house. Those kids know I’m always stocked with the full size candy bars! 🍫🍫 (Yes, I do that. And yes, it's not cheap. But the look on their faces is so worth it. I now get to be the kind of house I used to walk a mile to every Halloween growing up just to get 1 full size candy bar. Also, I’m carving a pumpkin I grew and am calling it James Carville.)
Happy Halloween,
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251031-2&t=25&refcode2=2795_587540_kmeori&akid=2795%2E587540%2Ekmeori)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=2795%2E587540%2Ekmeori)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2795%2E587540%2Ekmeori)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

body:

Peter —
We’ll be honest – this morning, we weren’t sure whether or not we’d be able to reach our goals before our fundraising deadline tonight.
But HOLY COW! Right now, lots of people are chipping in all across the country! Take a look:

We’re so grateful for this outpouring of support!
Each dot represents another person committed to this grassroots movement to take back Texas. Everyone you see on that map is hoping you will step up, too. So, what do you say?
[**Can you join the wave of support we’re seeing for James Talarico’s campaign for the U.S. Senate? We’re so close to our goal. If you’re able to pitch in right now, you could be the one to put us over the top!**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251028-1-ak&t=2&akid=211%2E1347274%2E1DRD2H)

name: President Trump
subject: Don’t leak this.

body:

| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

Friend,

I really wish I could've gotten this to you sooner, but I’ve been in and out of meetings all day.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Last reminder about tonight’s deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I set this goal personally.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5423%2E400544%2EznosR-)
Hi. It’s Halloween, so I promise to make this quick. _**I wanted to send one last reminder about our end-of-month fundraising at midnight tonight.**_
With a Republican insider now in this race, my team and I set a goal to raise 10,000 grassroots donations to help send an unmistakable message about the strength of our movement.
**[I’m so grateful for every single donation we’ve received so far, and I hope I can count on you to pitch in in these final hours to help us reach our goal. We’re close.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251031_2_halloween.W2fnML&amount=5&refcode=em20251031-5423&t=2&akid=5423%2E400544%2EznosR-)**

— Deb

Fellow Patriot,

I am honored and humbled by the enthusiasm from our supporters since we launched our campaign for AZ-5 last week, but today marks our **_first big fundraising test._**

October is ending — and **tonight’s month-end deadline** is the moment to show that we are ready to put a fighter in Congress.

I’ve spent years on the frontlines — battling cartel violence, stopping fentanyl, and protecting our families. Now I’m taking that fight to Washington, and I need you on my team from the beginning of this journey.

**With this being our first deadline** , every dollar we raise today sets the pace for the fight ahead. We can’t wait for Washington politicians to fix things — it’s up to us to send someone who will get the job done.

[**Will you step up today and help us hit our October Month-End Fundraising Deadline and crush this first test?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c58290cac31d4843a676904d61b41077&_e=LDIaAXrlTCFM_u4_LtsC9JNxEHLedBcNlWZa3TBd2WZuYZVdREE3HV-7mwIKTrStT9SttLw_4oUg0LvcXtXfvYKsqQ_f_CI_cWXr3aZLBZ1uvsZh5naBMuXELnKdFRFAgSLoP145odX6nGGSZ-oy3yXtPs-ZJMW7STEr5A3AxMaMtEcri7mOzawinMgA3VZFPJJwcGrA0TdVyelFOckC37yYFlYnXUlA-szevPnwYT0DM3_4A2CTVmg5Z2Dtd8dSp309LFBNyEg4PSCD5jPnFJvPiIHHdOggyNTzcGNGPHwA-HyatJeucBOrGT9it8-oMuAzQoVbEGep4tNAj0omMLz0np9gyXuxs2ko9-IJ7MOpzEuha3IIeTX4g41fxea2TCFVRNlBN4LWU1pyE-C9iQDkYiOoxt4nFCkup43OWAXUK8JhFdq_t7ABZwo6e-m7mg9o_wRJDxK3J1BYDB1WoqQHAEQaHdu-6h-QLWhq26ho6mipNeRna4oooQ2mAgp_ZypI3U-y2D5z72C4YVMI78WROa5gk28uFLN7nC6c7JZwD0Eev_yi7AubpD7v8I1FO3wDi22rkBJXr0BeAo1FWACOFDe_htxgZNpBUC2HG5ZQ0TFTEQ04a3PQC_Ygo4ePHsGbwItc-HGg9rtbJZzF7b5fpYzd8LrBBljQyOsS0bY%3D)

name: Derek Tran
subject: one last message
body:
Hi,
I know it’s Halloween, so thanks for taking a second to open this -- I’ll keep it quick.
I just got off the phone with my finance team, and we’re still a few donations short of where we need to be before the month ends at midnight. With four Republicans now running against me -- and national operatives laser-focused on flipping CA-45 -- tonight’s deadline has taken on a new meaning.
As you read this email national Republicans are laying the groundwork to flood this district with outside money and misinformation. They know Prop 50 could redraw the maps and limit their power, so they’re attempting to manipulate public opinion with distortions and spin.
We flipped this seat by just 653 votes. That means our path to holding it, and helping Democrats retake the House, depends on grassroots supporters stepping up at moments like this.
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to give, this is it.
Can I count on you for a $3 donation before the deadline?
Here’s a good link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dt-q4-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118423382/579720497/-1516755731?refcode=em-10.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI0NjA2ZTQtYjliNi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gBe4AVwFZ0KFug5MeaiWGY2xgoBwuKWVok5j2qbGhjI=)**
Thank you, and happy Halloween! 🎃
Derek

Let’s scare the GOP a little, shall we? ☠️ \-- Team Villegas P.S. The best treat you can give us today? A grassroots donation before the clock strikes 🕛. No tricks -- we’ll put it straight to work. | = | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

clean_body: Claim your 2025 personalized Membership Card now We've reached out a few times Peter about the change in your membership status and we really hope you understand what's at stake. According to our records, your 2025 Republican State Leadership Membership Card has NOT been activated. Our team members are working day and night to defend Conservative values nationwide and are fighting to stop the Radical Left from destroying our nation! | Republican State Leadership MEMBERSHIP NOTICE ACCOUNT HOLDER: 2024 MEMBERSHIP: LAPSED 2025 MEMBERSHIP ENROLLMENT: PENDING Republican State Leadership is counting on you to act NOW to stand with us as we put an end to the Left's radical agenda! By renewing your membership, you are sending the loudest possible message to the Radical Left and making it CLEAR that you proudly stand with Republican State Leadership nationwide! Thank you, Republican State Leadership Membership Services * By providing your mobile phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and texts and P2P messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from RSLC and its affiliated PACs. name: sent from Haley's iPhone
subject: The deadline is just hours away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I needed to reach out again

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1240%2E49239%2EdDrX_u)
| | |
---
Sorry to reach out again, null. But we've got our end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight, and we're still $8,340 short of our $350,000 goal.
It's especially important we hit this goal because the GOP is planning to spend millions to flip Michigan red – and we urgently need the resources to compete.
I wouldn't ask if it weren't important: **[Will you rush $5 now and help us close the fundraising gap before midnight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7828?t=2&akid=1240%2E49239%2EdDrX_u)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7829?t=3&akid=1240%2E49239%2EdDrX_u)
---
Thank you,

Haley sent from my iPhone
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7830?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1240%2E49239%2EdDrX_u) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7831?t=5&akid=1240%2E49239%2EdDrX_u)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Patriot,

I'm asking you to hear me out for a few minutes... Can I be honest with you?

When I left the service, I thought I had done the hardest thing I would ever have to do in my entire life. Being a Green Beret was no joke.

Being a father proved otherwise, and being a politician sometimes makes me wish I were back in basic training.

There are a few things that come hand-in-hand with politics that are unbearable; one of them is fundraising.

My parents didn't raise me to ask others for handouts, but fundraising is one of those things that I have to do; otherwise, my campaign would be dead in its tracks.

**If you 're still reading this email, I need your help. I have an upcoming fundraising deadline, and my team is telling me we need to raise $5,000 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: This seat belongs to us
body:
| | Peter,

We don’t need another politician who will rubber-stamp someone else’s agenda. We need representatives who deeply understand our struggles, who have lived them, and who will fight tirelessly for us.

**This seat belongs to us, and I intend to keep it that way.**

But here's the reality: National Republicans are pouring money into this race, hoping to replace me with someone they can control. They want to strip us of our voice and let party bosses in D.C. call the shots.

Contributing now means ensuring that Southwest Washington's voice stays in the hands of those who live and work here, not bought by outside interests. We need to show that our community stands united for a future driven by working families, not dark money.

[Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us finish the month strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118423617/579728476/140983856?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_251031_2_6&refcode2=783123fa-bbb6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODMxMjNmYS1iYmI2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GEBFPguuNglGMASifvBwDvGQhRz_fN7Xxc2sjbstpSM=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | **[EXPRESS DONATE: $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118423621/579728486/140983856?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_251031_2_6&refcode2=783123fa-bbb6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODMxMjNmYS1iYmI2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GEBFPguuNglGMASifvBwDvGQhRz_fN7Xxc2sjbstpSM=)**
---

Every bit makes a difference. Thank you for standing with me,

Marie

|
* * *
---

subject: Are you sure about this?

body:

I know you’re feeling it too, Peter. Every week, it seems, we're fighting yet _another_ existential crisis for our democracy. From Texas’s racial gerrymander to attacks on the Voting Rights Act to ongoing attempts to undermine free and fair elections nationwide, the fair maps movement has had our work cut out for us. **Fighting back wouldn't be possible if it weren't for grassroots supporters like you who keep us going.** Whether you're volunteering, spreading the word about the attacks on our democracy with your loved ones, or donating whatever you can to help us ramp up our democracy-saving efforts — I want to express my deepest gratitude to you, however you’ve been able to contribute to this movement. Looking to Election Day next week, the midterm elections, and the upcoming census — I know we’ve got some tough fights ahead. But I also know that supporters like you are our last line of defense against Trump’s power. I find hope and strength in knowing that we’re in this fight together. Thanks for everything you do, — Biz John Bisognano
President

clean_body: We’re incredibly grateful | I know you’re feeling it too, Peter. Every week, it seems, we're fighting yet another existential crisis for our democracy. From Texas’s racial gerrymander to attacks on the Voting Rights Act to ongoing attempts to undermine free and fair elections nationwide, the fair maps movement has had our work cut out for us. Fighting back wouldn't be possible if it weren't for grassroots supporters like you who keep us going. Whether you're volunteering, spreading the word about the attacks on our democracy with your loved ones, or donating whatever you can to help us ramp up our democracy-saving efforts — I want to express my deepest gratitude to you, however you’ve been able to contribute to this movement. Looking to Election Day next week, the midterm elections, and the upcoming census — I know we’ve got some tough fights ahead. But I also know that supporters like you are our last line of defense against Trump’s power. I find hope and strength in knowing that we’re in this fight together. Thanks for everything you do, — Biz John Bisognano President National Democratic Redistricting Committee | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. subject: Trump’s scheme to rig the midterms…

body:
We can stop him!
| **YOU KNOW** Trump is begging Republicans in every corner of the country to redistrict to RIG the midterms and save his MAGA Majority!

**AND YOU KNOW** that our first chance to foil their plan is in just FOUR DAYS...California’s new maps will stop Trump’s scheme!

**SO WE CAN’T BELIEVE** _you’re one of just 541 top Democrats who haven’t stepped up yet!_ [You know what’s at stake – and with just FOUR days left, we CAN’T fall short of our $10,000 goal, or it’ll cost us our chance to flip the House. So we’re giving you one last chance to step up before midnight »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95785?t=6&akid=21698%2E878179%2EcI2bop) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95786?t=7&akid=21698%2E878179%2EcI2bop)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21698%2E878179%2EcI2bop). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21698%2E878179%2EcI2bop).**

subject: America Needs a New Generation Of Fighters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR ARIZONA ]( "© PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR ARIZONA ")
body:
I’m part of a generation that refuses to sit back while career politicians mortgage our future. We’ve grown up watching Washington talk big... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2fd43b3c069b/im-their-worst-nightmare-13906079?e=36b5d8efc6)

| | Patriot, I’m part of a generation that refuses to sit back while career politicians mortgage our future. **We’ve grown up watching Washington talk big, spend bigger, and accomplish nothing. That ends with us.** **The truth is, our movement isn’t just about taking back Congress. ** It’s about taking back the future. _Young conservatives like me aren’t waiting for permission. _ **We’re stepping up, taking the fight directly to the establishment, and proving that service to country doesn’t stop when the uniform comes off.**
---
| [FIGHT FOR OUR VALUES](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=86e9d32bdd&e=36b5d8efc6 "FIGHT FOR OUR VALUES")
---
| But to do that, I need your help before our next deadline TONIGHT.

**[Every dollar you give is fuel for this movement—a statement that America’s best days aren’t behind us, and that the next generation is ready to lead.](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=7062e8f20b&e=36b5d8efc6)**

name: Spanberger HQ Alert (via Heartland Patriots)
subject: We need to correct this. Right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Our opponent just bought $2 million in ads — the largest buy of the whole election.
**Breaking news:** Winsome Earle-Sears is outspending us.
She just bought $2 million in ads for the last week — the largest buy of the whole election and far above what we've budgeted.
_Peter, we need to correct this._ **Right now.**
_If we don't step up our fundraising, we will continue to be out-messaged the last week of the campaign._
So, we've set our most ambitious goal yet to make sure we close this gap and reach millions of Virginians with the truth. What do you say?
**[Will you contribute $10 or more so Abigail Spanberger can keep pace with her opponent's record spending and win big on Tuesday? Your donation — split with Heartland Patriots — needs to come in today to have the necessary impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97250?refcode=em20251031-9655&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=9655%2E614464%2EtwBFM8)**

body:

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Reminder: volunteer for PA Climate Champions this weekend.
body:
Come text with us!

|
---
Hi, it's Jane Fonda. In Pennsylvania, climate champions Joe Khan and Tara Zrinksi are running to defend their communities from pollution, neglect, and corruption — and they need your help to reach every voter before the polls close on November 4. That’s why I’m asking you to join our volunteer team for special GOTV textbanks to help elect Joe for Bucks County DA and Tara for Northampton County Executive. We’ll send texts to voters to remind them what’s at stake — clean air, good jobs, and honest leadership — and make sure they have everything they need to cast their ballots. Volunteers across the country are joining in because they know when everyday people take action together, we can win. Can I count on you to step up and join us? name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden’s FBI Met with Twitter Days Before 2022 Election
body:
Court Hearing for Nashville School Shooter ‘Manifesto’

[INSIDE JW]

BIDEN’S FBI MET WITH TWITTER DAYS BEFORE 2022 ELECTION TO DISCUSS
‘CONTENT MODERATION’

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36363&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj02d0l1WVh1MUthayZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=ec8ce1495b681c5ce6c5e01d28c34d2ac74b93d34ced6bd0c3e3889ca439c62e]

We received a smoking-gun email showing that the Biden FBI was working
with Big Tech to censor Americans just before a key election.

The heavily redacted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36364&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXR3aXR0ZXItcmVjb3Jkcy0wMTE2My1mZXdlci1yZWRhY3Rpb25zL11lbWFpbD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c53f75d24812cd008c1f6d944e8e344c7ffb1f4cdb258ec716c82ad46e65c0be
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36359&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXR3aXR0ZXItcmVjb3Jkcy0wMTE2My1mZXdlci1yZWRhY3Rpb25zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=399700b8659c0a9e650a8bc4229aa56fab2dad761f83ebf6c234fa86c9eb5503]
was produced by the U.S. Department of Justice in response to our
Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit.

It shows Biden-era FBI personnel discussing a “touch point
meeting” with Twitter regarding reported meddling by China in the
2022 midterm election and the social media platform’s “potential
changes” in its “content moderation policies” soon after Twitter
was acquired by Elon Musk and shortly before Election Day.

We filed the April 2023
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36365&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1kb2ovXWxhd3N1aXQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6e31b40d935a46121c1dde1d5afd6908c6c39ba7aee2cd0939d5c806e91e3a8f
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=30116&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1kb2ovP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=cf7a6756b66b2fbae68d1a53123d889ace6eafecd61d3b7375fd5372b5a2ba6c]
against the
Justice Department, the U.S. Department of Homeland Security and the
Office of the Director of National Intelligence after the FBI failed
to respond to a December 2022 FOIA request for “Twitter Files
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=35483&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9tdGFpYmJpL3N0YXR1cy8xNTk4ODIyOTU5ODY2NjgzMzk0XeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=251e7a2df0259ca95dc069740d4c048a3ad088c7d0c5ff73a3e4d1f497cbdff8
records
concerning
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36366&F=T&&hash=2f9df388c8173aaeed9d0fe868789844dc244c91aa84cfc608f4afbbad027556
Biden’s laptop
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=35484&F=T&&hash=12fb06e91209a2137b05dc537609ec324a5f7d6e6317ae0104982aa72bcd25c7]
and other censorship (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=30093&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1kbmktdHdpdHRlci1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDExNjMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=57189a9a54aea3ad4cb7b6529d6f9874dccce04b48fc2c6cd96cd380b050e806]
(No.
1:23-cv-01163)).

The lawsuit references Yoel Roth, Vijaya Gadde, and Jim Baker, who
were prominent in internal discussions at Twitter about censoring the
_New York Post’s_ Hunter Biden laptop story, as journalist Matt
Taibbi revealed in the December 2022 release of the “Twitter Files
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=35486&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9tdGFpYmJpL3N0YXR1cy8xNTk4ODIyOTU5ODY2NjgzMzk0XS7igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=2d59e35653e0b1d95f63fe0b5a33635f1bf64e1d017e8e5fbce5066ad4572897

A
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36367&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHdpdHRlci1jZW5zb3JzaGlwLWhlYXJpbmctc2V0L11oZWFyaW5nP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7045b948a463af45a1bf29f4f3090bfad062aeacb64842aaceaae0b49f5dbd19
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=35500&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHdpdHRlci1jZW5zb3JzaGlwLWhlYXJpbmctc2V0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8098130ab1cf1da2e5aac9e2c18162f5171811e395eb8726cf865290195a3ba8]
was
held in this case in June 2025.

The newly obtained email, with the subject line “RE: Midterm
Election Touch Point Meeting with Twitter,” was sent on November 3,
2022. Musk’s acquisition of Twitter was finalized on October 27,
2022. The midterm election was on November 8, 2022. All names of the
sender and recipients of the email are redacted, with the exception
of
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36368&F=T&&hash=c9795fe59696b3302ea636c812f953e2c48ae238bba334f05f7bab902102873d
E. Dehmlow
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36360&F=T&&hash=c97561e3e42970804e4448f9189ad3dc3ef70384acc652cb33aa71b9db653d62],
former section chief of the FBI’s Foreign Influence Task Force.
The
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36364&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXR3aXR0ZXItcmVjb3Jkcy0wMTE2My1mZXdlci1yZWRhY3Rpb25zL11lbWFpbD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c53f75d24812cd008c1f6d944e8e344c7ffb1f4cdb258ec716c82ad46e65c0be
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36359&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXR3aXR0ZXItcmVjb3Jkcy0wMTE2My1mZXdlci1yZWRhY3Rpb25zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=399700b8659c0a9e650a8bc4229aa56fab2dad761f83ebf6c234fa86c9eb5503]
instructs:

> Twitter folks,
>
> For tomorrow’s meeting here are the topics we would like to
> discuss:
>
> 1. Recent disclosure of the three PRC [People's Republic of China]
> networks of activity (WAPO [Washington Post] article).
>
> 2. Any potential changes to Twitter’s account verification and
> content moderation policies.
>
> Let us know if you have any topics to cover so we can prepare
> accordingly. Thanks!

The response states:

> Thanks [redacted] Looking forward to meeting tomorrow. Can you also
> add [redacted] to the invite? He’ll be joining us from the legal
> side of the house.

_The Washington Post_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36369&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnBvc3QuY29tL3RlY2hub2xvZ3kvMjAyMi8xMS8wMS9jaGluYS1taWR0ZXJtcy10d2l0dGVyLW5ldHdvcmtzL11hcnRpY2xlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6449e8ca17cf1f541f5556ec98335136d3209283ba9b508259b4f807d799d1d4
referenced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36361&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnBvc3QuY29tL3RlY2hub2xvZ3kvMjAyMi8xMS8wMS9jaGluYS1taWR0ZXJtcy10d2l0dGVyLW5ldHdvcmtzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6c8314b63544e92fccceb0b1f8348b48b1d8a6ef4cb0790d12700e06de3d7e87]
in the email is likely from November 1, 2022, and headlined: “MAGA
porn, hate for Trump: China-based accounts stoke division.”

Through FOIA and other direct litigation, we continue to investigate
and litigate the broad range of censorship that had been imposed upon

political opponents. Our _Corruption Chronicles _blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36355&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmVtYS13aXRoaGVsZC1kaXNhc3Rlci1haWQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1864ca7bb64cd654a914698871e6fe7e2f947c78057c96237c982b9dd80e4492].

> Besides its lengthy history of incompetence, the federal agency
> created by Jimmy Carter to provide the nation with disaster relief
> singled out conservative victims and withheld aid to survivors who
> displayed signs and flags the agency’s liberal workforce disagreed
> with, including those supporting President Trump. The “textbook
> political discrimination against Americans in crisis
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36377&F=T&&hash=3ee41a0edd4daa1ce8bcd1d51dee0dea4a2b2a5127a2f52962f6ceb6a15c0e5f
> uncovered by a Department of Homeland Security (DHS) investigation
> that found throughout the Biden administration the Federal Emergency
> Management Agency (FEMA)—charged with helping people before,
> during and after disasters—systemically refused to visit the
> houses of politically conservative victims. “For years, FEMA
> employees under the Biden Administration intentionally delayed
> much-needed aid to Americans suffering from natural disasters on
> purely political grounds,” DHS Secretary Kristi Noem confirms.
> “They deliberately avoided houses displaying support for President
> Trump and the Second Amendment, illegally collected and stored
> information about survivors’ political beliefs, and failed to
> report their malicious behavior.”
>
> The investigation was conducted by the DHS Privacy Office and found
> that between 2021 and 2024 FEMA employees recorded the political
> beliefs of affected citizens in agency databases, and that the
> information was used to bypass or postpone aid to disaster
> survivors. Investigators determined that the conduct violates the
> Privacy Act of 1974 and other DHS data-handling rules intended to
> protect the First Amendments rights of all Americans. Here are some
> examples included in the report
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36378&F=T&&hash=bab4f4056a1acba1c33b496b4a01c3c0ef8505df5d63b7c3fe3a25d14fb0c594]

>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77500&L=36379&F=T&&hash=24cfcf010f724bc020605654281d5c0b44f7456deb3a20992f853ad1e3f213d8
> was made public last week. An October field note from Florida says,
> “Trump sign, no contact per leadership.” A September 2021 note
> in Pennsylvania reads, “...a lot of explicit political flags,
> posters, etc. ‘F— Joe Biden’ ‘MAGA 2024’ ‘Joe Biden
> Sucks’ ‘Trump 2024’ We do not recommend anyone visiting this
> location.” A Louisiana note from 2021 warns, “Homeowner had sign
> stated...this is trump country.” The prejudice first came to light
> after Hurricane Milton struck Florida’s Gulf Coast in October
> 2024, and a whistleblower revealed that FEMA employees were directed
> to bypass houses displaying political signs supporting then
> presidential candidate Trump. Biden’s FEMA administrator, Deanne
> Criswell, denied it was a systemic problem and even testified under
> oath before Congress that it was an isolated incident.
>
> The recent DHS probe contradicts Criswell’s assessment, finding
> that the abuses were widespread and occurred in the aftermath of
> multiple disasters dating back to Hurricane Ida in 2021. The report
> includes screenshots of a FEMA tool used to collect information that
> is supposed to be used to provide disaster survivor assistance.
> “The information collected included obviously protected
> information about individuals’ freedom of expression, such as
> campaign signs showing support for then-presidential candidate
> Donald Trump or political positions, such as supporting gun

clean_body: Court Hearing for Nashville School Shooter ‘Manifesto’ [INSIDE JW] BIDEN’S FBI MET WITH TWITTER DAYS BEFORE 2022 ELECTION TO DISCUSS ‘CONTENT MODERATION’ [] We received a smoking-gun email showing that the Biden FBI was working with Big Tech to censor Americans just before a key election. The heavily redacted [ [] was produced by the U.S. Department of Justice in response to our Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit. It shows Biden-era FBI personnel discussing a “touch point meeting” with Twitter regarding reported meddling by China in the 2022 midterm election and the social media platform’s “potential changes” in its “content moderation policies” soon after Twitter was acquired by Elon Musk and shortly before Election Day. We filed the April 2023 [ [] against the Justice Department, the U.S. Department of Homeland Security and the Office of the Director of National Intelligence after the FBI failed to respond to a December 2022 FOIA request for “Twitter Files [ records concerning [ Biden’s laptop [] and other censorship (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:23-cv-01163)). The lawsuit references Yoel Roth, Vijaya Gadde, and Jim Baker, who were prominent in internal discussions at Twitter about censoring the New York Post’s Hunter Biden laptop story, as journalist Matt Taibbi revealed in the December 2022 release of the “Twitter Files [ A [ [] was held in this case in June 2025. The newly obtained email, with the subject line “RE: Midterm Election Touch Point Meeting with Twitter,” was sent on November 3, 2022. Musk’s acquisition of Twitter was finalized on October 27, 2022. The midterm election was on November 8, 2022. All names of the sender and recipients of the email are redacted, with the exception of [ E. Dehmlow [], former section chief of the FBI’s Foreign Influence Task Force. The [ [] instructs: Twitter folks, For tomorrow’s meeting here are the topics we would like to discuss: 1. Recent disclosure of the three PRC [People's Republic of China] networks of activity (WAPO [Washington Post] article). 2. Any potential changes to Twitter’s account verification and content moderation policies. Let us know if you have any topics to cover so we can prepare accordingly. Thanks! The response states: Thanks [redacted] Looking forward to meeting tomorrow. Can you also add [redacted] to the invite? He’ll be joining us from the legal side of the house. The Washington Post [ referenced [] in the email is likely from November 1, 2022, and headlined: “MAGA porn, hate for Trump: China-based accounts stoke division.” Through FOIA and other direct litigation, we continue to investigate and litigate the broad range of censorship that had been imposed upon tens millions of Americans. In June 2025, we sued [] the U.S. State Department for all records which allege President Trump or any current or former member of his cabinet are “purveyors of disinformation.” In March, we filed a petition for a [ of certiorari [ the Supreme Court of the United States concerning our lawsuit asserting that the California Secretary of State retaliated against Judicial Watch because of an accurate election integrity video posted to YouTube just before the 2020 Election (J [ Watch, Inc. v. Shirley Weber, in her official capacity as Secretary of State of the State of California [ (No. 2:22-cv-06894)). The California Secretary of State used its well-established working relationship with Big Tech to have YouTube remove and censor Judicial Watch’s video. In November 2024, we [ records [] from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) revealing an extensive effort by government and non-government entities to monitor and censor social media posts on fraud during the 2020 election. In June 2024, heavily redacted Homeland Security [ [] from a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit showed state election officials in the days before and after the 2020 election flagging online content deemed “misinformation” and sending it to the Center for Internet Security (CIS), a DHS-funded nonprofit, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA), which is a division of DHS, the Election Integrity Partnership (EIP), which was created to flag online election content for censorship and suppression, and others. In December 2023, Homeland Security [ [] from the same lawsuit showed a close collaboration between its Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency (CISA) and the leftist Election Integrity Partnership (EIP) to engage in “real-time narrative tracking” on all major social media platforms in the days leading up to the 2020 election. In November 2023, we uncovered Homeland Security [ [] that showed the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) communicating during the 2020 election campaign with the Election Integrity Partnership (EIP). The CISA records showed government involvement in the EIP pressure on Google, Twitter, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, Reddit and other platforms to censor “disinformation.” HEARING IN LAWSUIT FOR RELEASE OF ‘MANIFESTO’ IN NASHVILLE SCHOOL SHOOTING We were in court this week for an oral argument [] before a three-judge panel in the Tennessee Court of Appeals in the public records lawsuit against the Metropolitan Government of Nashville and Davidson County for records related to the March 2023 shooting at The Covenant School in Tennessee, including the reported “manifesto” written by the female shooter. To view the proceedings online, click here: We filed an open records [ [] on behalf of retired Hamilton County Sheriff James Hammond and the Tennessee Firearms Association, Inc. (“TFA”) (Hammond et al. v. Metropolitan Govt of Nashville et al. [] (No. 23-0538-III)). The court later consolidated our lawsuit with several others related to the release of public records from The Covenant School shooting. Audrey Elizabeth Hale (also known as Aiden Hale), a 28-year-old trans artist, [ killed [] by police after opening fire on the private Christian elementary school in Nashville, Tennessee, killing three adults and three children. The resolution of the case has been delayed over disputes about whether the school and school/victims’ parents could intervene and prevent the release of the “manifesto” and other investigatory material. The transgender agenda should not interfere with the public’s right to know information that may possibly help Americans avoid future tragedies like the one in Nashville. In August 2025, in a related case against the U.S. Department of Justice, we received 485 pages [] of the “manifesto.” The records detail the shooter’s violent thoughts, the targeting and planning of the shooting attack on The Covenant School, and transgender-related obsessions. We previously obtained 112 pages [] of records in April 2025, and an additional 231 pages [] in June 2025—bringing the total number of pages released through this lawsuit to 828. The full “manifesto” consists of 2,056 pages, and the FBI is continuing to produce additional pages to us. The lawsuit also seeks materials provided to the FBI by local law enforcement. The FBI is withholding these documents, claiming they are categorically exempt from disclosure under FOIA. BIDEN FEMA SYSTEMICALLY WITHHELD DISASTER AID TO CONSERVATIVE VICTIMS As revelations of the Biden administration’s political use of the Justice Department multiply, we are also becoming aware that the administration was using other branches of government against its political opponents. Our Corruption Chronicles _blog reports []. Besides its lengthy history of incompetence, the federal agency created by Jimmy Carter to provide the nation with disaster relief singled out conservative victims and withheld aid to survivors who displayed signs and flags the agency’s liberal workforce disagreed with, including those supporting President Trump. The “textbook political discrimination against Americans in crisis [ uncovered by a Department of Homeland Security (DHS) investigation that found throughout the Biden administration the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA)—charged with helping people before, during and after disasters—systemically refused to visit the houses of politically conservative victims. “For years, FEMA employees under the Biden Administration intentionally delayed much-needed aid to Americans suffering from natural disasters on purely political grounds,” DHS Secretary Kristi Noem confirms. “They deliberately avoided houses displaying support for President Trump and the Second Amendment, illegally collected and stored information about survivors’ political beliefs, and failed to report their malicious behavior.” The investigation was conducted by the DHS Privacy Office and found that between 2021 and 2024 FEMA employees recorded the political beliefs of affected citizens in agency databases, and that the information was used to bypass or postpone aid to disaster survivors. Investigators determined that the conduct violates the Privacy Act of 1974 and other DHS data-handling rules intended to protect the First Amendments rights of all Americans. Here are some examples included in the report [] [ was made public last week. An October field note from Florida says, “Trump sign, no contact per leadership.” A September 2021 note in Pennsylvania reads, “...a lot of explicit political flags, posters, etc. ‘F— Joe Biden’ ‘MAGA 2024’ ‘Joe Biden Sucks’ ‘Trump 2024’ We do not recommend anyone visiting this location.” A Louisiana note from 2021 warns, “Homeowner had sign stated...this is trump country.” The prejudice first came to light after Hurricane Milton struck Florida’s Gulf Coast in October 2024, and a whistleblower revealed that FEMA employees were directed to bypass houses displaying political signs supporting then presidential candidate Trump. Biden’s FEMA administrator, Deanne Criswell, denied it was a systemic problem and even testified under oath before Congress that it was an isolated incident. The recent DHS probe contradicts Criswell’s assessment, finding that the abuses were widespread and occurred in the aftermath of multiple disasters dating back to Hurricane Ida in 2021. The report includes screenshots of a FEMA tool used to collect information that is supposed to be used to provide disaster survivor assistance. “The information collected included obviously protected information about individuals’ freedom of expression, such as campaign signs showing support for then-presidential candidate Donald Trump or political positions, such as supporting gun ownership, or indicating that an individual expressed support or disagreed with a political leader,” DHS investigators found. The report also says that internal FEMA communications show several supervisors and crew leaders told field teams to avoid or delay visits to homes displaying Trump campaign flags or other conservative symbols. Data taken from the agency’s disaster-relief software confirm skipped home visits, missing aid notifications as well as field notes citing political signs as reasons for not contacting victims. A U.S. map features instances in eight states between 2021 and 2024. The scathing report is simply the latest of many chronicling the lapses at FEMA, which is well known for its inefficiency in responding to disasters. The agency was merged into DHS after the 2001 terrorist attacks and has been failing the American people since Hurricane Katrina hit the Louisiana gulf coast two decades ago, killing more than 1,800 Americans and resulting in billions of dollars in property damage. “FEMA’s response was slow, ineffective, and bureaucratic,” DHS writes in an August announcement [] vowing to get the agency back on track. To ensure that the political discrimination under Biden does not happen again Noem has referred the probe’s findings to the Department of Justice (DOJ) for further investigation and potential prosecution and has canceled the door-to-door survey practice used to discriminate against Americans. “The prohibited collection of constitutionally protected information underscores a pattern of weaponizing federal power against Americans and abusing the trust placed in government institutions,” the DHS concludes in its report. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

body:

Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh's team. Have you noticed that only the weirdest and most far-right people are happy at the news of Kat's federal indictment? LibsofTikTok, one of Elon Musk's favorite transphobic accounts on Twitter, came out and ecstatically wrote **_"FAFO TIME"_** when referencing Kat's announcement the other day. Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/rdmAgEfDhKx4)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/pJyLOJZrVW3J)

---

name: MGP
subject: one last email
body:
| | Hi Peter, it’s Marie with one last note before we close the books on October.

If the last month of dysfunction in D.C. has shown us anything, it’s that everything is at stake in this race. And as the #1 most vulnerable Democrat in Congress, I can’t underscore the importance of defending everything we’ve worked for.

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/october-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118424434/579748428/140983856?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_251031_3_7&refcode2=ef655074-cdb6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjY1NTA3NC1jZGI2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZeCRfDIoS34aB_k-jxS_7nyyZShGvb1Uv13g3rCvP3A=)

I came to Congress promising that I would fight for working families and rural communities, and defend our democracy from extremists. I haven’t waivered, but I can’t do it alone.

It’s critical that we raise the last $2,129 of our end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight tonight to prove that we have the grassroots movement to protect our seat.

Will you help us get across the finish line by pitching in now? Any amount helps.

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/october-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118424435/579748429/140983856?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_251031_3_7&refcode2=ef655074-cdb6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjY1NTA3NC1jZGI2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZeCRfDIoS34aB_k-jxS_7nyyZShGvb1Uv13g3rCvP3A=)

Thank you for all of your support,

– Marie

---

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: People Over Politics
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100170937.172996.19&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15992)
#
# **People Over Politics**
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15993) Senator Hughes gathered lawmakers, advocates, union leaders, and community members [to share a simple message](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15994): People over politics!
* * *
**We should not have to choose between healthcare and making sure people have access to their SNAP benefits.**
* * *
We're asking for Republicans to choose to:
* Fund SNAP
* Extended the ACA tax credits
* Fund LIHEAP

**" This is a crisis that lies squarely on the shoulders of Republicans. We're here to say a simple message to them- put the people over the politics. There is nothing wrong with people feeding their families, heating their homes, or accessing quality healthcare. Put the people first."** **\- Senator Hughes -**
* * *
**Get Engaged ** [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15995) Donate or volunteer with your local food bank, [including Share Food Program](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15996) and Call Republican lawmakers and tell them to put people over politics
* * *
**Where to Access Food** If you, a loved one, or neighbor need help accessing food while SNAP benefits are unavailable, the following organizations and programs can help.
* Call 211 or visit [PA211.org](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15997) to find local food banks and other food assistance programs
* [Feeding Pennsylvania](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15998)
* [Share Food Program](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15996)
* [Philabundance](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15999)
* [City of Philadelphia Food and Meal Finder ](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15983)
* [Montgomery County Food Resources ](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15985)

**If you have questions or concerns, call our district office at 215-879-7777.** [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170937.172996.19&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15986)
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

body:
Prices Double from $100 to $200 After November 1st

No images? Click here https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-e-qkidldk-hhlljjcji-m/

Click Here for More Information [http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/c5KcBYI-M_yMe8Q0MZ6AaYik-plttCb95pJXHfiW3qxukP56jN0fmZIzszszwTDmY77Io-wODwLFg2KHE99a8w5MRqlYHjcoakcHwBJWaW7GU0GMURPBt0ZJxBtI3e-fSQCTHI5229Rt85vHyrnu_kiOL1tmehlI0UFXa0FlboZuiXIqn4JmSOjaQXHlVj2M3DMhi41fxPY4XuPxq66s4NqsAF5flr-e76DdlrTxk_lgMEqSgCk_eF22SRhIuhXpo53cq5nU-P86MeeQxekJ/mPzT9YYCR13KLyMsjCvw0_BLETP2z4sc/12] Click Here to Register [http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/s5WEMCkyxj3qqGrjKoEGerFwpJ77akWVGYAhu1kKskKCKBcnbY7HTdvAzh7H5CfRqjmd59Xo_A7lduuRoYlPeo1ypiXLQMp1X96WJJF3X-zeCNG3woQlvV5gy_l4p_z6FX_AAnLciyDkJG2YvtrmPCBo5LmGf71VowlneoN3r4EeY1W02PL5YO5wU8gzGw6QwCawqY77hcrDx3LrNArTzdkh7HSkArzccPeyVNFQJua3IAzfZvSs88Ab6fjiiE1kinsfFBqgyByjBi5icKx2Ilq5bVxFGWF4/tAeYGaK6SgCeZ5WiRbhjDqcoGa-rZJZj/12]

Dear Hoosier Republican,

⏰ Time is almost up! ⏰

Last call for Early Bird tickets to Congress of Counties is only two days away!

November 1st will be your last chance to save $100 on tickets before prices double!

Don’t wait—join Governor Mike Braun and fellow Republican leaders, organizers, and volunteers from across the state as we converge in French Lick, February 20th, to prepare for the battles ahead!

>From hands-on campaign workshops to strategy sessions with party leaders, this is where our winning team takes shape!

Grassroots victories don’t happen by accident; they’re built by committed conservatives who show up ready to learn and lead, and that’s exactly what Congress of Counties is all about!

Visit indiana.g [https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.createsend.com/campaigns/design/index/17F55DB19A2D8F422540EF23F30FEDED/s#]op for details and registration, or reach out to our team at rsvp@indiana.gop with any questions.

Hope to see you there!

Lana Keesling

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: They lied about abortion PreBorn is telling the truth
body:
Let me be blunt. You are being lied to.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpmdfgbbhgm3g9ljvcos804ks2ab58nc8t3j5og8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj4c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American,Let me be blunt.You are being lied to.They told you abortion was healthcare.
That it was safe. That it was rare. That it was compassionate.But today, more than 60 percent of abortions happen through a pill. Taken in silence. Usually at home. Often without a doctor. Often without the woman truly understanding what she is doing.The damage is staggering. To the baby. To the mother. To the culture.And most people are staying quiet.But one organization is not. That is why I am standing with PreBorn!
---
[**PreBorn! is doing what matters. They are saving lives. Not by yelling louder. Not through politics. But through love, truth, and real help.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zotgvjta1ggs407lqirfki6r6s4hv94irlqadct0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj4c5h2bs)

---
**They offer free ultrasounds to women in crisis.** They meet them where they are. They show them the reality of life inside the womb. **They walk with those women for up to two years after the baby is born.** **They share the Gospel.** They do not abandon women. They stay.Here is what stopped me. It costs just $28 to provide a free ultrasound.That is it.
$28 to help save a baby's life.
$140 to help rescue five.**[_Click here to give now_ _to support this incredible work >>_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeu936uvuh8uoqfkg2aisb4j7jtiqehbostid8vg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj4c5h2bs)_ _** You and I both know the abortion industry has everything on its side. The media. The government. The money. The silence of people who should speak up.But we still have the truth.
We still have a voice.
And we still have the ability to act.If you want to fight back against a culture of death, this is how you do it. In a real and practical way.Support PreBorn!
Give what you can.
Help save a life today.Sincerely,
Tucker Carlson
