name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znliss1lhlekdqm1unh1945du9s31fucoang021o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6chh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3c39r94sjnat505bs4goikmt2ahj4nk4u7j01r0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6chh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1jg2596kp1e1m4ts5uconup5e84mb8af8pjggo8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6chh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4vhv9lnl4odnppf39ud831dju6l0kc0diajul98_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6chh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgkcunmq7m778j5rd6uerec7fpq0alaj2kn7co6o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6chh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlreuma0n54fsp2ham5ro3apicmr5vq0q507lo1g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zthpqiamoimocn8eirm1h40dmfl6k39mlp8umhmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv5rgnicq46d1vb8424i1qm3t387t1c98d37utco_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6chh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1mgute4fbon8i5p1t39png4i8rbuidorbb9bku8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6chh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: They lied about abortion PreBorn is telling the truth
body:
Let me be blunt. You are being lied to.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7nr5stkosni8s2ob9i2g6jmdqe1odllr80s4288_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6c9h2bs)
---
Fellow American,Let me be blunt.You are being lied to.They told you abortion was healthcare.
That it was safe. That it was rare. That it was compassionate.But today, more than 60 percent of abortions happen through a pill. Taken in silence. Usually at home. Often without a doctor. Often without the woman truly understanding what she is doing.The damage is staggering. To the baby. To the mother. To the culture.And most people are staying quiet.But one organization is not. That is why I am standing with PreBorn!
---
[**PreBorn! is doing what matters. They are saving lives. Not by yelling louder. Not through politics. But through love, truth, and real help.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd40q97vrkc03pps931f4gs2hk6b8eojq47g44do_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6c9h2bs)

---
**They offer free ultrasounds to women in crisis.** They meet them where they are. They show them the reality of life inside the womb. **They walk with those women for up to two years after the baby is born.** **They share the Gospel.** They do not abandon women. They stay.Here is what stopped me. It costs just $28 to provide a free ultrasound.That is it.
$28 to help save a baby's life.
$140 to help rescue five.**[_Click here to give now_ _to support this incredible work >>_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfun9nogpsu6j9aiuoon4ghmnqji0t455vu3h148_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj6c9h2bs)_ _** You and I both know the abortion industry has everything on its side. The media. The government. The money. The silence of people who should speak up.But we still have the truth.
We still have a voice.
And we still have the ability to act.If you want to fight back against a culture of death, this is how you do it. In a real and practical way.Support PreBorn!
Give what you can.
Help save a life today.Sincerely,
Tucker Carlson

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9c5ero69p1k2upfll3bu7j5c7jec6sofo1l7hmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj5c5h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1k51o5248ffn3uf0953upqcfhbq42neftv4rfcg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj5c5h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh351v56iefuf3rn5hk01mp1m01j3ullk5q89930_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj5c5h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zontseg2aptb64j09e6cveotq0b96forh2is61jo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj5c5h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpmc0ssje61ic4346bm9a2r9i1gfb974emqknvq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj5c5h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z89h7l5ihonvkhng6hb2kj9hd033at1jib4342r0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj5c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgkju3ddrisdl5lirjao7aila07il5k0g9d7471g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj5c5h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlbmj71mjoap845q2b9ii2hltgcm5u1h5vqcqrmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj5c5h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2r5cg3dn1krb70771c4dnnlmbr6brhv3ens6k9o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj5c5h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbfbi5ronfjmlh5k6qjnce27lei98dg5g68r94do_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie4p34c1h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgisgidnq9p16k966kipjt2pk9ppr471c11o1cq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie4p34c1h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7i1ctda8t1a4703mebje4eftr5709nm4g9lher8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie4p34c1h2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8r1el6coci29esv0b6fa8vcecafi1f17uislg88_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie4p34c1h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvm3m9f1qfle3vrk0i2shebea9gb7s65qmptu9b8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie4p34c1h2bs)

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1h47v0h6r3jc2tcan1v2hb0vnde1dr0bjkgsk3o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshim8pb0chg648d245p25oh4cthm8p74s9i68o324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm9r2mkdqb9aoqeaorojemo4vtp0ktphbd7r4ko8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie4p34c1h2bs)_

name: Rep. Michael Cloud
subject: Do you support Rico Charges against Soros
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cloud for Congress
body:
MAGA needs to open this and VOTE

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zohnecp7cb748kds9hperajefpljg2e3j4ql7mu8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie8oj0slh2bs)

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: They lied about abortion PreBorn is telling the truth
body:
Let me be blunt. You are being lied to.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zod37188u6qi7tkc3hton00udtk6l1kltffkouvg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie4p32cph2bs)
---
Fellow American,Let me be blunt.You are being lied to.They told you abortion was healthcare.
That it was safe. That it was rare. That it was compassionate.But today, more than 60 percent of abortions happen through a pill. Taken in silence. Usually at home. Often without a doctor. Often without the woman truly understanding what she is doing.The damage is staggering. To the baby. To the mother. To the culture.And most people are staying quiet.But one organization is not. That is why I am standing with PreBorn!
---
[**PreBorn! is doing what matters. They are saving lives. Not by yelling louder. Not through politics. But through love, truth, and real help.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkn1n0b26mptfb1k47o522fj04ucfi3ov9m66dt8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie4p32cph2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6motgdcfll0v1js7cdu5d8dku3nlvomhvusm61o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie4p32cph2bs)
---
**They offer free ultrasounds to women in crisis.** They meet them where they are. They show them the reality of life inside the womb. **They walk with those women for up to two years after the baby is born.** **They share the Gospel.** They do not abandon women. They stay.Here is what stopped me. It costs just $28 to provide a free ultrasound.That is it.
$28 to help save a baby's life.
$140 to help rescue five.**[_Click here to give now_ _to support this incredible work >>_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zl2lppvskemtablv55m7o74ag8tr7k1nhie33eq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie4p32cph2bs)_ _** You and I both know the abortion industry has everything on its side. The media. The government. The money. The silence of people who should speak up.But we still have the truth.
We still have a voice.
And we still have the ability to act.If you want to fight back against a culture of death, this is how you do it. In a real and practical way.Support PreBorn!
Give what you can.
Help save a life today.Sincerely,
Tucker Carlson
---

| |
# **🚨 Town Hall in One Hour 🚨**
---
|
---
I cannot wait to see you at my upcoming town hall!

Whether it is the current gerrymandering push, rising utility bills, grocery trips getting more and more expensive, inaccessible child care or housing instability -- **we know there are a whole lot of problems that need fixing. **

It is an honor to work alongside our District 46 community in an effort to create an idea that works for all, and I am confident that the way we do that is **together. **

Thank you in advance for your time, your energy and for using your voice to create change.
* * *
---
# Navigating the Government Shutdown
Despite yesterday's court order aimed at releasing funds for SNAP, far too much uncertainty continues to exist for the over 600,000 Hoosiers who rely on food assistance programs to put food on their table.

Too much is demanded of Hoosiers too often.

Hoosiers have to navigate skyrocketing utility bills, decreased child care access and grocery carts that get more and more unaffordable.

And now hundreds of thousands have to keep up with federal court filings to find out if they are going to be able to afford their Sunday grocery trip.

**This is an unacceptable way to treat the folks who call this state home. **

It is unacceptable that our state leaders have done nothing, have said nothing and continue to be focused on playing politics instead of ensuring Hoosier families are fed.

Our community always step up when needed. I know it will continue to do so in the days ahead.

I am so grateful to the folks who care so deeply for our Indy community every day, but especially in times like these.
**Click the handout below for more information about the government shutdown and additional resources**
---
| | | | [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=275dbbfa5fcd856066a33bb8a7aec94f01984721aa2127dd281f9c801046bed9a6251cc575929747fa7664a7733427c78bf7bf0de93b04fa)
---
| | [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=275dbbfa5fcd856066a33bb8a7aec94f01984721aa2127dd281f9c801046bed9a6251cc575929747fa7664a7733427c78bf7bf0de93b04fa)
---

* * *
---
| | |
# **Gov. Braun Officially Calls Special Session in Effort to Rig Congressional Maps**
---
| | |
---
**Read my full statement on the impending illegitimate session below ⬇️** State Senator Andrea Hunley (D-Indianapolis) expressed dismay that the General Assembly will consider rigging Indiana's congressional maps to appease the Trump Administration. "We have a standing process rooted in precedent where we update our maps to reflect changes in the census," said Hunley. "There is no new data. If we illegitimately change our maps now for one man, where does that end?" Hunley went on to say that the intentional targeting of diverse communities by the gerrymandering plot needs to be called out. "We know that any new maps would work to diminish the voices of people throughout our state, especially Black and Brown voters," said Hunley. "This is a racist power grab to silence voters who look like me, plain and simple." Congressional Districts one and seven include Lake and Marion counties, the [two most diverse counties in the state](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=275dbbfa5fcd8560ba3b0d2e815585b711bcd1ba0b9fd70c00751278d8083fd9dccbd6387f5399cdfae67a57ed3f60ff3d29bdf005bbc49f), and Hunley stressed that any new map would rob these communities of the fair representation they are entitled to. "This is no different than redlining or putting interstates through our communities," said Hunley. "Our ancestors met the moment time and time again; it is our turn to do the same." Hunley reiterated that she is committed to pursuing every legal avenue to stop the map-rigging scheme and guarantee fair representation for Hoosiers throughout Indiana. "As a sixth-generation Hoosier, raising seventh-generation Hoosiers, I refuse to stand idly by and see my daughters inherit a world where we have lost hard-fought progress," said Hunley. With the [majority of Hoosiers opposed to the idea of Indiana's state legislature stealing congressional seats at the command of the White House,](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=275dbbfa5fcd85608a7eda6ebf2c6f841e66f96a8f2e3c13fc4115faa47f01c881506fc2746b398c494a5e72a8198c59d2be864eabdf1a97) Hunley is confident that people will not only show up throughout the special session process, but hold their elected officials accountable when the time comes. "We have seen thousands of people show up time and time again demanding that their elected officials remember that their job is to serve Hoosiers," said Hunley. "These folks will not forget if their state representatives, their state senators and their Governor sell them out for political favor with the president."
* * *
---
# **Give the Indiana Department of Education your feedback on School Accountability Plan**
**Did you know that Indiana has until the end of this year to redo the way it assesses a school's success?

Public comment is**** ****now open on proposed changes. **

Read the [second draft of the accountability framework for schools here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=275dbbfa5fcd856096c7f874c8b9cdac675ef968264213586b092f5b7fd187e9a06386f6d72c72fb9cafd75c2ce58a06548df1b8749edf6d). Give your [feedback online here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=275dbbfa5fcd856076547313d5012551cfe9ac0d75c075f8f294b62d0272a26ef33463f2ef8d13e694ba7b8444255f9503cdcb752d1a5632) by Nov. 17 or in person at 11 a.m. Nov. 17 in the history reference room at the Indiana State Library, 315 W. Ohio St. in Indianapolis.
---

"As a sixth-generation Hoosier, raising seventh-generation Hoosiers, I refuse to stand idly by and see my daughters inherit a world where we have lost hard-fought progress," said Hunley. With the Hunley is confident that people will not only show up throughout the special session process, but hold their elected officials accountable when the time comes. "We have seen thousands of people show up time and time again demanding that their elected officials remember that their job is to serve Hoosiers," said Hunley. "These folks will not forget if their state representatives, their state senators and their Governor sell them out for political favor with the president." Give the Indiana Department of Education your feedback on School Accountability Plan Did you know that Indiana has until the end of this year to redo the way it assesses a school's success? Public comment is** now open on proposed changes. Read the . Give your by Nov. 17 or in person at 11 a.m. Nov. 17 in the history reference room at the Indiana State Library, 315 W. Cardinal Blase Cupich of Chicago describes artificial intelligence (AI) as Pope Leo XIV’s “industrial revolution” at a Georgetown University forum Oct. 30, 2025. / Credit: Madalaine Elhabbal/CNA Washington, D.C. Newsroom, Oct 31, 2025 / 14:17 pm (CNA). Cardinal Blase Cupich of Chicago described artificial intelligence (AI) as Pope Leo XIV’s “industrial revolution” at a Georgetown University forum Oct. 30.The event, “Pope Leo XIV’s New Challenge and Moral Leadership on Poverty, Work, and Artificial Intelligence,” examined the impact of AI and the guidance provided by Catholic Social Teaching, as a part of the university’s Initiative on Catholic Social Thought and Public Life.

name: Jake Warner
subject: Supreme Court heard free speech case
body:
The fight to keep men out of women’s sports isn’t over.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd5ojv99guoo627rrocofulb8r3iuigtlfod2gg0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie2o71c1h2bs)
Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders.

This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values.

But Colorado law bans counselors from having private conversations with young clients that could help them regain comfort with their God-given sex--rather than pushing them one step closer to dangerous gender-transition drugs and surgeries.

Kaley has already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license.

This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors.

We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. We're excited the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments for this case on October 7th.

Will you stand with Kaley?

Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values.

[https://adflegal.org/support/chiles-case-statement/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze8a5835tcmbo5i78jqvn9rcaqvi9eau5da0509g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie2o71c1h2bs) For freedom, **Jake Warner** Senior Counsel

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: They lied about abortion PreBorn is telling the truth
body:
Let me be blunt. You are being lied to.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlrrq8fs8m8d9v7954vg2tvgo4iophhtt5dtfpeo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie2o76c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American,Let me be blunt.You are being lied to.They told you abortion was healthcare.
That it was safe. That it was rare. That it was compassionate.But today, more than 60 percent of abortions happen through a pill. Taken in silence. Usually at home. Often without a doctor. Often without the woman truly understanding what she is doing.The damage is staggering. To the baby. To the mother. To the culture.And most people are staying quiet.But one organization is not. That is why I am standing with PreBorn!
---
[**PreBorn! is doing what matters. They are saving lives. Not by yelling louder. Not through politics. But through love, truth, and real help.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf4g9ra4s8o4vceoq5u90u61i316d7d9oqna6ca0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie2o76c5h2bs)

They show them the reality of life inside the womb. **They walk with those women for up to two years after the baby is born.** **They share the Gospel.** They do not abandon women. We still have a voice.
And we still have the ability to act.If you want to fight back against a culture of death, this is how you do it. In a real and practical way.Support PreBorn!
Give what you can.
Help save a life today.Sincerely,
Tucker Carlson

I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsmvfdn7jua907n109l0vna2g1lbrqsborpd0fq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjieapr4c9h2bs) [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z327k9r5ou1dvdut0i3lr4u3kuih005q3ak5nifg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjieapr4c9h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgm81jb4iqkkuitq11i7lads6c57h366rk5tarmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjieapr4c9h2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z84gjp5bpfb5eng195eecrbfch1c4tpp3uqela4o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjieapr4c9h2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4deb82p5o2vc88j9nqvkof7rkdj0gufcmqsuuf8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjieapr4c9h2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9qiqaa1h6klcutjqso4amrvr0dijdtpn0m2vki8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjieapr4c9h2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---

name: INGOP
subject: Announcing our 2026 Convention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
As your Chairwoman and someone who began her public-service journey working shoulder-to-shoulder with grassroots, America First conservatives in Allen County, it is a special honor to announce that our 2026 Indiana Republican Convention will be held

No images? Click here https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-e-qkidkiy-hhlljjcji-k/

Announcing Our 2026 Convention

Dear Hoosier Republicans,

As your Chairwoman and someone who began her public-service journey working shoulder-to-shoulder with grassroots, America First conservatives in Allen County, it is a special honor to announce that our 2026 Indiana Republican Convention will be held in my hometown of Fort Wayne.

Next year’s convention is more than a gathering; it is the voice of the grassroots: the same Hoosier conservatives who transformed Indiana from a state that once voted for Barack Obama into a stronghold that has delivered three straight presidential victories for Donald J. Trump.

How did this happen? Hoosiers stepped up to shape our party’s direction, select strong leadership, and reaffirm that service is earned. They began electing conservative leaders who shared President Trump’s vision to shake up the status quo and make America great again. Here are the results, a testament to our county chairs and grassroots volunteers.

Today, our Governor is Mike Braun, a Main Street entrepreneur who created hundreds of Hoosier jobs, defeated a Democrat U.S. Senator, and then, unlike most politicians, recognized he could make an even greater impact serving as our Governor.

Our Lieutenant Governor is Micah Beckwith, a pastor and small-business owner who embodies the values that built our movement: faith, freedom, and hard work. From his years leading worship and mentoring young conservatives to his commitment to empowering local communities, Micah has become a trusted voice for the grassroots, and a tireless advocate for Hoosier agriculture.

We have an Attorney General in Todd Rokita, who, like President Trump, is a fighter. From standing up to federal overreach and defending Indiana’s laws, to protecting parents’ rights and safeguarding children from radical agendas, Todd has never backed down when conservative values are on the line. Particularly as he has defended Indiana's strong legislative actions in protecting life, defending girl's sports, and stopping the invasive DEI agenda.

Indiana is a stronger and more prosperous state because there is not a battle Todd Rokita is afraid to fight. And we may never again have an Attorney General so willing to risk everything to ensure Indiana remains a state that defends life, liberty, and the Constitution. Attorney General Rokita continues to prove that Hoosiers have a champion who fights, fights, fights, and wins for them every day.

We have a Secretary of State in Diego Morales, who has made election integrity his mission and delivered results. From day one, Diego has fought to ensure every legal vote counts and that Indiana’s elections remain secure, transparent, and trusted. He has strengthened voter-ID protections, expanded post-election audits, and built partnerships across the state so that Hoosiers can have confidence in the ballot box.

Liberals come after Diego because he’s doing something right, defending our elections and refusing to apologize for it. Diego Morales is battle-tested, and he will defeat Beau Bayh. Hoosiers will be forever grateful that he will end the current reboot of the liberal Bayh legacy.

State Treasurer Daniel Elliott has turned the office of Indiana’s chief investment officer into a model of conservative stewardship, delivering more than $1 billion in general fund investment earnings since taking office, with record returns in just the past year alone. Managing more than $16 billion in state assets, Daniel has prioritized Hoosier jobs, sound returns, and responsible growth, not the woke ESG investment trends pushed by liberal elites.

State Comptroller Elise Nieshalla has shown the same commitment to fiscal discipline and transparency. Under her leadership, Indiana continues to maintain its AAA credit rating and national reputation for sound financial management. Elise’s work proves that fiscal responsibility isn’t just a talking point in Indiana; it’s the Hoosier way of governing.

Finally, we have the best Congressional delegation in America, led by Senator Todd Young, Senator Jim Banks, and a team of America First conservative congressional fighters who have stood shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump to secure our southern border.

They’ve backed The One Big Beautiful Bill to cut taxes, lower costs, and help working families across Indiana. And today, they continue to stand with President Trump in supporting a clean continuing resolution to reopen the government, protect our economy, and keep America strong.

So next year, it will be my honor to welcome Governor Mike Braun, Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith, Attorney General Todd Rokita, Secretary of State Diego Morales, State Treasurer Daniel Elliott, and State Comptroller Elise Nieshalla to my hometown of Fort Wayne. I have no doubt our Republican Convention will showcase the strength of our grassroots, the quality of our America First candidates who want to Make America Great Again.

As always, thank you for being a part of our team, and please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.

Yours in service,

Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman

Governor Braun Calls Special Session on Redistricting

Following years of Democratic district manipulation, insistence that illegal aliens be counted towards Congressional representation, and flaws in the last census, Governor Braun has called a special session to fight back and ensure Hoosiers will not lose their voice in Washington.

“I am calling a special legislative session to protect Hoosiers from efforts in other states that seek to diminish their voice in Washington and ensure their representation in Congress is fair. I am also asking the legislature to conform Indiana's tax code with new federal tax provisions to ensure stability and certainty for taxpayers and tax preparers for 2026 filings.”

Governor Mike Braun via a press release [https://events.in.gov/event/gov-mike-braun-special-session]

Governor Braun Joins Secretary Noem to Highlight More Than 140 Illegal Alien Truck Drivers Arrested During DHS Operation Midway Blitz

Governor Mike Braun and DHS Secretary Kristi Noem announced that a joint 287(g) operation with Indiana State Police led to the arrest of 223 illegal aliens—146 of them truck drivers—on highways near the Illinois state line as part of Operation Midway Blitz. The arrests follow a string of fatal crashes involving illegal alien truck drivers, with many of those detained also facing charges for crimes including DUI, drug trafficking, assault, and child abuse.

“Indiana is the Crossroads of America, and that’s something we’re proud of — but it also means we must stay vigilant about those using our interstates for crime and thus endangering our communities. The safety of our state is our top priority, and we’ll keep working with our federal partners to keep Hoosiers — and Americans — safe.”

Governor Braun said via a press release [https://events.in.gov/event/gov-braun-joins-secretary-noem-to-highlight-more-than-140-illegal-alien-truck-drivers-arrested-during-dhs-operation-midway-blitz]

Governor Braun Announces IEDC President and Revives "Crossroads of America"

Governor Mike Braun announced the appointment of Josh Richardson as president of the Indiana Economic Development Corporation to lead efforts aligning workforce development with business growth and regional planning. Braun also announced that Indiana will reembrace its “Crossroads of America” identity, highlighting our state's central role in connecting people, industries, and opportunity across the nation."

“Josh brings a rare combination of economic insight and workforce experience. He understands that growth starts with people—and that the best way to strengthen Indiana’s economy is to make sure our employers, universities, and regional leaders are all moving in the same direction. I have full confidence in his ability to continue driving the state’s momentum and to create lasting opportunity for Hoosiers.”

Governor Braun said via a press release [https://events.in.gov/event/governor-braun-IEDC-president-crossroads-of-america-adoption]

Governor Braun Positions Indiana as Leader in American Drone Dominance

Governor Mike Braun signed an executive order creating the Indiana Initiative for Drone Dominance Task Force to position the state as a national leader in drone technology, manufacturing, and defense innovation. Developed in collaboration with Senator Todd Young, the initiative aligns with federal efforts to achieve American drone dominance and will unite government, industry, and universities to strengthen Indiana’s drone manufacturing supply chain, expand testing and training, and protect privacy and safety.

“Indiana has always stepped up to use our skills and labor to support America’s defense. Indiana’s advanced manufacturing capacity and our concentration of defense and research assets make us uniquely suited to lead in America’s pursuit of drone dominance, and this new Task Force will position Indiana as a national asset and drive innovation in this important sector.”

Governor Braun said via a press release [https://events.in.gov/event/gov-mike-braun-positions-indiana-as-leader-in-american-drone-dominance]

Chairwoman Keesling Completes Her 92 County Tour

Congress of Counties 2026

Click Here for More Information [http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/ycek62v7j3igMr-xrrBJi-8L08RjGlBYAVisamv_wHiTRsR5560b59e0K6wMsMed3pkfqgXRd5EkUwjnmasIu1R8q4Gg0-BWJyX8TclkmM6VS3BsNYWXinnOhjK5rm0VYdyolx5uzBgpqW3wjm5LuKrSrTPtzY8R_ORR54NfS-s6p5932coO3Ur5364_jmgmiwkuv8MGNuK5qWmsyCKLC5p3gR9JtvFZXy9dE5e5GGDvqaitJaBxEjXDHRJ-43SOfHXmayIjMaDQdc0P-UU/M_qqHzk9XkTw8X0bVqVzFm3KJCoTJsJI/12] Click Here to Register [http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/7S_sOJvegMt5UhJcQAKGLRFp8wXiU5lbKhJMbyGxRt5PjYXL_7pw4ckv3pjTjh8YuR9RZ2MwxytY5TMDqgUe-LieOp_Gb6QvL32mtZUlQ2kTY0sSWrIXzElIsnufFQaGiLM5WYeLrFM_6-yKsWfd5LDuR7xfEjkH5CXXWwQoCzkn_664dJTa9QhU8tpEsolf7e5JQzwBFK9nxzpHU7x42d4wAaGkCNSmUnuetg9MNsm6pvqP132ED_4J2gzcoXqoPZPvZ7u0IoSqrtdwaMzibLmMmaoiPZ4/EravEEHK8vzS31iu4ISLQWl8IzXuG-TH/12]

November 1st is the last day to purchase your half-off early bird tickets; don't miss out!

Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Fall Semester

📱 News You Can Use

Governor Mike Braun highlighted [https://events.in.gov/event/gov-mike-braun-highlights-growing-indiana-economy-in-readi-stops-celebrates-major-investments-in-hoosier-workforce-jobs] Indiana’s status as one of 15 states with an expanding economy this week, with stops at two READI sites in Churubusco and the future Spartan Square in Connersville, as well as two jobs-and-wages events celebrating a $5 million investment in the Hoosier manufacturing workforce by Caterpillar in Lafayette and the groundbreaking of a new HarperCollins facility that will create 412 permanent Hoosier jobs.

Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith welcomed [https://x.com/LGMicahBeckwith/status/1983983527462105145] Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins to Indiana for the National FFA Conference. Recently, President Trump announced a deal where China will buy soybeans, sorghum, and hardwood from the U.S., including Indiana.

Secretary Diego Morales warned [https://events.in.gov/event/secretary-of-state-diego-morales-warns-hoosiers-scammers-offer-tricks-not-treats?utm_campaign=widget&utm_medium=widget&utm_source=State+of+Indiana] Hoosiers to stay alert for scammers impersonating officials or financial experts as Halloween approaches. Morales said his office is working to protect Hoosiers’ hard-earned money and urged everyone to verify investments and report suspicious activity.

Treasurer Daniel Elliott thanked [https://x.com/TOS_Elliott/status/1983180468641210690] Governor Braun for honoring Indiana’s first responders, noting his own experience as the son of a volunteer firefighter and his work overseeing Indiana’s 911 system alongside the State Police. Elliott said he witnesses the dedication and service of first responders every day.

Comptroller Elise Nieshalla reiterated [https://x.com/Elise_Nieshalla/status/1982922941412307355] her support for redistricting to combat the unfair advantages held by Democrats in Congress and called on Republican leaders to support efforts to ensure only US citizens are allowed to vote.

Attorney General Todd Rokita partnered [https://events.in.gov/event/colts-legend-jeff-saturday-teams-up-with-indianaunclaimedgov-to-snap-missing-money-back-to-rightful-owners?utm_campaign=widget&utm_medium=widget&utm_source=State+of+Indiana] with Colts legend Jeff Saturday to promote IndianaUnclaimed.gov and help Hoosiers reclaim missing money. Rokita said that teaming up with a respected hometown hero will boost awareness of unclaimed property, with more than $77 million already returned to rightful owners in 2025.

Senator Todd Young praised [https://www.young.senate.gov/newsroom/press-releases/young-statement-on-governor-brauns-executive-order-establishing-indiana-drone-taskforce/] Governor Mike Braun’s new executive order creating Indiana’s Drone Task Force, developed in partnership with Young’s office. Young said the initiative will position Indiana as a national leader in drone innovation and manufacturing, strengthening both the economy and national security.

Senator Jim Banks met [https://x.com/SenatorBanks/status/1983899208072503514] with fellow Hoosier Vice Admiral Rich Correll in Washington. They discussed the importance of Crane and Indiana’s leadership in hypersonics. Banks said he is looking forward to supporting his nomination to lead U.S. Strategic Command.

Congressman Rudy Yakym celebrated [https://x.com/RepRudyYakym/status/1983251688489369694] First Responders Day by honoring the men and women who risk their lives to protect others. He encouraged Hoosiers to take a moment to thank these heroes for keeping communities safe.

Congressman Marlin Stutzman criticized [https://x.com/RepStutzman/status/1984260269921726642] Democrats for the ongoing “Schumer Shutdown,” saying Americans are facing real hardships this Halloween. He urged Congress to stop using those in need as leverage and reopen the government.

Congressman Jim Baird hosted [https://baird.house.gov/news/documentsingle.aspx?DocumentID=2504] U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins and Indiana agriculture leaders for a farm tour at Everett Farms in Putnam County. Baird thanked Secretary Rollins and President Trump for supporting Hoosier farmers, highlighting Indiana’s vital role in American agriculture and ongoing efforts to strengthen the state’s farming industry.

Congresswoman Victoria Spartz celebrated [https://x.com/RepSpartz/status/1983252860713292078] National First Responders Day by thanking the men and women across Indiana’s 5th District who courageously serve and protect their communities every day.

Congressman Jefferson Shreve published [https://shreve.house.gov/media/press-releases/icymi-rep-shreves-op-ed-washington-examiner-billions-us-dollars-are-being-lost] an op-ed in the Washington Examiner outlining his efforts to combat foreign scams draining billions from Americans. Shreve highlighted his bipartisan STOP Scams Caucus, new legislation, and federal task force to protect Hoosiers from cyber fraud and strengthen national security.

Congressman Mark Messmer joined [https://messmer.house.gov/news/documentsingle.aspx?DocumentID=188] Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins and Indiana leaders for a farm tour showcasing the state’s agricultural innovation. Messmer said he looks forward to continuing to work with the Trump Administration to support Hoosier family farmers and strengthen Indiana’s role in American agriculture.

Congresswoman Erin Houchin criticized [https://x.com/RepHouchin/status/1983988164474892626] Democrats for the ongoing government shutdown, warning that 40 million Americans could lose SNAP benefits starting November 1. She said families are paying the price for Washington’s failure to govern responsibly.

Upcoming Events

November 4: Bartholomew County Republican Party Fall (Hot Potato) Dinner [https://indiana.gop/event/bartholomew-county-republican-party-fall-hot-potato-dinner/]

November 6: 29th Annual Henry County Republican Club Student Speech Contest [https://indiana.gop/event/29th-annual-henry-county-republican-club-student-speech-contest/]

clean_body: As your Chairwoman and someone who began her public-service journey working shoulder-to-shoulder with grassroots, America First conservatives in Allen County, it is a special honor to announce that our 2026 Indiana Republican Convention will be held No images? Click here Announcing Our 2026 Convention Dear Hoosier Republicans, As your Chairwoman and someone who began her public-service journey working shoulder-to-shoulder with grassroots, America First conservatives in Allen County, it is a special honor to announce that our 2026 Indiana Republican Convention will be held in my hometown of Fort Wayne. Next year’s convention is more than a gathering; it is the voice of the grassroots: the same Hoosier conservatives who transformed Indiana from a state that once voted for Barack Obama into a stronghold that has delivered three straight presidential victories for Donald J. Trump. How did this happen? Hoosiers stepped up to shape our party’s direction, select strong leadership, and reaffirm that service is earned. They began electing conservative leaders who shared President Trump’s vision to shake up the status quo and make America great again. Here are the results, a testament to our county chairs and grassroots volunteers. Today, our Governor is Mike Braun, a Main Street entrepreneur who created hundreds of Hoosier jobs, defeated a Democrat U.S. Senator, and then, unlike most politicians, recognized he could make an even greater impact serving as our Governor. Our Lieutenant Governor is Micah Beckwith, a pastor and small-business owner who embodies the values that built our movement: faith, freedom, and hard work. From his years leading worship and mentoring young conservatives to his commitment to empowering local communities, Micah has become a trusted voice for the grassroots, and a tireless advocate for Hoosier agriculture. We have an Attorney General in Todd Rokita, who, like President Trump, is a fighter. From standing up to federal overreach and defending Indiana’s laws, to protecting parents’ rights and safeguarding children from radical agendas, Todd has never backed down when conservative values are on the line. Particularly as he has defended Indiana's strong legislative actions in protecting life, defending girl's sports, and stopping the invasive DEI agenda. Indiana is a stronger and more prosperous state because there is not a battle Todd Rokita is afraid to fight. And we may never again have an Attorney General so willing to risk everything to ensure Indiana remains a state that defends life, liberty, and the Constitution. Attorney General Rokita continues to prove that Hoosiers have a champion who fights, fights, fights, and wins for them every day. We have a Secretary of State in Diego Morales, who has made election integrity his mission and delivered results. From day one, Diego has fought to ensure every legal vote counts and that Indiana’s elections remain secure, transparent, and trusted. He has strengthened voter-ID protections, expanded post-election audits, and built partnerships across the state so that Hoosiers can have confidence in the ballot box. Liberals come after Diego because he’s doing something right, defending our elections and refusing to apologize for it. Diego Morales is battle-tested, and he will defeat Beau Bayh. Hoosiers will be forever grateful that he will end the current reboot of the liberal Bayh legacy. State Treasurer Daniel Elliott has turned the office of Indiana’s chief investment officer into a model of conservative stewardship, delivering more than $1 billion in general fund investment earnings since taking office, with record returns in just the past year alone. Managing more than $16 billion in state assets, Daniel has prioritized Hoosier jobs, sound returns, and responsible growth, not the woke ESG investment trends pushed by liberal elites. State Comptroller Elise Nieshalla has shown the same commitment to fiscal discipline and transparency. Under her leadership, Indiana continues to maintain its AAA credit rating and national reputation for sound financial management. Elise’s work proves that fiscal responsibility isn’t just a talking point in Indiana; it’s the Hoosier way of governing. Finally, we have the best Congressional delegation in America, led by Senator Todd Young, Senator Jim Banks, and a team of America First conservative congressional fighters who have stood shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump to secure our southern border. They’ve backed The One Big Beautiful Bill to cut taxes, lower costs, and help working families across Indiana. And today, they continue to stand with President Trump in supporting a clean continuing resolution to reopen the government, protect our economy, and keep America strong. So next year, it will be my honor to welcome Governor Mike Braun, Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith, Attorney General Todd Rokita, Secretary of State Diego Morales, State Treasurer Daniel Elliott, and State Comptroller Elise Nieshalla to my hometown of Fort Wayne. I have no doubt our Republican Convention will showcase the strength of our grassroots, the quality of our America First candidates who want to Make America Great Again. As always, thank you for being a part of our team, and please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with. Yours in service, Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman Governor Braun Calls Special Session on Redistricting Following years of Democratic district manipulation, insistence that illegal aliens be counted towards Congressional representation, and flaws in the last census, Governor Braun has called a special session to fight back and ensure Hoosiers will not lose their voice in Washington. “I am calling a special legislative session to protect Hoosiers from efforts in other states that seek to diminish their voice in Washington and ensure their representation in Congress is fair. I am also asking the legislature to conform Indiana's tax code with new federal tax provisions to ensure stability and certainty for taxpayers and tax preparers for 2026 filings.” Governor Mike Braun via a press release [] Governor Braun Joins Secretary Noem to Highlight More Than 140 Illegal Alien Truck Drivers Arrested During DHS Operation Midway Blitz Governor Mike Braun and DHS Secretary Kristi Noem announced that a joint 287(g) operation with Indiana State Police led to the arrest of 223 illegal aliens—146 of them truck drivers—on highways near the Illinois state line as part of Operation Midway Blitz. The arrests follow a string of fatal crashes involving illegal alien truck drivers, with many of those detained also facing charges for crimes including DUI, drug trafficking, assault, and child abuse. “Indiana is the Crossroads of America, and that’s something we’re proud of — but it also means we must stay vigilant about those using our interstates for crime and thus endangering our communities. The safety of our state is our top priority, and we’ll keep working with our federal partners to keep Hoosiers — and Americans — safe.” Governor Braun said via a press release [] Governor Braun Announces IEDC President and Revives "Crossroads of America" Governor Mike Braun announced the appointment of Josh Richardson as president of the Indiana Economic Development Corporation to lead efforts aligning workforce development with business growth and regional planning. Braun also announced that Indiana will reembrace its “Crossroads of America” identity, highlighting our state's central role in connecting people, industries, and opportunity across the nation." “Josh brings a rare combination of economic insight and workforce experience. He understands that growth starts with people—and that the best way to strengthen Indiana’s economy is to make sure our employers, universities, and regional leaders are all moving in the same direction. I have full confidence in his ability to continue driving the state’s momentum and to create lasting opportunity for Hoosiers.” Governor Braun said via a press release [] Governor Braun Positions Indiana as Leader in American Drone Dominance Governor Mike Braun signed an executive order creating the Indiana Initiative for Drone Dominance Task Force to position the state as a national leader in drone technology, manufacturing, and defense innovation. Developed in collaboration with Senator Todd Young, the initiative aligns with federal efforts to achieve American drone dominance and will unite government, industry, and universities to strengthen Indiana’s drone manufacturing supply chain, expand testing and training, and protect privacy and safety. “Indiana has always stepped up to use our skills and labor to support America’s defense. Indiana’s advanced manufacturing capacity and our concentration of defense and research assets make us uniquely suited to lead in America’s pursuit of drone dominance, and this new Task Force will position Indiana as a national asset and drive innovation in this important sector.” Governor Braun said via a press release [] Chairwoman Keesling Completes Her 92 County Tour Congress of Counties 2026 Click Here for More Information [] Click Here to Register [] November 1st is the last day to purchase your half-off early bird tickets; don't miss out! Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Fall Semester 📱 News You Can Use Governor Mike Braun highlighted [] Indiana’s status as one of 15 states with an expanding economy this week, with stops at two READI sites in Churubusco and the future Spartan Square in Connersville, as well as two jobs-and-wages events celebrating a $5 million investment in the Hoosier manufacturing workforce by Caterpillar in Lafayette and the groundbreaking of a new HarperCollins facility that will create 412 permanent Hoosier jobs. Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith welcomed [] Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins to Indiana for the National FFA Conference. Recently, President Trump announced a deal where China will buy soybeans, sorghum, and hardwood from the U.S., including Indiana. Secretary Diego Morales warned [] Hoosiers to stay alert for scammers impersonating officials or financial experts as Halloween approaches. Morales said his office is working to protect Hoosiers’ hard-earned money and urged everyone to verify investments and report suspicious activity. Treasurer Daniel Elliott thanked [] Governor Braun for honoring Indiana’s first responders, noting his own experience as the son of a volunteer firefighter and his work overseeing Indiana’s 911 system alongside the State Police. Elliott said he witnesses the dedication and service of first responders every day. Comptroller Elise Nieshalla reiterated [] her support for redistricting to combat the unfair advantages held by Democrats in Congress and called on Republican leaders to support efforts to ensure only US citizens are allowed to vote. Attorney General Todd Rokita partnered [] with Colts legend Jeff Saturday to promote IndianaUnclaimed.gov and help Hoosiers reclaim missing money. Rokita said that teaming up with a respected hometown hero will boost awareness of unclaimed property, with more than $77 million already returned to rightful owners in 2025. Senator Todd Young praised [] Governor Mike Braun’s new executive order creating Indiana’s Drone Task Force, developed in partnership with Young’s office. Young said the initiative will position Indiana as a national leader in drone innovation and manufacturing, strengthening both the economy and national security. Senator Jim Banks met [] with fellow Hoosier Vice Admiral Rich Correll in Washington. They discussed the importance of Crane and Indiana’s leadership in hypersonics. Banks said he is looking forward to supporting his nomination to lead U.S. Strategic Command. Congressman Rudy Yakym celebrated [] First Responders Day by honoring the men and women who risk their lives to protect others. He encouraged Hoosiers to take a moment to thank these heroes for keeping communities safe. Congressman Marlin Stutzman criticized [] Democrats for the ongoing “Schumer Shutdown,” saying Americans are facing real hardships this Halloween. He urged Congress to stop using those in need as leverage and reopen the government. Congressman Jim Baird hosted [] U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins and Indiana agriculture leaders for a farm tour at Everett Farms in Putnam County. Baird thanked Secretary Rollins and President Trump for supporting Hoosier farmers, highlighting Indiana’s vital role in American agriculture and ongoing efforts to strengthen the state’s farming industry. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz celebrated [] National First Responders Day by thanking the men and women across Indiana’s 5th District who courageously serve and protect their communities every day. Congressman Jefferson Shreve published [] an op-ed in the Washington Examiner outlining his efforts to combat foreign scams draining billions from Americans. Shreve highlighted his bipartisan STOP Scams Caucus, new legislation, and federal task force to protect Hoosiers from cyber fraud and strengthen national security. Congressman Mark Messmer joined [] Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins and Indiana leaders for a farm tour showcasing the state’s agricultural innovation. Messmer said he looks forward to continuing to work with the Trump Administration to support Hoosier family farmers and strengthen Indiana’s role in American agriculture. Congresswoman Erin Houchin criticized [] Democrats for the ongoing government shutdown, warning that 40 million Americans could lose SNAP benefits starting November 1. She said families are paying the price for Washington’s failure to govern responsibly. Upcoming Events November 4: Bartholomew County Republican Party Fall (Hot Potato) Dinner [] November 6: 29th Annual Henry County Republican Club Student Speech Contest [] November 7: Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner [] November 7: Ohio County Republican Party Lincoln Day Dinner [] November 8: Clark County Chairman’s Breakfast [] November 8: Porter County Republican Reagan Gala [] November 10: Allen County Reagan Bean Dinner [] November 10: Owen County Fireside Chat [] November 12: Randolph County Lincoln Day Dinner [] November 12: Clark County Elise Nieshalla Regional Delegate Meet & Greet [] November 17: Kosciusko County GOP Hall of Fame Banquet [] November 25: Shelby County Republican Fall Dinner [] December 4: Vigo County Christmas Dinner [] December 6: Clark County Republican Women Annual Christmas Dinner [] February 20: Congress of Counties 2026 [] March 7: Carroll County Lincoln Day Dinner [] April 10: Dearborn County Lincoln Day Dinner [] June 19: Indiana Republican State Convention 2026 [] Click Here to Learn more about Governor Braun's Administrative Orders, Policy Proposals, and Leadership Appointments [] [] PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4h286j1t4gb2ml4ekmiaqq7d3jpn6jhimjp2qj8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie1ob1cjh2bs) [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2vqljomg2c7ohefivgck3j08hun1f3s9eiqe3gg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie1ob1cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2l00f1pqdm7sr829u1fuj2uetat0ra0ibm7ukoo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie1ob1cjh2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp1tifuplg4lmas8u8j9cio6lsbamr8hs8117l48_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie1ob1cjh2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5i7lf3lv8cgmn6q2tnf1966o45pq6c9q4a3tmrg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie1ob1cjh2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt8om83hcuvnf8hq4rnaa2nbpcpa299ph4r35cco_rp22sh2s8i6eor4cjie1ob1cjh2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---

Over the last six years, the Farm Team has led to hundreds of Conservative candidates being elected to local office, and our team is prepared to continue these efforts.Join the Farm Team by going to [wisgop.org/farm-team/](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qktyuty-didthutlhu-y/) and joining the grassroots movement!-Team WisGOP **Special Message from Don Trump Jr.** [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qktyuty-didthutlhu-j/) Time is ticking to become a Republican poll worker! Sign up below and join the team that will ensure Wisconsin elections are safe and secure! [BECOME A REPUBLICAN POLL WORKER](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qktyuty-didthutlhu-t/) **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qktyuty-didthutlhu-i/) **Become a Poll Worker!**
Every two years, the Republican Party of Wisconsin submits poll workers to municipalities across the state. These 2 year appointments will be critical to keeping the 2026 elections safe and secure. Learn more about being a poll worker by signing up for a training below! [ATTEND A POLL WORKER TRAINING](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qktyuty-didthutlhu-d/)

| SHOCKING FBI REPORT: China Attacks U.S. Power Grid | **SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. POWER GRID** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=742d6ada93b7987cb0a9e8cb6067eb6a479445847ddf036d7f8d08856fe1babf5e0288aa1d21819524f7b812c02b07e83dfb5566ac09d933e508518b1e1dcff5) **National Security Reports China's Attacks On Critical U.S. Electric Grid, Food Supply and Water Systems** The FBI warns that China has gained access to electric companies throughout the U.S., and experts are now urging Americans to protect their homes. A new alarming report reveals over 70 attacks on America's power grid in just one year, and these are calculated strikes designed to weaken our nation's most essential lifeline. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **Our crumbling electric grid.** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months without electricity, food or clean water? It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's critical infrastructure. [**That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=742d6ada93b7987cb0a9e8cb6067eb6a479445847ddf036d7f8d08856fe1babf5e0288aa1d21819524f7b812c02b07e83dfb5566ac09d933e508518b1e1dcff5) Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=742d6ada93b7987cb0a9e8cb6067eb6a479445847ddf036d7f8d08856fe1babf5e0288aa1d21819524f7b812c02b07e83dfb5566ac09d933e508518b1e1dcff5). THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. **And never needs gas, ever.** You'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. And we have some great news! **Right Now Is The Perfect Time To Get Your NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200 Because of This _Exclusive_ 14 FREE Gifts Bonus Package Worth $973!** After offering a similar deal last year, these generators sold like hotcakes. subject: What the abortion industry hopes you will ignore
body:
Let me be blunt.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkc-K3DAMxp9Guc1gy4m9OeSwbDbQwyw9FHoMHluTmMZ_sJ0MffuSMn2C3qRPHz9JfD9v8027zYXlS3sazOHmXObnqmtdSd9jri4GF-xeav69xhkZdhfOL4yfvhBTpnvMYeaNHYyVAhsauJK87zm2slkHi93bQzwY9owb6tWdS6WVIWK2VW2nGjecTM4Z54wxoa6ia_HR6TfDW2LCWGjZnqyuVK4mhkL50NUd5EKIZxXD1UTfbMNaayog3gEnwGlxB11f150GwOnVAU46JdJbATEVA2L88cEkdt8_bwJQal9BjB0DlEsBMRZAuVc_l7hnQyDGlGNJZKoLy2vkybrdgxjJa7e9RKN90m4JIMa6m1-U_-kxVArnjvfPy8e3L9Uy2Td5sOnpts0VqaBlywn6-1f9n0yOAf8EAAD__5nen0s)
---
Fellow American, Let me be blunt. You are being lied to. They told you abortion was healthcare.
That it was safe. That it was rare. That it was compassionate. But today, more than 60 percent of abortions happen through a pill. Taken in silence. Usually at home. Often without a doctor. Often without the woman truly understanding what she is doing. The damage is staggering. To the baby. To the mother. To the culture. And most people are staying quiet. But one organization is not. That is why I am standing with PreBorn!
---
[**PreBorn! is doing what matters. They are saving lives. Not by yelling louder. Not through politics. But through love, truth, and real help.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkc-K3DAMxp9Guc1gy4m9OeSwbDbQwyw9FHoMHluTmMZ_sJ0MffuSMn2C3qRPHz9JfD9v8027zYXlS3sazOHmXObnqmtdSd9jri4GF-xeav69xhkZdhfOL4yfvhBTpnvMYeaNHYyVAhsauJK87zm2slkHi93bQzwY9owb6tWdS6WVIWK2VW2nGjecTM4Z54wxoa6ia_HR6TfDW2LCWGjZnqyuVK4mhkL50NUd5EKIZxXD1UTfbMNaayog3gEnwGlxB11f150GwOnVAU46JdJbATEVA2L88cEkdt8_bwJQal9BjB0DlEsBMRZAuVc_l7hnQyDGlGNJZKoLy2vkybrdgxjJa7e9RKN90m4JIMa6m1-U_-kxVArnjvfPy8e3L9Uy2Td5sOnpts0VqaBlywn6-1f9n0yOAf8EAAD__5nen0s)
