name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Urgent Senate Update: Trump’s Attack on Food Assistance/SNAP
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501305348%2501Urgent%2bSenate%2bUpdate_%2bTrump%25e2%2580%2599s%2bAttack%2bon%2bFood%2bAssistance_SNAP%250115449.55397340.7573380.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501305348%2501Urgent%2bSenate%2bUpdate_%2bTrump%25e2%2580%2599s%2bAttack%2bon%2bFood%2bAssistance_SNAP%250115449.55397340.7573380.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **November 1, 2025** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
# Urgent Senate Update: Trump's Attack on Food Assistance/SNAP
Starting today, Donald Trump and Republicans planned to intentionally withhold food and nutrition assistance (SNAP benefits) from over 42 million Americans, including 16 million children. In Maryland, that translates into 680,000 people, including nearly 270,000 children, 120,000 seniors, and 130,000 individuals with disabilities. Nothing about the Trump shutdown requires the Administration to take this draconian action. The Congress has made clear that under these circumstances, the government should use available reserve funds to continue supporting SNAP, but the Trump Administration has refused to do so. Instead, they are choosing to impose this pain on the country. [As I explained earlier this week](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dJ5xpYB9J2yg%26t%3d0s&redir_log=734139422816348), they are sadistically weaponizing hunger as a negotiating tool. [This is despicable](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fshorts%2fsOwI_8jpk1g&redir_log=913809846076292). Yesterday, [two federal district judges ruled that it was likely unlawful](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fbsky.app%2fprofile%2fvanhollen.senate.gov%2fpost%2f3m4j6lr3mbk2t&redir_log=068588769771441). The judges ordered the Trump Administration to continue providing SNAP benefits. We'll see if President Trump agrees to provide food assistance or appeals these decisions.

The truly sick part about all of this is that Trump and Republicans in Congress want to use the threat of hunger to avoid having to negotiate with Democrats to prevent the looming health care crisis across the country. That's because today is also the first day for Open Enrollment for most of the Affordable Care Act exchanges. Millions of Americans who get their health insurance through these exchanges are going to experience sticker shock. According to the Kaiser Family Foundation, the majority of Americans who use these exchanges will experience, on average, a whopping 114% increase in their premiums. Families will be paying double or triple what they were paying last year. That's because, when Trump and Republicans passed their so-called "Big Beautiful Bill," they permanently extended tax cuts for billionaires and the super-wealthy, but they let the one tax cut that helps middle-class families afford health insurance expire at the end of this year. In other words, they left in place a ticking time bomb that will explode on 20 million Americans and create harmful shock waves for millions more. We need to defuse that time bomb.

President Trump spent last week overseas meeting with the leaders of foreign governments while refusing to negotiate to open our own government. It's time for him to stop this jet-setting and to stop using taxpayer dollars to bail out his far-right buddy in Argentina and start focusing on ending crises of his own making here in the United States.

Meanwhile, here at home, families are struggling to get by. If you're a Marylander in need of food assistance, Governor Moore has declared a state of emergency and is surging assistance to Maryland families. [The State has also released this tool to help you find a food bank](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fdhs.maryland.gov%2foffice-community-grants%2ftefap%2ffinding-nearest-tefap-provider-maryland%2f&redir_log=869212290833670). [Please contact my office](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcontact&redir_log=475918421268285) if you have additional questions; we're here to help.

This preventable hunger crisis is happening by choice--part of a broader pattern of the Trump Administration siding with billionaires and the very rich at the expense of the American people.

In July, as part of their so-called "Big Beautiful Bill," Trump and the Republicans cut nearly $200 billion from SNAP and over $1 trillion in health care programs to help finance their tax breaks for billionaires. Now they're using this shutdown to inflict even more harm by refusing to use $5 billion in emergency contingency funds to keep SNAP benefits flowing in November. The Administration knows they are supposed to use these contingency funds. How do we know that? That's what the guidance on their own Department of Agriculture website said until they deleted it a few weeks ago. That's why I joined my Senate Democratic colleagues in [calling on the U.S. Department of Agriculture to immediately use all available funds to continue SNAP benefits in November](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.lujan.senate.gov%2fwp-content%2fuploads%2f2025%2f10%2fletter_to_release_funding_to_continue_snap_into_novemberp.pdf&redir_log=616057976196832) and why I [cosponsored the SNAP and WIC funded Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.lujan.senate.gov%2fwp-content%2fuploads%2f2025%2f10%2fELT25975.pdf&redir_log=771779212196434) to very expressly require that these programs be funded during the Trump shutdown.

Currently, there are two lawsuits against the federal government on its unlawful suspension of SNAP benefits during the government shutdown, including a challenge brought by attorneys general in 25 states, including Maryland. On Friday, federal judges issued two favorable rulings. The rulings confirmed that the Trump Administration is required to use emergency funds to at least partially fund SNAP benefits. Now, we must ensure that the Administration adheres to these rulings, follows the rule of law, and provides food assistance. While Maryland has declared a state of emergency to provide assistance--and food banks, places of worship, and community organizations are stepping up to help their neighbors--the reality is that we do not have the resources to replace all the SNAP funding Donald Trump is attempting to deliberately take away.

I know that this is only one way that Americans are suffering during this government shutdown. Federal workers and contractors are furloughed or working without pay. Trump's henchman Russ Vought, who has declared that he wants to impose "trauma" on federal workers, has also exploited the shutdown to illegally fire thousands of those federal workers. Last week, a federal judge issued an injunction against those illegal terminations, describing them as "political retribution." As [detailed in my last newsletter](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fview_newsletter.aspx%3fid%3d305092%26c%3dSenVanHollen&redir_log=953149091748602), I am fighting back to support federal workers and contractors in every way I can. And last week, I [called for a vote](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dXuRVcACjcVM%26t%3d0s&redir_log=298306285395351) on my bill to pay all federal workers, servicemembers, and contractors through the shutdown. Unfortunately, it was [blocked by Republicans](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fshorts%2fVCW90vkRpY4&redir_log=34681768526286).

Again, if you're a Marylander in need of assistance, [please contact our team.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fconstituent-services&redir_log=427117238233382) We're doing everything we can to help those impacted by this shutdown. I don't think it's right or fair that our federal workers are working without pay, and I too am withholding my pay throughout this government shutdown.

I will not rest until we restore SNAP, prevent health care costs from skyrocketing, get federal workers their pay, and end the shutdown without giving Donald Trump a blank check for his lawless actions.

Onwards,

Chris Van Hollen
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100064&__crop=15449.55397340.7573380.7517223)
|

subject: Boebert went as a “Mexican” for Halloween to mock ICE victims

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, While her fellow Republicans in Congress dressed up as jedis, Taylor Swift, and zombies, Lauren Boebert could not help but go the racist route for her Halloween costume. She donned a sombrero and wore a vile sign, meant to be read in a crude Mexican accent that stated, "Mexican word of the day: Juicy. Tell me if juicy ICE coming." | == 2025 has been ICE's deadliest year in two decades. Migrants are being tortured, deprived of food and water, and disappeared. Boebert can't help but mock them. Boebert and her costume embodies the rot that has metastasized within the Republican party and threatens to turn our nation into a totalitarian hell. They are devoid of empathy, compassion, and any decency toward their fellow man. Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when she went head to head with her Democratic opponent, labor leader Trisha Calvarese, she massively underperformed Trump in every county whereas Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district. She is vulnerable and Trisha is back to finish the job in 2026. These violent delights have violent ends. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | We have a rapidly closing window to stop this. name: Wes Moore
subject: Why I’m in VA:
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=862%2E1086043%2E8HNjd6)
Peter,
I’m down in Virginia today, helping our neighbors to the south get out the vote for Abigail Spanberger for Governor.
As the Trump administration comes after Democratic governors like me, I need Abigail to join us in the fight for progress. **But right now, she’s being outspent by her opponent. The polls are tightening. And the attack ads are nonstop.**
**[So I’m reaching out: With her election in just three days, can you split a donation of $5 with Abigail Spanberger and our campaign right now? Anything you chip in will add up in this critical race.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251101-1.kKbppi&refcode=em-20251101-1&t=4&akid=862%2E1086043%2E8HNjd6)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251101-1.kKbppi&amount=5&refcode=em-20251101-1&t=23&akid=862%2E1086043%2E8HNjd6)**
Abigail is clear-eyed about her mission to put Virginians first, and if she wins in Virginia it will give momentum to our own race in 2026.
But this won’t be easy: Donald Trump has endorsed Abigail’s opponent, and Republicans are putting up a fight to keep control of Virginia. **[Anything you can split between our campaigns today will help the final push to elect Abigail Spanberger as the next Governor of Virginia.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251101-1.kKbppi&refcode=em-20251101-1&t=24&akid=862%2E1086043%2E8HNjd6)**
Thanks for stepping up today, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251101-1.kKbppi&refcode=em-20251101-1&t=25&akid=862%2E1086043%2E8HNjd6)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251101-1&t=26&refcode2=862_1086043_8HNjd6&akid=862%2E1086043%2E8HNjd6)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=27&akid=862%2E1086043%2E8HNjd6)

There are three days left until Election Day here in Virginia — and I need your help.
The polls are tightening. The attack ads are ramping up. The President has even endorsed my opponent to try to derail our momentum.

clean_body: [] There are three days left until Election Day here in Virginia — and I need your help. The polls are tightening. The attack ads are ramping up. The President has even endorsed my opponent to try to derail our momentum. But I will not be distracted. Virginians deserve a Governor who will put Virginia first and stand up to the chaos of this Administration, and the entire country is looking to us to lead the way ahead of 2026 and 2028. So, if you're in a position to help us win this year's biggest election, I'm counting on your $30 before midnight. It adds up fast when we each give what we can. [] If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $30 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] With supporters like you in our corner, I know we can win. By renewing your membership, you are sending the loudest possible message to the Radical Left and making it CLEAR that you proudly stand with Republican State Leadership nationwide! name: Doomsday clock
subject: Only 72 hours left in this critical election for Dems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
In the closing week of this election, all hell is breaking loose.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00141emQ0qluopkd6daBEaUBwqGKvpw_V9e98yo6px34AndWZxw-z1-21jzwFPwbljfGijrLlWc3p6Uj-NJvy_vxCTRRyKSDd7294XEQzcSdHcTF8xompy1PXJj5jX-SnrDZxPI6FBHM9oMvAz8BiYLhw4DVuoj7KEQI199E5KXAK8lYnz9snuXVt5VOxUe5XuO5PsYPZiqRBS5jWpyrB-Z444-AusJEWXrbAQHrAGQdeI=&c=CI-5xt_FCevb78oHi58aXw1AOmDfGAk99x_olqBQ4UyfhSHdtgLU-w==&ch=vTxnagqdLPKBsoqDBQmtv_8yxZc-Hqan1BKRptQXYlp4-AK9QEiZ7A==)
---
|
Peter,
There is officially only 72 hours left in the most crucial election for Democrats in 2025, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election.
This race is existential for Democrats. A loss here would mean Trump and MAGA would gain control of the top court in the most important swing state in the country--paving the way for MAGA to unleash an extreme abortion ban, gerrymander PA to hell, and use voter suppression to tilt PA red in the crucial '26 and '28 elections.
In the closing week of this election, all hell is breaking loose:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00141emQ0qluopkd6daBEaUBwqGKvpw_V9e98yo6px34AndWZxw-z1-21jzwFPwbljfGijrLlWc3p6Uj-NJvy_vxCTRRyKSDd7294XEQzcSdHcTF8xompy1PXJj5jX-SnrDZxPI6FBHM9oMvAz8BiYLhw4DVuoj7KEQI199E5KXAK8lYnz9snuXVt5VOxUe5XuO5PsYPZiqRBS5jWpyrB-Z4y5gIGR8Z4A4HQPqdip_HKk=&c=CI-5xt_FCevb78oHi58aXw1AOmDfGAk99x_olqBQ4UyfhSHdtgLU-w==&ch=vTxnagqdLPKBsoqDBQmtv_8yxZc-Hqan1BKRptQXYlp4-AK9QEiZ7A==)
---
| Millions from both sides of the aisle are pouring into this race in the final days and the media is finally starting to give this race the attention it deserves. All public data suggests this race is a dead heat, and Democrats and Republicans are now in a desperate sprint to turnout more voters than the other.
And just days ago, Democrats received alarming news--GOP turnout is surging:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00141emQ0qluopkd6daBEaUBwqGKvpw_V9e98yo6px34AndWZxw-z1-21jzwFPwbljfGijrLlWc3p6Uj-NJvy_vxCTRRyKSDd7294XEQzcSdHcTF8xompy1PXJj5jX-SnrDZxPI6FBHM9oMvAz8BiYLhw4DVuoj7KEQI199E5KXAK8lYnz9snuXVt5VOxUe5XuO5PsYPZiqRBS5jWpyrB-Z4_JNG1go_69VauuUNXgD2lU=&c=CI-5xt_FCevb78oHi58aXw1AOmDfGAk99x_olqBQ4UyfhSHdtgLU-w==&ch=vTxnagqdLPKBsoqDBQmtv_8yxZc-Hqan1BKRptQXYlp4-AK9QEiZ7A==)
---
Defend Our Court is one of the largest Democratic organizations involved in this race, and in the final 72 hours we are going all out--reaching millions of PA Democrats in these closing hours urging them to turnout for this crucial election. We are on TV, our canvassers are on ground knocking doors, and we are blanketing PA dems with our ads on social media and digital platforms.
There is no telling how close this race will be when the polls close on Tuesday, so we are working overtime this weekend to make sure we are doing everything we can to turnout every last Democrat before the clock runs out.
With your help, we can make an even bigger impact in these final 72 hours. Every dollar could be the difference right now. [Please, will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help defend this crucial court?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00141emQ0qluopkd6daBEaUBwqGKvpw_V9e98yo6px34AndWZxw-z1-21jzwFPwbljfGijrLlWc3p6Uj-NJvy_vxCTRRyKSDd7294XEQzcSdHcTF8xompy1PXJj5jX-SnrDZxPI6FBHM9oMvAz8BiYLhw4DVuoj7KEQI199E5KXAK8lYnz9snuXVt5VOxUe5XuO5PsYPZiqRBS5jWpyrB-Z42acH8gi2pZBpaG5a3-6esw=&c=CI-5xt_FCevb78oHi58aXw1AOmDfGAk99x_olqBQ4UyfhSHdtgLU-w==&ch=vTxnagqdLPKBsoqDBQmtv_8yxZc-Hqan1BKRptQXYlp4-AK9QEiZ7A==)
---

clean_body: In the closing week of this election, all hell is breaking loose. | | | | | == | Peter, There is officially only 72 hours left in the most crucial election for Democrats in 2025, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election. This race is existential for Democrats. A loss here would mean Trump and MAGA would gain control of the top court in the most important swing state in the country--paving the way for MAGA to unleash an extreme abortion ban, gerrymander PA to hell, and use voter suppression to tilt PA red in the crucial '26 and '28 elections. In the closing week of this election, all hell is breaking loose: | == | Millions from both sides of the aisle are pouring into this race in the final days and the media is finally starting to give this race the attention it deserves. All public data suggests this race is a dead heat, and Democrats and Republicans are now in a desperate sprint to turnout more voters than the other. And just days ago, Democrats received alarming news--GOP turnout is surging: | == Defend Our Court is one of the largest Democratic organizations involved in this race, and in the final 72 hours we are going all out--reaching millions of PA Democrats in these closing hours urging them to turnout for this crucial election. We are on TV, our canvassers are on ground knocking doors, and we are blanketing PA dems with our ads on social media and digital platforms. There is no telling how close this race will be when the polls close on Tuesday, so we are working overtime this weekend to make sure we are doing everything we can to turnout every last Democrat before the clock runs out. With your help, we can make an even bigger impact in these final 72 hours. body:
In the closing week of this election, all hell is breaking loose.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016vwYJPe-8WM9awW50J5M7eFp3y62bFeaIt-tY6mCPcswvoFWjgt_sku_YxCS9zVsrTUxs-NEUan8I1N5KSW5oMy26CteTHfIWBdiybQS_LEK2ec9s85tN9nN3JaxlrcfXqcvk2fqejVBn7_0S4xcoCDjutebiDqgZq7RwMJ0GmjovvA2OLI9buXfG7LMiIJr5_l81SjuX12Q6JNBCAX_TGzOPfVaAOw6_CiZNfSYdpw=&c=BeC5fq-2EKzbP-GeNjp-zsal7dxsL3CRP3dobmcFdIAd8NyA1vSjjA==&ch=pBh0O2G9yZHsO3GOhRkw8lqg4-3CBeIx8E8gEpWSOQRUMQ5Gfji3-A==)
---
|
Peter,
There is officially only 72 hours left in the most crucial election for Democrats in 2025, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election.
This race is existential for Democrats. A loss here would mean Trump and MAGA would gain control of the top court in the most important swing state in the country--paving the way for MAGA to unleash an extreme abortion ban, gerrymander PA to hell, and use voter suppression to tilt PA red in the crucial '26 and '28 elections.

This race is existential for Democrats. A loss here would mean Trump and MAGA would gain control of the top court in the most important swing state in the country--paving the way for MAGA to unleash an extreme abortion ban, gerrymander PA to hell, and use voter suppression to tilt PA red in the crucial '26 and '28 elections. name: Larry Hailsham Jr., Executive Director, Pennsylvania Democratic Party
subject: we hit the polls on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

Thank you for supporting our end-of-month fundraising. With Election Day on Tuesday, this last push will help ensure we have the resources we need to reach every voter across the Commonwealth.

Now, we have to ask: are you ready to hit the polls on Tuesday? Having a voting plan makes it less stressful on the day of. We have some reminders below — make sure you know your voting plan and send this to 3 friends so they are sure of what to do on Tuesday too! 📍 Double check your polling location

🕗 Know what time you plan on getting there! Polls open at 7am and close at 8pm. _If you are in line by 8pm, STAY IN LINE. You are still allowed to vote — don’t let anyone tell you otherwise._

📫 Mail-in and absentee ballots must be received by 8pm. **_[Find your nearest designated drop-off location or county election office here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118454619/579812781/1542533284?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251101_EN_VotingPlan_0_1MO_LarryHailshamJr_NA_NA_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGE5OWU3MC0yY2I3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rgcjmofj3SjTijQlVpi4ECjtxoyy8DOpHI4iRpmMf5Y=&emci=57a99e70-2cb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=5da99e70-2cb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_**

☎️ If you need help or assistance, call the Voter Assistance Hotline: **1-833-PA-VOTES (1-833-728-6837)** Want to do more? **__[Join us for our last Get-Out-to-Vote push until Tuesday by calling voters or knocking on doors here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118454622/579812782/624412622?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251101_EN_VotingPlan_0_1MO_LarryHailshamJr_NA_NA_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGE5OWU3MC0yY2I3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rgcjmofj3SjTijQlVpi4ECjtxoyy8DOpHI4iRpmMf5Y=&emci=57a99e70-2cb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=5da99e70-2cb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)__**

Larry Hailsham Jr.
Executive Director, Pennsylvania Democratic Party

clean_body: | | Peter, Thank you for supporting our end-of-month fundraising. With Election Day on Tuesday, this last push will help ensure we have the resources we need to reach every voter across the Commonwealth. Now, we have to ask: are you ready to hit the polls on Tuesday? Having a voting plan makes it less stressful on the day of. We have some reminders below — make sure you know your voting plan and send this to 3 friends so they are sure of what to do on Tuesday too! 📍 Double check your polling location 🕗 Know what time you plan on getting there! Polls open at 7am and close at 8pm. If you are in line by 8pm, STAY IN LINE. You are still allowed to vote — don’t let anyone tell you otherwise. 📫 Mail-in and absentee ballots must be received by 8pm. ☎️ If you need help or assistance, call the Voter Assistance Hotline: 1-833-PA-VOTES (1-833-728-6837) Want to do more? | | Hi there, As the Board Chair for Fair Fight Action, I want to thank you personally for powering our pro-democracy movement as a member of this team. With every action you take, you help prevent voter suppression, you help mobilize advocates across the country, and you help counter the rise of authoritarianism in America. And your support couldn’t come at a more critical time, with the Supreme Court potentially poised to gut a critical plank of the Voting Rights Act and unleash a wave of racially discriminatory redistricting. We know that access to the ballot box remains unequal, and we know that too many communities have been deliberately excluded from full participation in our democracy. But we also know that together, we can remove the unjust obstacles that voters face, and we can make sure every American has an equal voice in our political system. I’m inspired by this team’s commitment to defending democracy. Everyone strengthens the movement in different ways, and of course not everyone can make a financial contribution at this time — but if you didn’t have a chance to make a donation before Friday’s end-of-month deadline, [**I’d be grateful if you could chip in any amount to advance the cause of free and fair elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118454876/579813034/-1185130066?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251101_T1_EOMTY_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRlYzM5Mi0yY2I3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aA-qke3QgdeUm0toqVswdX9z_qIoPVVHQFVD_mfriY=) Thank you for everything you do to power this critical work, Nancy Koziol

Peter Willis,

Election Day is almost here – and the attacks on Mamdani are reaching a
fever pitch.

Now, Andrew Cuomo is using Trump-style tactics to try to scare voters away
from Mamdani, saying he could “kill” New York and the Democratic Party if
he wins.

if elected

We CANNOT let these dirty political tricks – paired with the billionaire
dollars FLOODING the race – decide this election. That’s why our field
operation is in full swing. Our Revolution volunteers are fanning out
across the city. Our phone banks and texting shifts are buzzing. We’re on
pace to make 500,000 voter contacts before the polls close.

Every one of these conversations could be the difference, but this pace
comes at a cost. Every dollar you give right now helps us reach undecided
voters in these crucial final days.

Here’s the truth: Donald Trump desperately wants Cuomo to win this race.
Because Trump knows the only candidate who’s actually built a movement
strong enough to defeat MAGA politics – on the ground and in the ballot
box – is Mamdani.

Mamdani has shown he’s not afraid to stand up to Trump. Which is exactly
the kind of leader we need right now. And it’s why Our Revolution is all
in – knocking on doors, canvassing subways, phonebanking, and running a
texting campaign to reach as many people as possible in this final
stretch. But we need more resources to keep the pressure on.

The stakes couldn’t be higher. While Cuomo and Trump try to divide and

Now, Andrew Cuomo is using Trump-style tactics to try to scare voters away from Mamdani, saying he could “kill” New York and the Democratic Party if he wins. [ ]Headline: Cuomo says Mamdani could 'kill' New York and Democratic Party if elected We CANNOT let these dirty political tricks – paired with the billionaire dollars FLOODING the race – decide this election. That’s why our field operation is in full swing. Our Revolution volunteers are fanning out across the city. Our phone banks and texting shifts are buzzing. We’re on pace to make 500,000 voter contacts before the polls close. Every one of these conversations could be the difference, but this pace comes at a cost. Every dollar you give right now helps us reach undecided voters in these crucial final days. [ ]Will you help Our Revolution finish strong? Every contribution, big or small, brings us closer to proving Trump and Cuomo wrong and helping Mamdani WIN. Donate now to power our final push. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT Here’s the truth: Donald Trump desperately wants Cuomo to win this race. Because Trump knows the only candidate who’s actually built a movement strong enough to defeat MAGA politics – on the ground and in the ballot box – is Mamdani. Mamdani has shown he’s not afraid to stand up to Trump. Which is exactly the kind of leader we need right now. And it’s why Our Revolution is all in – knocking on doors, canvassing subways, phonebanking, and running a texting campaign to reach as many people as possible in this final stretch. But we need more resources to keep the pressure on. The stakes couldn’t be higher. While Cuomo and Trump try to divide and distract, our team is laser-focused on the real issues: affordable housing, stopping handouts to billionaires, and lifting up the working class. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Help us raise money for the Gleaners Community Food Bank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1215%2E251025%2EG9Wx7w ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1215%2E251025%2EG9Wx7w ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Behind me in this photo is the Genesee County WIC office in Flint,
Michigan:

[ Abdul ]Abdul standing in front of the Genesee County WIC office

For those who might not know, WIC stands for Women, Infants, and Children.
It’s a program that provides everything from formula to food for pregnant
moms and their babies.

I used to run a WIC program in Wayne County. I’ve seen firsthand how
critical this program is for families. It keeps kids fed, keeps mothers
healthy, and keeps hope alive.

Last year alone, 240,000 kids in Michigan benefited from WIC.

And now, WIC funding is at risk because Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans
decided to shut down our government and use food assistance programs as
collateral.

That’s hundreds of thousands of working people and children losing access
to the most basic nutrition programs, all because Donald Trump would
rather let the government shutdown continue than address the healthcare
crisis his budget is about to create.

Especially as we head into the holidays, no child in Michigan should have
to wonder where their next meal will come from. Hunger shouldn’t be an
issue in the richest, most powerful country in the world.

So today, I’m asking you to do something immediate and real. [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251101-2-ak.wwFF5b&amount=10&refcode=em20251101-1207&t=1004&akid=1215%2E251025%2EG9Wx7w ]If you can
afford it, contribute directly to Gleaners Community Food Bank, one of the
most important hunger relief organizations in Michigan.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251101-2-ak.wwFF5b&amount=10&refcode=em20251101-1207&t=1023&akid=1215%2E251025%2EG9Wx7w ]Donate ››

100% of your donation will help make sure Michiganders can still put food
on the table while the status quo in Washington continues to fail working
people.

We can do so much better, and until we have a government that puts people
over profits, it’s up to us to take care of one another.

With gratitude,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1215%2E251025%2EG9Wx7w
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1215%2E251025%2EG9Wx7w

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Over 690,000 Tennesseans could lose food assistance at midnight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Low income and disabled adults and children are being used as political leverage
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K8ZWSXDBVHYXQN180TB4QK2E_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K8ZWSXDBVHYXQN180TB4QK2E_1)
---
| | | | Hi Peter, Today, over 690,000 Tennesseans could lose their SNAP benefits—food assistance that keeps children, seniors and working families from going hungry. While Republicans in Washington and here at home play political games, our neighbors are facing empty dinner tables. SNAP isn’t a handout—it’s a lifeline that helps feed vulnerable Tennesseans. The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus has been fighting for the state to fund SNAP benefits, protect families, and make sure no one in our state is punished for not being paid a living wage at work or disabled. Gov. Lee refuses to act. Today, rather than donate to the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, we encourage you to donate to your local food banks. Corrupt politicians in DC can break our government, but they can’t break our will and Volunteer spirit. Please stand up for our neighbors in need, and we’ll continue to speak up for Tennessee families.
---

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Urgent update: Virginia is closing rapidly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by My Faith Votes
body:
Godly leadership or policies that ignore biblical values?
| | | | |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot,
The Virginia governor’s race is razor-thin, with RealClearPolitics showing just a **3% difference** between the candidates in the latest poll. That margin could be as high as **95,700 votes** or as low as **82,800**. The difference between godly leadership and policies that ignore biblical values.

With **5.81 million registered voters** in Virginia, turnout on **November 4** could range from **2.76 to 3.19 million** , depending on whether voters show up like they did in **2017 (47.6%)** or **2021 (54.9%)**. Will they be informed? Will they be guided by faith?

My Faith Votes is focused on reaching **low-propensity Christian voters**. Those who are already registered, but don’t vote consistently, especially in off-year elections like this one. Many simply need a reminder, a reason, and a resource to act. That’s where we come in.

Thanks to our army of Action Partners, we’re already sending over **112,000 letters** to low-propensity Christian voters in Virginia and more are being written every day.

_But we must do more._

**Text messaging has been proven to boost turnout.** We want to follow up with those receiving letters and reach even more Christian voters across Virginia with a simple, powerful message and a link to our **Candidate Fact Sheet.**
[**Every dollar you give helps us reach more believers with truth and clarity.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e7f675a4ec1d4b1484dadf07f673e27a&_e=N8bt15x7gsqk43DNHoPs73fLQe_qIFcEOTNHzn8L3hokl3CtZgfJwnOq17iP2-iFEo09Z8xfuYUM2iMA1Uu05IWwQTUpaYXM4LMh-8y9xaS92viCrb9oOBKDNq54h5rpb15ahedgGTwWe1d4HMMiaZ2ELlmQdl0FqeFJ2Lvh3NKA0I6ZyNAcv_euGFzacjuhLWguKDL9s3ELlIoFvZiktyTPqpRRVcbi6Rp32g4kFNvaMWtYmfoD3ZI-RPCBgZ8YyXGF9sP9vDOUCNCkW4OdWN-KgWQ6OMqhy-jAlfm4Dgkf36eTdjEa9XDIQLLNnlpRoNHWbwLZoWla-GmBJrY2iKUuxT5HVRnDQqKZiB759Ix2N5uHEQhGfIciH0uUvK3kNjopdjYx8kIPFh45OBgu6c_Rnxcex9fsPRUPuL9CryMSzA2P4HegVin7TnY8RDvQPDD389fF15-IfGhiy6zhIyanqmPJhhc-FJim3CvYA_G9JzN2djAe4RwJj5hHTQbhkzEfkN6hAIXB9NkpfW27LnPu5tBFWSDJohFhTLcHfGBtZB3jtZRd2newuM_3Kxw3jo9_LQc9p7IH3_5SwZrpO_RpUT3BkCWq0uLVlMsh1kyUCxAIgg08rzW15QeNoAqbPX9Q0BiFCT_XPkVljas4Jw%3D%3D)

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118456961/579817121/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDNjOWY2NC0yZmI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o4Az0treWEOKN3hcMZ_mv7Q01oytudte9XSuD7LccFo=&emci=6756025e-2fb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=6d3c9f64-2fb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=13185894) Derek, I know my team and I have been emailing a lot ahead of our end-of-month deadline, but I wanted to take a moment to write one more time to share some good news: Thanks to supporters like you, we reached our end-of-month goal, and we couldn’t be more grateful to have you on our side in the fight to win PA-17 and help Democrats take back the House. **This is one of the toughest battleground seats in the country.** That’s why Republicans have spent millions trying to defeat me in 2022 and 2024. But thanks to this grassroots team, we pulled together and defended this seat. With your support, I’m able to focus on giving a voice to Western Pennsylvanians and fight for the issues that matter most to our community—like bringing down costs, protecting healthcare, and creating more solid jobs. Now, as the ONLY Democrat defending a battleground district in Pennsylvania, my team and I are gearing up for another competitive— _and expensive_ —race next year. But with you on our team, I know we have what it takes to defend this battleground seat and keep up the fight for hardworking Western Pennsylvanians in Congress. **Derek, thanks again for being a part of this team.** [**And if you haven’t had the chance to contribute in a while, I’d be so grateful if you’d consider making a donation now to help defend PA-17.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118456962/579817122/981825435?refcode=email_110125_ty&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDNjOWY2NC0yZmI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o4Az0treWEOKN3hcMZ_mv7Q01oytudte9XSuD7LccFo=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118456963/579817123/981825435?refcode=email_110125_ty&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDNjOWY2NC0yZmI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o4Az0treWEOKN3hcMZ_mv7Q01oytudte9XSuD7LccFo=)

clean_body: Derek, I know my team and I have been emailing a lot ahead of our end-of-month deadline, but I wanted to take a moment to write one more time to share some good news: Thanks to supporters like you, we reached our end-of-month goal, and we couldn’t be more grateful to have you on our side in the fight to win PA-17 and help Democrats take back the House. This is one of the toughest battleground seats in the country. That’s why Republicans have spent millions trying to defeat me in 2022 and 2024. But thanks to this grassroots team, we pulled together and defended this seat. With your support, I’m able to focus on giving a voice to Western Pennsylvanians and fight for the issues that matter most to our community—like bringing down costs, protecting healthcare, and creating more solid jobs. Now, as the ONLY Democrat defending a battleground district in Pennsylvania, my team and I are gearing up for another competitive— and expensive —race next year. But with you on our team, I know we have what it takes to defend this battleground seat and keep up the fight for hardworking Western Pennsylvanians in Congress. Derek, thanks again for being a part of this team. = | | = Thanks so much, Chris Deluzio | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@chrisforpa.com to your address book. # Aaron Siri LIVE in Central Texas!
---
| |
---
| **Join us for an Exclusive Event with Aaron Siri!** Texans for Vaccine Choice is thrilled to announce a **special evening with Aaron Siri** , America’s leading legal advocate for vaccine choice! Renowned for his relentless fight against Big Pharma and the corrupt regulatory machine in Washington, D.C., Mr. Siri recently **made waves exposing the hypocrisy** of Biden’s HHS during a powerful Capitol Hill testimony. Join us for an in-person,** inspiring keynote and Q&A with Aaron Siri** on his new book, _Vaccines, Amen: The Religion of Vaccines_ in Round Rock (near Austin) the evening of Wednesday, November 12. Each ticket includes a copy of the book. The **special VIP hour** will provide an opportunity to meet Mr. Siri in person and have your book signed. Mr. Siri’s groundbreaking legal work has held regulatory health agencies accountable, **exposing critical flaws in the vaccine program**. **Let's give this true champion of medical freedom a warm Texas welcome! Seating is limited so grab your tickets soon!**

name: Tim Walz
subject: It shouldn’t be like this
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter,
Yesterday, a federal judge ruled that the Trump administration must use the emergency funds at their disposal to fund the SNAP — a program that over 440,000 Minnesotans and millions of Americans rely on.
**It shouldn’t take a court order for the America First president to feed the hungry.**
The cruelty of this all was the point. This administration doesn’t know what it means to be a good neighbor — they only care about themselves.
While Trump played political games, my administration directed $4 million in emergency funding to shore up our food shelves. And here in Minnesota, we already feed our kids free breakfast and lunch at school every single day.
This isn’t just what Minnesotans do. **It’s who we are.** We look out for our neighbors and stand up for our values.
Together, we’ll continue to build a state that leads with empathy, kindness and grace.
I’m grateful,
Tim Walz

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251101-42&t=1&refcode2=42_34582_owRI0x&akid=42%2E34582%2EowRI0x)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251101-42&t=2&refcode2=42_34582_owRI0x&akid=42%2E34582%2EowRI0x)**
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=3&akid=42%2E34582%2EowRI0x)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=42%2E34582%2EowRI0x)

Prepared and paid for by Walz for Governor
Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104

In Virginia and New Jersey, we have the opportunity to elect two strong Democrats as governors and secure the first line of defense against Trump and his allies on a statewide level. In California, we have the chance to pass Proposition 50, which counters Republican redistricting and prevents another two years of the Trump administration’s unchecked power. **Derek, these elections are coming up _fast_. We are running out of time to make sure that we have mobilized and persuaded every voter that we need to win in Pennsylvania, New Jersey, California, Virginia, and beyond.** [**So, can you chip in $7 or whatever makes sense to you to help us make the biggest impact possible between now and November 4? name: Adelita Grijalva
subject: Speaker Johnson’s snarky comment about me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

_GIFFORDS PAC is standing with Adelita Grijalva and the people of Arizona’s 7th District as Republicans continue blocking her from taking office after her landslide victory.[**Please read Adelita’s message and split a $5 contribution so we can keep up the pressure together to get her sworn in »_**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-grijalva-2025.T8hJTV&refcode=em251101-1-b&t=1&akid=11006%2E3935704%2EQCgjSl)
_
* * *

Hey friend, it’s Adelita Grijalva — the Democratic Rep.-Elect that Speaker Mike Johnson is still refusing to swear in.
When I told GIFFORDS what Speaker Johnson said about me, they urged me to reach out and share it with you directly:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-grijalva-2025.T8hJTV&refcode=em251101-1-b&refcode2=11006.3935704.QCgjSl&t=2&akid=11006%2E3935704%2EQCgjSl)_**"Bless her heart... she doesn't know how it works around here."**_
That’s what he said — dismissive, patronizing, and **completely unacceptable.**
Let me be clear, I know exactly how it works. Earlier this year, two Republicans were sworn in while the House was in recess and less than 24 hours after their elections. My race has been certified. The voters spoke. It's now been over a month!
My job is to serve, and his job is to swear me in. FULL STOP.
Instead, he's hiding behind smug, patronizing excuses. It's not just offensive, it's dangerous. A Speaker can't pick which Members to seat based on politics. **That's not how democracy works, that's how it dies.**
[**Will you stand with me by splitting a $5 contribution or whatever you can between GIFFORDS PAC and my campaign today to help us keep the pressure on and show we won't accept this abuse of power?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-grijalva-2025.T8hJTV&refcode=em251101-1-b&t=3&akid=11006%2E3935704%2EQCgjSl)

| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-grijalva-2025.Ov4L_7&refcode=em251101-1-b&t=5&akid=11006%2E3935704%2EQCgjSl)**

name: Breaking:
subject: Obama intervenes in PA Supreme Court Race — will it be enough?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The entire Democratic movement has awoken to the blinking warning signs and the big guns are coming out.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAAnbMUY4GOfbsPEygkbEJrk6gSYOCj-0zI8iOgtJ0zbmZDlq3dfR3bK4rIaV8aF8a2KNhXDuEfQ80QvtwbyehpIN8ShlL-o3xEA5NeBuqFZlvWt77XCdKW9aPd2uskcPwBwpMKScb8TvUeN9oH6v3zSoGFRQr7eirHSuOstefAIT3ZDM4QXnhRfRJmfbimSpigw-ATygFERzmELK7hv9HO_QItE6yE895EEqtznLeN-7X3IMunQ_A==&c=oPARrAW5H26LRltPx14tEPb7g2QlPFiPiDRBnPQHZR4XCFz3ZQFRnQ==&ch=JTzh9DMvtolOOiAu2ITn3bgl9ZxJDR9kj4NPPPEn4HSoJexDa7c8mQ==)
---
|
Peter,
For the last five months Defend our Courts has been ringing the alarm bell about the impending disaster for Democrats in the upcoming November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court race.
The situation on the ground is dire. We are being outspent, MAGA has more canvassers, they've nearly caught up to us in mail ballots, and polling is showing that we could lose.
Now, the entire Democratic movement has awoken to the blinking warning signs and the big guns are coming out: President Barack Obama just issued an urgent statement drawing attention to this race and urging Pennsylvanians to vote.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAAnbMUY4GOfbsPEygkbEJrk6gSYOCj-0zI8iOgtJ0zbmZDlq3dfR3bK4rIaV8aF8a2KNhXDuEfQ80QvtwbyehpIN8ShlL-o3xEA5NeBuqFZlvWt77XCdKW9aPd2uskcPwBwpMKScb8TvUeN9oH6v3zSoGFRQr7eirHSuOstefAIT3ZDM4QXnhRfRJmfbimSpigw-ATygFERzmELK7hv9HO_QItE6yE8qIrVu_KDv1URVMlvYe1myw==&c=oPARrAW5H26LRltPx14tEPb7g2QlPFiPiDRBnPQHZR4XCFz3ZQFRnQ==&ch=JTzh9DMvtolOOiAu2ITn3bgl9ZxJDR9kj4NPPPEn4HSoJexDa7c8mQ==)
---
| This is a huge reprieve for besieged Pennsylvania Democrats but will it be enough?
The stakes of this race could not be higher. Losing this court means MAGA can implement an extreme abortion ban, conduct a blood red redistricting of the Pennsylvania Congressional map, and rig the 2026 and 2028 elections.
Given Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes, losing this court means Democrats never win PA again and without PA there is a real possibility that we could never win a Presidential election again (every recent election in which we've lost PA, Democrats lose the Presidency).
When the dust settles on November 5th we need to be able to say that we left nothing on the table, went for broke, and did everything in our power to save this critical court.[ ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAAnbMUY4GOfbsPEygkbEJrk6gSYOCj-0zI8iOgtJ0zbmZDlq3dfR88577EWDhu3HEaHw0z9RkQwd28P-ZSw5GaG_X8HSDdhN751tQi1TpaQTtTGPDAv8gEYpiOPGk6RXUpBoIb03gGCvqD__OlZhLdkqCyDRGQ-wwbxyO2iRyVcgDkLN8m_wTl8oVg4uY5u6hqiGsqfwzy2fsheFXyHpSL5NR6UzBwwyCGpmtTwlXmF1thAyOVBmw==&c=oPARrAW5H26LRltPx14tEPb7g2QlPFiPiDRBnPQHZR4XCFz3ZQFRnQ==&ch=JTzh9DMvtolOOiAu2ITn3bgl9ZxJDR9kj4NPPPEn4HSoJexDa7c8mQ==)
[](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAAnbMUY4GOfbsPEygkbEJrk6gSYOCj-0zI8iOgtJ0zbmZDlq3dfR88577EWDhu3HEaHw0z9RkQwd28P-ZSw5GaG_X8HSDdhN751tQi1TpaQTtTGPDAv8gEYpiOPGk6RXUpBoIb03gGCvqD__OlZhLdkqCyDRGQ-wwbxyO2iRyVcgDkLN8m_wTl8oVg4uY5u6hqiGsqfwzy2fsheFXyHpSL5NR6UzBww3BPvgdQ3QTczCabCfp0uXA==&c=oPARrAW5H26LRltPx14tEPb7g2QlPFiPiDRBnPQHZR4XCFz3ZQFRnQ==&ch=JTzh9DMvtolOOiAu2ITn3bgl9ZxJDR9kj4NPPPEn4HSoJexDa7c8mQ==)[Please, if you've been waiting to give or have anything left in the tank, make a contribution of $50, $25, or even $5 and we will rush it to the ground in Pennsylvania.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAAnbMUY4GOfbsPEygkbEJrk6gSYOCj-0zI8iOgtJ0zbmZDlq3dfR3bK4rIaV8aF8a2KNhXDuEfQ80QvtwbyehpIN8ShlL-o3xEA5NeBuqFZlvWt77XCdKW9aPd2uskcPwBwpMKScb8TvUeN9oH6v3zSoGFRQr7eirHSuOstefAIT3ZDM4QXnhRfRJmfbimSpigw-ATygFERzmELK7hv9HO_QItE6yE8MU2Uf1Oruo7beUam6t8P-g==&c=oPARrAW5H26LRltPx14tEPb7g2QlPFiPiDRBnPQHZR4XCFz3ZQFRnQ==&ch=JTzh9DMvtolOOiAu2ITn3bgl9ZxJDR9kj4NPPPEn4HSoJexDa7c8mQ==)

clean_body: The entire Democratic movement has awoken to the blinking warning signs and the big guns are coming out. | | | | | == | Peter, For the last five months Defend our Courts has been ringing the alarm bell about the impending disaster for Democrats in the upcoming November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court race. The situation on the ground is dire. We are being outspent, MAGA has more canvassers, they've nearly caught up to us in mail ballots, and polling is showing that we could lose. Now, the entire Democratic movement has awoken to the blinking warning signs and the big guns are coming out: President Barack Obama just issued an urgent statement drawing attention to this race and urging Pennsylvanians to vote. | == | This is a huge reprieve for besieged Pennsylvania Democrats but will it be enough? The stakes of this race could not be higher. Losing this court means MAGA can implement an extreme abortion ban, conduct a blood red redistricting of the Pennsylvania Congressional map, and rig the 2026 and 2028 elections. Given Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes, losing this court means Democrats never win PA again and without PA there is a real possibility that we could never win a Presidential election again (every recent election in which we've lost PA, Democrats lose the Presidency). When the dust settles on November 5th we need to be able to say that we left nothing on the table, went for broke, and did everything in our power to save this critical court.== == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == | | | | For Pennsylvanians this is the fight of our lives. We will not forget that you had our back when we needed it most. Team Defend our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. body:
This Halloween, Democrats are playing trick-or-treat with New Hampshire’s safety, and Granite Staters would be the ones getting tricked.

| | | | | [|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=4a5f48e2e1&e=f3aa6419cd)
| | | | | |
Friend,**This Halloween, Democrats are playing trick-or-treat with New Hampshire’s safety, and Granite Staters would be the ones getting tricked.** After years of denying it, they’ve finally told the truth: Democrats want to MASS up our state by defying the law Governor Ayotte and Republicans passed banning sanctuary cities.They’re calling it “Sanctuary Communities.”**We call it what it is — lawlessness.**
---
| [STOP THE INVASION >>](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=e78c53b682&e=f3aa6419cd)

Republicans in Concord took action to keep dangerous criminals out of New Hampshire. Democrats are now standing up to defend them._If they get their way, New Hampshire will be the next Massachusetts.__We can’t let that happen._ Republicans are the only thing standing between order and chaos, safety and surrender.[**Chip in HERE to help us stop Democrats from MASSing up New Hampshire >>>**](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=5c4d243a68&e=f3aa6419cd)Because the only thing scarier than Halloween...is what Democrats would do to our state if they ever got the chance.For New Hampshire,NHGOP

subject: Obama intervenes in PA Supreme Court Race — will it be enough?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The entire Democratic movement has awoken to the blinking warning signs and the big guns are coming out.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S2U-qYYLCMi_drYL8Y8PNFDR_fdxMv6gXKABliQ_XBjYQ-KwSxKEyNOfYSeI-J64lDCnKH_8KbIqSiq8vGy2p8bnUFtwd-yf7ECY0sJ2Yv-yglfgSSoXOu9UfJfN0Cc9GbKtYKRMNxowxB0FTBgn1Q36VcRNhgVij2jLr10iAKlXZfGFCYkF_cvu_CB6rOBEyRFmZpV6ifGTLtFM87depEC6Q6jcjX41eIT4fxJ41-bqIzW0yFBPUA==&c=fUGFLXnFeOUklrp1c16XDiVJMKRbfrKfV7GYdDJr4fMxEesLRd2DVA==&ch=KzbZ600PyJG3SmM9JM3SGObxy5LHMYHI3LxVr9vZf8MbF60uUtlDgw==)

|
Peter,
For the last five months Defend our Courts has been ringing the alarm bell about the impending disaster for Democrats in the upcoming November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court race.
The situation on the ground is dire. We are being outspent, MAGA has more canvassers, they've nearly caught up to us in mail ballots, and polling is showing that we could lose.
Now, the entire Democratic movement has awoken to the blinking warning signs and the big guns are coming out: President Barack Obama just issued an urgent statement drawing attention to this race and urging Pennsylvanians to vote.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S2U-qYYLCMi_drYL8Y8PNFDR_fdxMv6gXKABliQ_XBjYQ-KwSxKEyNOfYSeI-J64lDCnKH_8KbIqSiq8vGy2p8bnUFtwd-yf7ECY0sJ2Yv-yglfgSSoXOu9UfJfN0Cc9GbKtYKRMNxowxB0FTBgn1Q36VcRNhgVij2jLr10iAKlXZfGFCYkF_cvu_CB6rOBEyRFmZpV6ifGTLtFM87depEC6Q6jcjX41T-fgbBqUaNDYy2FkbewZEg==&c=fUGFLXnFeOUklrp1c16XDiVJMKRbfrKfV7GYdDJr4fMxEesLRd2DVA==&ch=KzbZ600PyJG3SmM9JM3SGObxy5LHMYHI3LxVr9vZf8MbF60uUtlDgw==)
---
| This is a huge reprieve for besieged Pennsylvania Democrats but will it be enough?
The stakes of this race could not be higher. Losing this court means MAGA can implement an extreme abortion ban, conduct a blood red redistricting of the Pennsylvania Congressional map, and rig the 2026 and 2028 elections.
Given Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes, losing this court means Democrats never win PA again and without PA there is a real possibility that we could never win a Presidential election again (every recent election in which we've lost PA, Democrats lose the Presidency).
When the dust settles on November 5th we need to be able to say that we left nothing on the table, went for broke, and did everything in our power to save this critical court.
[Please, if you've been waiting to give or have anything left in the tank, make a contribution of $50, $25, or even $5 and we will rush it to the ground in Pennsylvania.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S2U-qYYLCMi_drYL8Y8PNFDR_fdxMv6gXKABliQ_XBjYQ-KwSxKEyNOfYSeI-J64lDCnKH_8KbIqSiq8vGy2p8bnUFtwd-yf7ECY0sJ2Yv-yglfgSSoXOu9UfJfN0Cc9GbKtYKRMNxowxB0FTBgn1Q36VcRNhgVij2jLr10iAKlXZfGFCYkF_cvu_CB6rOBEyRFmZpV6ifGTLtFM87depEC6Q6jcjX41WEE9tcIfh-HkbDd5qJpaGA==&c=fUGFLXnFeOUklrp1c16XDiVJMKRbfrKfV7GYdDJr4fMxEesLRd2DVA==&ch=KzbZ600PyJG3SmM9JM3SGObxy5LHMYHI3LxVr9vZf8MbF60uUtlDgw==)

clean_body: The entire Democratic movement has awoken to the blinking warning signs and the big guns are coming out. | | | | | == | Peter, For the last five months Defend our Courts has been ringing the alarm bell about the impending disaster for Democrats in the upcoming November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court race. The situation on the ground is dire. We are being outspent, MAGA has more canvassers, they've nearly caught up to us in mail ballots, and polling is showing that we could lose. Now, the entire Democratic movement has awoken to the blinking warning signs and the big guns are coming out: President Barack Obama just issued an urgent statement drawing attention to this race and urging Pennsylvanians to vote. | == | This is a huge reprieve for besieged Pennsylvania Democrats but will it be enough? The stakes of this race could not be higher. Losing this court means MAGA can implement an extreme abortion ban, conduct a blood red redistricting of the Pennsylvania Congressional map, and rig the 2026 and 2028 elections. Given Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes, losing this court means Democrats never win PA again and without PA there is a real possibility that we could never win a Presidential election again (every recent election in which we've lost PA, Democrats lose the Presidency). When the dust settles on November 5th we need to be able to say that we left nothing on the table, went for broke, and did everything in our power to save this critical court. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == | | | | For Pennsylvanians this is the fight of our lives. We will not forget that you had our back when we needed it most. Team Defend our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. body:
Those polls showing a close race are real, and we’re responding.
| We'll get right to the point.

A recent Emerson poll found this race tied — with tons of undecided voters. It’s not an outlier. We’ve lost count of how many polls have come out in recent weeks showing this race functionally tied.

In a race this close, the last thing we can afford is for people who support Mikie Sherrill to not show up to the polls, or leave their mail-in ballot sitting on their kitchen table.

**We just made a decision to MASSIVELY expand our GOTV program between now and Nov. 4 — counting on money that we don’t yet have, because we’re counting on this grassroots team to come in big for us down the stretch.**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: People need help.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark.
I’ll get right to the point. Donald Trump is trying to cut off SNAP benefits for millions of people. He’s doing that in November, with Thanksgiving in four weeks.
Donald Trump’s personal wealth has increased by billions since he retook the White House. This is the wealthiest nation on the planet. And millions of American families are wondering how they’re going to feed their kids.
Food banks are doing their best to help right now, but this is an unprecedented situation. I know times are tough, but if you have anything to spare, I am humbly asking you to help us keep their shelves full.
[**Can you make a donation right now to the Arizona Food Bank Network and help make sure folks don’t go hungry because of Trump’s mistakes?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-afbn/.YDmKuh&refcode=em251101-1-f&t=1&akid=6235%2E6688874%2EYONHl3)
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-afbn/.YDmKuh&refcode=em251101-1-f&t=2&akid=6235%2E6688874%2EYONHl3)**
That donation is going to make a difference for the people who need help right now.
Thank you in advance.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6235%2E6688874%2EYONHl3).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Fellow American,

My name is Winsome Earle-Sears, and if you don't mind, I'd like to tell you a little about myself. **I 'm not your typical politician, and I never will be. _This is my story._**

In 2021, I won the General Election for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia by less than 60,000 votes. In doing so, I became the first black woman to hold this office--but that's not why I ran. I ran to effect real change and instill common-sense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we have done and will continue to do.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b78fb068c0174873a7bad055fe1cd91b&_e=b27FqYgR9hxG9VnOF-78sm7DPt6pc9dpxrcPdut4G8MBxeEw3debu8FEvh_jAKxOd0V7lwIViVGh_Rbc5i-aNaKYavaNIi2LkpfE7UWSX2OI6KCHLI2JHPiIzfyd8Mlqo9iZGT5aKmTmNuWjktrfWS5tZtlsRYoK7OedkeBca6u0UZA1hZuHkEovbq5QncZwWfC8DgURT6XJ38KRr-YUzsbfTOr0GlBg7ZVGR0Zxyc6mZ0ojBuVKB4qod8KVVsj78wcU7BkbA27VETeRSuxxokdfqjHTJp5mZOkyl0wb-Vt8N7spKW3IOBhuPMe2PeeAADNbo5SKCFoP3SeuhneEUVwF2zE-g6YHXgHx6d7Xq64WXtrj048DZg_jfyHtMCNHITRMBl9iLfy6HmVL2q798giBQgL0Y7EosUMr8o6Hb9am_oWDaxr6wxiNMHd-9jCL9LzVvwccRoPZnxyfF5SxAnXT3D1B2MdnBkuKOnUdLnCpmjP-XQF3f99zZVNiVFaqo8lWqj7e0A0lFRFSsMJSc4knUQ0ftHgOprAni50911PC5ipGQNSR4Qz6MX16vyoFtH4KS1B_4tcoYOJrPn0S80TSCfHvwe8PKBzckPrbKTwKX0devi-f7JkKy9xgesumwPUzfRV22mePyPtwWKtb_bVUCRS6SB1XNwIkF-c4SIUau_euoCNeIJbtPIfomjatFOyFZ5YyXZu7aUJ9pYUnF4M__TcHDMVVk3dGyPgzGduLStpuOTslatIiCXoGlrYBAb2HZI0j4XWs-mJhh7u6cbqomK55bALPAB05TTlQ5nOf-jWpDllZom6Lj0bsxZps)

Before becoming the 2nd in command in Virginia, I beat a 20-year incumbent in 2001 to become the first Republican to win a seat in a majority black district in the Virginia House of Delegates since 1865. In the General Assembly, I focused on getting results for my constituents.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b78fb068c0174873a7bad055fe1cd91b&_e=b27FqYgR9hxG9VnOF-78sm7DPt6pc9dpxrcPdut4G8MBxeEw3debu8FEvh_jAKxOd0V7lwIViVGh_Rbc5i-aNaKYavaNIi2LkpfE7UWSX2OI6KCHLI2JHPiIzfyd8Mlqo9iZGT5aKmTmNuWjktrfWS5tZtlsRYoK7OedkeBca6u0UZA1hZuHkEovbq5QncZwWfC8DgURT6XJ38KRr-YUzsbfTOr0GlBg7ZVGR0Zxyc6mZ0ojBuVKB4qod8KVVsj78wcU7BkbA27VETeRSuxxokdfqjHTJp5mZOkyl0wb-Vt8N7spKW3IOBhuPMe2PeeAr9K_CQqOBOtZbLBkY2VQfORKmC7lP_TgBz_R2GQS3y6Fg_7ZisgAOBvOUZ9uuoo6kZXft5HmpSAxgHBBh01-Kk8LjpnNUINAqHHdWICjh4qT9hEtIG5_KLR9wbKDqWs_hxnBN7DQ6A_xEGuTYEpgvbgbpBEwI7Bf58fgLFtNY7REIASsa-ZTzPl0B6zh1OmzeUxUSnuK7N4qNAB7L_OY4kyBL_XfqayAEgIO-qFTSEHHwXYnVhMvlwG5YKQDKowp_14I_AMBU7ZUjhWTz1IXNiEV2hewAYdZE_bgXvT_Du1PU2rSdUdRfruc4Pu7SbmJCUReFBslCikDQr2Giyp72pZ8AsnJzbJWq3bnpiK6zam5AZuHpg8khyUmLsh2Y5PdW_wOaCR6Ga6IPrzv2dBtVpraTgeyxb-eKUS0kRaVkhj0tyG0ymmsX2F0GYDaBB1x8xBCKW6Wv0roIxMpVXFGEcqwqqZscPsUs3L-S98dlGQ89KOWxdQE-v1CsktT9qOj)

Prior to my career in politics, I had the distinct honor of serving as an electrician in the United States Marine Corps. It was here that I learned to be a leader--to improvise, adapt, and overcome. Looking back, my time in the Marines had a significant impact on who I am today, and for that, I'm ever grateful.
---

Looking even further back, when I was just 6 years old, my family and I came to the United States from Jamaica. We arrived in a new land with no money and different accents, but we made it work and got through the struggles - **only in America is something like this even possible. **
---

Of course, none of this would have been possible without my husband, Terence, and my amazing daughters. Throughout all of this, they have been my rock, and I owe them everything - they have kept me grounded, confident, and optimistic for the future.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b78fb068c0174873a7bad055fe1cd91b&_e=b27FqYgR9hxG9VnOF-78sm7DPt6pc9dpxrcPdut4G8MBxeEw3debu8FEvh_jAKxOd0V7lwIViVGh_Rbc5i-aNaKYavaNIi2LkpfE7UWSX2OI6KCHLI2JHPiIzfyd8Mlqo9iZGT5aKmTmNuWjktrfWS5tZtlsRYoK7OedkeBca6u0UZA1hZuHkEovbq5QncZwWfC8DgURT6XJ38KRr-YUzsbfTOr0GlBg7ZVGR0Zxyc6mZ0ojBuVKB4qod8KVVsj78wcU7BkbA27VETeRSuxxokdfqjHTJp5mZOkyl0wb-Vt8N7spKW3IOBhuPMe2PeeArOKbUVz4aH_hu3vM1r-X2zgexjmluKidoIEaMeiHtWqOMGx130A7jDjZOY3Rg-MNSWuszxc_qIRidOT9ODCeHnu2nD-VnjASBsiHZd_OV2N-yvXSXbAB00O_sggj5dpuV6w68Uujouj2KYHmNc3SQbv3MLp5l2ejUyp-Hjn4OFAw7TlNWKzJx6J3IfIYW4i-Qih4vfFYEk9d6yBO6paa-E0bpXqqbXWih_0b6GfG3MnaplYxUUg6LFJ8KGQYawCBbo3T-9FJBCHHxzMrHL02uGfOg-jWCUWQOyLi47t06aBC1JwmxmWahzHpuF1kQ7TS_6fV1B3D7JC_2bfEcatAiM-szIVRlj6IBMHNBYOBuZRFhisYRr2ww8p6nUIRPYdhH_RPSR4C1J-IWcIOMVTWvbSz5isVX4Pwo6ZKv-FMb81dsaIN2xGyJgKT7Qh5_BoDza4i6NZ7LaC2d0KNA1XXrnp8MNdXwtJ_MHJN2TwLLaWBotZxMl76TV0HbZgE9mYe)

As you can see, I've lived a full life. There have been highs, lows, and everything in between, but I don't regret a single thing. I maintain, without a shadow of a doubt, that my story is only possible in America. I am the second most powerful person in the former capital of the Confederacy, and I am a black female. _I am the epitome of the boundless opportunity and freedom that can _**only**_ be found in America.__**But Fellow American, my story is far from over.**_ I'm running for Governor not only to break records but also to continue spreading my conservative message - to show the world that a black, female, immigrant - and anyone else for that matter - can go from absolutely nothing to the highest levels of American politics. Now, the support I have received for my campaign thus far has been amazing, **but the reality is that if we 're going to have a shot at winning this thing, then we must be well-funded. ** _**[So, after all you’ve learned about me today, can you take just a second to chip in to support my campaign, even if it’s just a few bucks? This road ahead will be difficult, but this is nothing I haven’t experienced before - and it would be an honor to have you by my side, Fellow American.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b78fb068c0174873a7bad055fe1cd91b&_e=b27FqYgR9hxG9VnOF-78sm7DPt6pc9dpxrcPdut4G8MBxeEw3debu8FEvh_jAKxOd0V7lwIViVGh_Rbc5i-aNaKYavaNIi2LkpfE7UWSX2OI6KCHLI2JHPiIzfyd8Mlqo9iZGT5aKmTmNuWjktrfWS5tZtlsRYoK7OedkeBca6u0UZA1hZuHkEovbq5QncZwWfC8DgURT6XJ38KRr-YUzsbfTOr0GlBg7ZVGR0Zxyc6mZ0ojBuVKB4qod8KVVsj78wcU7BkbA27VETeRSuxxokdfqjHTJp5mZOkyl0wb-Vt8N7spKW3IOBhuPMe2PeeABuBDFww-svkvp2lmfh1Ol_QlYaGL7iO07dXCFZ9foPhEMo5jtdsVQLXrQkHmWTHTt79eInrZYnu6g-RQZXVFJ_BWGAFpKgQvLt9RMyx8R_pbQyndOmWPxNBgKl_6jPq4CRaoQewjwf66MPIeVX2X234UJJ9SzSs1TKKRbZcwl0AyYwzL8GnrlKQizH2-lLpuLO1d2t9R__PCkx42zn_EIHBWOKw_U9sI5PjTF_n7X9QKT0NSylbyDrktHQMG4H_4YCXUaU8VD4Wr3Ne5SmAJvmjABzlDeRNBrF6oIWC_am_vig681sAsdvD6FzeMZglUQekWYYOYv482MfgVT7xCO1-IpROqvrFggXBpwN3SKNN5FVWPuJ0XqF94PCrHx5N42pG6ViVr5Mg9ZIDccusmY0TZXlMJ4UcSiGoAsvOeKP8kIrdSjGx5R78Ua5_z60v7A68w4WuYhj6hUPNh5e-eOyCs9fX40tGfewfEK3sk4e7008y20teO8TJpswfS2DBR)**_

I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet!

It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Fellow American, My name is Winsome Earle-Sears, and if you don't mind, I'd like to tell you a little about myself. I 'm not your typical politician, and I never will be. This is my story. In 2021, I won the General Election for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia by less than 60,000 votes. In doing so, I became the first black woman to hold this office--but that's not why I ran. I ran to effect real change and instill common-sense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we have done and will continue to do. Before becoming the 2nd in command in Virginia, I beat a 20-year incumbent in 2001 to become the first Republican to win a seat in a majority black district in the Virginia House of Delegates since 1865. In the General Assembly, I focused on getting results for my constituents. Prior to my career in politics, I had the distinct honor of serving as an electrician in the United States Marine Corps. It was here that I learned to be a leader--to improvise, adapt, and overcome. Looking back, my time in the Marines had a significant impact on who I am today, and for that, I'm ever grateful. Looking even further back, when I was just 6 years old, my family and I came to the United States from Jamaica. We arrived in a new land with no money and different accents, but we made it work and got through the struggles - only in America is something like this even possible. Of course, none of this would have been possible without my husband, Terence, and my amazing daughters. Throughout all of this, they have been my rock, and I owe them everything - they have kept me grounded, confident, and optimistic for the future. As you can see, I've lived a full life. There have been highs, lows, and everything in between, but I don't regret a single thing. I maintain, without a shadow of a doubt, that my story is only possible in America. I am the second most powerful person in the former capital of the Confederacy, and I am a black female. I am the epitome of the boundless opportunity and freedom that can only be found in America.But Fellow American, my story is far from over. I'm running for Governor not only to break records but also to continue spreading my conservative message - to show the world that a black, female, immigrant - and anyone else for that matter - can go from absolutely nothing to the highest levels of American politics. Now, the support I have received for my campaign thus far has been amazing, but the reality is that if we 're going to have a shot at winning this thing, then we must be well-funded. Thank you for your time, and may God Bless the United States of America, Winsome Earle-Sears (R-VA)| * Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596

name: Adelita Grijalva
subject: “Bless her heart”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The voters have spoken and HIS job is to swear HER in. That's how it works.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30a5338d-20d7-4bbd-beea-54499cb1fcd4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69df7a08-ec15-499a-80f2-a84416e40c12/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Hey, it’s Adelita Grijalva — the Democratic Rep.-Elect that Speaker Mike Johnson is still refusing to swear in. When I told Blue Amp Action what Speaker Johnson said about me, they urged me to reach out and share it with you directly: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T53f27a42-6a1d-49bc-9af4-229f1a637243/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_" Bless her heart... she doesn't know how it works around here."_** That’s what he said — dismissive, patronizing, and **completely unacceptable.** Let me be clear, I know exactly how it works. Earlier this year, two Republicans were sworn in while the House was in recess and less than 24 hours after their elections. My race has been certified. The voters spoke. It's now been over a month! My job is to serve, and his job is to swear me in. FULL STOP. Instead, he's hiding behind smug, patronizing excuses. It's not just offensive, it's dangerous. A Speaker can't pick which Members to seat based on politics. **That's not how democracy works, that's how it dies.** **[Will you stand with me by splitting a $10 contribution or whatever you can between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help us keep the pressure on and show we won't accept this abuse of power?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf8723c3-7af5-4676-9d71-963d0d1b0403/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T037f9311-3ddd-42e5-b9f4-189c01e1af54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Spanberger HQ Alert (via Maggie Hassan)
subject: Breaking News: Winsome Earle-Sears is outspending us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Our opponent just bought $2 million in ads — the largest buy of the whole election.

**Breaking news:** Winsome Earle-Sears is outspending us.

She just bought $2 million in ads for the last week — the largest buy of the whole election and far above what we've budgeted.

_We need to correct this._ **Right now.**

_If we don't step up our fundraising, we will continue to be out-messaged the final few days of the campaign._

So, we've set our most ambitious goal yet to make sure we close this gap and reach millions of Virginians with the truth. What do you say?

[**_Will you contribute $10 or more so Abigail Spanberger can keep pace with her opponent's record spending and win big on Tuesday? name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: These democratic socialists are up against corporate Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We’re fighting for a government that serves the people rather than corporations or billionaires. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW6MxrrFUkvVqDSiFi0C3YirzMIc9yJ6Clp9kM8kQoKq5uRGmlf5qlyl8VnsNMffRs0gfg85udAytJscWEmX0k9uXiCahZr3PTo9qsLTXN8oivuTxVYKo5cJYCOM3OnQmX8G6OJ97kWbxO1kaO4qtth8tSsjkHPbQXhXJBcZrLEJ40b1U1ch44UezK0foi7XshGWIFB9DdJd-6dGynZb1r8K3fvIkj1baOMyULjtkdO_95Pbu5j7kfOl5ehb-KD-Ue/4l8/UbMlwjwQQFWQksWEuSiLbQ/h0/h001.Ur7AKdPLJqpBjYM-hHI03mIPaHkMw2szkSINKMqVof4)

Friend, Election Day is coming up in just a few days in many states. The progressive Working Families Party has endorsed local and state candidates around the country, including only two candidates in Michigan: Gabriela Santiago-Romero and Denzel McCampbell. Members of the Democratic Socialists of America, these champions for the working class are running for Detroit’s City Council against corporate Democrats. Denzel has led campaigns for justice and equity, voting rights and campaign finance reform, and responsive governments that co-govern with constituents. **He is running against a State Representative who has voted with Republicans against paid family leave, against raising the minimum wage, and against public school funding** —while failing to protect reproductive rights.
