clean_body: We’re fighting for a government that serves the people rather than corporations or billionaires. | | | Friend, Election Day is coming up in just a few days in many states. The progressive Working Families Party has endorsed local and state candidates around the country, including only two candidates in Michigan: Gabriela Santiago-Romero and Denzel McCampbell. Members of the Democratic Socialists of America, these champions for the working class are running for Detroit’s City Council against corporate Democrats. | Detroit is one of the poorest cities in the country, and more than half of our city’s children are now living in poverty.But Denzel’s opponent has continually aligned with Republicans as a state Representative, voting NO on paid family leave, raising the minimum wage, funding public schools, and reproductive rights. When speaking with residents, Denzel has found that people want something different; they want representatives who center the needs of Detroiters rather than catering to special interests and corporations. Recently we knocked on doors and spoke with voters together: Gaby, who’s running for re-election, has spearheaded and won changes to hold corporate polluters accountable, make housing more affordable, protect immigrants and other vulnerable residents, and expand Paratransit services for seniors and disabled people. She’s also worked directly with constituents in need, resolving over 1,000 cases with them. The Michigan Working Families Party PAC is getting out the vote for these two bold leaders who are committed to co-governing with their constituents. When we build the bench of progressive local leaders, we deepen our democracy, help our communities thrive, increase our ability to hold lawmakers accountable to serving the people, and grow our power nationwide. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to MI Working Families Party PAC | | | | | | | | | Thank you for supporting the bold changes we deserve. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Oct 31, 2025 Subject: These democratic socialists are up against corporate Democrats To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, With less than 5 days until Election Day, we need all hands on deck to elect the only Michigan candidates endorsed by the progressive Working Families Party: Gabriela Santiago-Romero and Denzel McCampbell. The Michigan Working Families Party is getting out the vote for these bold change-makers who will serve the people rather than corporations. Both members of the Democratic Socialists of America, Denzel and Gaby are running against corporate Democrats. Here’s part of their flyer for Get Out the Vote events for Gaby and Denzel: The Working Families Party’s Neighborhood Captains program has mobilized Detroiters to encourage their neighbors to vote. In addition to knocking on doors and making phone calls, these captains have hosted neighborhood events to discuss issues and build relationships with their neighbors. This is an important step toward long-term community-based relational organizing that regularly engages voters in issues that impact them. Denzel has led campaigns for justice and equity, voting rights and campaign finance reform, and responsive governments that co-govern with constituents. He is running against a State Representative who has voted with Republicans against paid family leave, against raising the minimum wage, and against public school funding —while failing to protect reproductive rights. Detroit is one of the poorest cities in the country, so its residents deserve elected leaders who serve the working class. Denzel and Gaby are running for Detroit City Council to make housing and healthcare affordable, protect immigrants and other vulnerable residents, hold corporate polluters accountable, and push for a budget that centers community investment. Gaby, who’s running for re-election, hit the ground running in her first term on the council. She secured funding to keep Detroiters in their homes and to support first-time homeowners, passed a policy to protect Detroiters from industrial pollution , and created a successful Community Violence Intervention program. She’s also offering “know your rights” trainings for immigrants and championing policy to limit local police cooperation with ICE. Right now, we need a surge of grassroots funding to help Gaby and Denzel overcome corporate PAC spending and win on Tuesday—Election Day. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to MI Working Families Party PAC | | | | | | | | | Thank you for helping to build the multi-racial democracy we deserve, where everyone can thrive. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Will you join our focus group…?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. I am honored to serve as your Chair of the DSCC.

My entire career, I've believed in **the power of grassroots activism.** I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. _And that last piece is why I want to hear from you._

**[Today, I'd like to invite you to join my official DSCC Focus Group. Flipping the Senate depends on knowing what issues and messages matter most to this team, so it's important that I personally hear from top supporters like you. Your feedback will enable us to build our strategy to take back the majority -- so please, will you take my survey before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/22096?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251101-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251101-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=21642%2E9716520%2Es_Vhif)**

| | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/22096?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251101-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251101-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=21642%2E9716520%2Es_Vhif)
---

Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue.

The Senate is our _best chance_ at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate _your_ invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face.

**[So please, will you take a few moments to join my DSCC Focus Group by completing a brief survey before midnight? Democrats are at our strongest when we hear from supporters like you, so I'm humbly asking you to take a few moments to share your thoughts on how we can win.](http://go.dscc.org/go/22096?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251101-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251101-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=21642%2E9716520%2Es_Vhif)**

The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and **[with your input](http://go.dscc.org/go/22096?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251101-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251101-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=21642%2E9716520%2Es_Vhif)** , we'll build our strongest majority yet.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/22096?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251101-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251101-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=21642%2E9716520%2Es_Vhif)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from YourCapitalMinds.com, an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. body:
These next 72 hours are when elections are won or lost.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118464972/579841466/1328794144?refcode=ea.4a1b26af-3ab7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4a1b26af-3ab7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMWIyNmFmLTNhYjctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O42aKEFOWr20qYGw-x17B5Xe0_5DKWcR2cyerw9u6EA=&emci=18d0e7a6-3ab7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4a1b26af-3ab7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
| **This is a longer message from Jane about our final push to Election Day.[If you're pressed for time but want to make an immediate impact, chip in any amount here to help power our climate champions across the finish line >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118464974/579841468/2105508926?refcode=ea.4a1b26af-3ab7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4a1b26af-3ab7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMWIyNmFmLTNhYjctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O42aKEFOWr20qYGw-x17B5Xe0_5DKWcR2cyerw9u6EA=)**
---
In just 3 days, results will start to come in for some of the most competitive and consequential races for our climate and democracy this year.
But before we get there, I’d like to pause to say **thank you for all you’ve done to get us to this moment.**
Whether you've chipped in a few bucks, signed petitions to protect our public lands, volunteered with one of our incredible candidates, or shared our messages with friends and family throughout the year — you’ve been part of something bigger than any one of us.
Now, as we approach our first major electoral test since Donald Trump returned to the White House, I want to give you a quick look at what we’re looking out for on Tuesday:
**VIRGINIA** Every single seat in the House of Delegates is on the ballot. We've endorsed **18 climate champions,** and Democrats are defending a majority so narrow that Republicans need just a few seats to flip control. We have three real opportunities to flip Republican-held districts, including two where our candidates lost by fewer than 200 votes last election. We also have **Ghazala Hashmi** running for Lieutenant Governor against an opponent who's taken over _$50,000 from Dominion Energy_ — the same big polluter she's fought for years.
---
**PENNSYLVANIA** We're finishing what we started in 2023. The **Luzerne County Council** used to have a 10-1 Republican supermajority. We helped break it. Now, if we win just two more seats, we’ll flip the entire council to a pro-environment majority and cement the progress we made in 2023. We're also backing **Joe Khan for Bucks County District Attorney** — a county Trump won by just _291 votes_ last year — and **Tara Zrinski for Northampton County Executive.** Tara has spent years fighting pipelines, fracking, and fossil fuel interests in her community, and she’s ready to implement a climate action plan to lead the county forward.
---
**COLORADO** Our candidates are taking on some of the state's worst corporate polluters in communities that desperately need environmental justice. From **Commerce City** — _one of the most polluted zip codes in America_ — to **Aurora,** where a massive fracking project threatens the city's water supply, our climate champions refuse to let their neighbors become sacrifice zones.
---
**GEORGIA, MICHIGAN, MISSISSIPPI, OHIO, & TEXAS** Our climate champions are running for everything from school boards to the **Public Service Commission** to Congress — high-stakes positions with real power to block corporate polluters and invest in clean energy.
---
In total, we have over _60 candidates_ in more than _10 states_ running to Trump-proof their communities, challenge the status quo, and deliver bold, forward-thinking solutions.
**So this is it. This is when campaigns deploy their final get-out-the-vote operations. When they make their last push to reach undecided voters. When every conversation, every door knock, every phone call could tip these races.**
**[These next 72 hours are when elections are won or lost. We've come too far to slow down now. You can use this link or one of the buttons below to chip in any amount to help our candidates reach every last voter before polls close.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118464975/579841469/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.4a1b26af-3ab7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4a1b26af-3ab7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMWIyNmFmLTNhYjctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O42aKEFOWr20qYGw-x17B5Xe0_5DKWcR2cyerw9u6EA=)**

clean_body: These next 72 hours are when elections are won or lost. | | This is a longer message from Jane about our final push to Election Day.= In just 3 days, results will start to come in for some of the most competitive and consequential races for our climate and democracy this year. But before we get there, I’d like to pause to say thank you for all you’ve done to get us to this moment. Whether you've chipped in a few bucks, signed petitions to protect our public lands, volunteered with one of our incredible candidates, or shared our messages with friends and family throughout the year — you’ve been part of something bigger than any one of us. Now, as we approach our first major electoral test since Donald Trump returned to the White House, I want to give you a quick look at what we’re looking out for on Tuesday: VIRGINIA Every single seat in the House of Delegates is on the ballot. We've endorsed 18 climate champions, and Democrats are defending a majority so narrow that Republicans need just a few seats to flip control. We have three real opportunities to flip Republican-held districts, including two where our candidates lost by fewer than 200 votes last election. We also have Ghazala Hashmi running for Lieutenant Governor against an opponent who's taken over $50,000 from Dominion Energy — the same big polluter she's fought for years. PENNSYLVANIA We're finishing what we started in 2023. The Luzerne County Council used to have a 10-1 Republican supermajority. We helped break it. Now, if we win just two more seats, we’ll flip the entire council to a pro-environment majority and cement the progress we made in 2023. We're also backing Joe Khan for Bucks County District Attorney — a county Trump won by just 291 votes last year — and Tara Zrinski for Northampton County Executive. Tara has spent years fighting pipelines, fracking, and fossil fuel interests in her community, and she’s ready to implement a climate action plan to lead the county forward. COLORADO Our candidates are taking on some of the state's worst corporate polluters in communities that desperately need environmental justice. From Commerce City — one of the most polluted zip codes in America — to Aurora, where a massive fracking project threatens the city's water supply, our climate champions refuse to let their neighbors become sacrifice zones. GEORGIA, MICHIGAN, MISSISSIPPI, OHIO, & TEXAS Our climate champions are running for everything from school boards to the Public Service Commission to Congress — high-stakes positions with real power to block corporate polluters and invest in clean energy. In total, we have over 60 candidates in more than 10 states running to Trump-proof their communities, challenge the status quo, and deliver bold, forward-thinking solutions. So this is it. This is when campaigns deploy their final get-out-the-vote operations. When they make their last push to reach undecided voters. When every conversation, every door knock, every phone call could tip these races. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's finish strong. Together. xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
Trump’s plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity — a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KPcp3ULV_VulArpTQc6Bi1_l07k5ywZ46a5ajxMUkZUttnQfZG0xwrBENqUb0aNL9UB3KaDvBs3DnawoDiO0XdWmV5tDcjFEYpfvuGGsOR7KKVnGKK2SfHWNvJ-OzHZD2qZYiJNahtogQeREwCF0pNALVO5iRbGTvGkl-XKIJXr86mlKMGe-2f67pN_MN6sc7VqmtFXk-o3ty9sqGY4TQ184j6f-S4OADJRZhH_RUfs=&c=AT5FnncqxqyA2fT9aIFYi75T3HwSY56VibWV2qv5CJs_wKNT6k5x2g==&ch=OrZfZzFSAt1DgxuvvnAYX5P0txERiC_Qq8nf7JgluIqolfMAgb7zOg==)
---
| Peter,
For the first tens months of Trump's return to the White House, Democrats have been mounting a desperate defense of Democracy from a president drunk with power.
We've seen Trump crack down on freedom of speech, unleash soldiers in American cities, and use ICE as his personal gestapo to inflict terror on Democrat run cities.
All of it is wildly unpopular -- but Trump's plowing ahead like elections don't matter. Because that's the plan: end democracy before voters can end him.
The November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election is the bellwether for everything that comes next for America.
If Trump flips PA's Supreme Court, he'll control the very body that decides how elections are run in the most critical swing state in the nation. This would allow him to gerrymander PA, suppress Dem votes, and ban mail-in ballots to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KPcp3ULV_VulArpTQc6Bi1_l07k5ywZ46a5ajxMUkZUttnQfZG0xwrBENqUb0aNL9UB3KaDvBs3DnawoDiO0XdWmV5tDcjFEYpfvuGGsOR7KKVnGKK2SfHWNvJ-OzHZD2qZYiJNahtogQeREwCF0pNALVO5iRbGTvGkl-XKIJXr86mlKMGe-2f67pN_MN6sc7VqmtFXk-o3ty9sqGY4TQzY2tT-VfrqaVuf7IZnfLT8=&c=AT5FnncqxqyA2fT9aIFYi75T3HwSY56VibWV2qv5CJs_wKNT6k5x2g==&ch=OrZfZzFSAt1DgxuvvnAYX5P0txERiC_Qq8nf7JgluIqolfMAgb7zOg==)
---
But Trump's plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity -- a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back.
His deeply unpopular fascist agenda can only continue if he is able to rig upcoming elections to avoid backlash from voters. But If Democrats win in PA this November, it will set off a chain reaction paving the way for Democrats to end the Trump era once and for all:

* Win Back the U.S. House in 2026 -- with fair districts and voter protections in PA, Trump loses his ability to tip the scales in MAGA's direction for the midterms.

* Halt Trump's Fascist Agenda in Congress-- with Dems in control of the House, they can stop his efforts to criminalize dissent, target the press, and rig the economy in favor of MAGA billionaires.

* Expose Trump's Corruption -- launch House investigations to uncover and prosecute the crimes, cover-ups, and abuses of his administration.

* End the Trump era for good in 2028 -- with the most important swing state in the nation protected, Trump faces a backlash at the polls for the utter failure of his presidency and Democrats win back the White House. America closes the door for good on the Trump era.

Defend Our Courts is leading the counterattack against Trump in PA, rallying tens of thousands of Democrats across the nation to join us in our defense of the Dems on PA's Supreme Court. Having now raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the largest Democratic organizations in this fight.
But with only 3 days left, we are still being outspent by MAGA in this race. With your help, we can close the spending gap by election day and ensure the beginning of the end of the Trump era starts in PA.
[Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or $10 to help Defend Our Courts defend PA's Supreme Court and usher in the fall of Donald Trump?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KPcp3ULV_VulArpTQc6Bi1_l07k5ywZ46a5ajxMUkZUttnQfZG0xwrBENqUb0aNL9UB3KaDvBs3DnawoDiO0XdWmV5tDcjFEYpfvuGGsOR7KKVnGKK2SfHWNvJ-OzHZD2qZYiJNahtogQeREwCF0pNALVO5iRbGTvGkl-XKIJXr86mlKMGe-2f67pN_MN6sc7VqmtFXk-o3ty9sqGY4TQ9nqAV4S1PU34GeX6Z9RF5o=&c=AT5FnncqxqyA2fT9aIFYi75T3HwSY56VibWV2qv5CJs_wKNT6k5x2g==&ch=OrZfZzFSAt1DgxuvvnAYX5P0txERiC_Qq8nf7JgluIqolfMAgb7zOg==)

_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118465462/579843150/-515208178?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_011125_FR_SNAP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U4OGU4Y2YtM2JiNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IWSTlozbyIheBgKfMg2G1LoFRPk0k01Z8tCxwTRQvUU=)_
Hey team,

We’ve seen the news this last week that SNAP benefits have run out of funding, leaving hungry families without food during the month of Thanksgiving.

Food is a right, not a privilege. In one of the wealthiest countries in the world, we should not be having public discourse – started by the President and his administration – about which people deserve to eat, and which deserve to starve.

Food pantries in our state are likely to see an influx in people this month. We know Trump and his minions want to inflict as much damage as possible. So we need to step up.
[_**You can click here to find a food pantry near you.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118465464/579843151/-1557314720?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_011125_FR_SNAP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U4OGU4Y2YtM2JiNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IWSTlozbyIheBgKfMg2G1LoFRPk0k01Z8tCxwTRQvUU=&emci=8c372147-a0b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=3e88e8cf-3bb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=81601)
If you need food: **please visit**. There’s no shame in accepting help, and these organizations are here to help you.

If you’re able, please consider making a donation to a food bank near you. Canned goods and non-perishables are always appreciated, but monetary contributions make a huge difference in what food banks are able to provide and are often even more valuable than food donations.

Look out for our communities,

IDCCA

subject: The beginning of the end of Trump starts in PA

body:
Trump’s plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity — a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aXqhf-h4OKhikU4FRATIkZj1D_stuyOmQjUXugO2KjLgoatHn4XU-G8Aeizkj51EUvxErZzzJQbwIQ7mFHIZkC26cYCidQOcWmlhryFBWB7WsCmlLHoZbKwpKgi-n5svV0sPysiPMDRdsFakfC25iZadOH2Bm6ojduwK5Z_R20IS_SfvrLtsIxckmVda8tGH2zP4Lr1VBZXnEO8m26LQ-cYJLG-YFhC9NgRCv92bUIsZ7A_alH1FDg==&c=9I-sqzy_ewzp899Km4YxMSOCIALBXW_Wd5ev9ZRbIvQrj4DWshif7g==&ch=k9bJY6irGrHJWvrRAaoBoRnW6niSe-K5vNCtB4BsKlVMF61v6t4HGA==)
---
| Peter,
For the first tens months of Trump's return to the White House, Democrats have been mounting a desperate defense of Democracy from a president drunk with power.
We've seen Trump crack down on freedom of speech, unleash soldiers in American cities, and use ICE as his personal gestapo to inflict terror on Democrat run cities.
All of it is wildly unpopular -- but Trump's plowing ahead like elections don't matter. Because that's the plan: end democracy before voters can end him.
The November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election is the bellwether for everything that comes next for America.
If Trump flips PA's Supreme Court, he'll control the very body that decides how elections are run in the most critical swing state in the nation. This would allow him to gerrymander PA, suppress Dem votes, and ban mail-in ballots to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aXqhf-h4OKhikU4FRATIkZj1D_stuyOmQjUXugO2KjLgoatHn4XU-G8Aeizkj51EUvxErZzzJQbwIQ7mFHIZkC26cYCidQOcWmlhryFBWB7WsCmlLHoZbKwpKgi-n5svV0sPysiPMDRdsFakfC25iZadOH2Bm6ojduwK5Z_R20IS_SfvrLtsIxckmVda8tGH2zP4Lr1VBZXnEO8m26LQ-cYJLG-YFhC97oDz5hbOCiSBSOZbSLYQ2Q==&c=9I-sqzy_ewzp899Km4YxMSOCIALBXW_Wd5ev9ZRbIvQrj4DWshif7g==&ch=k9bJY6irGrHJWvrRAaoBoRnW6niSe-K5vNCtB4BsKlVMF61v6t4HGA==)
---
But Trump's plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity -- a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back.
His deeply unpopular fascist agenda can only continue if he is able to rig upcoming elections to avoid backlash from voters. But If Democrats win in PA this November, it will set off a chain reaction paving the way for Democrats to end the Trump era once and for all:

* Win Back the U.S. House in 2026 -- with fair districts and voter protections in PA, Trump loses his ability to tip the scales in MAGA's direction for the midterms.

* Halt Trump's Fascist Agenda in Congress-- with Dems in control of the House, they can stop his efforts to criminalize dissent, target the press, and rig the economy in favor of MAGA billionaires.

* Expose Trump's Corruption -- launch House investigations to uncover and prosecute the crimes, cover-ups, and abuses of his administration.

* End the Trump era for good in 2028 -- with the most important swing state in the nation protected, Trump faces a backlash at the polls for the utter failure of his presidency and Democrats win back the White House. America closes the door for good on the Trump era.

Defend Our Courts is leading the counterattack against Trump in PA, rallying tens of thousands of Democrats across the nation to join us in our defense of the Dems on PA's Supreme Court. Having now raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the largest Democratic organizations in this fight.
But with only 3 days left, we are still being outspent by MAGA in this race. With your help, we can close the spending gap by election day and ensure the beginning of the end of the Trump era starts in PA.
[Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or $10 to help Defend Our Courts defend PA's Supreme Court and usher in the fall of Donald Trump?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aXqhf-h4OKhikU4FRATIkZj1D_stuyOmQjUXugO2KjLgoatHn4XU-G8Aeizkj51EUvxErZzzJQbwIQ7mFHIZkC26cYCidQOcWmlhryFBWB7WsCmlLHoZbKwpKgi-n5svV0sPysiPMDRdsFakfC25iZadOH2Bm6ojduwK5Z_R20IS_SfvrLtsIxckmVda8tGH2zP4Lr1VBZXnEO8m26LQ-cYJLG-YFhC9xZH0N1zojavwBaPuQ1cdxg==&c=9I-sqzy_ewzp899Km4YxMSOCIALBXW_Wd5ev9ZRbIvQrj4DWshif7g==&ch=k9bJY6irGrHJWvrRAaoBoRnW6niSe-K5vNCtB4BsKlVMF61v6t4HGA==)

clean_body: Trump’s plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity — a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back. | | | | | == | Peter, For the first tens months of Trump's return to the White House, Democrats have been mounting a desperate defense of Democracy from a president drunk with power. We've seen Trump crack down on freedom of speech, unleash soldiers in American cities, and use ICE as his personal gestapo to inflict terror on Democrat run cities. All of it is wildly unpopular -- but Trump's plowing ahead like elections don't matter. Because that's the plan: end democracy before voters can end him. The November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election is the bellwether for everything that comes next for America. If Trump flips PA's Supreme Court, he'll control the very body that decides how elections are run in the most critical swing state in the nation. This would allow him to gerrymander PA, suppress Dem votes, and ban mail-in ballots to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. | | == But Trump's plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity -- a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back. His deeply unpopular fascist agenda can only continue if he is able to rig upcoming elections to avoid backlash from voters. But If Democrats win in PA this November, it will set off a chain reaction paving the way for Democrats to end the Trump era once and for all: Win Back the U.S. House in 2026 -- with fair districts and voter protections in PA, Trump loses his ability to tip the scales in MAGA's direction for the midterms. Halt Trump's Fascist Agenda in Congress-- with Dems in control of the House, they can stop his efforts to criminalize dissent, target the press, and rig the economy in favor of MAGA billionaires. Expose Trump's Corruption -- launch House investigations to uncover and prosecute the crimes, cover-ups, and abuses of his administration. End the Trump era for good in 2028 -- with the most important swing state in the nation protected, Trump faces a backlash at the polls for the utter failure of his presidency and Democrats win back the White House. America closes the door for good on the Trump era. Defend Our Courts is leading the counterattack against Trump in PA, rallying tens of thousands of Democrats across the nation to join us in our defense of the Dems on PA's Supreme Court. Having now raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the largest Democratic organizations in this fight. But with only 3 days left, we are still being outspent by MAGA in this race. With your help, we can close the spending gap by election day and ensure the beginning of the end of the Trump era starts in PA. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | The fight to end the Trump era begins in Pennsylvania -- and it starts right now. name: Roy Cooper
subject: North Carolinians need your help
body:
Peter,

Starting today, more than a million people across NC will have a harder time feeding their kids because of Washington’s dysfunction.

Right now across our country, SNAP benefits are at risk for tens of millions of families who rely on it to put food on the table.

I’ve seen firsthand how hard people are working to make ends meet — and how much it hurts when politics in Washington makes their lives harder. We cannot accept the fact that DC is too broken to come together to feed hungry kids.

That’s why I’m personally asking. If you have $5, $10, or anything at all, can you donate to the Food Bank of Central & Eastern North Carolina today? Every dollar you give will help provide nutritious meals to children, seniors, and hardworking parents in communities from Raleigh to Wilmington and beyond. [https://secure.foodbankcenc.org/site/Donation2?df_id=14505&mfc_pref=T&14505.donation=form1&s_src=fy26_email_leadgen&s_subsrc=snap_rc26_all_1&autologin=true&utm_source=leadgen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=snap&utm_content=snap_rc26_all_1]

This is what North Carolinians do best: we look out for one another. Let’s make sure no family in our state goes hungry.

Thank you for standing up for our neighbors and for the values that make North Carolina strong.

Roy Cooper

Contact us [info@roycooper.com] |
Privacy Policy [https://roycooper.com/privacy-policy/]

Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602

Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XRfPFq3TrUC8xvIQHGyyTA2?unsubscribedata=O%2Buz0tPuqUFVMnTdgjF7niCOuTKm4dZHPyXZ1HdO4WE5yWH%2BNbuK75jcnXM2fkV3Z8cTpu62uaX5bzqbv%2FrvUWznd%2FcdPQ8jDLkmO852EaNiTQKeMjQUlin%2F%2FshUZocU3yT8%2F0A3Dkpi9Kr%2Bl3Aros0UeMg2%2BxYxrigFugwuWlCT94YsAi90q8RcGkaHjfJqiNUrvMBCnI2%2BE9eWKer%2FuXB8S%2FCy2dAoz%2FPlXZubLqVH7lBVx0Ow1hT3%2BEOXl7%2FCvF8Ky38%2FJdwIm%2FPg89BnYvBb87hy0Ay9KRLPJKQUHIQF2ffhEB%2BFLzX3IEc4ISPr1o2ocaG7Mo9931%2BbB8I0QUtNm2d4%2BZGrPDSmVmKVqaUtUwSRYQ3MVgPcL4b7st0fRMIDjGgY8FQhpoudHkBMgPQZRMdrBJoRq9WaRGMxvF7cJnxyqnKcT9jDi1nKHd9%2B]

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Not the news I wanted to share today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
While we came very close, we were still a few donations short at the stroke of midnight.
| | |
---
Hi there – it's Michael.
While I've been focused on reopening the government and saving Obamacare tax credits in Washington, I know my team has reached out to you a couple of times this week about our end-of-month goal to raise 10,000 grassroots donations.
Well, friend, I hope you'll hear me out once more – **because the truth is, while we came very close, we were still a few donations short at the stroke of midnight**.
(If you were one of the thousands of people who did pitch in, however, I hope you know how incredibly grateful I am to have earned your support.)
With ACA open enrollment starting today, **280,000 Coloradans** are about to feel the cost of the GOP’s refusal to act on rising health care premiums. So if Trump and the Republicans think they can make working families pay 2X (or more) for essential health care and get away with it, we'll have to make them pay at the ballot box next year.
**That's why I'm extending the deadline until 11:59 p.m. tonight** – both to close the gap and because I need all the help I can get if we're going to protect the people of Colorado from the president's cruelty.
**As governor, I’ll always stand with Coloradans to protect our health, our communities, and our future – no matter what Trump does. But I can't fulfill that promise without you powering this campaign to victory –[ so please, friend, will you chip in anything right now _(even if just $1!)_ and be one of the last few grassroots donations I need to meet this goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118466731/579847604/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk967-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGM4MzU4NC0zY2I3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gr8-WBTw7CvX_OcPu1-aVutwd3RpFciwsXJbxjpXmdw=)**

clean_body: While we came very close, we were still a few donations short at the stroke of midnight. | | | Hi there – it's Michael. While I've been focused on reopening the government and saving Obamacare tax credits in Washington, I know my team has reached out to you a couple of times this week about our end-of-month goal to raise 10,000 grassroots donations. Well, friend, I hope you'll hear me out once more – because the truth is, while we came very close, we were still a few donations short at the stroke of midnight. (If you were one of the thousands of people who did pitch in, however, I hope you know how incredibly grateful I am to have earned your support.) With ACA open enrollment starting today, 280,000 Coloradans are about to feel the cost of the GOP’s refusal to act on rising health care premiums. So if Trump and the Republicans think they can make working families pay 2X (or more) for essential health care and get away with it, we'll have to make them pay at the ballot box next year. That's why I'm extending the deadline until 11:59 p.m. tonight – both to close the gap and because I need all the help I can get if we're going to protect the people of Colorado from the president's cruelty. As governor, I’ll always stand with Coloradans to protect our health, our communities, and our future – no matter what Trump does. But I can't fulfill that promise without you powering this campaign to victory –= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you in advance for your help with this – and just for being a part of this grassroots team. Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Our work is not done — join the movement
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251101-1603-foote&t=1001&akid=1603%2E342411%2EYBE1wH ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Last month, supporters like you helped power the Squad’s fight for real,
progressive change. Together, we’re taking on authoritarianism, fighting
corporate greed, and pushing bold policies that give everyone a fair shot
— from affordable healthcare and workers’ rights to racial justice and
climate action.

Now is the moment to join
the fight,
Peter. Your support fuels the
Squad’s fight to challenge entrenched power, take on authoritarian
threats, and push policies that make sure no one gets left behind.
Grassroots power is how we win.

The Squad doesn’t just talk about change. We make it happen. But our work
is not done. Every new supporter and every voice in this movement
strengthens our ability to protect democracy and deliver progress for
everyone.

We’re seeing results, but only because of having a team like you. The
far-right is ramping up attacks on our democracy, and the next fights will
be tough. But together, with our movement, we can defend our democracy,
expand opportunity, and make sure progress doesn’t just happen for a few —
it happens for everyone.

Thank you for standing with us,

The Squad Victory Fund

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are taking a stand against Trump,
his MAGA cronies, and anyone who stands in the way of justice — but they
can’t do it alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251101-movement.gJOvTM&refcode=em20251101-1603&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1603%2E342411%2EYBE1wH ]Chip in now to stand with the Squad and keep this movement going
strong.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251101-movement.gJOvTM&refcode=em20251101-1603&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1603%2E342411%2EYBE1wH ]Contribute ››

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1603%2E342411%2EYBE1wH

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Marina Jenkins, All On The Line
subject: We can’t take our eyes off anti-democracy attacks on the census
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We need your help to keep up our efforts fighting back
|
---

Peter,
The attacks on our democracy have been nonstop these days. It feels like we can barely catch our breath:
Multiple states have passed rare mid-decade redraws — manipulating their congressional maps to unfairly hold on to power and ignore the will of the people. And if the news is any indication, more states might follow suit.
The Supreme Court just heard oral arguments in _Louisiana v. Callais_ over whether the Voting Rights Act is constitutional. Their impending decision will have nationwide implications for fair maps.
And behind the scenes, the Trump administration is making efforts to hijack one of the most important tools for determining fair representation: **The U.S. Census. **
[**This is an urgent moment that requires urgent support. We have to be ready to respond as a movement. Will you make a donation to help us defeat these attacks and protect democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118466826/579847905/2092430633?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_CensusAttacks_email_20251101-AOTL-Tier1-CensusAttacks_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251101-AOTL-Tier1-CensusAttacks_&utm_campaign=CensusAttacks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkMmIzMjE4LTNjYjctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=37bEZY6yNvUS6VPgwDheVQS6FZL1RgdIPDOEVvM4wpA=)

Listen: I get it. There’s _a lot_ going on right now. Anti-democracy forces want to overwhelm us with their incessant efforts. We _can’t_ let them.
In less than a year, Trump and other extremists have unleashed a whirlwind of attacks on the census, one of the foundations of our democracy:
* The Trump administration removed census data from the internet that is normally available to the public.
* Four conservative states filed a lawsuit against the Census Bureau, asking the court to order the Bureau to exclude undocumented persons and people with temporary visas.
* Anti-democracy lawmakers have proposed multiple bills aimed at excluding residents without U.S. citizenship from the 2030 Census.

The census is supposed to count _all_ of the people living in our country. It’s meant to be an accurate count of the entire population. Not only does it determine how much representation each state has in the House of Representatives, it also determines state funding for critical programs, including improving public schools and fixing potholes.
But if extremists get their way, they’ll hijack the census in a blatant power grab. **I know we know we can defeat this attack, because the last time they tried to undermine the census, we won. But we’ll have our work cut out for us to make it happen. We need to be ready to get the word out about the importance of the census.**

clean_body: We need your help to keep up our efforts fighting back | Peter, The attacks on our democracy have been nonstop these days. It feels like we can barely catch our breath: Multiple states have passed rare mid-decade redraws — manipulating their congressional maps to unfairly hold on to power and ignore the will of the people. And if the news is any indication, more states might follow suit. The Supreme Court just heard oral arguments in Louisiana v. Callais over whether the Voting Rights Act is constitutional. Their impending decision will have nationwide implications for fair maps. And behind the scenes, the Trump administration is making efforts to hijack one of the most important tools for determining fair representation: The U.S. Census. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Listen: I get it. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118468320/579853229/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_OTH_TY_110125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTg1MTFlNy0zZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9q5pc7YHFtFEDlyYuFAOzrrGxJCO2PuLekenAuzdt34=&emci=e7ea5bf3-a6b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=058511e7-3db7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=51844520) We have had a busy month, and I have one thing to communicate today: _Thank you._ Ever since we launched this campaign, I’ve been blown away by the support you’ve shown. I was honored to speak with so many of you on our Fight for Colorado tour earlier this month, and hear all about your hopes, ideas, and what concerns you. And so many of you have shown your support by donating. We are building a grassroots movement. Please know that your dollars are making a real impact. Since the very beginning, I’ve said that Colorado deserves a fighter. Let me be more specific — here’s what a fighter does:
* A fighter listens deeply, stands up, and delivers.
* A fighter does not appease bullies, like those in power in DC.
* A fighter takes concrete action to protect our precious land, air, and water.
* A fighter leans into challenges — like affordable housing and child care and thriving public schools — with a collaborative and innovative spirit — and a commitment to getting results.
* A fighter invests in our kids, young adults and workers, so everyone can build a thriving future in Colorado.
* A fighter defends our democracy, our right to representation, and the rule of law.
* _A fighter leads — taking on the fight while others hold back._

**I’m honored that you put your trust in me to be that fighter for the state we all love.** Once again, and from the bottom of my heart: thank you. I’m looking forward to seeing you out on the campaign trail (and here in your inbox). With gratitude, Phil P.S. — We have published our **[Colorado Blueprint](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118468321/579853230/971055370?refcode=em_WEI_OTH_TY_110125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTg1MTFlNy0zZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9q5pc7YHFtFEDlyYuFAOzrrGxJCO2PuLekenAuzdt34=&emci=e7ea5bf3-a6b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=058511e7-3db7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=51844520)** so you can take a look at our thoughts and share yours. **[You can leave us a suggestion or a question here any day, any time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118468322/579853231/94470019?refcode=em_WEI_OTH_TY_110125&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTg1MTFlNy0zZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9q5pc7YHFtFEDlyYuFAOzrrGxJCO2PuLekenAuzdt34=&emci=e7ea5bf3-a6b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=058511e7-3db7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=51844520)**

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Get corruption out of politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The wannabe dictator is choosing to keep SNAP benefits from going out to hungry families on November 1st. | |
---
Peter, **Any other president would be looking for ways to feed families in need right now.** This one is more interested in using them as a political punching bag. Due to the ongoing government shutdown, SNAP food benefits for children, elders, and those with disabilities have run out of funding. **The Department of Agriculture has $5 billion in reserves for exactly this situation—but Trump is refusing to release the money.** **Instead, he’s letting more than 40 million people go hungry.** He hopes to force Democrats to vote to end the shutdown without having to give in to their demands to keep healthcare premiums low. Yesterday, two lower court judges ordered the Administration to release these emergency funds. But the Trump administration is planning to appeal to the MAGA Supreme Court once again to overrule them. **The Supreme Court has enabled Trump’s lawlessness and corruption. If they won’t look out for the people, we need our governors to stand up and do the right thing.** [**Send a letter to your governor now. clean_body: The wannabe dictator is choosing to keep SNAP benefits from going out to hungry families on November 1st. | | Peter, Any other president would be looking for ways to feed families in need right now. This one is more interested in using them as a political punching bag. Due to the ongoing government shutdown, SNAP food benefits for children, elders, and those with disabilities have run out of funding. The Department of Agriculture has $5 billion in reserves for exactly this situation—but Trump is refusing to release the money. Instead, he’s letting more than 40 million people go hungry. He hopes to force Democrats to vote to end the shutdown without having to give in to their demands to keep healthcare premiums low. Yesterday, two lower court judges ordered the Administration to release these emergency funds. But the Trump administration is planning to appeal to the MAGA Supreme Court once again to overrule them. The Supreme Court has enabled Trump’s lawlessness and corruption. If they won’t look out for the people, we need our governors to stand up and do the right thing. Trump is the only president in American history to cut millions of hungry people off of their SNAP benefits. And he can’t blame this on anyone else. His administration funded SNAP during his first-term shutdown. The government is legally required to do so. This is his choice. Food banks and charities can’t keep up with the volume of people served by SNAP. Attorneys general in over two dozen states have sued Trump to keep SNAP alive. But people will start going hungry tomorrow—they can’t wait for lower courts to side with them only to watch Trump run to the MAGA Supreme Court justices for cover. This administration needs every ounce of pressure we can muster to feed families in need of SNAP. Governors—especially those from red states—can make a difference in this fight. Thank you for standing up for hungry families, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . name: Kirk Cameron
subject: This story sold out in THREE HOURS
body:

Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because **BRAVE Books** is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... **[...I thought you’d want to be one of the first to know what’s going on.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) ** **Fellow Conservative, BRAVE Books** has introduced _Mouse in the House_ as a Christian alternative to that other secular “Christmas” game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to “spy” on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa’s gifts. My friends at**BRAVE Books** knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created _Mouse in the House_ to help parents emphasize the joy of _giving_ more than _getting_ in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,___Mouse in the House_ sold out in THREE HOURS! Fellow Conservative, I know it’s only November, but this year we don’t want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand.
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| **BRAVE Books** is ramping up production big-time and fast. **[And today I’m hoping you’ll contribute to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign by rushing back your one-time gift in the next 24 hours.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Friend, you’re one of our best supporters and I’m so grateful.
---
| | **BRAVE Books** is ramping up production big-time and fast. [And today I’m hoping you’ll contribute to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign by rushing back your one-time gift in the next 24 hours. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Fellow Conservative, you’re one of our best supporters and I’m so grateful.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | You understand that **BRAVE Books** is fighting to restore our culture because we can’t just give up and let the radicals erase America’s Judeo-Christian values. >>> Your support has already helped get “See You at the Library” kits to thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens who gathered at over 201 libraries in 46 states (including the Library of Congress!) to take back our libraries. Together, we countered the Left’s radical and ungodly “Drag Queen Story Hours” and filled children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. >>> Your last gift helped us finish filming TWO whole seasons of our historic TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk.” This is the very first television show funded by everyday Americans to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” is our modern day “Mr. Rogers’ Neighborhood” that uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are the difference between success and failure with our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign. Just look at what parents have already said about our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle that comes with a beautiful book and adorable stuffed mouse:
---
_“So thankful for a thoughtful new Christmas tradition for our children. The story is sweet, the explanation of Christmas is poignant, and the mouse is so adorable. Thank you, Brave Books!!!” — Jenae K._ _“I love the Godly service ideas!” – Susan_ _“I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season.” – Kat F._
---
**Fellow Conservative, parents are hungry for Godly content that helps them counter the wicked culture.** **And your support helps BRAVE Books supply it.** **[Your gift of $35, $50 or even $100 not only helps fund our “ _More Mouse in the House_ _!_ ” campaign... ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Your gift helps **BRAVE Books** complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. Fellow Conservative, nothing we accomplish is possible without you. And that’s why as a thank you for being such a faithful and faith-filled friend, when you contribute $100 or more to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign... ...we will send one out to you absolutely free. You can keep the _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle for your family, you can gift it to someone you love... ...or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn’t have a Christian role model in their life. [**Friend, what’s most important is that you rush back your best gift of $35, $50, or even $100 in the next 24 hours.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **BRAVE Books** is working round the clock to get enough _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundles produced and all the orders filled in time. Fellow Conservative, THANK YOU for helping. **BRAVE Books** would have no chance of beating Hollywood, giant left-leaning publishers, and big government-funded libraries and schools without you. Thank you for taking a minute to help with our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign. You’re bringing the true meaning of Christmas to families all across America. Thank you and may God bless you and God bless America,
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
P.S. Fellow Conservative, it’s only November and we’re already in a Christmas crunch! Families are clamoring for our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle to counter the Left’s secular interpretation of this most blessed season. [**Your donation of $35, $50, or even $100 helps us fill all our Mouse in the House orders in time to help parents teach giving not getting this Christmas.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) And as a thank you for your gift of $100 or more we’ll send you your very own _Mouse in the House_ for your family! Thank you! -- Kirk

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: We’re setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Derek,
I’ve told you time and time again just how important this race is for New Jersey. But what you need to understand is, what we do here will have major implications for the country.
This is the first major election since Donald Trump returned to office. Since then, we’ve seen nothing but chaos and corruption come from the White House — and New Jersey families have taken hit after hit because of it.
On November 4, New Jerseyans have an important choice to make: we can choose the career politician who’s going to copy and paste Trump’s disastrous policies into New Jersey, or we can choose a new way forward: a leader who will always put our state first, and never bend to the will of deep-pocketed Washington politicians.
And if we win, not only do we send a powerful message to the nation by choosing the path of affordability, opportunity, and freedom — we empower Democrats across the country to stand up and fight back against the Trump administration, setting us up for major wins in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
Whatever happens, America is going to follow New Jersey’s lead, Derek. That’s why National Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race, it’s why Donald Trump and his administration have attacked me repeatedly, and it’s why we have to win this election.
[**The movement we’re building here in New Jersey is so much bigger than me or you — it’s about all of us coming together to build a new path forward for our state, and for our country. And if that’s the type of movement you believe in, I would really appreciate it if you split whatever you can between NJ Victory 25 and John Fetterman to help power me to victory this Election Day.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52265?t=1&akid=10399%2E434096%2EK7R9X8)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between NJ Victory 25 and John Fetterman will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52266?t=2&akid=10399%2E434096%2EK7R9X8)
---

Thank you,
Mikie

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: absolutely shameful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
Peter, what Republicans are doing is absolutely shameful.

---
| | Peter, what Republicans are doing is absolutely shameful. This morning, MILLIONS of Americans are seeing their healthcare costs skyrocket because Republicans refuse to end the Trump shutdown. Everyday Americans already pay too much to see a doctor or visit the hospital. Now, Americans will face higher premiums – increases of tens of THOUSANDS of dollars per year – because Republicans refuse to extend the Affordable Care Act tax credits. You deserve better. Democrats remain ready, willing and able to find a bipartisan path forward to end the Republican healthcare crisis and address the needs of the American people. We’re not backing down. We’re not hiding. We’re not going to stop fighting for hardworking families. Democrats will continue to stand on the side of healthcare for everyday Americans. It’s the right place to be, Peter. Keep the faith, Hakeem

clean_body: Peter, what Republicans are doing is absolutely shameful. | | Peter, what Republicans are doing is absolutely shameful. This morning, MILLIONS of Americans are seeing their healthcare costs skyrocket because Republicans refuse to end the Trump shutdown. Everyday Americans already pay too much to see a doctor or visit the hospital. Now, Americans will face higher premiums – increases of tens of THOUSANDS of dollars per year – because Republicans refuse to extend the Affordable Care Act tax credits. You deserve better. Democrats remain ready, willing and able to find a bipartisan path forward to end the Republican healthcare crisis and address the needs of the American people. We’re not backing down. We’re not hiding. We’re not going to stop fighting for hardworking families. Democrats will continue to stand on the side of healthcare for everyday Americans. It’s the right place to be, Peter. Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. Jeffries for Congress PO BOX 65322 Washington, DC 20035 United States | mailto:info@hakeemjeffries.com | | | Paid for by Jeffries for Congress

Peter,
We’re gearing up for the final push before Election Day, and we’d love for you to join us for our MassDems GOTV Phonebank on Monday and Tuesday !
We’ll have an open Zoom room running throughout the day — just pop in during any shift and start making calls.
📅 Shift times:
* 9 AM – 12 PM
* 12 PM – 3 PM
* 3 PM – 6 PM
* 5 PM – 8 PM
📍 Where we’re calling:
Virginia, New Jersey, California, Maine, and local races in Winthrop and Taunton .
Whether you can give one hour or several, your calls make a real difference in turning out Democratic voters where it matters most.
👉 Sign up here: https://www.mobilize.us/massdems/event/866670/

Thank you for helping us finish strong and for all that you do to power Democratic victories!
In solidarity,

name: Jo Mendoza
subject: Screw Pete Hegseth’s “standards”
body:
| | _Seth Moulton here. Jo Mendoza is running for Congress in Arizona, so I wanted to pass along this message and ask that you **[split a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118468733/579854057/-268588050?refcode=251101_sm_jm_split_l1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc4NGVlNC0zZWI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0OM6e7_jDIhEAjZ-LSg2tIABR1FWKvnn5lXEQseFgE=)** between my campaign and hers._ Team, I’m Jo Mendoza, retired U.S. Marine Corps Drill Instructor and Democrat running in toss-up AZ-06. Seth Moulton said I can share this because it really pisses me off. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118468734/579854058/856757521?refcode=251101_sm_jm_split_img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc4NGVlNC0zZWI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0OM6e7_jDIhEAjZ-LSg2tIABR1FWKvnn5lXEQseFgE=) **Instead of trying to deliver for our troops and veterans during this government shutdown, Pete Hegseth is using our troops as props for their latest culture war. ** He says he wants troops to meet the “highest male standard,” but that’s B.S. I met the standard while I was serving three tours in two warzones, and when I became a U.S. Marine Corps Drill Instructor. And I exceeded that standard when I was chosen as one of only two women to train other Drill Instructors at Drill Instructor school. **So if Pete has a problem with women serving our country, then just wait until he finds out that Democratic women veterans will be the ones who flip the House blue come 2026...** All eyes have already been on my race for one of the most flippable red seats in the country, but being so outspoken against this administration makes me an even bigger priority for national Republicans to defeat. I need your help right now. **[So please, will you give $20 to Seth Moulton and my campaign before midnight so I can win my toss-up race in AZ-06 and hold this administration accountable?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118468735/579854059/-268588050?refcode=251101_sm_jm_split_l2&amount=20&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc4NGVlNC0zZWI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0OM6e7_jDIhEAjZ-LSg2tIABR1FWKvnn5lXEQseFgE=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118468742/579854066/-268588050?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=251101_sm_jm_split&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc4NGVlNC0zZWI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0OM6e7_jDIhEAjZ-LSg2tIABR1FWKvnn5lXEQseFgE=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118468743/579854067/-268588050?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=251101_sm_jm_split&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc4NGVlNC0zZWI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0OM6e7_jDIhEAjZ-LSg2tIABR1FWKvnn5lXEQseFgE=)
