clean_body: | | Seth Moulton here. Jo Mendoza is running for Congress in Arizona, so I wanted to pass along this message and ask that you = between my campaign and hers. Team, I’m Jo Mendoza, retired U.S. Marine Corps Drill Instructor and Democrat running in toss-up AZ-06. Seth Moulton said I can share this because it really pisses me off. = Instead of trying to deliver for our troops and veterans during this government shutdown, Pete Hegseth is using our troops as props for their latest culture war. He says he wants troops to meet the “highest male standard,” but that’s B.S. I met the standard while I was serving three tours in two warzones, and when I became a U.S. Marine Corps Drill Instructor. And I exceeded that standard when I was chosen as one of only two women to train other Drill Instructors at Drill Instructor school. So if Pete has a problem with women serving our country, then just wait until he finds out that Democratic women veterans will be the ones who flip the House blue come 2026... All eyes have already been on my race for one of the most flippable red seats in the country, but being so outspoken against this administration makes me an even bigger priority for national Republicans to defeat. I need your help right now. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Together, Jo Mendoza | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Seth for Massachusetts PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

body:
Our communities are worth fighting for.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=7rgU85ie2lJ2IaeZ7%2FhO2WPxsdgbvG66KJLxHFAgo7hm9diUafGSKOJVWGboZAEQrq57T2E5w8BntwmEdSbCxxaqMrkktZ60NZUadoDK2sS8%2BST%2BY%2F0NBAzwEsCuy5WXit%2BW6uCKtbfzb9ubOlNTGwcekPG2XkEvJcZRGoJoJFWIzyTo7gdIYGLg1XbqvL%2BKmo33sCC1f8DTpvKvghqyf9K3UBaYzr3w6qtQV5cEDcyKbrgFh65ODBhUMn%2BNghG4qkntp88y%2FVTh2AIjGAvDQgKoj1863b2KR5nbBl7p9hE5bDu%2FSnPrZsCI2SHw0INpAvtXaOELAUHEuvDcPMovIc2D%2FgcPZfdjAXjN%2BWSI1U8%2BasiJMcV51a7JaBXDZ%2BVJ8imXuHrDVgH%2F3SRFGuPL5lTt61RMAGziWMrnfDaWQSA%3D)

It’s Gabe Vasquez. We hit our end-of-month fundraising goal — and it’s all because of **_you_**. I can’t thank you enough. Every single contribution — big or small — helped us get there. And in a moment when so much feels uncertain, that kind of commitment means everything to me. Right now, millions of Americans and New Mexicans are doing their best to make ends meet in the middle of all this chaos. Families are stretched thin, federal workers are waiting for answers, and too many families are wondering when the government will start working for them again. My job is to fight for them — to fight for **_you_** — and I will never stop doing that. Whether it’s protecting good jobs, expanding access to health care, or defending our public lands and resources, **I’ll always show up and fight for New Mexico.** Thank you for standing with me and for believing in what we can accomplish for NM-02 together. In gratitude, Gabe [P.S. Your support fuels everything we do. If you can, will you chip in $10 today to help us start November strong and help fuel our fight for New Mexico’s families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118468928/579854662/-1319787235?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_110125_EOMTY_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2U0NTcwMS00MGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_2lKtL3spVaOL5W-y6sSjdXvKYLDyQy9kb7An1WRo8=) | | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118468935/579854669/-1319787235?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_110125_EOMTY_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2U0NTcwMS00MGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_2lKtL3spVaOL5W-y6sSjdXvKYLDyQy9kb7An1WRo8=)

We hit our end-of-month fundraising goal — and it’s all because of you. I can’t thank you enough. Every single contribution — big or small — helped us get there. And in a moment when so much feels uncertain, that kind of commitment means everything to me. Right now, millions of Americans and New Mexicans are doing their best to make ends meet in the middle of all this chaos. Families are stretched thin, federal workers are waiting for answers, and too many families are wondering when the government will start working for them again. My job is to fight for them — to fight for you — and I will never stop doing that. Whether it’s protecting good jobs, expanding access to health care, or defending our public lands and resources, I’ll always show up and fight for New Mexico. name: Deb Haaland
subject: This breaks my heart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
During these tough times, SNAP didn’t just make life easier; it made it possible to survive.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5430%2E400544%2EwyyQZb)
This breaks my heart.
Donald Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress forced a government shutdown and put over 40 million Americans — including seniors and kids — at risk of going hungry.
I know what that feels like. As a single mom, I’ve had to choose between paying rent and buying groceries. I’ve stared down at an empty fridge, stretched, and skipped meals. During these tough times, SNAP didn’t just make my life easier; it made it possible for me to survive, just as it has for so many New Mexicans.
**Right now, we need leaders who will fight fiercely for our families.** I’m proud that Governor Lujan Grisham authorized $30 million to help fill any gaps that could be left by delayed or reduced SNAP benefits, and that New Mexico’s Attorney General is taking action by suing the Trump administration to lift this cruel suspension of food assistance. Governors are the last line of defense — we need leaders who stand up and deliver for our families. As governor, I’ll bolster the New Mexico Attorney General’s office so we can hold Donald Trump accountable for trying to take away programs and services New Mexicans rely on.
**But right now, we can’t afford to wait. Every day this shutdown drags on, more and more families are at risk of facing hunger.[That’s why I’m asking you to sign my petition urging Congress to fully restore SNAP benefits immediately. Will you add your name? ](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20251101_1_snap/?source=em20251101-5430&t=4&akid=5430%2E400544%2EwyyQZb)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20251101_1_snap/?source=em20251101-5430&t=5&akid=5430%2E400544%2EwyyQZb)**
In solidarity,
— Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251101-1&t=6&refcode2=5430_400544_wyyQZb&akid=5430%2E400544%2EwyyQZb)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=7&akid=5430%2E400544%2EwyyQZb)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=8&akid=5430%2E400544%2EwyyQZb)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40345%2E3422442%2ERtoqz5)
Peter, I want to take a moment to say _thank you._
Because of grassroots contributions, we closed out October on a high note and reached our end-of-month fundraising goal.
We’re not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs. This is a movement built by everyday people who know that when we stand together, we can demand a government that works for everyone.
As California’s next governor, I’ll lead the fight against Trump’s dangerous agenda and I’ll tackle the high costs that working families face every day, from housing and health care to groceries and child care.
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251101-40345&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40345_3422442_Rtoqz5&akid=40345%2E3422442%2ERtoqz5)**

name: Janet Mills
subject: I love Maine with everything I’ve got
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
That's why I’m running to defeat Susan Collins

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7848?t=2&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb)
null, I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I could _never_ live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.
Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger every _single day_ and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it.
**So I’ve officially announced my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins. MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority.[Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue? >> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7849?t=3&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7848?t=4&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb)
---
null, I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And null, I'm the only Maine Democrat to win a statewide election in the last 20 years.
_
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate Majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.
**[Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and Susan Collins the power of this campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me.>> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7848?t=5&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Janet Mills and Haley Stevens will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7850?t=6&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7851?t=7&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7852?t=8&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7848?t=9&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb)
---
Let’s win this thing,

– Janet Mills
Governor of Maine
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7853?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7854?t=11&akid=1247%2E49239%2Ea7CNnb)

Thank you,
Haley

name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: 99% of conservatives will ignore this email. I need you to be the 1% that opens it.

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

subject: This is my solemn promise to you…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
Please read my letter.
| **_A LETTER FROM THE DESK OF REP. JIM JORDAN_**
---
Friend,
---
Over the last month, Democrats have picked up two seats in special elections.
---
**Republicans are now just _ONE_ _SEAT_ over the threshold to declare a majority in the House. **
---
_That means we have almost NO ROOM for error anymore..._
---
_In the midterms, we need to not just DEFEND every single Republican seat, but we need to take the offensive to FLIP Democrat seats as well!_
---
Look – I’ll be honest with you: Our Republican House majority is the KEY to passing President Trump’s America First agenda.
---
If we lose it, the Democrats will be able to sabotage everything we’re trying to do, and they won’t stop there...
---
These radicals will attempt to IMPEACH President Trump and bring our country straight back to the days of the failed Biden-Harris agenda.
---

clean_body: Please read my letter. | A LETTER FROM THE DESK OF REP. JIM JORDAN Friend, Over the last month, Democrats have picked up two seats in special elections. Republicans are now just ONE SEAT over the threshold to declare a majority in the House. That means we have almost NO ROOM for error anymore... In the midterms, we need to not just DEFEND every single Republican seat, but we need to take the offensive to FLIP Democrat seats as well! Look – I’ll be honest with you: Our Republican House majority is the KEY to passing President Trump’s America First agenda. If we lose it, the Democrats will be able to sabotage everything we’re trying to do, and they won’t stop there... These radicals will attempt to IMPEACH President Trump and bring our country straight back to the days of the failed Biden-Harris agenda. Given how critical the House Majority is, I’m making you a solemn promise... I’m going to do EVERYTHING in my power to help Republicans DEFEND our razor-thin majority so we can continue Making America Great Again! ...But I’m humble enough to know this isn’t a battle I can win on my own. That’s why I’m asking you, Friend: Will you stand with me and House GOP Leadership Chair Elise Stefanik today by pledging a grassroots contribution to help DEFEND President Trump’s House majority? Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Team Guzman
subject: Abortion-banning extremists spending in our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
clean_body: | | | Friend — The abortion-banning extremists at National Right to Life are now running digital display ads for my opponent, Ian Lovejoy. National Right to Life pushes for a national abortion ban — even in cases of rape or incest. They’re pouring money into Virginia to elect candidates like Lovejoy who would take away your rights and drag us backward. We cannot let them win. Not here. Not now. Not ever. Elizabeth Guzman has spent her career fighting for women’s healthcare, for working families, for freedom. With less than a week to go before Election Day, we need your help to fight back. We’re building a grassroots campaign powered by Virginians, not D.C. special interests. Every single dollar you give helps us get our message out, fight back against these lies, and defend our rights. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** The extremists have made their choice. These national groups think they can buy this seat. Now it’s our turn. Let’s show them Virginia stands for freedom, not control — and let’s prove them wrong. — Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Shocking:
subject: Boebert does Mexican blackface for Halloween
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
This is the Lauren Boebert that Colorado has come to know: a vile racist devoid of any sense of humanity.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZyERIy3XfPTe5NefwFWyZV8r2FbRxnIN4QkXV-9F-t3kzGWCQ5Ue1lvZOD48NElqXtVOX4bHCSuOeI6pDeS_hlYsJeVO0aoTLQAbaqygeK0OuAcDTOAP-ckR-siwGe2mQORHm6nt-zHPU_7MU1oKFHH5q_tKvkk62tCY9DzLmPl3KrUfqo9XrGRPJ7HPsloV72mlJfJCYjPxzZCxTZW7iAS_T5ELmfKM9mKpEz1_qyA=&c=KyVtHA10L_z9o94g5WSSKEADuv8KdepRn1K1ePeQ3xwgDpJ6304bRA==&ch=JKVh4IwsZD8ZYb5ty1p8r7iKz4mCA84u7gaSh1X9u4usz3q7leuLvw==)
---
|

Peter,
While thousands of citizens of Latino, Chicano, and Mexican descent in Colorado's 4th district live in fear of being snatched by masked ICE agents for no other reason than the color of their skin, language, or accent, they are looking to their elected representative to defend their rights.
Unfortunately, their current elected official is Lauren Boebert. And this is her response to her constituents looking for leadership:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZyERIy3XfPTe5NefwFWyZV8r2FbRxnIN4QkXV-9F-t3kzGWCQ5Ue1lvZOD48NElqXtVOX4bHCSuOeI6pDeS_hlYsJeVO0aoTLQAbaqygeK0OuAcDTOAP-ckR-siwGe2mQORHm6nt-zHPU_7MU1oKFHH5q_tKvkk62tCY9DzLmPl3KrUfqo9XrGRPJ7HPsloV72mlJfJCYjPxzZCxTZW7iJ72J4nFM4If8cr6MxSXvTU=&c=KyVtHA10L_z9o94g5WSSKEADuv8KdepRn1K1ePeQ3xwgDpJ6304bRA==&ch=JKVh4IwsZD8ZYb5ty1p8r7iKz4mCA84u7gaSh1X9u4usz3q7leuLvw==)
---
Mockery--a Mexican minstrel show akin to blackface.
This is the Lauren Boebert that Colorado has come to know: a vile racist with no humanity. Someone who celebrates discrimination, dehumanization, and violence unleashed by the federal government against her own constituents. Colorado knows that the violence ICE is unleashing in our communities isn't about public safety or enforcing the law, it is about cruelty:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZyERIy3XfPTe5NefwFWyZV8r2FbRxnIN4QkXV-9F-t3kzGWCQ5Ue1lvZOD48NElqXtVOX4bHCSuOeI6pDeS_hlYsJeVO0aoTLQAbaqygeK0OuAcDTOAP-ckR-siwGe2mQORHm6nt-zHPU_7MU1oKFHH5q_tKvkk62tCY9DzLmPl3KrUfqo9XrGRPJ7HPsloV72mlJfJCYjPxzZCxTZW7iD-HbaAV-86I23EyWDwHDdA=&c=KyVtHA10L_z9o94g5WSSKEADuv8KdepRn1K1ePeQ3xwgDpJ6304bRA==&ch=JKVh4IwsZD8ZYb5ty1p8r7iKz4mCA84u7gaSh1X9u4usz3q7leuLvw==)
---
Any elected official who takes their oath of office seriously would oppose these blatant violations of our constitution by the federal government. But not Boebert--she celebrates it. Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when she went head to head with her Democratic opponent, labor leader Trisha Calvarese, she massively underperformed Trump in every county whereas Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district. She is vulnerable and Trisha is back to finish the job in 2026.
It's past time for Boebert's brand of hate to be fired from Congress. clean_body: This is the Lauren Boebert that Colorado has come to know: a vile racist devoid of any sense of humanity. | | | | | == | Peter, While thousands of citizens of Latino, Chicano, and Mexican descent in Colorado's 4th district live in fear of being snatched by masked ICE agents for no other reason than the color of their skin, language, or accent, they are looking to their elected representative to defend their rights. Unfortunately, their current elected official is Lauren Boebert. And this is her response to her constituents looking for leadership: | == Mockery--a Mexican minstrel show akin to blackface. This is the Lauren Boebert that Colorado has come to know: a vile racist with no humanity. Someone who celebrates discrimination, dehumanization, and violence unleashed by the federal government against her own constituents. Colorado knows that the violence ICE is unleashing in our communities isn't about public safety or enforcing the law, it is about cruelty: | == Any elected official who takes their oath of office seriously would oppose these blatant violations of our constitution by the federal government. But not Boebert--she celebrates it. Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when she went head to head with her Democratic opponent, labor leader Trisha Calvarese, she massively underperformed Trump in every county whereas Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district. She is vulnerable and Trisha is back to finish the job in 2026. It's past time for Boebert's brand of hate to be fired from Congress. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | CO-4 deserves a leader who will stand up for the rights of all citizens, regardless of race, gender, or religion. Trisha will be that leader. name: Chris Pappas
subject: Help ensure that no family goes hungry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
#
Right now, over 40 million Americans — including children, seniors, and working families — are wondering how they’re going to put food on the table.
**For many people SNAP and other food assistance programs are a vital lifeline and the difference between putting food on the table or not.**
As food banks and other charities across the country brace for a surge in need and scale up operations, they need our support more than ever.
**[That’s why, if you’re able, I’m asking you to consider making a donation to Feeding America, a national network of food banks whose mission is to ensure that no family in our country goes hungry. Any amount will go a long way to helping those who need our support right now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251101_1_feedingamerica.4hYkTi&refcode=em20251101-1&t=1&akid=3224%2E582294%2EjZoXp5)**
**[Donate to support Feeding America »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251101_1_feedingamerica.lsABXP&refcode=em20251101-1&t=2&akid=3224%2E582294%2EjZoXp5)**
The political moment we’re in demands a lot from us. We have a shared responsibility to look out for each other and show compassion for our neighbors. Let’s show the strength of our community and make sure no one falls through the cracks.
Yours in service,
Chris Pappas
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=3224%2E582294%2EjZoXp5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=3224%2E582294%2EjZoXp5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=3224%2E582294%2EjZoXp5)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Jena Griswold
subject: A moment of gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251101-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251101-email]
Peter,
I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you.
Because of your support, we ended October strong and started this new month with real momentum. Every dollar, every share, every message of encouragement helps us keep fighting for the Colorado we believe in: one where everyone’s rights are protected, our democracy stays strong, and working families have a fair shot.
Your belief in this campaign keeps me going. When I see Coloradans come together to stand up for what’s right: for our freedoms, for our environment, for each other, I know we can take on whatever challenges come our way.
I’m so proud of what we’re building together, and I’m honored to have you on this team. Thank you for being part of this movement and for standing with me every step of the way.
With gratitude,
Jena Griswold

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: How you can help those losing SNAP benefits today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
1 in 8 Americans are losing their federal food assistance.
#
Five days ago, the USDA announced that the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) will not be funded on November 1st due to the federal shutdown.
Yesterday, two federal judges ordered the Trump administration to fund the program, but both acknowledged there is no timeline as to when the funding might be restored.
1 in 8 Americans — 42 million senior citizens, disabled people, low-income families with kids, and more — lost their food assistance today, just weeks before Thanksgiving.
So **we’re launching a fundraiser for 3 foodbanks that will support an additional 3 million New Yorkers trying to feed themselves and their families** until a resolution is found — and their essential SNAP benefits return.
[Will you make a $3 contribution to three local food pantries — $1 for Elmcor, RAP4Bronx, and City Harvest — that are increasing their capacity to help those who are losing their food assistance tomorrow?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251101-food.NQ4RS2&refcode=em20251101-10116-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K)
_100% of your contribution will go to these incredible community-based organizations._
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251101-food.NQ4RS2&refcode=em20251101-10116-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K)**
This is the first time in United States history that the USDA has stopped food assistance during a government shutdown.
The Trump administration falsely claims that billions of dollars in SNAP assistance is given to undocumented immigrants.
**The USDA’s own data from 2023 reflects that 89.4% of SNAP recipients were U.S.- born citizens**. The remaining 11% includes 6.2% naturalized citizens, 1.1% refugees, and 3.3% other noncitizens, including lawful permanent residents and other eligible noncitizens.1
[If you can, will you make a $3 contribution to support a small portion of the 42 million Americans that, starting tomorrow, will lose their access to food because of the Trump administration's political agenda?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251101-food.NQ4RS2&refcode=em20251101-10116-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251101-food.NQ4RS2&refcode=em20251101-10116-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K)**
Whether or not you can contribute today, thank you for standing with our movement.
We will keep you updated as more on the government shutdown develops.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [**PolitiFact** : Who gets food stamps? Viral chart misleads about SNAP recipients' race, ethnicity](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/35127?t=41&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251101-food?refcode=em20251101-10116-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=42&refcode2=10116_2526796_O3Ro1K&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251101-10116-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=43&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=44&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=45&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=46&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=47&akid=10116%2E2526796%2EO3Ro1K)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [¿Hablas español?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/espanol-2025/?source=em20251101-10116-P_FND_CHA_GOL)

clean_body: Peter, Don Jr. here I wanted to personally reach out and thank you for taking the time to complete my father's new census. Your commitment to our cause is what drives us forward, and we're grateful for your support. We reviewed your questionnaire, and we noticed you left Question 5 blank. I know it was an honest oversight, but I want to make sure your voice is fully heard. That's why I'm asking if you could review and re-submit your responses by 11:59PM tonight. You're one of our most valued allies in the fight to protect fair elections, and your input is crucial to our success. By taking a minute to revisit your census, you'll be helping us build a stronger, more just America. Thank you again for standing with us, Peter. You're making a real difference. | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: URGENT: We’re being hit with a wave of last-minute attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
I need your help to fight back now. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=431a0f584d&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?

---|---

---
| | Friend,

In these final four days before ballots are counted, my opponent is flooding homes with a last-minute blitz of misinformation and deceptive ads. Worse, it's an attempt to try and **buy this election** -- pouring in personal money to mislead voters because they don't support my opponent's radical, tax-hiking, "anti-capitalist" agenda.

This is unacceptable behavior. King County residents deserve leaders who represent their communities -- not out-of-touch, anti-police radicals trying to force an extreme agenda on East King County neighborhoods.

Let's be clear about what's at stake: ✅ **Lower taxes, safer and more affordable communities, and accountability for taxpayers**
**Or**
❌ **Higher taxes, fewer police, and extreme activists calling the shots** I'm fighting back the only way I know how -- by telling the truth and standing up for the people I serve. But to reach every voter in time, I urgently need your help _._

_Every dollar we raise in the next**24 hours** goes straight into voter contact_ -- doing everything we can to Get-Out-The-Vote.

**Please[ chip in $25, $35, $50, or more](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=7ffcef0c71&e=77eef70c61) to help us counter these false attacks and keep King County moving in the right direction.** **\---------------------**
**[DONATE NOW](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=d1e7d92800&e=77eef70c61)**
**\--------------------** We've worked too hard to let outside money from radical activists decide our future. Together, we can combat this misinformation campaign and deliver the results taxpayers deserve.

Thank you!
Reagan Dunn
King County Councilmember

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Let’s take a walk down memory lane
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=964105e1b3874000be4cd9e99a6462f6&_e=AxC-uQEpNSNCPZIxffXMMKQG1SDENWOVqJySgNKB64C2yIN8zs_deZ2B6vVNfBzo32_Pcynd5pzWYxTavvoJfhm6DzBfD77nen2W-AkKSNaBoRIMtZpfKcXC_bY7KPcouTNAhhH0hYoLwlsXYsIBE0RX1vD3rOJaadvSlh1LQouArL16WT49Ezpc-xNkHRIEVrFn2turA3y10pR-knWvFEMzViEJS3UF6dSwPmwCftWN1uQZQgIGL4MeqzfYYyT_a6Jd0McSxFU_g2MM7LAzUz_iUQQMClq0Lt8GwsCsFMOLCm2l6OezpHzhNh8REgA56D9XgtPIAD9VEW33oy9FGH9In5SErNeur5Pwx71e40hz8c6eXnsAAv85giX2jWcik_ZrkCa2MUGzB-MHisrZ-UP9Z32xE_0CMZyQVN8uSr2vfMyAgWCV0PpybhiOwRtu8hYASb-4IvGOjAFcOO7cH5xtvKHTyCEcoeIYHG8zhVU-yshaQVzpVeGOpV80eh071kAFqylfpfkmf5BW0cXZ1XuGaxu-m6ai5HCSRyDNu9Pv6WUFNQFc3Ynb0d4K6oakSbaLpSBwOC71bvqTQq_4hoviFrMUuElxsr3XWBSSmVhQ4bWstpPqquzhvVOCmJADKxV8waEBREbwgp0BUFjEG6Ljfc175ZiTdCE6aJ8okInBldlAgv8AEMcXTJyWPTo3obvcnedtLEalQn32r5ZIJLV_Z6ktSwUrH8dPqB1-ErPqPmro-GrGr3TjoO8AYHWdmItAQLZ1LC6xe5rDb1ssD9I2ro_CMZvr3Ha2Vk28AO4n0zznRMPHgwn8TYHnpUwR)

Fellow American,

My name is Winsome Earle-Sears, and if you don't mind, I'd like to tell you a little about myself. **I 'm not your typical politician, and I never will be. _This is my story._**

In 2021, I won the General Election for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia by less than 60,000 votes. In doing so, I became the first black woman to hold this office--but that's not why I ran. I ran to effect real change and instill common-sense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we have done and will continue to do.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=964105e1b3874000be4cd9e99a6462f6&_e=AxC-uQEpNSNCPZIxffXMMKQG1SDENWOVqJySgNKB64C2yIN8zs_deZ2B6vVNfBzo32_Pcynd5pzWYxTavvoJfhm6DzBfD77nen2W-AkKSNaBoRIMtZpfKcXC_bY7KPcouTNAhhH0hYoLwlsXYsIBE0RX1vD3rOJaadvSlh1LQouArL16WT49Ezpc-xNkHRIEVrFn2turA3y10pR-knWvFEMzViEJS3UF6dSwPmwCftWN1uQZQgIGL4MeqzfYYyT_a6Jd0McSxFU_g2MM7LAzUz_iUQQMClq0Lt8GwsCsFMOLCm2l6OezpHzhNh8REgA5fnTXu7wNwrJf43y-P2DTQevPdTi6Z0WxnG8dNf7YqQUpdkDX_H5zifIOZPQzC2v_HIc-qQjA2DpBMuXUsybKPziVwdgy1iyXKDVnTBLPVy3Z99EvULljU217rOFCC5Q_4I2-1UqzwmDnmlzD2y5OjnSplkzRk8cbVbSYrXBibAFZQ3hFt-fZJtowsLuBZl2QziPuiNf6OzcJmqOByUgdtQyKsfUpl_J16Aoeh0bUJL7aYa_QXKMJFxjNaHDCLJAAMyI6x77uWd8UqPLEqhihj9Bn_RbX0M94BKPsN-JEDIl7k73x7Yft_BRqQNfR3QR6Pu9c0aYqkUdob9Su6xAqST10M94wq31LkSNP-jd9zz_7ruiD7Tht0piQq4EOVOgMVvXT2ZkosQ2j2wEgSKtuBQu2KiKmTfttK0ryCXttYCXt1Vs3bFhby9QaxhK6JIfFzd7dPr8YsE0pdjGko6K9sFTqJWZyOBMPY-wRgzkWcvwAB61BG0GUNAr4Tes4yTWP)
---
Before becoming the 2nd in command in Virginia, I beat a 20-year incumbent in 2001 to become the first Republican to win a seat in a majority black district in the Virginia House of Delegates since 1865. In the General Assembly, I focused on getting results for my constituents.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=964105e1b3874000be4cd9e99a6462f6&_e=AxC-uQEpNSNCPZIxffXMMKQG1SDENWOVqJySgNKB64C2yIN8zs_deZ2B6vVNfBzo32_Pcynd5pzWYxTavvoJfhm6DzBfD77nen2W-AkKSNaBoRIMtZpfKcXC_bY7KPcouTNAhhH0hYoLwlsXYsIBE0RX1vD3rOJaadvSlh1LQouArL16WT49Ezpc-xNkHRIEVrFn2turA3y10pR-knWvFEMzViEJS3UF6dSwPmwCftWN1uQZQgIGL4MeqzfYYyT_a6Jd0McSxFU_g2MM7LAzUz_iUQQMClq0Lt8GwsCsFMOLCm2l6OezpHzhNh8REgA59XMKACIz8PQX6afS5i0SlWrl_-KGtzBywwYz4V17gJn7R_lyHbTXztnlILqID3Dghd_bHjLbZWp8diM0TE12uk47HFRZD4okpDL2EIAXfE4HEFC9UdebPDR-GzIO5zjTjmXhIVSrx2vLY_P360pABwG13cKO22_UngjesPgGG_9oztm5BpABcW87Su60Yz79EAjagQh57MC7hUmmuwYRE1P2anDpw6B9OASaJiwCyEUZDZPQZPj0irU3-PdtMh0fMJROEEVEg5EFXdDldFNYIQZ0aBZdbqYEPDBiNJ_qoG-UF6VH2wxgOxWZ8mxAuk5VVxnY-XAty9z_mLLf1jGhLizZPL5nA6hrlkjmMPWMMrNAudSF7KIDGjl22ie-HbkEDv6lrgBhZy8xO1kRVfWpWIaj7GUArBpKuA-OwwF0gdD3IEMMcs7u2kgXjdxPCAOfHVzGGfOl0g_0cDHmdRho6roiWFc0QT7pjj8h9lhHrAAMwImakpH2fhye28FVyiSA)
---
Prior to my career in politics, I had the distinct honor of serving as an electrician in the United States Marine Corps. It was here that I learned to be a leader--to improvise, adapt, and overcome. Looking back, my time in the Marines had a significant impact on who I am today, and for that, I'm ever grateful.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=964105e1b3874000be4cd9e99a6462f6&_e=AxC-uQEpNSNCPZIxffXMMKQG1SDENWOVqJySgNKB64C2yIN8zs_deZ2B6vVNfBzo32_Pcynd5pzWYxTavvoJfhm6DzBfD77nen2W-AkKSNaBoRIMtZpfKcXC_bY7KPcouTNAhhH0hYoLwlsXYsIBE0RX1vD3rOJaadvSlh1LQouArL16WT49Ezpc-xNkHRIEVrFn2turA3y10pR-knWvFEMzViEJS3UF6dSwPmwCftWN1uQZQgIGL4MeqzfYYyT_a6Jd0McSxFU_g2MM7LAzUz_iUQQMClq0Lt8GwsCsFMOLCm2l6OezpHzhNh8REgA5aMX3FQpO2btu1H7kZigIa5EVpW_F-E5XhBsYhkjtHBgLG0DBmXxjWshYz4G3l9QzHFxY0tvEDN7h14rv7ZnurKU4p8iog6f7cSFJNQi6KYr3niU9Yi9NSrujbpX2erJtpb5XuQvxEcPRrKl2OsEefR5GPbB-b-KgccY2C9-Fe4CtI5YHS6DJd1UTZ8NMyX7N6t16ngLThkac12lXYrauioE8WVbIqiY1aDt6izo1291MYl6_svM7kG_F7Mk5zHbpNhrSfH8ez7jadh6_eF43nAT1RoRHltddaFyqdURrAvCp1sgNuePkzysQ4dA4MgDLYJD4Ev74ewoP1HRnT1ZhAJ4j6ErdJKw31VirYhw2GoTJGdzMf_R4YuurEUSK91DqZVZLx_vTzNCT6GZk2vpybvaCLyOpHZ07zl8Wmc9NsoagICNyQEqLELA3fyOUAR9vSECMh3a96tUDKF6_iCvA-fMYoHWG47FaXHxoUcAzJ_Aq8R_61D3R5bhl_GxXUCQQ)
---
Looking even further back, when I was just 6 years old, my family and I came to the United States from Jamaica. We arrived in a new land with no money and different accents, but we made it work and got through the struggles - **only in America is something like this even possible. **
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=964105e1b3874000be4cd9e99a6462f6&_e=AxC-uQEpNSNCPZIxffXMMKQG1SDENWOVqJySgNKB64C2yIN8zs_deZ2B6vVNfBzo32_Pcynd5pzWYxTavvoJfhm6DzBfD77nen2W-AkKSNaBoRIMtZpfKcXC_bY7KPcouTNAhhH0hYoLwlsXYsIBE0RX1vD3rOJaadvSlh1LQouArL16WT49Ezpc-xNkHRIEVrFn2turA3y10pR-knWvFEMzViEJS3UF6dSwPmwCftWN1uQZQgIGL4MeqzfYYyT_a6Jd0McSxFU_g2MM7LAzUz_iUQQMClq0Lt8GwsCsFMOLCm2l6OezpHzhNh8REgA5cuvlClLm-_zJ9rYYfX8wt6W6O_S6IlVahzVcjW4Tq8mXub4RWNY7yajtkst_60aaJblab1Cil5cm6yxHWVAqb9VnJ8mlBRaBUM-0o52gIiBYveSRIDQd2jMo5lcglc4nigxyBJlewag5eiNwM-zxt_Fb74eXyqjgJW5HR6J7tYE07NztBTDf7VJsMoOj3ZbyG5Kowe6N4Z9P419Lcs8k18Kmnq11ySM2lhK_fHl4Qsgk84KcWCayJlViQhd_dpsKT1OS-JFr0qI-EXowQ7y0l2n5HPT77Y6CkZvdBhlOS9QBFaKcgW39TKAQKwcgT93pS6vTU3KMmrOgoIA87raCnd7-GSLsBdbWxehLQ0Qv5FSHYRisfFE3bLKAh5ApTeHBiJO4J8E2QH0g5xx_uMCigWSyrZxztLpcdWEb0uI5yHvVe0xMX4PzRS00xMNHq4oCeXg4bw2PN1SmThUroLWuyn3fS_yzokUOyVNEvzo9Jv5_aDSOD3tM772JxAVmncB2)
---
Of course, none of this would have been possible without my husband, Terence, and my amazing daughters. Throughout all of this, they have been my rock, and I owe them everything - they have kept me grounded, confident, and optimistic for the future.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=964105e1b3874000be4cd9e99a6462f6&_e=AxC-uQEpNSNCPZIxffXMMKQG1SDENWOVqJySgNKB64C2yIN8zs_deZ2B6vVNfBzo32_Pcynd5pzWYxTavvoJfhm6DzBfD77nen2W-AkKSNaBoRIMtZpfKcXC_bY7KPcouTNAhhH0hYoLwlsXYsIBE0RX1vD3rOJaadvSlh1LQouArL16WT49Ezpc-xNkHRIEVrFn2turA3y10pR-knWvFEMzViEJS3UF6dSwPmwCftWN1uQZQgIGL4MeqzfYYyT_a6Jd0McSxFU_g2MM7LAzUz_iUQQMClq0Lt8GwsCsFMOLCm2l6OezpHzhNh8REgA5wW84U4jADYdRATf_dTcU2Hanq8ek8Vi3D9deiTKL8N3mKyoV_eiUibfuMNaAPZNFNPaxrIQrfHUCj9wBk9XsQwFHInNsEesvrk64hOpSxMhOGwd7atgFZrBBO4JdxI_UwCS3FvFI26jWyFvLL_7Pkt22qJa4Ik3RmnNhCfae0sRdvp6O0sUxnJ_zhn9igglmZDiPwOvbQIzgK_SsNovCeLE-EsvNjQbPENDNwz36h0pUNlOdi3arpcS3f38sKwDFldxGHYrHvogm-HYDuQf7TP3pGZV774NIkgpn68YuIIWsoT3X5BnqdrofTqe1s09yCHcSPhOy5hQCicXfJO5zs_bKQlyttfMT6hmeUHPT1g1adeNNPa87X1T9SetM1cVZp0oSkPEPulAG1OdHOOsne0ixtjSYg7hocr48HD2RBrWbBRegNd8YDqbabqCCupqWM2LGDnLNzteN9OsheR9vPjd82xcfMbyHnMeuQz2OMo5FfM87r0tW3x9xTYI7sPtE)
---
As you can see, I've lived a full life. There have been highs, lows, and everything in between, but I don't regret a single thing. I maintain, without a shadow of a doubt, that my story is only possible in America. I am the second most powerful person in the former capital of the Confederacy, and I am a black female. _I am the epitome of the boundless opportunity and freedom that can _**only**_ be found in America.__**But Fellow American, my story is far from over.**_ I'm running for Governor not only to break records but also to continue spreading my conservative message - to show the world that a black, female, immigrant - and anyone else for that matter - can go from absolutely nothing to the highest levels of American politics. Now, the support I have received for my campaign thus far has been amazing, **but the reality is that if we 're going to have a shot at winning this thing, then we must be well-funded. ** _**[So, after all you’ve learned about me today, can you take just a second to chip in to support my campaign, even if it’s just a few bucks? clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Fellow American, My name is Winsome Earle-Sears, and if you don't mind, I'd like to tell you a little about myself. I 'm not your typical politician, and I never will be. This is my story. In 2021, I won the General Election for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia by less than 60,000 votes. In doing so, I became the first black woman to hold this office--but that's not why I ran. I ran to effect real change and instill common-sense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we have done and will continue to do. Before becoming the 2nd in command in Virginia, I beat a 20-year incumbent in 2001 to become the first Republican to win a seat in a majority black district in the Virginia House of Delegates since 1865. In the General Assembly, I focused on getting results for my constituents. Prior to my career in politics, I had the distinct honor of serving as an electrician in the United States Marine Corps. It was here that I learned to be a leader--to improvise, adapt, and overcome. Looking back, my time in the Marines had a significant impact on who I am today, and for that, I'm ever grateful. Looking even further back, when I was just 6 years old, my family and I came to the United States from Jamaica. We arrived in a new land with no money and different accents, but we made it work and got through the struggles - only in America is something like this even possible. Of course, none of this would have been possible without my husband, Terence, and my amazing daughters. Throughout all of this, they have been my rock, and I owe them everything - they have kept me grounded, confident, and optimistic for the future. As you can see, I've lived a full life. There have been highs, lows, and everything in between, but I don't regret a single thing. I maintain, without a shadow of a doubt, that my story is only possible in America. I am the second most powerful person in the former capital of the Confederacy, and I am a black female. I am the epitome of the boundless opportunity and freedom that can only be found in America.But Fellow American, my story is far from over. I'm running for Governor not only to break records but also to continue spreading my conservative message - to show the world that a black, female, immigrant - and anyone else for that matter - can go from absolutely nothing to the highest levels of American politics. Now, the support I have received for my campaign thus far has been amazing, but the reality is that if we 're going to have a shot at winning this thing, then we must be well-funded. Thank you for your time, and may God Bless the United States of America, Winsome Earle-Sears (R-VA)| * Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596

**We’re THRILLED — and Trump is still _FURIOUS._ He’s lashing out at Democrats, attacking politicians, and throwing temper tantrums!**

But Friend, our main objective at the Voter Protection Project is to protect voting — _and voters._

That’s why we _need to know_ if _YOU_ were among the millions of brave Democrats who showed up in protest, Friend:

name: Jim Jordan
subject: This is my solemn promise to you…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
Please read my letter.
| **_A LETTER FROM THE DESK OF REP. JIM JORDAN_**
---
Friend,
---
Over the last month, Democrats have picked up two seats in special elections.
---
**Republicans are now just _ONE_ _SEAT_ over the threshold to declare a majority in the House. **
---
_That means we have almost NO ROOM for error anymore..._
---
_In the midterms, we need to not just DEFEND every single Republican seat, but we need to take the offensive to FLIP Democrat seats as well!_
---
Look – I’ll be honest with you: Our Republican House majority is the KEY to passing President Trump’s America First agenda.
---
If we lose it, the Democrats will be able to sabotage everything we’re trying to do, and they won’t stop there...
---
These radicals will attempt to IMPEACH President Trump and bring our country straight back to the days of the failed Biden-Harris agenda.
---
**Given how critical the House Majority is, I’m making you a solemn promise...**
---
I’m going to do EVERYTHING in my power to help Republicans DEFEND our razor-thin majority so we can continue Making America Great Again!
---
_...But I’m humble enough to know this isn’t a battle I can win on my own._
---
That’s why I’m asking you, Friend:
---
_**Will you stand with me and House GOP Leadership Chair Elise Stefanik today by pledging a grassroots contribution to help DEFEND President Trump’s House majority?**_
---

clean_body: Please read my letter. | A LETTER FROM THE DESK OF REP. JIM JORDAN Friend, Over the last month, Democrats have picked up two seats in special elections. Republicans are now just ONE SEAT over the threshold to declare a majority in the House. That means we have almost NO ROOM for error anymore... In the midterms, we need to not just DEFEND every single Republican seat, but we need to take the offensive to FLIP Democrat seats as well! Look – I’ll be honest with you: Our Republican House majority is the KEY to passing President Trump’s America First agenda. If we lose it, the Democrats will be able to sabotage everything we’re trying to do, and they won’t stop there... These radicals will attempt to IMPEACH President Trump and bring our country straight back to the days of the failed Biden-Harris agenda. Given how critical the House Majority is, I’m making you a solemn promise... I’m going to do EVERYTHING in my power to help Republicans DEFEND our razor-thin majority so we can continue Making America Great Again! ...But I’m humble enough to know this isn’t a battle I can win on my own. That’s why I’m asking you, Friend: Will you stand with me and House GOP Leadership Chair Elise Stefanik today by pledging a grassroots contribution to help DEFEND President Trump’s House majority? Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

body:
We have just a few days left to chase ballots
| | | | |
---
Peter, right now Early Vote Action ballot chasers are blanketing the state getting Republican voters to request mail-in ballots and chasing down outstanding mail-in ballots.
Polling in the New Jersey’s governor’s race has started to show what I’ve been seeing for a long time.**The race is officially tied.**

The polling for Republican nominee Jack Ciattarelli continued to improve this week and we are truly in the midst of a tectonic shift in New Jersey... All that’s left now is to do the hard work between now and Election Day to turn out every Republican voter in the state.

That’s where my team and I come in. My grassroots team is on the ground right now registering voters, chasing mail-in ballots, and preparing to launch our massive get out the early vote program.
****
**And if you take a look at these numbers,****__you know we’re making an impact_._**

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Hunger is not a political tool
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We need to step up and help families facing food insecurity.
#
Instead of ending their shutdown, Congressional Republicans have thrown 42 million Americans who rely on SNAP benefits to put food on the table into uncertainty.
But Republicans have created a long-term crisis beyond the shutdown. The budget they passed this year guts food assistance programs across the country, reducing thousands of meals and making life even harder for working families.
**It’s cruel and shortsighted. And worst of all, it’s entirely avoidable.**
Hunger is not a political tool. It’s a moral test, and we cannot fail it. That’s why I’ve been working around the clock to urge Republican leadership to return to the table and work with us to protect the programs that keep our communities strong.
But we can’t wait for Trump and Republicans to come around and do the right thing. It’s now on us to step up and help our neighbors.
**Here’s what I’m asking you to do right now to help:**
**[Please consider donating to Feeding America,](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251101-1.bvDf0_&refcode=em20251101-2461&t=2&akid=2461%2E21716%2EsOC888)** an organization that supports food banks nationwide and helps millions of people facing hunger.
Your support will help ensure no one goes to bed hungry and provide nutrition, comfort, and hope to those who need it most.
Thank you for stepping up for families, seniors, and children across the country.
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=2461%2E21716%2EsOC888)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=4&akid=2461%2E21716%2EsOC888)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2461%2E21716%2EsOC888)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

body:
Our grandkids will ask us what we did in this moment. Let’s tell them we fought.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AEeS_lmGZ_J7t2nykpbQyANBCVPg-XeXc3wQTRz2ysS0WDsKOv-txGfErmhXZAdxpVEkl04ofOWxtSiixrnhR8cIMjsLi-D4m_5k6rLTzzdGo_xT0gqhnv6EyAJPBLh4tbJifA1I96q1bhUY41lYmP5ZWrE24uKGUtZxAUMslO6za4jQcYb5KJAFOD_k1G3Qp8JmUVIBPBIOANa8WZp12aUdhrQkGmjQ5zmP22xAS7w=&c=tlbgtiB5uTnGWZyrwcWoemLrMV6iHHgV4OEtPNa2kQjwo4YNPaLazQ==&ch=jP6HZIfBb3Dxcm35B-ein9sI-_K5XVun2akDXJlS4icqm9zuI78QlA==)
---
| Peter,
If we haven't met yet my name is Andrew Hayman. I am the field Director at Defend our Courts. We are less than 72 hours from day zero of the critical Pennsylvania State Supreme Court election.
This could very well be the last free and fair election ever held in Pennsylvania. God help us if we aren't successful.
If the GOP seizes this court they become the umpire. They will rewrite the rulebook to ensure Democrats never win here again. They'll pass an extreme abortion ban and they will redraw PA's congressional map to remove all blue seats.
Republican turnout is surging. I have managed field programs across the county for more than a decade and I am being deadly serious when I say that we could lose this election if these trends continue.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AEeS_lmGZ_J7t2nykpbQyANBCVPg-XeXc3wQTRz2ysS0WDsKOv-txGfErmhXZAdxpVEkl04ofOWxtSiixrnhR8cIMjsLi-D4m_5k6rLTzzdGo_xT0gqhnv6EyAJPBLh4tbJifA1I96q1bhUY41lYmP5ZWrE24uKGUtZxAUMslO6za4jQcYb5KJAFOD_k1G3Qp8JmUVIBPBIOANa8WZp12ZYa_pPsYtPLV8MUUl87EWE=&c=tlbgtiB5uTnGWZyrwcWoemLrMV6iHHgV4OEtPNa2kQjwo4YNPaLazQ==&ch=jP6HZIfBb3Dxcm35B-ein9sI-_K5XVun2akDXJlS4icqm9zuI78QlA==)
---
| As you read this, people are voting. Pennsylvanians are being hammered with disinformation. This is an all-hands-on-deck moment for Democrats.
The most common thing our canvassers hear at the doors is this, "I didn't even know this election was happening. I'll go vote." There is an unstoppable reserve of Democratic voters we can turnout. All we need to do to win is just tell more people that there is an election.
We need your help and we need it today. [Please can you rush a donation of $55 dollars the average cost per vote (CPV) in this race? Even just $5 will make an impact in a race this close.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AEeS_lmGZ_J7t2nykpbQyANBCVPg-XeXc3wQTRz2ysS0WDsKOv-txGfErmhXZAdxpVEkl04ofOWxtSiixrnhR8cIMjsLi-D4m_5k6rLTzzdGo_xT0gqhnv6EyAJPBLh4tbJifA1I96q1bhUY41lYmP5ZWrE24uKGUtZxAUMslO6za4jQcYb5KJAFOD_k1G3Qp8JmUVIBPBIOANa8WZp12fKqsfiXKmfUEZ9aWEMzRSA=&c=tlbgtiB5uTnGWZyrwcWoemLrMV6iHHgV4OEtPNa2kQjwo4YNPaLazQ==&ch=jP6HZIfBb3Dxcm35B-ein9sI-_K5XVun2akDXJlS4icqm9zuI78QlA==)

name: PA Working Families Party
subject: Just three Days until Election Day — make your plan to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | Election Day is almost here, Peter! This Tuesday, November 4th, Pennsylvanians will decide the direction of our state — and the stakes couldn’t be higher. We’re fighting for a **State Supreme Court** that will stand up for our freedom to make decisions about our own bodies, safeguard fair treatment for workers, and ensure everyday people have a real voice. We’re also working to **elect local champions** who truly have working people’s backs. Keep reading to see how to make your vote count, what’s at stake, and how to join the fight for working families across Pennsylvania:
* * *
### 🗳 Go Vote
Election Day is **Tuesday, November 4th, 2025,** and polls will be open across Pennsylvania from **7:00 AM – 8:00 PM.**
* Make your plan to vote now: **[Check your registration and polling place here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfrJ1cPvi7xmqJVfXvqKIatugd8IKu2U2SRb93GqgkP1zOr_05X5dYzjpEZj8w3TpgQ4DRyOASZoxESpDKd2kPPB_y_5M-CnpbRLpPvzZGT4NNtkObHU9KbhxuxttDh4-qqefepDucoHPQ7rMD21BeaDY7kwmLiNz7Ibr6gZVhNTWJzda35iBJz9isFyKKPvav4tNbGN7LvyhMD6zwSuI-ltvYdDOYaKJi56NA9BKeMGSAqBvNjR3tk3U8ANnG5aQ7hAL8ZjWgWQEL1vbNGmTlaKHlIx8vQMvgdMlflmxAceJow4fS9DBRJEJsDC08XRhCt9Ovo7Ig9b1kHuvwMuvVA/4l8/bkA_k7wmTuWY_Onsxjt8Yw/h0/h001.CkThFKZ455mC8yn32xqzc8dEKAzV_sqrJKfudmNcwIM)**

name: The Flyover
subject: I want to grow with you
body:
I'd rather grow _The Flyover_ with you -- and now you can invest for as little as $500.

| | |
---
| |
#
---
**Dear Reader,** When we launched _The Flyover_ , we set out to build something rare in American media -- a newsroom focused on facts and real stories, not political narratives or biased reporting. We're now about **halfway to our investment goal** , thanks to more than **1,540 readers** who have already invested in our mission of independent, reader-driven journalism. If you're one of them -- **thank you.** If not, I hope you'll consider joining your fellow readers in this next chapter. Before we bring in new investors, I want to give you -- our readers --**a special opportunity** to help shape where we go next. You've been with us from the beginning. You understand why _The Flyover_ is needed -- and I'd rather grow with you by my side than rely on outside investors who don't share our values.
* * *
**Making Investing More Accessible** To make that possible, I've asked our legal counsel to **lower the minimum investment to $500** -- so more of the people who built this community can become owners in it.
* * *
**Why Invest in The Flyover**
1. **Independent journalism matters.** We answer to readers -- not advertisers, political activists, or corporate boards.
2. **Our audience is soaring.** From a kitchen-table startup to over**** 3.3 million readers nationwide, _The Flyover_ is among the top 1% of fastest-growing media startups in America.
3. **We 're delivering results.** Since our first investor round, readership has grown 27%, while maintaining strong profit margins and expanding our reporting reach.
4. **You 're investing in trust.** Nearly every dollar goes directly toward**** expansion and innovation, keeping our reporting fact-first and unbiased -- a rarity in today's media.
5. **Return on your investment.** As _The Flyover_ continues its positive trajectory, there are several possible ways reader-investors could benefit -- through a sale, public listing, or dividends. While none of these are guaranteed, they reflect potential outcomes if our growth continues on this path.

* * *
**Owning a part of _The Flyover_ is something special.**

And yes -- it's more complicated to manage a larger group of smaller investors. But I instructed our attorney to do it anyway. Because I want to partner with you -- our readers. If you've been on the fence, [now is the time to invest.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskbuu2zAMhp9G3hLoEtnuoKGo4S3NUqCjoEqUzUKXwKZj5O0Lt2mmM56VH_mBP_6fV3t1mLBM310GQ7HaAAG9Iwi2wL4mIILF4u4KUZ2Wuu9I87NuVnKpT0KcuLDfxrilNLwP-yaYCCBBNWBE10ouuegvzWyU9JHLNnQxqi5KL4TuhddBaO1-ae8aNIdXCC5EzxUX5zZw-NJ3rdc8eOclu3AISHU5_65YaIaYnvUBy9nX3CQzE91Xpr4yOTI5YnnASh9sHliNG2W71m3xwNTwfp_J9gAZAm6ZqeG2FwinKwR0L-RdvjucClPD-M_5H9RCUIipQXOesbzGBMsh-jHeBntEk7pZTLjvmBKubccufMoO098I9HklPIz8EwAA___rp6Jc) Will you be part of the movement that changes how Americans get their news? Common Sense News for Common Sense Americans. Are you in? 👉[ **Invest in _The Flyover_ here.**](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskbuu2zAMhp9G3hLoEtnuoKGo4S3NUqCjoEqUzUKXwKZj5O0Lt2mmM56VH_mBP_6fV3t1mLBM310GQ7HaAAG9Iwi2wL4mIILF4u4KUZ2Wuu9I87NuVnKpT0KcuLDfxrilNLwP-yaYCCBBNWBE10ouuegvzWyU9JHLNnQxqi5KL4TuhddBaO1-ae8aNIdXCC5EzxUX5zZw-NJ3rdc8eOclu3AISHU5_65YaIaYnvUBy9nX3CQzE91Xpr4yOTI5YnnASh9sHliNG2W71m3xwNTwfp_J9gAZAm6ZqeG2FwinKwR0L-RdvjucClPD-M_5H9RCUIipQXOesbzGBMsh-jHeBntEk7pZTLjvmBKubccufMoO098I9HklPIz8EwAA___rp6Jc) Thank you for believing in what we're building. Warm regards,
**Guy Short**
Founder,_The Flyover_
* * *
|
_Equity crowdfunding investments in private placements, and start-up investments in particular, are speculative and involve a high degree of risk and those investors who cannot afford to lose their entire investment should not invest in start-ups. clean_body: I'd rather grow The Flyover with you -- and now you can invest for as little as $500. | | | | | Dear Reader, When we launched The Flyover , we set out to build something rare in American media -- a newsroom focused on facts and real stories, not political narratives or biased reporting. We're now about halfway to our investment goal , thanks to more than 1,540 readers who have already invested in our mission of independent, reader-driven journalism. If you're one of them -- thank you. If not, I hope you'll consider joining your fellow readers in this next chapter. Before we bring in new investors, I want to give you -- our readers --a special opportunity to help shape where we go next. You've been with us from the beginning. You understand why The Flyover is needed -- and I'd rather grow with you by my side than rely on outside investors who don't share our values. Making Investing More Accessible To make that possible, I've asked our legal counsel to lower the minimum investment to $500 -- so more of the people who built this community can become owners in it. Why Invest in The Flyover 1. Independent journalism matters. We answer to readers -- not advertisers, political activists, or corporate boards. 2. Our audience is soaring. From a kitchen-table startup to over** 3.3 million readers nationwide, The Flyover is among the top 1% of fastest-growing media startups in America. 3. We 're delivering results. Since our first investor round, readership has grown 27%, while maintaining strong profit margins and expanding our reporting reach. 4. You 're investing in trust. Nearly every dollar goes directly toward expansion and innovation, keeping our reporting fact-first and unbiased -- a rarity in today's media. 5. Return on your investment. As The Flyover continues its positive trajectory, there are several possible ways reader-investors could benefit -- through a sale, public listing, or dividends. While none of these are guaranteed, they reflect potential outcomes if our growth continues on this path. Owning a part of The Flyover is something special. And yes -- it's more complicated to manage a larger group of smaller investors. But I instructed our attorney to do it anyway. Because I want to partner with you -- our readers. If you've been on the fence, Will you be part of the movement that changes how Americans get their news? Common Sense News for Common Sense Americans. Are you in? 👉 Thank you for believing in what we're building. Warm regards, Guy Short Founder,The Flyover * | Equity crowdfunding investments in private placements, and start-up investments in particular, are speculative and involve a high degree of risk and those investors who cannot afford to lose their entire investment should not invest in start-ups. In 72 hours, California will make a decision that could determine control of the U.S. House and the future of our democracy. _Every single conversation — every knock, every phone call, every voter reached — matters now._ Our organizers are working around the clock across the state. But the truth is, we’re stretched thin. We still have phonebank lists that need to be called and voter protection lines that must stay open. **[We’ve never been this close to the finish line with so much still riding on our organizing. clean_body: 72 hours | = | Everyone, this is it! We’re three days out! In 72 hours, California will make a decision that could determine control of the U.S. House and the future of our democracy. Every single conversation — every knock, every phone call, every voter reached — matters now. Our organizers are working around the clock across the state. But the truth is, we’re stretched thin. We still have phonebank lists that need to be called and voter protection lines that must stay open. = = If Prop 50 passes, California voters — not MAGA politicians — will decide our congressional representation. It will keep fair maps in play and preserve a path to flipping the U.S. House next year. If it fails, Trump’s allies will lock in their power and silence millions of Californians before a single ballot is cast in next year’s midterm elections. But this final push is straining every resource we have. We need your help to finish strong — and then stay in the fight to flip the House once Prop 50 passes. = = = = = = Thank you! \- All the energized organizers at CADEM HQ | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. clean_body: | = = Hi, it's Ghazala Hashmi, Democratic nominee for Virginia lieutenant governor. I'm reaching out with five reasons why you should split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List today >> 1. This election is our first big test since Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans took power in Washington. 2. All eyes are on Virginia to see if Democrats have what it takes to stand up to Republican extremism. 3. I'm proudly running a grassroots campaign powered by people like you, not by corporate megadonors. 4. After four years of Glenn Youngkin and Winsome Earle-Sears, Virginia's future is on the line in this election. 5. And lastly, I won the Democratic nomination in June with one of the slimmest margins in history. The general election is on Tuesday, and I need your support now more than ever. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your split contribution will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Ghazala Hashmi Democratic Nominee, Virginia Lieutenant Governor = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. *cue Sarah McLachlan’s In the Arms of Angel*

| Peter,
Pennsylvania's State Constitution requires that every ten years State Supreme Court Justices face a reelection vote.
The three Democratic Justices responsible for the Democratic majority on the PA Supreme court are up for reelection this Nov. and MAGA has launched an unprecedented full scale assault on them to ensure they are removed.
Their removal would mean a full GOP redistricting of the PA congressional map, a total abortion ban, and no accountability for MAGA vote rigging in 2026 and 2028. PA will go so far to the right it will be unrecognizable.
---

| | | | These three Democratic Justices are facing daily relentless attacks in the run up to their November 2025 retention election
---
| | | | MAGA billionaires have been saturating Pennsylvania voters with attacks against these justices, telling vile lies like they "protect pedophiles." In the final stretch, GOP turnout is surging and Democrats are getting outspent. If the election were held today, it would be a complete toss-up. What we do in the next 3 days could put the Democrats on top.
Sadly PA's rules of judicial ethics limits these justices from campaigning for themselves meaning they are completely defenseless in the face of the MAGA onslaught they are up against and they need our help 🥺🐶
*cue Sarah McLachlan's In the Arms of Angel*
Defend Our Courts is one of the top Democratic organizations stepping up to save these justices. Time is running out, only 72 hours remain until Election Day. Fellow patriot —

You may already know me – some of you know me and my story well.

But I want to take this opportunity to reintroduce myself and **share some exciting news.**

**My name is Mark Lamb** — I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and the proud former Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona.

After much prayer and reflection with my family, I’ve made a huge decision: **I am officially running for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District!**

[ **JOIN MARK LAMB »** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fdebae772edf44e5b71e9cdf370da5d3&_e=vl3pH1U7lQ9-Xx6DTGKf4qPgYWvFWvU5CSfCMTKR77pcXtjmh0GC1ZhlcuHq4soHcle-zAScM_Qoi3fBXpZKp72_OYpSbfJ8UlgsyZvgNb1A4AZ6fxuTE7aJVFLrLBVcXh2lQo17tEdruDvywtV3QrCNjcIO2L-AhmUa058KZ5GZnOOLyeynkI-8rRr9It65K9bpThvwmHddZvH9lBc9otDRlN3JpyBh1YAA05tJ1cZexYtS569X_idVNFSDJFePNoWU1NT0gSevVdwyN2-Ee85xjIZENbOQ8XMFgHpoQPwd1QUwiQHSh7ozXwkaz3QJx22TFmDthYFgHQkyrjYs57SqhhP8GpmWCUjdJLj_ARLD-h2xACiV6fIB7nMANrePNkKIHWe3mkX744CeiJt-57tbdhbMI358Vz8IGt_a0N6GJXe03S_tNPkV94Y0v96HFjHlUtnNAeyEyBBKlijwAIpfuNvwo7-NaTMu6lPsWK07zTnrp4rQFJ1sXOSl2gIwm8zKwZWvhCscKNeNevT4G5T0t1Tu3k6N6-j46Lm4jWf4uaokshX5Ea-xVrU3zKRE1Cu3ai9HDzq79W5rlAelfNw_at0ZPECwg1_hysyvYjIIz6sLIzHHjH2tOk7al34JtwxCDc7_ZUlBfB4eyJnqVimLk1LoSkLLG1Huh29WNoE%3D)
This isn’t about ambition — _it’s about service._ I’ve seen what happens when leaders lack courage and conviction, and I refuse to sit by while feckless politicians and bureaucrats fail our nation’s families.

**I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right** — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now.

[**So I’m taking this fight, along with these principles, to Congress, and I want YOU, fellow patriot, to be part of our team from Day One that’s going to bring home a win.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fdebae772edf44e5b71e9cdf370da5d3&_e=vl3pH1U7lQ9-Xx6DTGKf4qPgYWvFWvU5CSfCMTKR77pcXtjmh0GC1ZhlcuHq4soHcle-zAScM_Qoi3fBXpZKp72_OYpSbfJ8UlgsyZvgNb1A4AZ6fxuTE7aJVFLrLBVcXh2lQo17tEdruDvywtV3QrCNjcIO2L-AhmUa058KZ5GZnOOLyeynkI-8rRr9It65K9bpThvwmHddZvH9lBc9otDRlN3JpyBh1YAA05tJ1caKLXNFEDOUXgnF2Lk6jTehQz0STp0BDamGCYjODddckUY44g7jX0UdxXFFsuJxHiWxYYYD2qYFAIgpGANF-dvUN-0uXGWADzkVChTilFW6rFbUMvszTn6fUBjnSCIIQ12GpRHxR1y9NZMaPIWIsU_VFS1CBf3WhtkXd-nSadLLepVgtLsM2Ss-r1ua1nalFahMAr5xiYuDEFl9J5cSwQWn7-8x9oTe5aCNF8rjSZNidiA7NFlepsKxsFUxOWXwTR5pdsSDYRzzjXDJ458D8e-VWZHayDITUb0wdv-3HLP6p0tjaoPuAFjWICZTwsN4HyznZdqkrVdp6OBD_kcw5kORHiyVqjIRjNXhFffzjSPYgJ6-Be8T86Yunut5CjBJtSgjZPpwd6MuoJmwIz9BVe1Mp7CSUVsRG5mvQcXAYsOhjIY83rgmo5b3JWCm0SNwQNM%3D)

[ **JOIN MARK LAMB »** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fdebae772edf44e5b71e9cdf370da5d3&_e=vl3pH1U7lQ9-Xx6DTGKf4qPgYWvFWvU5CSfCMTKR77pcXtjmh0GC1ZhlcuHq4soHcle-zAScM_Qoi3fBXpZKp72_OYpSbfJ8UlgsyZvgNb1A4AZ6fxuTE7aJVFLrLBVcXh2lQo17tEdruDvywtV3QrCNjcIO2L-AhmUa058KZ5GZnOOLyeynkI-8rRr9It65K9bpThvwmHddZvH9lBc9otDRlN3JpyBh1YAA05tJ1cYO4eFlX3Rzwm3FR9Qdpfd9afIRbyjWkmrRfJ0c-NmiaKSP3sADCDNLvcZgaVm68enCxZBy2Y7Firn9vDdE0jo-u3sOV78CNMZglo6pQlMBB71HFtoVto0W9sk1bMhYew5Xf5fDIkveV_LVYlIuFw3dgsoEfaTzSrKyZE1jKxRVtXSsZUJ4nd3E-dXUFhaBnl4CuZltxykwU2_qOk13RWhIV5MCaoZzze-xNJGVPNXUpr1ktPuhc71LvgxjRVOOlR05TpEK6H_PHjHovQJeOh9JKEFq9Vg2KfnTp1V_5_dQ4xiIvHkcoSp2pwo2kGqoB2uEk8zn-8eCM4M7LqWn_tsAfQYMHX-TRLDW-len4x2kyZcPeTvC0E1K1mLRDzYt_2zkfbnog07bZzGWBZ1ct0YlnYfD9UbOd9L4k6h0lfL5sfSqs-DwNisQ__AfxYfVeos%3D)
Before I go any further, I want to thank Congressman Andy Biggs for his years of service to AZ-5 and wish him well in his decision to step down from this seat and run for Governor of Arizona.

Andy has always fought hard for conservative values, **and you can trust that I will do the same.**

**You know me, and you know my record.** As Sheriff, I spent years on the frontlines — battling the fentanyl epidemic, fighting cartel violence spilling over our borders, rescuing children from trafficking rings, and holding gang members and criminals accountable.

**Every day, I put on my badge and carried the responsibility of keeping our communities safe.** I’ve seen families ripped apart by crime and drugs, and I’ve felt that pain personally. I’ve seen firsthand the devastating effects of rising crime and failing leadership.

**I won’t stand by while career politicians in Washington make excuses, play politics, and leave families unprotected.**

Our liberty, our safety, and our freedom are not guaranteed by silence — they are defended through action. I will fight in Congress for the same principles I’ve lived by as Sheriff: **personal responsibility, faith, courage, and an unwavering commitment to the people I serve.**

I will stand up to the woke left, to the weak political establishment, and to anyone who puts politics above the safety of our communities.

_This fight will not be easy._ Washington isn’t used to someone who tells it like it is, someone who’s willing to get their hands dirty and put people over politics. But that’s exactly what I intend to do — for Arizona families, for our law enforcement, and for our Constitution.

clean_body: I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. | Fellow patriot — You may already know me – some of you know me and my story well. But I want to take this opportunity to reintroduce myself and share some exciting news. My name is Mark Lamb — I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and the proud former Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona. After much prayer and reflection with my family, I’ve made a huge decision: I am officially running for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District! This isn’t about ambition — it’s about service. I’ve seen what happens when leaders lack courage and conviction, and I refuse to sit by while feckless politicians and bureaucrats fail our nation’s families. I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. Before I go any further, I want to thank Congressman Andy Biggs for his years of service to AZ-5 and wish him well in his decision to step down from this seat and run for Governor of Arizona. Andy has always fought hard for conservative values, and you can trust that I will do the same. You know me, and you know my record. As Sheriff, I spent years on the frontlines — battling the fentanyl epidemic, fighting cartel violence spilling over our borders, rescuing children from trafficking rings, and holding gang members and criminals accountable. Every day, I put on my badge and carried the responsibility of keeping our communities safe. I’ve seen families ripped apart by crime and drugs, and I’ve felt that pain personally. I’ve seen firsthand the devastating effects of rising crime and failing leadership. I won’t stand by while career politicians in Washington make excuses, play politics, and leave families unprotected. Our liberty, our safety, and our freedom are not guaranteed by silence — they are defended through action. I will fight in Congress for the same principles I’ve lived by as Sheriff: personal responsibility, faith, courage, and an unwavering commitment to the people I serve. I will stand up to the woke left, to the weak political establishment, and to anyone who puts politics above the safety of our communities. This fight will not be easy. Washington isn’t used to someone who tells it like it is, someone who’s willing to get their hands dirty and put people over politics. But that’s exactly what I intend to do — for Arizona families, for our law enforcement, and for our Constitution. I’m ready to step up and bring real leadership to Congress, but I can’t do it alone. Every contribution — big or small — sends a message: that hard-working families won’t be ignored, that our freedoms matter, and that courage still counts in America. I’m ready, fellow patriot. Are you with me? For God, Family, and Country, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 P.S. I want to make it clear that the outpouring of support you’ve shown me and my wife, Janel, in the past factored into our decision to make this run. As Sheriff, I couldn’t have accomplished what I did without my deputies, and I won’t be able to succeed in this fight without you. Thank you! Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

clean_body: | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending Citizens United state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, Listen, we’ve emailed you OVER and OVER again about how important it is to ABOLISH the Electoral College once and for all! REMEMBER: Top Democrats like Elizabeth Warren agree that abolishing the Electoral College is the ONLY WAY to stop Republicans from stealing future presidential elections. We’re re-opening our petition for the next 6 hours ONLY in your area! Team, if you truly care about helping to save our democracy, you’ll sign on before it’s too late. | \-------- FORWARDED MESSAGE -------- BREAKING via NBC : "Trump just realigned the entire political map. Democrats have 'no easy path' to fix it." This petition is registered to you only. Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the outdated Electoral College. Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million. But the Electoral College overruled her popular vote victory. Now, Sen. Elizabeth Warren is urgently pleading with Democrats: We couldn't agree more. But now that Trump is in office, he and his Republican cronies will do everything in their power to uphold the Electoral College. So we need to act now -- because we must prevent unpopular, unqualified candidates from EVER becoming President again. Thank you, Fight for Reform | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O.
