name: James Carville
subject: this will TERRIFY Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones]
Hey folks – it’s James Carville.
I’ve seen a lot of campaigns in my day, but the Attorney General’s race in Virginia is shaping up to be HOT.
Why? Because Donald Trump’s loyal foot soldier, Jason Miyares, is running for reelection. And MAGA billionaire donors are already pouring MILLIONS into his campaign. They know that with Miyares in office, they have a devoted Trump ally to carry out his agenda.
That’s why Democrats need Jay Jones to win this race – there’s no question about it. Jay is committed to protecting abortion rights, standing up for small businesses, and keeping Virginia out of Trump’s circus.
I’m not one to sugarcoat things, so here’s the truth: If Democrats elect Jay Jones in this battleground race, it’ll TERRIFY Republicans.
And they know it, too! It’s why their gaggle of billionaires and corrupt special interests are dumping millions into this race, to the point that they’re now outraising Jay Jones by more than a 2-to-1 margin.
Here’s what has me fired up – Jason Miyares only won his last race by 0.81% (less than a POINT) and recent polling has shown that this will come down to the margin of error. That means every single dollar, every single grassroots donation, could decide the outcome.
Jay Jones doesn’t need Trump’s billionaires because he has something way better: grassroots supporters like you. That’s why EVERY Democrat needs to step up in this moment and make a contribution of whatever they can – whether it’s $25, $50, hell even $100 if you’ve got it – to help Jay Jones fight back and win this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones]
Let’s get the job done, y’all.
- James Carville
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/P5FfEbyeIEejNQSsVSzanQ2?unsubscribedata=FmpiqOSrjOknjV2b5bWMRJvVjslmuiht0w4SnUcCpPfVpfWTsuqhQPsVOr3pYnSCwVMvwi%2BBhqSVAcB%2FvSgrnf4cDqsWQcF6tlM3iMXjWNUxaRSs1OdKHKGjfc11hdBOWmj1vFKBtisuY8ImJSHWQtMDF%2Bb487vkxv3Z6xaApMHAgz9AYsVIF8ddNWfehUWdOblz6yTN%2Brvedy0fUEMsZJs3XkxxPhq%2FJP6GcXREyI%2Bm8eIQpZ6zz2ihYUZLsyKDJlmyEl5WEOyeuscf%2BXudQKdgV9pMedWc9RtdENc8BjMMe164YtpwXgLiSsy2UILUrIXIuxbNtQI1KKeuxyGtA39%2B13%2BzAnwqZPT4b77FwRvr6ZrKl1aidD9zzFfzCZ000yEtsYy0UtUyTy5qLllGV4yMDNl1Z6SoVjyuo8zcpm4%3D .

name: Bob Brooks
subject: Putting out fire in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
I’m a firefighter, a dad, and someone who has spent his life working hard for myself, my family, and my community.
#
Peter, I’m Bob Brooks. I’m a firefighter, a dad, and someone who has spent his life working hard for myself, my family, and my community.
**I’m running to defeat Republican Ryan Mackenzie in PA-07. Last year, he won this race by just one percentage point. Next year, we have the chance to defeat him.**
**[I want to tell you a bit more about who I am and why I’m running for Congress, but if you’re already with me in the fight to flip this competitive seat, then I’m humbly asking you to split a donation between State Democrats Committee and me →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97127?refcode=em20251101-9661&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9661%2E614464%2ERyN745)**
**[Donate →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97127?refcode=em20251101-9661&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9661%2E614464%2ERyN745)**
From a young age, I worked plenty of different jobs. Paperboy, fry cook, dishwasher, bartender, pizza delivery driver — you name it, I did it. I know what it’s like to clock in early, work hard, and still wonder if you’re getting ahead.
**But in 2005, I found my passion: I became a firefighter with the city of Bethlehem.**
I spent 20 years there because fighting fires was more than just a job for me — it was about serving my community and standing up for the people who keep us safe.
Republicans in Congress like Ryan Mackenzie are spending their time prioritizing Donald Trump and the wealthy billionaires who back their campaigns.
While families in PA-07 struggle with rising costs and making ends meet, Mackenzie is busy supporting policies that slash Medicaid and SNAP to pay for tax cuts to the rich and powerful.
We deserve better. We deserve someone who understands what working class families and small business owners are going through. We need someone who knows what it means to work hard and still wonder if you’re going to get by.
I’m that person, Peter. I’m running so that I can fight for you, the people.
Thank you,
Bob
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97127?refcode=em20251101-9661&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9661%2E614464%2ERyN745)

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=4&akid=9661%2E614464%2ERyN745).

Jim Himes (D-CT), the ranking Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee, issued a chilling warning to the nation—one that underscored the legal, moral, and political tightrope the United States is walking in its expanding use of military force against alleged narco-terrorists. It’s about cultural fluency, digital dominance, and a sense of humor that the Left still doesn’t quite know how to handle. Take the Department of [...]

# **[CBS Staffer Comments On Layoffs](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The latest wave of layoffs at CBS News—reportedly impacting nearly 100 employees—has ignited predictable finger-pointing across media circles. But let’s be clear: blaming new editor-in-chief Bari Weiss is missing the mark entirely. The real culprit isn’t editorial change.

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118475448/579873808/1435897075?refcode=email_110125_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA1OTkwZS01N2I3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CDC2w3zsVtxm1FTCkwfLDxAyMQuXDYq6IW2FD9qQ-ak=&emci=f303cff8-6eb6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=1d05990e-57b7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7280715) Howdy folks, it’s John, and I just wanted to reach out with a great big THANK YOU. **Thanks to everyone on this grassroots team, we hit our October fundraising goal _just_ ahead of last night’s deadline.** But listen, this campaign isn’t just about raising money. We’re in this fight to solve the very real problems facing millions of working people today — whether that’s by bringing down food and energy costs, defending affordable health care, taking on climate change, or ending the President’s chaotic tariff-taxes that have wreaked so much havoc on our economy. But it won’t be easy. We’ll need you (_and as many friends and family as you can bring along!_) all on board to help us defend Colorado from the far-right MAGA Republicans running to flip this state red and implement extreme legislation — like a nationwide abortion ban. [_**So if you have a moment, I'd really appreciate it if you could make a $10 donation to our campaign and help us prepare for the next stage of this race as we head into the final months of 2025.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118475449/579873809/910623595?amount=15&refcode=email_110125_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA1OTkwZS01N2I3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CDC2w3zsVtxm1FTCkwfLDxAyMQuXDYq6IW2FD9qQ-ak=) | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118475450/579873810/910623595?refcode=email_110125_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA1OTkwZS01N2I3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CDC2w3zsVtxm1FTCkwfLDxAyMQuXDYq6IW2FD9qQ-ak=)

John

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: PA FWD Party November Newsletter
body:
Party on!

|
### Let's throw a Party
Parties are a lot of work. You have to decorate and make snacks. You have to deal with different personalities and opinions about what kind of party to have. You have to show people why this is a party they want to attend. That’s like what we've been doing with the Forward Party for the past few years. A variety of people, from all over the state, have been working to build the Pennsylvania Forward Party since 2022 and we thank them for their support—especially all the past candidates. Thanks to their successful campaigns, we have 6 Forward-affiliated office holders... and that number could triple if our 12 current candidates win their races next week. We're planning the (political) party we all want. It's hard work and we need your help. We have big plans for next year, including a convention, State House races, and county-level organizing... but right now, the best thing you can do – to make this party a success – is find a way to support these 12 candidates. And [Vote November 4th](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4XT5t7ZPUAMhlrpk_QBMIslqem-Ydep4zgJqQk7dascykdibPvu-kCwhgbtOsI8Y-Xi9n8WyY5GKVqhtwjS8ww&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_november_newsletter&n=1)! clean_body: Party on! | Let's throw a Party Parties are a lot of work. You have to decorate and make snacks. You have to deal with different personalities and opinions about what kind of party to have. You have to show people why this is a party they want to attend. That’s like what we've been doing with the Forward Party for the past few years. A variety of people, from all over the state, have been working to build the Pennsylvania Forward Party since 2022 and we thank them for their support—especially all the past candidates. Thanks to their successful campaigns, we have 6 Forward-affiliated office holders... and that number could triple if our 12 current candidates win their races next week. We're planning the (political) party we all want. It's hard work and we need your help. We have big plans for next year, including a convention, State House races, and county-level organizing... but right now, the best thing you can do – to make this party a success – is find a way to support these 12 candidates. And ! \- Philadelphia District Attorney \- Derry Township School Board Director \- Delaware County Controller \- Lower Macungie Township Commissioner \- Berks County Court of Common Pleas \- Adams County Court of Common Pleas Christian Fyke- New Kensington City Treasurer (Write In) \- Bucks County Sheriff Forward on the Ballot Zachary Thompson - Judge of Election, Allegheny County Jessica Forsell - Inspector of Election, Bucks County Steven Goodsell - Judge of Election, Delaware County Eva McGowan - Judge of Election, Philadelphia County You can check out the pledge they signed . Join us November 17 at 8pm for our monthly Statewide Call. You'll have things you want to talk about. We willtoo! Click below to see more** Help support these events from our partner organizations. And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party -=-=- Forward Party · 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Providing meals for Seattle families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re stepping up to help the people Trump and MAGA Republicans are abandoning.
#
Peter,
As SNAP food assistance hangs in the balance for 42 million Americans — including right here in Seattle — families across the country are at risk of going hungry because Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans refuse to end the shutdown they started and fund basic nutritional assistance.
We can’t wait for them to do the right thing. In moments like this, it’s on us to step up, pitch in, and help our neighbors out.
**That’s why my campaign is partnering with White Center Food Bank to provide 1,000 meals before Thanksgiving to people impacted by these cruel cuts.**
**Each meal costs about $2.50 to provide, which means we need to raise $2,500 to reach our goal.[Will you pitch in now to help us cover the cost of these meals?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251101-whitecenter.gdxN9K&refcode=em20251101-5586&amount=3&t=1&akid=5586%2E420207%2ENXQgoH)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251101-whitecenter.gdxN9K&amount=3&refcode=em20251101-5586&t=2&akid=5586%2E420207%2ENXQgoH)**
**I’ll also be volunteering alongside my campaign team to help sort and distribute food on-site.** If you’re in the Seattle area you can sign up [here](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51565?%3Futm_source=em20251101-5586&t=3&akid=5586%2E420207%2ENXQgoH) to volunteer with us!
This is exactly what our campaign is about — fighting for bold policies in DC and organizing to support our communities at home.
It was important that we do this in White Center, where 1 in 5 residents face food insecurity. It’s one of Seattle’s most diverse, immigrant-rooted neighborhoods — and it’s being hit hard by this shutdown.
While we can’t fix everything overnight, we can start with these meals. It’s one less worry for families trying to put food on the table and pay rent, let alone afford a Thanksgiving meal.
**This is what resistance looks like, Peter — compassion, community action, and resilience in the face of cruelty and hate.**
**[So if you can, please make a donation today to help us cover 1,000 meals for families in need. Every dollar raised will go directly to providing meals at the White Center Food Bank.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251101-whitecenter.gdxN9K&refcode=em20251101-5586&amount=3&t=4&akid=5586%2E420207%2ENXQgoH)**
Together, let’s make sure that everyone in our community can live in dignity — one meal at a time.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=5586%2E420207%2ENXQgoH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=5586%2E420207%2ENXQgoH)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

BREAKING: In the middle of a government shutdown, the Trump regime is taking a sledge hammer to the programs that protect children with disabilities. The Office of Special Education and Rehabilitative Services (OSERS), the backbone of support for _more than_ ___7 million students_ , is being gutted. Staff fired. Programs halted. Families left to fend for themselves. **At Able Dems, we refuse to look away. We’re fighting to protect disability rights, restore essential services, and make sure every child gets the support they deserve, no matter what.** **[This is the moment to step up. clean_body: These are not numbers on a spreadsheet... | | | Trump is hurting vulnerable kids. BREAKING: In the middle of a government shutdown, the Trump regime is taking a sledge hammer to the programs that protect children with disabilities. The Office of Special Education and Rehabilitative Services (OSERS), the backbone of support for more than _7 million students , is being gutted. Staff fired. Programs halted. Families left to fend for themselves. At Able Dems, we refuse to look away. We’re fighting to protect disability rights, restore essential services, and make sure every child gets the support they deserve, no matter what. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. These are not numbers on a spreadsheet. These are children losing access to speech therapy, early intervention, and the teachers who help them thrive. It’s as if compassion itself has been written out of the budget. This isn’t just bad policy, it’s state-sanctioned cruelty. The most vulnerable among us are being sacrificed to political games and bureaucratic indifference. And if they can strip help from children with disabilities, no one’s rights are truly safe. At Able Dems, we support Democrats with disabilities and our allies. We’re ready to step into the breach. We’re ready to call out the theft, the betrayal, and the destruction of our shared values. ****** Let’s turn outrage into action. Let’s fight for every child’s future -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: My Faith Votes
subject: Urgent update: Virginia is closing rapidly.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by My Faith Votes
body:
Godly leadership or policies that ignore biblical values?
| | | | |
---
|
---
Peter,
The Virginia governor’s race is razor-thin, with RealClearPolitics showing just a **3% difference** between the candidates in the latest poll. That margin could be as high as **95,700 votes** or as low as **82,800**. The difference between godly leadership and policies that ignore biblical values.

With **5.81 million registered voters** in Virginia, turnout on **November 4** could range from **2.76 to 3.19 million** , depending on whether voters show up like they did in **2017 (47.6%)** or **2021 (54.9%)**. Will they be informed? Will they be guided by faith?

My Faith Votes is focused on reaching **low-propensity Christian voters**. Those who are already registered, but don’t vote consistently, especially in off-year elections like this one. Many simply need a reminder, a reason, and a resource to act. That’s where we come in.

Thanks to our army of Action Partners, we’re already sending over **112,000 letters** to low-propensity Christian voters in Virginia and more are being written every day.

_But we must do more._

**Text messaging has been proven to boost turnout.** We want to follow up with those receiving letters and reach even more Christian voters across Virginia with a simple, powerful message and a link to our **Candidate Fact Sheet.**
[**Every dollar you give helps us reach more believers with truth and clarity.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fea295be7a94481e9de89396584bbbd1&_e=tK69S0t4YGjTJ3sXpaG5RioC6GOykPWHBedTuNhB-Fdv3-aJgQhaC-AINeWMwIoJW2W69T7K4E_K7HKPJTVNSj9ML0nAeVy6duJJQFmTr3bDBzBLbWSHW0YNAfK4eScbA_vsbqusjlIdpeSsm5FYw_htutoRfWfBdVHJ2L0I33fuZ5z325LTIf4TbnRnJJW80MDxfC3eIDaS8OEH5EN0GWWP_SFT-LgcdBNKvne0MjbsYBtyDKSdLNyR8aCtqw5z69XRXOgx7K8Akg6wcqlKBZ3bFZeQthlltZwjUz_HoZ3Lb6k5hMrdG694xGyJ5eSnBcPS349l3fg6ML1hySOHvBnW2fiEU58YznRr12mvPX0yTzbFZPWH65VcUvvWMXf-XF2i29FKfq1sbI9W8xB8Eu_tLfotT9iG-YVes3kxs8AGpGeCEUlUifWLcmifEi98nawIfqDjfzj-j0COkRw2ndQHsmao7lKPA1lxWcNBTdylm8E2kcmt5tgcI_izUA_k4HzZHi_Cd5X3udtUBRQL5cCd5wixMz_NZFb5qH1vHmuwHIaQBFc-83TjagfmGZzf33yNqEK5Nxvo-7CNSYIxpyKAMMKPHxzEf8FZ-AbnQBOE8oeal2MdDyR9H9rw_-_3CV-gizDewTvi0F2_UPMicQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Godly leadership or policies that ignore biblical values? | | | | | | Peter, The Virginia governor’s race is razor-thin, with RealClearPolitics showing just a 3% difference between the candidates in the latest poll. That margin could be as high as 95,700 votes or as low as 82,800. The difference between godly leadership and policies that ignore biblical values. With 5.81 million registered voters in Virginia, turnout on November 4 could range from 2.76 to 3.19 million , depending on whether voters show up like they did in 2017 (47.6%) or 2021 (54.9%). Will they be informed? Will they be guided by faith? My Faith Votes is focused on reaching low-propensity Christian voters. Those who are already registered, but don’t vote consistently, especially in off-year elections like this one. Many simply need a reminder, a reason, and a resource to act. That’s where we come in. Thanks to our army of Action Partners, we’re already sending over 112,000 letters to low-propensity Christian voters in Virginia and more are being written every day. But we must do more. Text messaging has been proven to boost turnout. We want to follow up with those receiving letters and reach even more Christian voters across Virginia with a simple, powerful message and a link to our Candidate Fact Sheet. Here is how you can help: A gift of $10 reaches 100 voters A gift of $35 reaches 350 voters A gift of $50 reaches 500 voters | | Your donation helps us close the gap with well-informed believers who vote their values. United. We Stand. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by My Faith Votes My Faith Votes** 5801 Golden Triangle Blvd, Suite 103 Fort Worth, TX 76244

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: It’s been blue since dial-up internet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9547c47d98d748a4ace397bd76bb6f5e&_e=cssYz4ioSOVWIN5-U81558mheJcNzer-gyWU3gtmgbQJCSYNSlMsjRIFtFtAJgFQ-r_e3VXQLP1V192yftY0bEybVAatL6y5KfBshvO-MC0lHRh-F-NcWHUmWSw6DF2y6iQMuqNVtLWoEeluZr6GrHUvKSHpf7aDTyecZoG2GSuMAbMz4YqjheEJHFTm3UH_u0prgO-wUOwYbYEi8rF7l7M0DO1djMkNE5yMfb1Nhng0GodsvW0Lp3zwO93cBLOKw2FbmA3Q2cbNTe1aZLGvMOryMxyaYpg8VE3bJlQASBOYUFntL54SZRWx-upIy_QRmSYu7dfuf138odLnK6e7VwrHze4qkwBeYPb7fOMIsVapOIMOaYds9lBJwg9PNUgdAQMroyNUlO-5LHlfqaV42xLjOAVFcx7tOTYvHDwWgkNiS6z-ROhJNkhtpZr7iaFg79DC2nlijL5t8cApsgGuKjDjmzhoxGry_J-Ir_g3HMpOMuW5VI6OoXL31Y3VljpZ__w1lEjm5j1iw9FM8ePHorDUWY8vydZ0sSXvEDQZMpEu_7e97cmUvkwG_iplMgWL-x2TJy8HR8hVPVxkvZb3dB2fKTUDclcZm3Ve6bvdHS8zau4kJTY_ryrsIWKUiePucVDcyDo5ht0gW8WjIane9xt-BVa799Hcxt-EkP6CPKFwSBknqYZHkLxeVec_R8OhO4ywxdK_RUsKP9UzrRfcb3a5JL7xYubY7qybPYvnpLJuHqFaWMQUs-Z0oItqqw9264ctHrfMbXpUzC0E9XNvtpx5iyXM6ohQXQ4udeRAbsw%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda.

Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back.

I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. **I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos.**

Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans.

_**Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe.

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9547c47d98d748a4ace397bd76bb6f5e&_e=cssYz4ioSOVWIN5-U81558mheJcNzer-gyWU3gtmgbQJCSYNSlMsjRIFtFtAJgFQ-r_e3VXQLP1V192yftY0bEybVAatL6y5KfBshvO-MC0lHRh-F-NcWHUmWSw6DF2y6iQMuqNVtLWoEeluZr6GrHUvKSHpf7aDTyecZoG2GSuMAbMz4YqjheEJHFTm3UH_u0prgO-wUOwYbYEi8rF7l7M0DO1djMkNE5yMfb1Nhng0GodsvW0Lp3zwO93cBLOKw2FbmA3Q2cbNTe1aZLGvMOryMxyaYpg8VE3bJlQASBPue_Y7aabajS-8IQAEagAbb-lFIcVnlyq-J3HO33NR5qrL6yQc-C_TdIIUgb2HqnnqwJGfSXJxDrjzJ12nmgEHrrNIMym_Bz2jB4qcCZODDhLEJvmkoaDmeyXftReL0TFPnKaG7x-iGhuwSEhuw4g8p9WFvj8Wb06Zrf0qbrx4dF7lq0gZF_FdXO9xxc7N4LQ4SWCZJn0PkPLsOT3jXetS64HPaZP4-Ba_fqTn7pZeQlIBj6fyg7szXjQZ2Q_PVnaE-CYPvypUXELjW360GfJykkgyg3OEiHsvKJ-N_tU-NKY2BGoz0KqVLJNteodQN5K_lNkBotk_iLiQ8fL278bdbOa-ZlcA1JTtx8zngrtB3m5kGqU6syNCiMG5DkqvEYDQsyUk2QMFH00T-L_coIV5Ttp7sm2aqTpk_YiOOw8rb7l3mCDRRZRwf7kvn33tSG-XfvFInxI7XPIQLAHasi8RX-39bcccHAJnX_js8eoXe4ommL2gATYNDQXk5TaEqog%3D)
**_ _[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9547c47d98d748a4ace397bd76bb6f5e&_e=cssYz4ioSOVWIN5-U81558mheJcNzer-gyWU3gtmgbQJCSYNSlMsjRIFtFtAJgFQ-r_e3VXQLP1V192yftY0bEybVAatL6y5KfBshvO-MC0lHRh-F-NcWHUmWSw6DF2y6iQMuqNVtLWoEeluZr6GrHUvKSHpf7aDTyecZoG2GSuMAbMz4YqjheEJHFTm3UH_u0prgO-wUOwYbYEi8rF7l7M0DO1djMkNE5yMfb1Nhng0GodsvW0Lp3zwO93cBLOKw2FbmA3Q2cbNTe1aZLGvMOryMxyaYpg8VE3bJlQASBNO7_LLnOlaUWfvzoVdkAsnRETCSPD_ARREW0vjwrFIZFOMvjdAYt8wmh_GQ586lRQprOtEaibTKRN90ilnYUv4-3ioV-DzjwmVCKA0AUddU1FXWTdqpWIDACNdkXSdKChSpZzQdFs25G7uC-XwGU7pbRMQJRo-U04ddiAkmFUKOjy_Ia7jEzBO5VWtHnShP0h3w3OHqVTmPdZbFvQ4FsAOEgzXIEANCIvvcmptUd3najLsldw2NKG0BjcYJIAsdzncyKlX22YBnuDUdUiPjH8XesacmUM041obHoG5CJ8J-RyKlStWwlt6byzEHmkGoqGXOAkYBqo8x1YfHwz6Ts3Cfl5jVh1Jr-ARGdyll3X8Y3e_M7kFvDc5EnHL9ckw9Oql_Gecjf6TIGln7epUGUjcVbM4vt21usoqKJqUDoYBWp32LJvizY5I2C1rmOsP7DIAuMAWA9fx0TG-lj3gbsvTaQ5_Gg_8aLUn3ietg10igU65R6Cb6HWTCOLC79NHTWw%3D)_
**Here’s the spark:** Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. **With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades.** Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good.

**I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom.**

We’re the underdogs, no question. **Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet.** But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything.

_**[Now, I need you to join me.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=9547c47d98d748a4ace397bd76bb6f5e&_e=cssYz4ioSOVWIN5-U81558mheJcNzer-gyWU3gtmgbQJCSYNSlMsjRIFtFtAJgFQ-r_e3VXQLP1V192yftY0bEybVAatL6y5KfBshvO-MC0lHRh-F-NcWHUmWSw6DF2y6iQMuqNVtLWoEeluZr6GrHUvKSHpf7aDTyecZoG2GSuMAbMz4YqjheEJHFTm3UH_u0prgO-wUOwYbYEi8rF7l7M0DO1djMkNE5yMfb1Nhng0GodsvW0Lp3zwO93cBLOKw2FbmA3Q2cbNTe1aZLGvMOryMxyaYpg8VE3bJlQASBPSPg8XHXBU6vOK-qP2Z_lFA4eVoYxV8IHCTQbBwDJp2DRgFxrWMtcBADSmuR_peBEbm9vh0SU9Y71aaxJc_W-jS7Aa3o1MXOhz6EyyxmuJtDNjHkFK8_odiiZFVPVfCn9Vhhi8rsVfx36qb3TFfUsucX_DUhb-BeOxjqLVjxDfujHFhEmhiD02RmrvGjbAsfUvsGPHUWrk8OoTvGnQPGEKnhpIaoVrO5YMQqSbmWltjf8yqqmptDaaieIO_7gh_2q77h74Tmx1BdHTHikZ9ZM7dEMKzAoWv9D5t31DVeDl8kyd6cKnGYI_TEV-LkjTZ1p70U_7Il-wHbZP-o1O7Qcpafw1kji10Qjx4osjonPC3r3wIUgTJPMmbONF2m-hVTpkGiUCU0XK6HQIHW3zkcykr-qxjWHepHYBLAlj0geoiQQFHUc1HueRtRD0DtapFd5K40Yih-U1uJzoxRt_7Lp1jDYTmbxmiwgoAJ4YZtLEd4Pf37ApIItUymctnruRIAs%3D)**_

clean_body: Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | Fellow Conservative, Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda. Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back. I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos. Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans. Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe. Here’s the spark: Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good. I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom. We’re the underdogs, no question. Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet. But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything. Our last fundraising push got us halfway to our goal, but with Q4 filings looming and Flanagan raking in cash from coastal elites, You—retired vets, churchgoers, grandparents who’ve paid your dues—can fuel the ads, the door-knockers, the momentum to shock the system. You’ve got a choice. Delete this and let Democrats keep choking our future. Or stand with a battle-hardened SEAL ready to fight—not with noise, but with the quiet professionalism that wins wars. Help me make it real. Because we built this country on sacrifice and resolve, and we’re not done fighting. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| Peter, this is Congresswoman Nellie Pou. I am the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, one of 13 Democrats who won a district Donald Trump carried last cycle, and among the newest additions to the DCCC Frontline list. [If you don't have time to keep reading, I understand. Please consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help fuel our efforts to take back the House and stop Trump's reckless agenda in its tracks.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27f9f6e5-8111-4ab2-a463-e930b37302df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Being added to Frontline confirms what we already knew: Mike Johnson and the NRCC are coming after us. Why? Because Donald Trump won in NJ-09, once a reliably blue seat. But here's what else Blue Amp Action and I know:
* He and Mike Johnson already cut Medicaid to give more tax breaks to their billionaire friends
* They plan to slash more Federal programs and services, and Social Security is coming up on the chopping block
* Democracy and voting rights — for women and veterans — are under attack
* The best way to stop all of them? Taking back the House.

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Add your name to defend the Voting Rights Act before it’s too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
The cornerstone of our democracy is under attack
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118475645/579874527/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmUzNjUxMC01ZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PRSVdwqiV-d4IIfYD_e56-xYux6YuBdccCdNLX4lGa4=)
Hi, it's Robert Garcia — the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
**I won’t sugarcoat it:_Right now, the Voting Rights Act — the cornerstone of American democracy — is under attack._**
Section 2 of the VRA outlaws racial discrimination in voting. It’s what ensures every voter — no matter their race, zip code, or background — has a fair shot at electing leaders who truly represent their communities.
But extremist politicians are trying to gut it, paving the way for more gerrymandering, more voter suppression, and less representation for communities of color.
**The Supreme Court must protect the Voting Rights Act.** We cannot go back to an era where politicians pick their voters instead of voters picking their representatives. We cannot allow decades of civil rights progress to be erased in a single court decision.
**[That’s why I’m calling on you to join me in demanding that SCOTUS uphold Section 2 and preserve the VRA — because free and fair elections are not negotiable. Add your name to our petition right now to stand up for the Voting Rights Act and defend every American’s right to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118475646/579874528/1472272769?refcode=251101_RG_vra-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmUzNjUxMC01ZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PRSVdwqiV-d4IIfYD_e56-xYux6YuBdccCdNLX4lGa4=&emci=f492137e-3bb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=8fe36510-5db7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118475647/579874529/1472272769?refcode=251101_RG_vra-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmUzNjUxMC01ZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PRSVdwqiV-d4IIfYD_e56-xYux6YuBdccCdNLX4lGa4=&emci=f492137e-3bb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=8fe36510-5db7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
We’ve come too far to go backward. Let’s make sure the Court — and the country — hears us loud and clear.
Thank you
Robert Garcia

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118475648/579874530/-309737922?refcode=251101_RG_vra-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmUzNjUxMC01ZGI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PRSVdwqiV-d4IIfYD_e56-xYux6YuBdccCdNLX4lGa4=)

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Helping people impacted by SNAP cutoffs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
42 million Americans are still at risk of going hungry. Here’s what you can do to help.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251101-1&t=1&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls)
**Big news, Peter: A federal judge just blocked Trump’s attempt to cut off SNAP benefits today. But we need to be clear — this does not guarantee anyone will actually receive their benefits, and millions are still waiting to find out if they’ll be able to buy groceries next week.
**
The ruling says the government can use emergency funds to keep SNAP going — but it doesn’t require them to actually send out payments today. And we know this administration openly defies court orders — we cannot trust they’ll follow this one.
Even if they do, the emergency reserve is only $5 billion — a fraction of what’s needed to fully fund SNAP. That means 42 million people — including 16 million children — could still be at risk of going hungry in the coming weeks.
Plus, this ruling only applies to SNAP — not WIC (Women, Infants, and Children) or other food assistance programs families rely on. So while this may offer a bit of breathing room, it doesn't guarantee safety. We haven’t won yet, and we can’t let our guard down now. We must keep fighting for full SNAP funding and support our neighbors facing food insecurity in the meantime.
**This was _completely_ avoidable, Peter.** Trump and MAGA Republicans chose this outcome after blocking a Democratic bill to continue SNAP funding during the Government shutdown.
Some Republicans claim SNAP recipients are _“freeloading.”_ That’s rich, considering the GOP is refusing to open the government and the House has only worked 20 days in four months while still getting six figures in tax payer money annually and health insurance.
And if they were even a little bit in touch with reality, they would know that the average SNAP recipient gets $187 a month — barely enough to cover basics. **SNAP is not a luxury. It’s literally keeping people alive.**
This is exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists: to elect leaders who come from real communities and understand what it’s like to rely on programs like Medicaid and SNAP. Leaders who have the lived experience to know what it’s like to live the struggles most Members of Congress can’t even begin to comprehend.
We may not know what comes next — but we can help our neighbors survive this horrific failure of leadership by Republicans.
**_Here’s how you can step up to help your community right now — or find support if you’re impacted by the shutdown and SNAP cuts:_**
* **Find a Food Bank:**[Feeding America,](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3817?t=3&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls) [Food Finder,](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3804?t=4&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls) or [Harvesters](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3805?t=5&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls) can connect you to local food banks, meals for kids, and volunteer opportunities.
* **Mutual Aid:** Use [Mutual Aid Hub](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3806?t=6&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls) to connect with local aid networks.
* **Community Support:** Check local Facebook “Buy Nothing” groups or reach out to neighbors who may need help.
* **Delivery Programs:** [Meals on Wheels](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3807?t=7&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls) can help people who may not be able to make it to a food bank, and [DoorDash,](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3808?t=8&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls) [GoPuff,](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3809?t=9&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls) and [Instacart](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3810?t=10&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls) are offering a limited amount of free or discounted groceries and meals to impacted SNAP recipients.
* **United Way:** Dial 2-1-1 to find additional resources.

Our leaders are failing us. It’s on us to support our neighbors and make sure no one goes hungry.
In solidarity,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251101-1&t=11&refcode2=2797_587540_FoJgls&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=12&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=2797%2E587540%2EFoJgls)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Only 3 days away!  [DOTL]
subject: A Trump dictatorship is becoming more possible!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
California’s governor is warning us:

|
---

body:
Peter, Abigail here. I just left our rally with President Obama in Norfolk, and I want you to hear this from me directly:
_Today is a milestone for our campaign._
And yes, the President's appearance will lead the headlines tomorrow. But this election is bigger than any one event. _It's about the future of our Commonwealth._
From my days as a federal law enforcement officer and then as a CIA officer, I worked to keep our country safe. Then I ran for Congress, not for the title, but to improve people's lives. And in this race, I've shown that I will put Virginia first — always.
Now, the whole country is placing their hope in this team to win the biggest election of 2025 so we can set the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond.
**That's why I hope I can earn your support today. Use my personal link to complete your contribution:**

### Five years after his book How to Avoid a Climate Disaster, Gates now declares there is no disaster

* * *
* * *
### The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication
### Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism
[Support What We Do](https://substack.com/redirect/485c151c-ba2c-4299-b062-333836cf980c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
Bill Gates has changed his tune on climate change.
Not even five years after the [publication](https://substack.com/redirect/a7ff7f71-4116-4e60-9920-d89467d33175?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of his book _How to Avoid a Climate Disaster_ , Gates now [declares](https://substack.com/redirect/c5afe7df-bcb8-42ca-9eb7-a61849a8fd9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) there is no coming disaster.
Hmmmm...
Many people see this flip flop as something positive, a "come to Jesus" moment on one of the leading international causes. "Bill Gates is on our side now!".[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/eb20b971-bb8d-4be6-8b3d-e962e57e3935?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[I was not as enthusiastic.](https://substack.com/redirect/eb20b971-bb8d-4be6-8b3d-e962e57e3935?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Allow me to explain.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/70137cb3-aa75-4ffc-9b29-a839da66e522?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
First, nothing has changed in the repository of climate data. There is no new evidence. No new study provided a revelatory insight which made Bill Gates say _**" well, would you look at that!"**_ Had that been the case, I'd say kudos to you, Bill. We adapt our positions as they become better informed by new information.
But on climate, _**" the science is settled"**_, right? We have heard that for years if not decades. And those of us in this space, who have looked at the same science, but reached different conclusions were the enemy.
We are called "deniers". We were **[deplatformed](https://substack.com/redirect/2a9bea6b-27a1-416e-b9b6-9fbb35f1016f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by social media companies. Chuck Todd, when he was still the host of NBC's "Meet the Press" **[declared](https://substack.com/redirect/8755010f-e263-490b-9219-da641cc0dfa3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** us not welcome on his show. We were accused of misinformation, disinformation, and just a year ago John Kerry, Joe Biden's special envoy for climate change, **[stated the 1 st Amendment](https://substack.com/redirect/8bf4df5b-cf98-41eb-a367-429edde0d66e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** was a "major block" in his agenda.
* * *
* * *
**[Together with AMAC](https://substack.com/redirect/c305dfc0-d805-4c78-bf25-de6b0d811e07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Your Complimentary 90-Day AMAC Membership**
America is at a crossroads -- and your voice matters. That's why we're inviting you to try **[AMAC-- The Association of Mature American Citizens -- free for 90 days.](https://substack.com/redirect/c305dfc0-d805-4c78-bf25-de6b0d811e07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c305dfc0-d805-4c78-bf25-de6b0d811e07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When you activate your complimentary membership, you'll receive immediate access to:
* **Exclusive Savings** on travel, insurance, healthcare, and more
* **Trusted Resources** on Medicare, retirement, and Social Security
* **A Voice in Washington** through AMAC Action, our powerful grassroots advocacy arm
* **Community & Fun** with the AMAC Magazine, book club, sweepstakes, and more

No cost. No credit card needed. No obligation. Just 90 days of everything AMAC has to offer -- so you can experience the difference for yourself.
**[[Activate Your Free 90-Day Membership]](https://substack.com/redirect/c305dfc0-d805-4c78-bf25-de6b0d811e07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Join today and stand with millions of like-minded Americans fighting to protect faith, family, and freedom.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/c305dfc0-d805-4c78-bf25-de6b0d811e07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**P.S.** You'll also start receiving **AMAC Magazine** , the trusted publication conservatives rely on for news and insight you won't find anywhere else.
* * *
* * *
This is quite a reversal for Gates. The same ice core samples and university studies and research papers, the same body of evidence which taken as an undeniable and absolute truth caused little Greta to cut class and old hippies to throw soup on priceless art... all of this remains the same.
**What changed is the opportunity.**
Look at the date of Gates' climate book: 2021. Biden, the newly inaugurated President, had an Administration full of climate lunatics like aforementioned John Kerry and Gina McCarthy (she implemented the hundreds of changes to appliances, light bulbs, toilets...) all of them vowing to spend unimagineable fortune of tax dollars to combat climate change.
At the 2024 Presidential debate Kamala Harris **[bragged](https://substack.com/redirect/5754167d-cb69-4e8c-80dc-6a8f99c4cdf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**" over the last four years, we have invested a trillion dollars in a clean energy economy"**_ as if Keynesian-style spending were an accomplishment. "Vote for me! I make printing press go whirr....!"
A trillion dollars is a lot of money. Someone got their mitts on it, and likely those decrying climate crisis and preparing to avoid a "disaster" were the recipients.
Tens of billions of our dollars were "invested" on wind and solar farms, on electric vehicles rebates, on electric buses, high speed rail, and climate "justice" whatever the hell that means. On CBS' "Face the Nation" host Margaret Brennan laughed at former Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg when he said $7.5 billion had been spent to build "seven or eight" charging stations. Think about that... Secretary Carl Sagan struggled to quantify "seven or eight", as if those numbers are ethereal and incalculable. The $7.5 billion was more certain, however. It was gone.
That is why Bill Gates wrote his book. Washington, DC was making it rain climate change dollars like Russian hookers at Hunter Biden birthday party.
Fast forward to today. Money machine go stop. Sad face emoji... but something new has emerged... and with no new climate science or data, the "why" of Gates' pivot is all about energy.
Energy is now a top priority. Cutting red tape to build coal, natural gas, nuclear plants, or permitting reform to expediate pipelines, mining and extraction is administrative paperwork. That is not what Gates cares about... it's what the energy is for: AI.
Gates wants the artificial intelligence. He wants the data centers because that is the new power, and a power unlike anything we have seen or can even imagine.
Climate is about power: power not just to control your thermostat, but your movement, your family decisions, your diet. Under the guise of "avoiding the climate disaster" people like Bill Gates want to force you into 15-minute cities and regulate your use of air travel or miles you drive.
So much bigger than the climate power, the COVID power, the vaccine power, the GMO power... Gas stoves and EV's are crumbs compared to the untapped power of AI.
AI is the power the remake the human genome, to write and rewrite history in real time, to monitor every person on every device in every country on the planet and make decisions about what they see, read, hear, what they are allowed to click on, what they are allowed to access, purchase... the power to feed billions in nanoseconds with "your" truth.
AI is the power to change reality as you are experiencing it so that, for example, the video your kids are watching can morph in real time to feed them what people like Gates believe they should see, to make them global citizens, to encourage them to get booster, to eat the bugs, with no permission from you, no oversight from the Federal Communications Commission, not even the kids' awareness it is happening.
I am just barely scratching the surface of what AI's potential power will be, and Bill Gates wants it. He wants it more than any billions or any company or any **[$650 million yacht](https://substack.com/redirect/5a400038-614b-4e93-a87a-4e1f76959b7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
And AI needs energy. **[My org put out a study](https://substack.com/redirect/ecd1ceaf-3c70-44dc-8916-d0d8207ff21f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** showing how we need to produce three times as much electricity as we currently do in the next decade.
The biggest impediment to increasing electricity production is the very climate movement Bill Gates has supported for decades, so the climate change activism, the book, the entire agenda is discarded like an underage sex slave trapped on a Caribbean island.
That is why Bill Gates has changed positions, and it is not a victory. It is not even a Trojan Horse or a Benedict Arnold. It is something far, far worse.
Hence my angry Twitter video and my deeply held suspicion.
I know these people. For decades they watched their climate alarmism bankrupt small towns across America, plunging coal miners into poverty, driving up divorce, depression, alcoholism, domestic violence, and suicide, and they were unmoved. Climate activism fired hundreds of thousands of fossil fuel workers, caused economic chaos and geopolitical instability, and they were unmoved. From their private jets, people like Bill Gates would say "learn to code" at the blue-collar workers whose very livelihood they destroyed.
I started my organization precisely because of the climate activism funded by people like Bill Gates.
I know these people. I fear them. I loathe them.
Bill Gates wants power more than anything: power over you, your freedom, your property, your rights, your agency, and he will do anything to get it. AI is the greatest opportunity to make it happen, and he will do whatever it takes to control it. We are all underage sex slaves trapped on a Caribbean island.
This is why I fight the climate movement and welcome this new fight against the looming AI master, gathering his forces in Mordor, building the armies, forging weapons, preparing for war. AI is that ring to rule them all, and the climate movement was standing in his way.
So let us fight, with every breath we have, let us fight those who wish to rule us. Honor and courage.
_**Daniel Turner is the founder and executive director of Power The Future, a national nonprofit organization that advocates for American energy jobs. Contact him at daniel@powerthefuture.com and follow him on Twitter @DanielTurnerPTF**_

Hi Peter, it’s Zoe Lofgren. I’ve been working on Capitol Hill for over fifty years now. Through my time, I’ve fought on the frontlines of some of the greatest battles for our nation’s democracy, including when I served on the January 6th Committee in 2021. Donald Trump and his administration think they can strongarm their way into an autocracy. But I’ve fought and won to keep our democracy intact since the start of my career – and I refuse to give in now. [**But this fight is more urgent than ever, Peter. From election tampering to illegal budget cuts, Donald Trump is endangering our country with his reckless far-right agenda. So if you support my work, please consider donating to my re-election campaign today to help me keep up the fight for our democracy. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118476457/579877198/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-11-01_BIO_ZOL_ES-34660_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzBkYzU2ZS01ZmI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XLKi7BlnerT90ttocg_sZlbXj6fXyNXTWHbWGzTfIxM=)

Fellow American,

My name is Winsome Earle-Sears, and if you don't mind, I'd like to tell you a little about myself. **I 'm not your typical politician, and I never will be. _This is my story._**

In 2021, I won the General Election for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia by less than 60,000 votes. In doing so, I became the first black woman to hold this office--but that's not why I ran. I ran to effect real change and instill common-sense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we have done and will continue to do.
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6033bfeed14542bbb1d7fc1428333954&_e=7rSRay1Omjx_yfYDZVqVB1LEDRSUil5VoyM120rVGurtv_sVxHtu5g6u0uHSN1FFS0I9uY_6F-3GVAD59bVllOS7dW4VYXdK1ZCyXfUeXCd15ngPHtNjXcZcIJSSMoj_cQZtB9YlfwERi9W0nQCGwnLYTYT4C9C2aCGI9vKpxw82LRxHtd3mK4mL8jFvDVSligkJZvp8c8pKrFq2lHSLGhuKyXvn67hzyYiS2GuH8DB7bDeoyPNKPqPPuRi8RpyAG4XFBuGB1No025uZ1ZB603MVRNsyTrA7p4R8XNPnqiNpOS233vX50VQxLAbq-HsPUBNqM6OBIEaLea4Uz8CtccGix07rqkCwn6I9yl75HbD8doHh5eeQJqtfbqVoZfib9PmqigimYo33bdgwrP9BexRu5ERMst7oVq_AqQ9S8Gnpmu4XceJkpJZ87FsTTXzVLuTg-4Um8odNF0VQ3jhoqP3d0bFlmjF1E51JvMp-FAPWSq2nEfp2VLHT6TXXXmd_vItLZB5jEjgrjT55MPSOYEf52TTUB8Nwoh2YAu-lWJIr7X_lRDiomQo7d2OwHgc5_stL5SLUWkGlSE_fu6JejmCA2Xv3oBwqflIq-zZ5qURAtR44Hx4V3eRpFvbrRNTLKO4pNg_uqEibjjZmHz6eqB-CJRK2KMcorvmoYuMVBKvA-37QGQZbiRIBnQfy4e26HVGNvkfpPTEYZuEhM1t-hy03Q53-4aImlDOMiKGeTibv-6KpgwG9x-Gf9q64a5NNLhWM63pGjXxy5XKYEeTVx9rqQnG4juLLwiDK5vNXZ7aPXQ_sbOA0vEos4lx9FAaC)
---
Before becoming the 2nd in command in Virginia, I beat a 20-year incumbent in 2001 to become the first Republican to win a seat in a majority black district in the Virginia House of Delegates since 1865. In the General Assembly, I focused on getting results for my constituents.
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6033bfeed14542bbb1d7fc1428333954&_e=7rSRay1Omjx_yfYDZVqVB1LEDRSUil5VoyM120rVGurtv_sVxHtu5g6u0uHSN1FFS0I9uY_6F-3GVAD59bVllOS7dW4VYXdK1ZCyXfUeXCd15ngPHtNjXcZcIJSSMoj_cQZtB9YlfwERi9W0nQCGwnLYTYT4C9C2aCGI9vKpxw82LRxHtd3mK4mL8jFvDVSligkJZvp8c8pKrFq2lHSLGhuKyXvn67hzyYiS2GuH8DB7bDeoyPNKPqPPuRi8RpyAG4XFBuGB1No025uZ1ZB603MVRNsyTrA7p4R8XNPnqiNpOS233vX50VQxLAbq-HsPTPhk19OXsZ4OCz97agudqQElOYUXW7Qopaxn-fuNjnsovQs46XClvIWrqYmp1JScRE7psydesIk_ofJBDuGSLkZJNGDfs5Djrwc8nutZg2pUfIPDOArGH8eYjQf8OGJuPVwjBsYLUVF1M3J974eHZqbe9MobCsJqLPLKoM3eSM7SVHgzGQ74shfu3nDaO5C-DGm0U08mh2Tu0a1BqeVNN7lF-JF31tu-BDB9w7TSyUjUjRoY7nl1yWvdfK_gTaFxHbN6UCy9rfuTm-ZTdkDbOJwo5fK401RmuoU_1katjUpSjdnTRR7hrBQNyxzb_PLlPx8yM_d7ykJRiMFIZlzYxX73xteaEqEXe-2oZsGzEwiLxTFgmSgaKc3lFfF0-H-zEZJhEl9eAzqUX2rS15wA-dNfmsE1fLTLmLzLegANr1mDaxjrlPlXczPae2rvE4vuABGCNGU5Mw_wasrydXIpcbKbYRs0qX-wcCJDu2SNgUYqa0xmR-aT_aWWNLwo2cE7)

Prior to my career in politics, I had the distinct honor of serving as an electrician in the United States Marine Corps. It was here that I learned to be a leader--to improvise, adapt, and overcome. Looking back, my time in the Marines had a significant impact on who I am today, and for that, I'm ever grateful.
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6033bfeed14542bbb1d7fc1428333954&_e=7rSRay1Omjx_yfYDZVqVB1LEDRSUil5VoyM120rVGurtv_sVxHtu5g6u0uHSN1FFS0I9uY_6F-3GVAD59bVllOS7dW4VYXdK1ZCyXfUeXCd15ngPHtNjXcZcIJSSMoj_cQZtB9YlfwERi9W0nQCGwnLYTYT4C9C2aCGI9vKpxw82LRxHtd3mK4mL8jFvDVSligkJZvp8c8pKrFq2lHSLGhuKyXvn67hzyYiS2GuH8DB7bDeoyPNKPqPPuRi8RpyAG4XFBuGB1No025uZ1ZB603MVRNsyTrA7p4R8XNPnqiNpOS233vX50VQxLAbq-HsPYiEysp9m6sIw1MXTtbvYJS4iiE5XXRxCoqpD-POfpRd0rdA4vb6uZnxvSlz338lpH6wUA2bOVXGf7EnGK7pXiILN53JBKrZClSnoSA8CVwk4t6c3PxpZth_zHk4jrf5O2kPlF18CJwMPQSXR5LkNt823JPnnHry7vGQRGEKlsLeDd9ExWZiV8ox4jIku3dP_mVKDviP6IuMk7vrbFrTbkgujzefZ0sKLP2XbY7w9uhqv2AkQVay9rAeVdZ7ta9I_IkO42_nMLcK71T9IIlredxwJkmDjAwEyivaYAmXkV9PXXytj7J4X14TTR0bNjAHVzQcOrp9tOdLU8HdH9xMSYNgp873ZI3s-t9chHg_XE_haZdxtH37Haknb5uh2EBhfA1YF_zmB_zwWuQREZMKfiKPf6x1qjlmqLbyDSO4AB3s1fwxFT1Ajuh5jr8Z62SqKjSyWZU1dX8xay29yqxEzqtAb-4v-5e64kg-0o99JbbHD50beeG_G1n0VJfmBO65d)

Looking even further back, when I was just 6 years old, my family and I came to the United States from Jamaica. We arrived in a new land with no money and different accents, but we made it work and got through the struggles - **only in America is something like this even possible. **
---

Of course, none of this would have been possible without my husband, Terence, and my amazing daughters. Throughout all of this, they have been my rock, and I owe them everything - they have kept me grounded, confident, and optimistic for the future.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Fellow American, My name is Winsome Earle-Sears, and if you don't mind, I'd like to tell you a little about myself. I 'm not your typical politician, and I never will be. This is my story. In 2021, I won the General Election for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia by less than 60,000 votes. In doing so, I became the first black woman to hold this office--but that's not why I ran. I ran to effect real change and instill common-sense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we have done and will continue to do. Before becoming the 2nd in command in Virginia, I beat a 20-year incumbent in 2001 to become the first Republican to win a seat in a majority black district in the Virginia House of Delegates since 1865. In the General Assembly, I focused on getting results for my constituents. Prior to my career in politics, I had the distinct honor of serving as an electrician in the United States Marine Corps. It was here that I learned to be a leader--to improvise, adapt, and overcome. Looking back, my time in the Marines had a significant impact on who I am today, and for that, I'm ever grateful. Looking even further back, when I was just 6 years old, my family and I came to the United States from Jamaica. We arrived in a new land with no money and different accents, but we made it work and got through the struggles - only in America is something like this even possible. Of course, none of this would have been possible without my husband, Terence, and my amazing daughters. Throughout all of this, they have been my rock, and I owe them everything - they have kept me grounded, confident, and optimistic for the future. As you can see, I've lived a full life. There have been highs, lows, and everything in between, but I don't regret a single thing. I maintain, without a shadow of a doubt, that my story is only possible in America. I am the second most powerful person in the former capital of the Confederacy, and I am a black female. I am the epitome of the boundless opportunity and freedom that can only be found in America.But Fellow American, my story is far from over. I'm running for Governor not only to break records but also to continue spreading my conservative message - to show the world that a black, female, immigrant - and anyone else for that matter - can go from absolutely nothing to the highest levels of American politics. Now, the support I have received for my campaign thus far has been amazing, but the reality is that if we 're going to have a shot at winning this thing, then we must be well-funded. Thank you for your time, and may God Bless the United States of America, Winsome Earle-Sears (R-VA)| * Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. body:
Before Election Day, please read this >>
| Hey friend, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project. Before Election Day, I have a very important favor to ask of you:

[Are you able to chip in just $1 to our grassroots powered movement to take back the House? $1 will allow you to confirm your supporter status in the fight to flip the House & fight back against MAGA extremists. Chip in $1 today! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95773?t=6&akid=21694%2E878179%2EpokcCr) | [LAST CHANCE TO CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORTER STATUS IN THE MUST-WIN FIGHT TO FLIP THE HOUSE: CHIP IN $1 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/95773?t=7&akid=21694%2E878179%2EpokcCr)
---
We wouldn’t normally ask for just $1, but Election Day is around the corner and donations are plunging! _We want to make sure that loyal Democrats like you haven’t thrown in the towel in the race to flip the House and fight back against Trump._

**Your support — today — gives us the fuel we need to ensure we can limit the damage Donald Trump gets away with._It’s that simple!_**

[With Trump and MAGA Republicans ramping up their dark money war chest around the country, we need all the help we can get. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21694%2E878179%2EpokcCr). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21694%2E878179%2EpokcCr).**

name: Kat Abughazaleh
subject: Friend, they can try, but they won't succeed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kat for Illinois
body:
My goal hasn't changed
---
|
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/kUZAxPw2KhbT)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/BHRItmo4uat1)
---
Friend, What's happening to me and the 5 others that were indicted is unprecedented, and we will fight this in court, but what's happening to Americans right now is life-threatening. **I want you to know that while the Trump administration can try to kill the spirit of our campaign—they won't succeed.** Our campaign office still serves as a mutual aid hub and is open and stocked with resources like food, clothes, books, and feminine hygiene products like pads that are available to anyone,**no questions asked.** We're still doing stuff like pumpkin carving on stream, putting on events like our blood and bone marrow donor registration drive, supporting local food banks, and continuing to hire folks and pay them a living wage. Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/6K6NN8rfaTgh)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/Y2FFKq7Smsgh)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/M5S6Hi4nELoB)
---
A lot of things have changed, but the goal of this campaign, to make a positive impact on our community win or lose and help people _right now_ , **hasn't.**
[**Friend, legal fees are a new expense that we have to pay for, and the only way that we're able to do that while still providing mutual aid to people in need, putting on fun events, and running a winning campaign is with your help. If you're able to, please donate any amount that makes financial sense to you.**](https://ka4il.us/l/mLyjgQAQqmR6) Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.

name: Scott Presler
subject: The equation is simple
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action New Jersey Inc
body:
We could win the early in-person vote
| | | | |
---
Patriot, we are approaching the end of early voting in New Jersey and Republicans are just a few thousand votes behind Democrats in early voter turnout.
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1a00f57bf4414de7b2426d4df575280b&_e=V0vV_IaC5tyTK4BuHsVph8pftyaK0VQ-NhzEiuTjZBmXh12PDkFQdTUNIF24GZg0yoI4L7zO_IpupmKFHIJ_nyHTRevROMCZQFnxETtsiZa3HN_IZEuO1gHDSvF-1GNkBexjapp50ZtDhvgAJW6Qhfqh739iYOT77TvRzfPaful0A1_d5BTyJ9CJKgu0yJkfTqF0IJKzs0-w6He3LTas9jzQ7ZbAtjJgLYk_vwgChEU3tczRMSsQWg_teJPejUtVYr6T2EuJI7d64KHE_fMkW7AxPdTbvbRCbq4BmqWWia-milvlocAzs9t1B5OCAcshuVKR6FeBpT_OkIMwvJu5-BSQ-W_o3NOvMkDKPkObAkHupiS4IQtws261WEZaKl4D-5jAF9XGIxHpt9BrXiVR7w%3D%3D)
My team of grassroots activists is knocking doors across the state driving Republicans to vote early in-person so that we have as many “votes in the bank” as possible before election day. Here are the latest numbers:
🔴Republican In-Person - 122,628🔵Democratic In-Person - 127,543🟡All Others In-Person \- 61,030
Right now, the Democrat early in-person vote lead is 5 TIMES LESS than their margin in 2021, **_[and with only a few days left of early in-person voting, we could win the early in-person vote](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1a00f57bf4414de7b2426d4df575280b&_e=V0vV_IaC5tyTK4BuHsVph8pftyaK0VQ-NhzEiuTjZBmXh12PDkFQdTUNIF24GZg0yoI4L7zO_IpupmKFHIJ_nyHTRevROMCZQFnxETtsiZa3HN_IZEuO1gHDSvF-1GNkBexjapp50ZtDhvgAJW6Qhfqh739iYOT77TvRzfPaful0A1_d5BTyJ9CJKgu0yJkfTqF0IJKzs0-w6He3LTas9jzQ7ZbAtjJgLYk_vwgChEU3tczRMSsQWg_teJPejUtVbKh1XyTnhSrFNdlsl1PVGAkKIDMcFOmTPbRcEn6yDVquSM-Daya3dkpinH2eMbKXu685JdiNjqjz04Yga15DZ9u4mF0-6Gjxy5diyQidhKUTDd0oo0YhjUU4ivt8raycDvKXSBZ2ek7W0H0I1_3yPg%3D%3D)_.**
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1a00f57bf4414de7b2426d4df575280b&_e=V0vV_IaC5tyTK4BuHsVph8pftyaK0VQ-NhzEiuTjZBmXh12PDkFQdTUNIF24GZg0yoI4L7zO_IpupmKFHIJ_nyHTRevROMCZQFnxETtsiZa3HN_IZEuO1gHDSvF-1GNkBexjapp50ZtDhvgAJW6Qhfqh739iYOT77TvRzfPaful0A1_d5BTyJ9CJKgu0yJkfTqF0IJKzs0-w6He3LTas9jzQ7ZbAtjJgLYk_vwgChEU3tczRMSsQWg_teJPejUtVX1HWwqq4s10VHptS0a_64sbW0C5e5y6rATdzG0RPTNsXvzxXVFNxgB7KM-6kBmbLOj8SSxNfvT84OnRBNay9NF-2xH-kjXsXUKNJmqCybR8zr7es_h36lXjAN6eY4JfD9giXWB7uKL2ikWw2qrxvwQ%3D%3D)
Patriot, there is a lot of hard work ahead of us, but just like President Trump’s victory last year, the payoff is worth the sore feet and tired legs.
Why do we knock on doors? Because the research shows it is the most effective way to get voters to the polls. The equation is simple: the more doors we knock, the more Republican voters cast their ballots.
[SPONSOR A DOOR KNOCKER](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1a00f57bf4414de7b2426d4df575280b&_e=V0vV_IaC5tyTK4BuHsVph8pftyaK0VQ-NhzEiuTjZBmXh12PDkFQdTUNIF24GZg0yoI4L7zO_IpupmKFHIJ_nyHTRevROMCZQFnxETtsiZa3HN_IZEuO1gHDSvF-1GNkBexjapp50ZtDhvgAJW6Qhfqh739iYOT77TvRzfPaful0A1_d5BTyJ9CJKgu0yJkfTqF0IJKzs0-w6He3LTas9jzQ7ZbAtjJgLYk_vwgChEU3tczRMSsQWg_teJPejUtVePq96uR8lsKTkfFZHlhT6-PYjP4ZunL6kRQjMSCeDz1MK0dZd9fOMQpagkE2i4AH1IMwoKI-L1es-O3bICrlPDYhPd5gS-nMnoQxjbFHiYr43uTJe51mRFGaGmgWsb-6zEH3T4AwkjZoRqRTK3dfhw%3D%3D)
**That’s where you come in.**
**We have door knockers in New Jersey right now who are waiting to get the call that a generous supporter has sponsored them and it’s time for them to start knocking.**
**_[If you’re ready to make a direct impact on a toss-up election, there’s no better way to invest your money than sponsoring an EVA NJ door knocker](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1a00f57bf4414de7b2426d4df575280b&_e=V0vV_IaC5tyTK4BuHsVph8pftyaK0VQ-NhzEiuTjZBmXh12PDkFQdTUNIF24GZg0yoI4L7zO_IpupmKFHIJ_nyHTRevROMCZQFnxETtsiZa3HN_IZEuO1gHDSvF-1GNkBexjapp50ZtDhvgAJW6Qhfqh739iYOT77TvRzfPaful0A1_d5BTyJ9CJKgu0yJkfTqF0IJKzs0-w6He3LTas9jzQ7ZbAtjJgLYk_vwgChEU3tczRMSsQWg_teJPejUtVxr9p9t8KeyNojOh8brmHJfU5mKKJyAqYieWSzB1S-UALqzvSvAs1QjmmG9j0pColK8Nam_PYlW5qnfVRnd6YWdcW5Xjuar0_PgYKhOrptxaXIEWuMR3xhXp1qhxCKPE8ilOHGW5VCNS25GeiU0q-PQ%3D%3D)_.**
****__Thank you, Thank you, THANK YOU,
**Scott Presler** Early Vote Action New Jersey

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Peter – I’m making my final plea to you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: - I'm making one final plea for help before it's too late. My situation is desperate, and I need you to read every word of this email carefully. While I was barred from accepting campaign donations, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, collected hundreds of hundreds of thousands of dollars. Then, a Soros-backed group handed her $500,000 all in one shot. She's outraised me by MILLIONS, but the polls are now virtually TIED! But here's the hard truth: I'm on pace to miss my next crucial Fundraising Deadline Goal. I'm over $10,000 behind, and I desperately need your help to close the gap. As a Christian, a Marine, and a mother, not backed by billionaire donors or Hollywood liberals; I'm 100% reliant on patriots like you. That's why I'm asking you to send in any amount you can to help me reach this CRUCIAL Goal before midnight. grateful for your support, Peter. Together, we can beat my liberal opponent and take back our country. Thank you, and may God bless you. -Winsome Earle-Sears| . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. Hi Peter, \- I'm Mike Nelson - a longtime news meteorologist and proud Coloradan.
After decades of tracking tornadoes, wildfires, floods and blizzards across our state, I've seen firsthand how timely, reliable weather reporting saves lives - especially in rural areas where help can be hours away.
But recently, Lauren Boebert and her friends in Congress have slashed critical weather and emergency preparedness funding. She backed the "Big, Beautiful Bill," which guts the systems we rely on to predict and prepare for extreme weather. That's not just irresponsible. It's dangerous.
That's why I'm standing with Trisha Calvarese. She actually grew up here. She knows our communities, shows up and listens. And she understands how important it is to protect the resources families count on - weather alerts, a reliable electric grid, emergency services.
We need someone in Congress who puts public safety before partisan soundbites. Someone who takes facts seriously and doesn't gamble with people's lives. That's why I'm asking: [Will you chip in today to help Trisha flip this seat, hold Boebert accountable, and bring real leadership back to Colorado?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b5pfeG73865iF077PfXaiRcNkX0Bxs0uTBkrgXK9o_2ToUlMV0M5CTWZ4I7NiBNow4xlky0zmWYXrFlznP7d4HdZYSNw2Xirg8FXBsWAZHNzHZIJE8YqyvjmLYb1MNkHqfKrlnoFQkC04x0s1hLgUUMpXh-WxfUdgvKiRAmMY9UfCICGwecYErFmF9q2QHkM1d7b-8xghQzq8G_ahVUB4HNKJslneYZ8&c=wtGpqI-SP8i1_SboXZV9XmFWcXKOblUMhAJuUKAk1oxZYD201ucdqA==&ch=-VTmTjNeKuptUVSYVe2iSU6r6DyTlxlQC7TBt22leat9s5DCum5qkQ==)
