name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: 📰 November 1st Update 📅
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1bcb5a5353&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| |
## Dear Friends and Neighbors,
The past week was a dynamic blend of legislative preparation, in-district community engagement, and policy work on pressing national issues like affordable housing. Thank you for staying involved and for your continued support!

**🏥 Tour Highlights: From Chronic Care to Ancient Arizona 🏜️** One day last week was dedicated to immersing myself in the diverse work being done across Arizona:
* **PharMerica Facility (Phoenix):** I began the day with a tour of PharMerica’s Phoenix facility. They provide essential pharmacy services to long-term care facilities, specializing in individuals with **chronic healthcare needs, aging adults, and those with disabilities**. Their work is vital to ensure 24/7/365 access to medications for our most vulnerable residents.
* **Deer Valley Petroglyph Preserve (District 2):** It was a joy to be back in my district for a tour of **ASU’s Deer Valley Petroglyph Preserve**. Assistant Director John Bello gave me a one-on-one tour of this unique desert landscape, where I was reminded of the thousands of years of history and the tribes that lived off the land here long before it became our current Deer Valley. You can learn more about this remarkable site at [Deervalley.asu.edu](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=05536dde9e&e=a7ab36849c) .
* **School Choice in Action (Central Phoenix):** I visited two outstanding Hebrew private schools: [**Torah Day School** **of Phoenix**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5c9a59f95e&e=a7ab36849c) and the all-girls [**Shearim Torah High School**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=dc35084c89&e=a7ab36849c). Speaking with the students provided a fantastic, firsthand look at what **school choice** means for Arizona, allowing families to find the best educational fit for their children.

**🛠️ Policy & Prep: Addressing Arizona's Challenges 📚**
On the policy front, I participated in several important discussions:
* **Criminal Justice Reform:** I met with a trio of criminal justice reform advocates about an App currently being used to manage adults on probation. Initially, a pilot program funded by COVID dollars, this effective technology needs a legislative path for **permanent funding** to be extended into the foreseeable future.
* **Future Leaders & Internships:** A student I met last year at Grand Canyon University reached out to ask about our **legislative internship program**. Having been a legislative intern myself with the New York State Assembly in the late 1990s, I always enjoy sharing my experience and advising students on how to prepare for the interview process and what to expect on the Hill in Arizona.
* **Medical Freedom & Food Reform:** I attended a medical freedom gathering with the **Make America Healthy Again (MAHA)** movement. Their work to improve school lunches and remove ingredients with "funny sounding names" from non-perishable foods is gaining traction, with the current administration looking for ways to ensure more healthy options are available to Americans.

**🏘️ Housing Masterclass in D.C. 🏘️🏛️
Housing affordability** remains a top concern across Arizona and the nation. I was invited to participate in a 2-day housing masterclass in Washington D.C. with pro-reform state legislators from across the country to brainstorm bipartisan solutions. **Leading the Discussion:** On Monday, I had the honor of leading the Western states in a vital discussion on how to **reduce red tape and accelerate home building through legislative solutions.

Free Market Solutions:** After the masterclass, I met with the **American Enterprise Institute (AEI)** to discuss the Arizona legislature and free-market housing solutions. This week AEI held a housing summit in Washington, DC on a myriad issues surrounding affordable housing. You can learn more [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=61c2355740&e=a7ab36849c).

**Speaking of housing policy, check out the Mercatus Center at George Mason University's Hot take on pro housing legislation in 2025 [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c30d242171&e=a7ab36849c).**

After my meeting with AEI, l met with Kayleigh Kozak who now works at the **America First Policy Institute (AFPI)** to discuss parental rights and protecting children. You might recall I worked with Ms. Kozak on a few [legislative updates](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=13448253b5&e=a7ab36849c) to Kayleigh’s Law.
It was also a pleasure to catch up with a former boss of mine from my days working on Capitol Hill for US Senator Rick Santorum! **Community Engagement Highlights: Building a Stronger Arizona Together**
* **[State of the County Address](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a2e3775dbc&e=a7ab36849c) (Wednesday):**
Attended the Greater Phoenix Chamber of Commerce breakfast with Maricopa County Board of Supervisors Chairman Thomas Galvin. Topics included:
* Vision for county prosperity
* Affordable housing initiatives
* Election integrity
* Keeping taxes low
* **[Flinn-Brown](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8a84e16d47&e=a7ab36849c) “Shark Tank” Session (Thursday):**
Engaged with the current cohort on legislative proposals:
* Provided constructive feedback
* Judges were patient and supportive
* You’ll collaborate on a **victim’s rights issue** —potential addition to **Kayleigh’s Law**

* **[TerrosHealth](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bc4b3102ea&e=a7ab36849c): Attended their first annual "Hope, Health, and Healing Brunch" (Today)**

### As the federal government shutdown looms, please consider making a contribution to a local food bank to help our neighbors in need. You can find one to support in your area through the [Arizona Food Bank Network](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=184e0aee39&e=a7ab36849c).

**🗳️ Campaign Update 📈**
Our **campaign kickoff fundraiser** was a tremendous success—thank you to everyone who attended or contributed online! Your support means the world to me. **See below on how you can continue to help.

👉 [Click here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=253811d881&e=a7ab36849c) **to sign my nomination petition.

**👉[ Click here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e83e250c11&e=a7ab36849c) **to donate to my campaign. We’re preparing for a competitive cycle ahead:
* **Two challengers** have filed for the Republican primary
* **One Democrat** will run in the general election

Next year’s mid-term election historically sees lower turnout and often challenges the sitting president’s party. That’s why your continued support is critical as we fight to keep our seat and defend Arizona values. Best regards,
Shawnna

I was invited to participate in a 2-day housing masterclass in Washington D.C. with pro-reform state legislators from across the country to brainstorm bipartisan solutions. Leading the Discussion: On Monday, I had the honor of leading the Western states in a vital discussion on how to reduce red tape and accelerate home building through legislative solutions. Free Market Solutions: After the masterclass, I met with the American Enterprise Institute (AEI) to discuss the Arizona legislature and free-market housing solutions. This week AEI held a housing summit in Washington, DC on a myriad issues surrounding affordable housing. You can learn more . Speaking of housing policy, check out the Mercatus Center at George Mason University's Hot take on pro housing legislation in 2025 . After my meeting with AEI, l met with Kayleigh Kozak who now works at the America First Policy Institute (AFPI) to discuss parental rights and protecting children. You might recall I worked with Ms. Kozak on a few to Kayleigh’s Law. It was also a pleasure to catch up with a former boss of mine from my days working on Capitol Hill for US Senator Rick Santorum! Community Engagement Highlights: Building a Stronger Arizona Together (Wednesday): Attended the Greater Phoenix Chamber of Commerce breakfast with Maricopa County Board of Supervisors Chairman Thomas Galvin. Topics included: Vision for county prosperity Affordable housing initiatives Election integrity Keeping taxes low “Shark Tank” Session (Thursday): Engaged with the current cohort on legislative proposals: Provided constructive feedback Judges were patient and supportive You’ll collaborate on a victim’s rights issue —potential addition to Kayleigh’s Law : Attended their first annual "Hope, Health, and Healing Brunch" (Today) As the federal government shutdown looms, please consider making a contribution to a local food bank to help our neighbors in need. You can find one to support in your area through the . 🗳️ Campaign Update 📈 Our campaign kickoff fundraiser was a tremendous success—thank you to everyone who attended or contributed online! Your support means the world to me. See below on how you can continue to help. 👉 to sign my nomination petition. 👉 to donate to my campaign. We’re preparing for a competitive cycle ahead: Two challengers have filed for the Republican primary One Democrat will run in the general election Next year’s mid-term election historically sees lower turnout and often challenges the sitting president’s party. That’s why your continued support is critical as we fight to keep our seat and defend Arizona values. Best regards, Shawnna | "Sign My Petition" | | "Donate" | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK. AUTHORIZED BY SHAWNNA BOLICK. | | Copyright © 2025 Vote Bolick, All rights reserved. If you want to mail a donation, our mailing address is: Shawnna Bolick c/o Vote Bolick 610 E. | | Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. Our democracy is being put to the test like never before. **There’s no sugarcoating it: I’m writing to you because the Trump administration just tried to seize control of Oregon’s voter registration data.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118477230/579879732/-569431239?refcode=251101em-data-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWNjYWIwMS02NmI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjmJVpzJj6LYOPqtqPgaBETX9Ooxaos3KiiAs_IInq4=)
---
They demanded voters’ personal identifying information that has no legitimate role in federal election oversight. Data that can be manipulated to undermine trust in our elections and go after opponents. **This demand has nothing to do with compliance and everything to do with power.** By hoarding personal data, Trump’s DOJ could spin false claims of voter fraud or even build a national voter database to target Americans. **I said no. As Oregon’s Secretary of State, I rejected their request in the strongest possible terms.** But I need your help to show that the people of Oregon stand with me. **[That’s why I’m asking you personally: Will you add your name to our petition opposing Trump’s voter data grab?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118477231/579879733/-120029677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWNjYWIwMS02NmI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjmJVpzJj6LYOPqtqPgaBETX9Ooxaos3KiiAs_IInq4=&emci=94a5e4fa-3bb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=81ccab01-66b7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118477232/579879734/-120029677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWNjYWIwMS02NmI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjmJVpzJj6LYOPqtqPgaBETX9Ooxaos3KiiAs_IInq4=&emci=94a5e4fa-3bb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=81ccab01-66b7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)
---
Thanks to Donald Trump’s unprecedented quest for power, our personal privacy is at risk. Trust in our elections is at risk. And our constitutional authority to run state elections is at risk. **[We can stop this — but only if we speak up together. Sign the petition today to tell the Trump administration: Oregon’s voter data is not theirs to take.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118477233/579879735/-120029677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWNjYWIwMS02NmI3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjmJVpzJj6LYOPqtqPgaBETX9Ooxaos3KiiAs_IInq4=&emci=94a5e4fa-3bb7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=81ccab01-66b7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)** Thank you for standing strong for democracy, Tobias Read

body:
As Napoleon put it, an army marches on its stomach. With experts projecting that this race could be determined by as little as a fraction of a point, pizza could truly have a decisive impact here.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TwwMX2YsW2AJC3Ad8H8mZYQbanhga3rHXg8RElaowtbkAd6EH9um1SEl76l-5HgiX84wjg2ol1me5G05Y1h9ovW4htWKIaLrISnaB1QwbL8sC58qc9yuijygjhAI2Jd0UAzTzwXkhnReYyn19-6cNkQ0WVmpDEa1gM8XWcX3rNeexoR_Yzzcgti33iHhqSIoqEPaNDqVxsCKB3RdbTg7F00UiHek-_M-tvbAPm16j_I=&c=HUvZzrBucjtIxb_9eAzYFl_Fjgwhwu5gXB6utJWT6gFKZVUa2_1OxQ==&ch=wxXR_aDZrhvi92_sxkLVWreq-0h48S3Wox4NBe0UehKc_5FMBrv3Ww==)

| Peter,
There are less than 72 hours until the November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election and Democrats are neck and neck with the GOP.
Our army of paid and volunteer canvassing are one of the only things standing in the way of a catastrophic defeat for Democrats that would all but guarantee permanent GOP control of Pennsylvania for the next decade and beyond.
These canvassers are knocking over 10,000 doors per day in cold weather pushing it to the absolute limit for Pennsylvania's Democratic justices. They are coming in from across Philadelphia and every corner of Pennsylvania, some have even drove in from as far as Maine to help us get out the vote.
Yesterday, a local donor saw pictures online from one of these canvasses and reached out offering to place an order of large pizzas, from a local pizza joint for a canvas happening that day.

Our army will march on pizza. Andrew Hayman Field Director Defend our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

name: AOC
subject: They spent $3 million against me while I was wiping down tables, and we won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Please do not fall for the illusion or the lie that any action is too small. **There is no action too small**.
In fact, when millions of us _do_ tiny things, we _can_ disrupt these systems. I'm not saying that getting in the game is going 100% to change the outcome, but it may, because **we are in an unprecedented time**.
The unprecedented time can mean, of course, many bad things happen — but it can also mean that **unpredictable things can happen, and can even go our way**.
I was elected in the first Trump administration and nobody ever, _ever_ thought that I had a prayer in order to win. I was a waitress. I was challenging the head of a political machine who was supposed to be the next Speaker of the House.
They spent $3 million against me while I was wiping down tables, and we won. Why?
**Because an unpredictable window has opened**.
Do not comply in advance. You try anyway.
We will not be afraid – **because that’s what they want**.
But our movement for real progress will have to push harder than ever these next four years.
Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251101?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/35125?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20251101-10118-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10118%2E2526796%2EXTIp6v)
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251101?refcode=em20251101-10118-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=2&refcode2=10118_2526796_XTIp6v&akid=10118%2E2526796%2EXTIp6v)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251101-10118-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=3&akid=10118%2E2526796%2EXTIp6v)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. Lieutenant Governor. I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, and I’ve held many titles in my life. Each one hasn’t been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I’ve tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would’ve made it easier, but I’ve found a helping hand from your community means so much more. [That’s why I’m reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fffab7a158da47d6b5e171ec8d78d3e4&_e=Ne0NWZ5VzLUnHU0Dah9x_sAXjNUrTbaeW_42ppOI6StpXgV9EZNNqbkGBJLV4pgsHx99VE_7EkPPj639jqKNMVbHDM2xTSw-6cviTN6VnGZCFLaDrdGT2xObqRP35U1tRJO5TmekTJL-31BJqS6jGB81Pcw5yxLYH_kCYVhKB_krrGfXdHLh3zQ-QV0d1y3OZLkgS0ZRw-LRGhnvH8FUrIlA3XfMwj4wWz8Oups2m740vaD7W9MS_jnmXfFYYKgU23zMuDpN8D-CeYtCzSX01Tstp9pIu-LAxm4iGCcWRhjRRUJm9QMg2bERmRVuLNNmkD0yFjPHeeEkwqHq67JpfctQdMo6DqgHFNHJw2B376Jup4Ml_Ajku52obZz7JaLMd6VS8yAC2SxfL0RYpbQOIhQwhmLBhQ6qL6Be6ajXslYjplPJA0a5uGAXkYOXOInOOjVoR_vpxmoyEYAB0ztnYHGmEDniFWVGJxron8lrPUsIW2caozBZNmuWCV1Vc8ZPotE7YyVD_eL_FNNE9e_B_yn8wUWqGvesAFn1q19IydJDEso5RQvMHSUcBHk8uDQEqSbIOCazEI2FhpMbqSqXg1LHbvBWAPik11JyO3eA5hGZCl9IT7_L3-AQ5HhtZm1vJOwRaC9u0lD3p-alY3YdJxenUseoton2-0CGknVSzyCDWIpDfY2U6oz3s815X4mwqszs3YOdbvaNjcCYBGGcbnWrZmk8bwC9Fj1MBKErBurXqxbjDGcoLpVWP2ldq5X3qs8xrUVMNHPaGumh_33YJN-acQdQi0Z7Yp0OWMZevmnRgeo-dbs2qz_urQXAuIX_C8gZqZ1oJHHQjBMSryPbXSHcBphqzbR5xeqB6x5DoDc%3D) This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. clean_body: This is it. We're down to the wire. My election is a few days away, and the future of Virginia and our nation hangs in the balance! I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I'm running for Governor of Virginia. But I'm not just running for office--I'm running to stop the liberal establishment from destroying our country. They're pouring MILLIONS into my Democrat opponent's campaign, and we're running out of time--chip in NOW to protect our country’s future. I need 1,000 Patriots like you to contribute to my campaign in the next hour. If we can do that, I know we can win this. But if we fall short, the consequences will be devastating: higher taxes, more regulations, and a government completely out of touch with our values. Your donation right now can make all the difference. Let’s send a loud and clear message that we won’t back down. Thank you for standing with me when it matters most. Together, we can protect our values and continue leading America in the right direction. \- Winsome Earle-Sears * Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, and I’ve held many titles in my life. Each one hasn’t been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I’ve tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would’ve made it easier, but I’ve found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. body:
As Napoleon put it, an army marches on its stomach. With experts projecting that this race could be determined by as little as a fraction of a point, pizza could truly have a decisive impact here.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JD58-KCMzHEWbU2fIfLWXEPmDxqANpLC4J00qE7OqTAh9I7Z--s_ai8HvgRvQ0d9xiK5ziKb-ux2T_UT40_6RU1xWvVDCksq1sz-Q78FlMVOzh_TrdY8FfQV-lvsTszixwddl5llmlIqnOYg0_C5jW4u_kTOA_Os14iCeEZAidaqGVn3O8cAC8gWJVe6Wx6osemPtUsO7wP25JD2ieUlueem0qFZ-bjWJfvwDXuBuZM=&c=XNzhcwmLdGweeUVzD1ijYBcziNjUTSXz0N4cSGPST8xvLDGMiAoq1A==&ch=ibypkPDWO1Nr9CK0uNLoEcFKdnEDlo-CXq962slslNDuwxs0AC5YnQ==)

| Peter,
There are less than 72 hours until the November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election and Democrats are neck and neck with the GOP.
Our army of paid and volunteer canvassing are one of the only things standing in the way of a catastrophic defeat for Democrats that would all but guarantee permanent GOP control of Pennsylvania for the next decade and beyond.
These canvassers are knocking over 10,000 doors per day in cold weather pushing it to the absolute limit for Pennsylvania's Democratic justices. They are coming in from across Philadelphia and every corner of Pennsylvania, some have even drove in from as far as Maine to help us get out the vote.
Yesterday, a local donor saw pictures online from one of these canvasses and reached out offering to place an order of large pizzas, from a local pizza joint for a canvas happening that day.

name: Jay Jones
subject: Where it all began
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025]
Hey there,
When I first sent out this email back in November 2024, we were just getting started.
I was introducing myself, sharing my story, and asking you to join me in believing in a vision for a brighter Virginia, one that promises progress, opportunity, and safety for every Virginian.
Fast forward to today: there are only 3 days left until Election Day , and we’ve built something incredible together.
My team and I have traveled from Lynchburg to Fredericksburg to Norfolk, met thousands of everyday Virginians, and shared countless conversations about the future of the Commonwealth. This race has been the most expensive Attorney General race on record, and we still need your help.
Let me be clear: none of this would have been possible without your support. We’re in the home stretch now, and it’s all hands on deck. Every door knocked, every call made, and every dollar raised matters now more than ever.
If you’re able, please chip in today to give my campaign a boost and help power us through these final days. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=250]
DONATE $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=500]
Thank you,
Jay
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jay Jones <jay@jayjones.com>
Date: Tues, Nov 12, 2025 at 9:00 AM
Subject: Re: I’m running
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?]
Friend,
I want you to be among the first to know: today, with hope for a brighter future for our Commonwealth and our nation, I am proud to announce my campaign for Attorney General of Virginia.
I’m running because we need an Attorney General focused on keeping Virginians safe, not a personal, partisan political agenda. If you’re already fired up to support our campaign to retire Virginia’s MAGA Attorney General, please chip in right now to become one of the Founding Donors of this campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025] If you have a few more minutes, keep reading to learn more about my vision and my plans for Virginia...
I am the descendant of slaves. My grandfather, a Civil Rights attorney, was one of the first Black lawyers in Virginia. My father was in the first wave of students to integrate Norfolk’s classrooms, even as the Attorney General at that time shut down the schools to stop it.
Last week, we awoke to an uncertain future and a President-elect who openly flouts the rule of law. In times like these, I draw strength from my ancestors. In the very darkest days of our history, when things looked far more grim than they do today, they held unswervingly to hope that a brighter future was possible.
As Virginia’s Attorney General, my highest priority will always be the safety of my family and my fellow Virginians.
The incoming Trump administration threatens families with higher health care costs, higher prices, and hazards to our health. And President-elect Trump will find an eager accomplice in Virginia Attorney General Miyares. Jason Miyares has used his office to advance his own radical, ideological agenda, not protect Virginians.
As your Attorney General, I will protect Virginia families, our children, and the most vulnerable. We’ll crack down on those who would do our kids harm by working with law enforcement to get illegal guns off our streets, shut down drug traffickers, and hold to account gun manufacturers whose weapons of war are used to commit mass shootings and crimes.
I’ll take on the social media companies fueling a mental health crisis among young people and corporations that pollute our air and water. I’ll crack down on price-gougers, predatory lenders, and corporate landlords that break the law and make life unaffordable for the middle class.
If the Trump administration again tries to raise health care costs by taking apart the Affordable Care Act, I’ll be the first to take them to court to stop it.
And I will always fight back against any attempt to undermine abortion rights in Virginia.
If you’re ready to fight for Virginia families, to fight back against MAGA politics in Virginia and protect abortion rights, I need you with me.
Our team has set a goal to earn the support of 1,000 Founding Donors. We’re counting on folks like you, team, to help us reach this ambitious goal and kickstart this campaign. Will you chip in any amount to help us launch our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?]
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?]
Now is our moment to hold tightly to hope. Thank you for joining me in this fight.
– Jay Jones

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States
Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/YqPmCIa7-kyhl9zzn7GjiQ2?unsubscribedata=G0ik31vXSlO%2Ferwjs80AZFDbN6rUZeJw9ZgkLGFXUdvJzma1OGagJYydlJp%2BRYrtMBpOAU3V3CoEBnW8%2FghNbwYGsHYczvNczW1ed%2FwWIQ985eH%2F70v8%2B1OhqX%2BRmX43CVlFL57GD04b99IiMEU%2FDgHePv1dpRwKnD5Miq7hkAFDv%2FQ7mnMcW6b4zfWlx%2FLQ6yGhNjPevSfRun%2Fw2R5XP077IGunNqVf8mQWbT1ZqLd91BkEJo2rkeeqcw7TqLKXOWcLMu6xWB9JALBMyBtV13EQaz0S3Srxg7Ye0T5hi3EK3HYKPCWMLAoL4NcO%2BS0C0%2BjcsSVhIvy7%2BSwysmnph6CNWpNbGicBacPlErDZ9d%2Fuk5STaVaLcH5YwNvXm9pp2RjL%2BUdXh%2B2uWxtiPQV26C5GX63BM21BUXdGV0Kv1Ca8fFFYxBN38WSGG5Sn%2Bex7 .

Hi Peter — it’s Governor Josh Shapiro here.

In a few days, PA voters will have the power to stand up for our fundamental freedoms by voting to retain our Supreme Court justices — Justices Donohue, Dougherty, and Wecht.

Our Supreme Court has the power to impact some of the most important issues here in Pennsylvania – including protecting free and fair elections, reproductive rights, and the union way of life.

At a time when our democracy itself is under attack, **we need to vote YES on November 4th to retain Justices Donohue, Dougherty, and Wecht on the PA Supreme Court.**

body:
The Virginia governor’s race is razor-thin
| | | | |
---
Peter, before I get into the latest from New Jersey, I want to _**[thank all of our sponsors](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5b6ddff801884d62bc867c3e1149febe&_e=cBqnJHPvhyq-zpk4UOue0-XddJonVFLoO6VpIVFZ32RRN1FQXm5t7VZpncBt6T5z4IiMWgwY39f3aFhcsDxX1kIN3MazI1kGaR1-OktIoREiqey9km_D0or2zlAq4AHoceg2fSDqOKuI3SoV1-KR8Bfuy4I7Upg0HCIJ6OfCKKNZEtYILVOnw-3fJOxqfabwW1syRh4NBbaOxGUSD7ZYIla9BttNT-NAKo-rynNLf6nAT-Y_ufBKHONQBTxaWzH--nyBd7690OkEZf4w-dNaV8tKuq31VhOn_jVpZwgX4CZbAsDojI6oEAMTvZL3-My_GLlADS9ebFsr1PfDbKmmY6U4JrLzteTFf3gu86B_LyZO4uPDfexkYktqgH-6-73yTf_aWSuJYpiaAtDIUCXCIrWjEzXkR0-g1pB-Lx8FsnVh3qYl4d6oSUyfX1DIlN1TQ8SDoK-URlHzbzSZAIRheMhdthHMFzWQXHqph1mDVxAx5hdQS6GmoyRqcHc-tadb5-fAtEf55tJpnZtX6xOhaMtjT4oukxeWa8wpvWb8BNKdWuBKbr0WIZa32z4S6P3DPSRk8VQAexdO0_TSEoZ2zy9oTLWMLpLQk4AzySpHShfCuao6TBmoeYcCt-NegYKF9dqBlzwziK2XS8Kp4K9ZlT1TmEge3nAQZqjGo_Pn_qRLJ3SEh_hbcAJSsEVfezdzARH4gNgG782YsME5eY6rNA%3D%3D)**_ who have stepped up to fund a voter registration staffer or ballot chaser this year.
Because of them, we are tied in the polls and ahead of our projections in New Jersey, and this race is 100% winnable.
Right now, my grassroots team is on the ground chasing mail-in ballots and preparing to launch our massive get out the vote program to **FLIP New Jersey** **from Blue to RED** this November, and we’re having great success.
[SPONSOR A BALLOT CHASER](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5b6ddff801884d62bc867c3e1149febe&_e=cBqnJHPvhyq-zpk4UOue0-XddJonVFLoO6VpIVFZ32RRN1FQXm5t7VZpncBt6T5z4IiMWgwY39f3aFhcsDxX1kIN3MazI1kGaR1-OktIoREiqey9km_D0or2zlAq4AHoceg2fSDqOKuI3SoV1-KR8Bfuy4I7Upg0HCIJ6OfCKKNZEtYILVOnw-3fJOxqfabwW1syRh4NBbaOxGUSD7ZYIla9BttNT-NAKo-rynNLf6nAT-Y_ufBKHONQBTxaWzH-nPy43EnmZYF30Fkf4EL29FeSKlc3xwPF4op0YoZezYtSBqdXHlUAYDIbHwj3gwWarlxPFBbn1WiQaDe6EGRTQHfWg9MBlLbmlQzlkeCftI1aC-RxFW7rmxgYa73LtCT7YGnArGnjjadfFSX8pG8w5AgrEt7KACFERf9aTlFNoy2uy1PJ4ikDdNku0JKKiVlWWLxWHt1_RxqnbDxtNSNe5X8P3dAR69Y7wJ5L9RHPjKlbDcLyPjUylFZaJRqc0CZX38EMj8LcgLG9ZdT2IDdp6VptpfHvzliSnsKg6P0cRw8eTP0H3tl8giyQIw-dEfzsCP_9hGZY694JrQpqOtdHHxDb6gtoG3e7xxKun-ERnnKqE7uR11bkxmvn00BxoQ1epMylSr8jdZxJFk71eYwrbxTBnbxXfT8xPE7lVYicPwDcI6BwFaF3h0i9vQ6yNfy-rTWdj0lVGOzN9RoNcR5XDA%3D%3D)
**Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a higher rate than Democrats.** This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... Democrat voters have requested almost 3 TIMES as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, and they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do.
Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey **_we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day_** so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day.
We truly don’t have a moment to waste... in-person Early Voting begins on October 25th, mail-in voting ends on October 28th, and Election Day is November 4th.

clean_body: The Virginia governor’s race is razor-thin | | | | | Peter, before I get into the latest from New Jersey, I want to who have stepped up to fund a voter registration staffer or ballot chaser this year. Because of them, we are tied in the polls and ahead of our projections in New Jersey, and this race is 100% winnable. Right now, my grassroots team is on the ground chasing mail-in ballots and preparing to launch our massive get out the vote program to FLIP New Jersey from Blue to RED this November, and we’re having great success. Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a higher rate than Democrats. This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... Democrat voters have requested almost 3 TIMES as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, and they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do. Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day. We truly don’t have a moment to waste... in-person Early Voting begins on October 25th, mail-in voting ends on October 28th, and Election Day is November 4th. Peter, the momentum is on our side, and the early returns are looking very good, but we have a lot of work to do in the next few weeks if we’re going to flip the Garden State red. We need your help to make the difference. By sponsoring an Early Vote Action staffer, you’re fueling the grassroots work to flip New Jersey RED in 2025. . In Liberty, Scott Presler | | | | | Paid for by Early Vote Action New Jersey Inc. 111 Town Square Place, Suite 1201, Jersey City, NJ 07310. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. |

name: Sara Schreiber, LCV Victory Fund
subject: Trump’s Clean Energy Ban is on the ballot in VA and NJ right now — here’s how we’re going to win:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LCV Victory Fund,www
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMxMjc5NTYS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM0MDAxNzk5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — next week, voters will head to the polls in the first major
statewide elections since last November. We want to make sure you've heard about
two of them: the governors’ races in New Jersey and Virginia. What happens in these two states will affect ALL of us. Here's why: In both races, the Republican candidate is backed by Trump. The stakes are huge,
because with Trump’s support — now if they lose, it sends a clear message to EVERY Republican that Trump’s ban on
clean energy is a loser at the ballot box. Once the drilling starts, we cannot undo the damage. Defeating Trump’s favored candidates on Tuesday would send shock wavesthrough Washington, D.C. — and make members of Congress think twice about giving
Trump a blank check to implement his dirty agenda that will further raise
costs. Here’s a rundown on these races — and what our movement is doing to win: New Jersey Governor One of the most closely watched races in the country is in New Jersey, where
Democratic Rep. Mikie Sherrill, a former Navy pilot first elected to Congress in
2018, is facing off against MAGA Republican Jack Ciattarelli. New Jerseyans are facing some of the nation’s largest increases to utility bills
after Trump gutted a host of clean energy tax credits and projects in the
Republican Budget Bill. Trump’s favored candidate, Jack Ciattarelli, has proposed plans that will raise
bills even higher by taking clean energy like offshore wind off of the energy
grid. New Jersey LCV Victory Fund and our partners are going BIG to expose Jack Ciatarelli’s dirty energy policies and their impact on New Jersey
families. This is the largest electoral investment in a statewide campaign in
New Jersey LCV Victory Fund’s history, making them one of the top spenders in
the race. Virginia Governor Energy costs are also dominating the headlines and airwaves in the Virginia governor's race. The
proliferation of electricity-hogging data centers in Virginia — which is now home to over a third of data centers worldwide — has caused energy rates to skyrocket. MAGA candidate Lieutenant Governor Winsome Earle-Searshas promised to gut Virginia’s landmark clean energy law. Former Democratic Rep.
Abigail Spanberger, on the other hand, has pushed to tackle costs by expanding
renewable energy generation, and getting data centers to pay their fair share. Our state affiliate in Virginia — Virginia LCV PAC — is running a large-scale
canvass program knocking on more than 200,000 doors to talk with voters about
the issues that matter to them, including energy costs, and making sure they
know the stakes of this election. The environmental movement is going all out in these races, Peter.If we can pull off a big win, it will send a clear message to candidates around
the country: If you back Trump’s corrupt agenda, you will be defeated at the ballot box. And
if you stand for clean energy and lowering costs, you will win. These elections will lay the groundwork for a huge push in the critical 2026
election cycle. If you’re feeling inspired, please — chip in and help LCV Victory Fund defeat polluter-backed politicians. Make a
gift today and stand up against Trump’s corrupt agenda now >> These elections will lay the groundwork for a huge push in the critical 2026
election cycle. If you’re feeling inspired, please — chip in and help LCV Victory Fund defeat polluter-backed politicians. Make a gift today and stand up against Trump’s corrupt agenda now >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqME_ Thanks for everything you do to defend the environment and our democracy,
Peter. — Sara Schreiber Paid for by LCV Victory Fund,www.lcvvictoryfund.org https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6sXmZN_, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13127956&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM0MDAxNzk5MQS2&spReportId=MjM0MDAxNzk5MQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13127956&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM0MDAxNzk5MQS2&spReportId=MjM0MDAxNzk5MQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

clean_body: | - This is the end. No, I am not being dramatic. Please read this entire message and take action! I'm locked in the BIGGEST race of 2025. Whether I win or lose this race WILL determine the future of our nation. I'm not in the business of lying to voters and supporters, so I'm going to tell you the TRUTH. Here's the full state of things: Spanberger HID a $900K trust from voters while she was in Congress, so lying isn't anything new for her. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has taken over $550K in donations from a George Soros-backed group and a Chinese Communist Party member! She doesn't fight for you, me, or our nation; she's looking out for megarich liberals and literal COMMUNISTS! Spanberger took cues from Biden 100% of the time while she was in Congress. If she became Governor, she'd bring the same lies and downturn that we saw under BidenIf Spanberger wins in November, we'll have a HORRIBLE and corrupt career politician as Governor in Virginia. But on top of that, it will signal to National Democrats that this kind of corruption is a recipe for success. Soon, every state would be filled with even more corrupt, lying Democrats in office! I'm fighting everyday to ensure that my team and I pull off this CRITICAL victory. We have the message and momentum we need - recent polls show that we're SURGING as votes are being cast in Virginia. Here's my crucial problem: my radical opponent has built a MASSIVE fundraising lead ahead of me! We're being outraised and outspent by over $10 MILLION. CANNOT let my liberal opponent and her megadonors BUY this election! This isn't about me and it's not just about you - this is about the future of our nation. From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to support me in this fight! we stand together, I know we can win this thing. I pray you'll stand with me. Sincerely,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears| . I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. # [Kristi Noem: The Queen of Lies in Trump's America](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=177599883&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3NTk5ODgzLCJpYXQiOjE3NjIwMzQ1NTIsImV4cCI6MTc2NDYyNjU1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GSQgNR3ZCj2SNejTJ9bcBJe47S02hu-rN0YWB6r8v7k)
### When the Secretary of Homeland Security says no Americans have been detained--but hundreds have--the rot goes deeper than dishonesty. It's policy.
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster), [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp), [Blue Amp Media](https://substack.com/@blueampmedia), and [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)

| Nov 1
---

---|---|---|---|---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=177599883&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3NTk5ODgzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MjAzNDU1MiwiZXhwIjoxNzY0NjI2NTUyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RuwEHAAbWRnZlCe3HV-l_3V1ley_bLtCUudUJnOpCVw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=177599883&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3NTk5ODgzLCJpYXQiOjE3NjIwMzQ1NTIsImV4cCI6MTc2NDYyNjU1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GSQgNR3ZCj2SNejTJ9bcBJe47S02hu-rN0YWB6r8v7k&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/blueamp/p/kristi-noem-the-queen-of-lies-in?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1df195ef-02fa-4c74-9212-29604f173e12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e085664-1612-4eca-90ab-43b8177b1fe1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There are Trump administration officials who lie because they must, and there are those who lie because they can't help themselves.
Then there is [Kristi Noem--who lies like it's her native language](https://substack.com/redirect/a087e279-e228-41e5-b2fc-371314436b37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
This week, the Secretary of Homeland Security stood before the nation and declared, with a face so straight it should be in the Smithsonian, that _not a single U.S. citizen has been arrested or detained_ during President Trump's deportation dragnet.
"There's no American citizens have been arrested or detained," she said--a sentence that manages to insult both grammar and intelligence in a single breath.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7dbd804d-68f5-4950-a444-a0aab75dbe91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It takes a special gall to deny what even a casual glance at the news reveals. _ProPublica_ has documented over 170 cases of Americans detained by ICE this year.
Locked up for days without access to a lawyer, a phone call, or anything resembling an apology.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c80e4d77-461e-4c36-a69f-bc852fb0254e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yet here comes Noem, waving away the evidence like it's a damn mosquito, announcing that none of this ever happened. It's as if a firefighter stood in front of a house burning to the ground and said, "There's no fire -- that's just smoke."
[Subscribe for free to get more Shuster](https://substack.com/redirect/3e085664-1612-4eca-90ab-43b8177b1fe1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.0fMDncxe4Cx-4vFK9yWKHksYOxUZPcyPnIQW5YbVZ7c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=177599883)
What makes it worse is that Noem isn't some garden-variety hack parroting a memo.
She's the Cabinet's reigning queen of bad judgment. Everything motivating a majority of Americans [to fight this Administration](https://substack.com/redirect/c80e4d77-461e-4c36-a69f-bc852fb0254e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in one empty shell.
The woman who wrote about shooting her puppy in the face in her memoir--as if _that_ _story_ would win the hearts and minds of Middle America and convince Trump to name her his 2024 running mate.
In case you were surprised that t[hese people are purposely depriving 20 million children of food right now](https://substack.com/redirect/b4f92ed1-46a5-4a4b-9fe5-2ffa80d40475?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a087e279-e228-41e5-b2fc-371314436b37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When Vice President J.D. Vance recently said that only a "really terrible person" mistreats a dog, [it was hard to tell whether Vance was trolling or confessing](https://substack.com/redirect/97ac7514-921d-4918-959c-840c58036015?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Either way, Noem's reputation as the administration's moral black hole remains secure.
The pattern is as old as power itself: when the facts get ugly, deny them, and [when the denial collapses, deny that you ever denied it](https://substack.com/redirect/c80e4d77-461e-4c36-a69f-bc852fb0254e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Under Noem's watch, the Department of Homeland Security has perfected this ancient art of bureaucratic gaslighting.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1df195ef-02fa-4c74-9212-29604f173e12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The agency doesn't even _track_ how many citizens it mistakenly locks up--not because it can't, but because it doesn't want to know. Ignorance is policy, deceit is doctrine.
The founders of this country once believed that citizenship was sacred--that the government existed to protect it above all else. Under Noem, citizenship is a coin toss.
The difference between freedom and lock up now depends on [whether an ICE agent can read a driver's license](https://substack.com/redirect/a087e279-e228-41e5-b2fc-371314436b37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If not...the Secretary will simply pretend it never happened.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a087e279-e228-41e5-b2fc-371314436b37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Kristi Noem represents the modern American disease in its most virulent form: [moral vacancy wrapped in patriotic packaging](https://substack.com/redirect/b4f92ed1-46a5-4a4b-9fe5-2ffa80d40475?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). She mouths slogans about law and order while presiding over government tyranny.
She praises freedom while defending detention without cause. She talks about "American greatness" in the same way polly wants a cracker--endlessly, meaninglessly, and without the faintest idea of what the words imply.
[Love David Shuster? So do we! Subscribe now.](https://substack.com/redirect/3e085664-1612-4eca-90ab-43b8177b1fe1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.0fMDncxe4Cx-4vFK9yWKHksYOxUZPcyPnIQW5YbVZ7c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=177599883)
Every generation produces its share of official fools, but rarely one so pleased with her own mediocrity and [dutiful genuflecting as Noem](https://substack.com/redirect/9b5d2e1d-647f-4f28-bb6a-5b24bf17ffaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). She is not just an idiotic ICE Barbie unfit for office--she's a walking [indictment of the system that put her there](https://substack.com/redirect/a087e279-e228-41e5-b2fc-371314436b37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9b5d2e1d-647f-4f28-bb6a-5b24bf17ffaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If this is the [caliber of leadership that claims to defend America](https://substack.com/redirect/c80e4d77-461e-4c36-a69f-bc852fb0254e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), then our Republic doesn't need enemies. Because our nation is already being dismantled from inside, by people too dishonest to know they're the problem.
The truth will outlive Kristi Noem, of course. But until then, we are left to endure the grim tragedy of Noem--the Trump stooge who can't tell a citizen from an alien, [a lie from the truth](https://substack.com/redirect/b4f92ed1-46a5-4a4b-9fe5-2ffa80d40475?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or a puppy from a target.
* * *
[Merch](https://substack.com/redirect/7dbc4cb2-caf8-4ebf-add2-b03442612e12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: When the Secretary of Homeland Security says no Americans have been detained--but hundreds have--the rot goes deeper than dishonesty. It's policy. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? When the Secretary of Homeland Security says no Americans have been detained--but hundreds have--the rot goes deeper than dishonesty. It's policy. | | , , , and | Nov 1 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- There are Trump administration officials who lie because they must, and there are those who lie because they can't help themselves. Then there is . This week, the Secretary of Homeland Security stood before the nation and declared, with a face so straight it should be in the Smithsonian, that not a single U.S. citizen has been arrested or detained during President Trump's deportation dragnet. "There's no American citizens have been arrested or detained," she said--a sentence that manages to insult both grammar and intelligence in a single breath. | | ---|---|--- It takes a special gall to deny what even a casual glance at the news reveals. ProPublica has documented over 170 cases of Americans detained by ICE this year. Locked up for days without access to a lawyer, a phone call, or anything resembling an apology. | | ---|---|--- Yet here comes Noem, waving away the evidence like it's a damn mosquito, announcing that none of this ever happened. It's as if a firefighter stood in front of a house burning to the ground and said, "There's no fire -- that's just smoke." ! What makes it worse is that Noem isn't some garden-variety hack parroting a memo. She's the Cabinet's reigning queen of bad judgment. Everything motivating a majority of Americans in one empty shell. The woman who wrote about shooting her puppy in the face in her memoir--as if that story would win the hearts and minds of Middle America and convince Trump to name her his 2024 running mate. In case you were surprised that t. | | ---|---|--- When Vice President J.D. Vance recently said that only a "really terrible person" mistreats a dog, . Either way, Noem's reputation as the administration's moral black hole remains secure. The pattern is as old as power itself: when the facts get ugly, deny them, and . Under Noem's watch, the Department of Homeland Security has perfected this ancient art of bureaucratic gaslighting. | | ---|---|--- The agency doesn't even track how many citizens it mistakenly locks up--not because it can't, but because it doesn't want to know. Ignorance is policy, deceit is doctrine. The founders of this country once believed that citizenship was sacred--that the government existed to protect it above all else. Under Noem, citizenship is a coin toss. The difference between freedom and lock up now depends on . If not...the Secretary will simply pretend it never happened. | | ---|---|--- Kristi Noem represents the modern American disease in its most virulent form: . She mouths slogans about law and order while presiding over government tyranny. She praises freedom while defending detention without cause. She talks about "American greatness" in the same way polly wants a cracker--endlessly, meaninglessly, and without the faintest idea of what the words imply. Every generation produces its share of official fools, but rarely one so pleased with her own mediocrity and . She is not just an idiotic ICE Barbie unfit for office--she's a walking . | | ---|---|--- If this is the , then our Republic doesn't need enemies. Because our nation is already being dismantled from inside, by people too dishonest to know they're the problem. The truth will outlive Kristi Noem, of course. But until then, we are left to endure the grim tragedy of Noem--the Trump stooge who can't tell a citizen from an alien, , or a puppy from a target. | | , , and | | ---|---|--- | Oct 30 | | | ---|---|--- * You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: This election will be close
body:
This week, Christopher Newport University released their final poll of our race for Governor.

In September, they claimed we were ahead by 12 points. Now, they found that Winsome Earle-Sears has closed the gap and trails by just seven points.

Peter, I'll put it plainly: This election will be close.

We are doing absolutely everything in our power to reach undecided voters here in Virginia, to share my agenda for Virginia families, stand up to Trump's attacks, and win the biggest election of 2025.

But this work is hard, it's expensive — and it can only continue with your support.

Will you split a contribution between our campaign and Roy Cooper to help us win big on November 4th? Whether it's $10, $25, or more, every donation goes toward ads, organizers, and other investments that we know to be persuasive. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_spanbergersplit]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Abigail Spanberger and Roy Cooper:

SPLIT $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_spanbergersplit?express_lane=true&amount=5]

SPLIT $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_spanbergersplit?express_lane=true&amount=10]

SPLIT $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_spanbergersplit?express_lane=true&amount=25]

SPLIT $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_spanbergersplit?express_lane=true&amount=50]

SPLIT $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_spanbergersplit?express_lane=true&amount=100]

SPLIT ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_spanbergersplit?express_lane_other=true]

It's a point of pride that so many of you have invested in my campaign. I hope you'll have my back again today.

Thank you so much,

Abigail

Contact us [info@roycooper.com] |
Privacy Policy [https://roycooper.com/privacy-policy/]

Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602

Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Semper Fi. Always faithful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e283b45c2eee4af3b33c8115dab98f50&_e=QhhcJO-Er2fPu4_P_sfQrO0EWHENLxYrgwOrghSUjOfh3j5owGBjKHLOzZQF4v7pjwel0ZcIDn11F6vNEEBNi99aiQggFAXkkxdi4sJKGxESpaezab63lcbSjlMpssSavIeOpK07QrIWdWogstN1Vtn_pRLoGOykBd2c-OKjr-Nabtn39zNjZ-hawYnHYFNOgMks5zTADOlgdb22nCMIrUnZimK4E-W05UT7G8ae_mlbISYquM0eJW72fN8QE8PBGqbXEURot_cOoazJIlscqobz8ZUepA3u3KiJXIUbYQTNwVETvq8sNOj5VG5sUBvmfks-DuFOss6M9JznmChkXpO7g1LLq_8CieO3SYplUHI7l-GU7tfUrgp5t68VL9hYBbDtTPA8VRZb9awCjSbW-UpufsEvq-gf4_jrFKuM4ViHKAipMS-weZE3Af3X2t2sj6Ls1EywoX1pqvGhX4xMufgd3xKl2pRjmNwme8Xx8-Bhr7_M-y5pnTQQX7-7hIfkUWM23oV5Y32vu4-84Lljio4UvtwgrhKJxNJDGUL9cG8H0bQb9i9kxcmhfRlrRZcds6FkTx2VUi_EjdY1YOOjqsR_NAr8_H8kPmF5ll9jP9fccUM98nciFmWJMY_US8JqV4VXAbWcTCZe3tcqP8kapA%3D%3D) Semper Fi. Always faithful.
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e283b45c2eee4af3b33c8115dab98f50&_e=QhhcJO-Er2fPu4_P_sfQrO0EWHENLxYrgwOrghSUjOfh3j5owGBjKHLOzZQF4v7pjwel0ZcIDn11F6vNEEBNi99aiQggFAXkkxdi4sJKGxESpaezab63lcbSjlMpssSavIeOpK07QrIWdWogstN1Vtn_pRLoGOykBd2c-OKjr-Nabtn39zNjZ-hawYnHYFNOgMks5zTADOlgdb22nCMIreNdsXwHYx9cM2MDfIl6feL57hgEFasLm8evvUhCZGGgXPPR0nT0KBFZmAUFnSy6YL9QwiLfIUvlpcytbFpWIl_HMpaNtNAI7Qynu6VANQsiUaWIJUOumCJShwzU9Fi7TjVRHyGjpDx3WA0eZ7ot35N2X95x8_K33Wrwja4uH5YByKd5HPAdOyL-_Cx8AH8JmgyO4RupsTPNzZNWTekyyMPQFYX75yVaNdTQTFMy8o4NcT-cFrBbbFkbdWI0QOkFX-22sINihf4BF3Y9MIGfC0gtSouZsc6wpbHpMB2XhB2G9rrGa91u5BJnkPHNGJITKPt6b6TWGsb2yeZd4nVrkFDpnQ-7NTdszXSoUV42W06pEE99lx3gq44_nGw1t9fHILp4TabnJZPsTlFt9H3GAqIsye0gZS028h19rLUc_AsDQ-AvQIMku5y7ibJv6vt1vw%3D%3D) And to that, I say absolutely.
Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:
-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.
I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America.
And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.
But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.
Not on my watch.
[So, consider this a humble invitation to join my campaign: Will you chip in today—even if it’s just a few bucks—to ensure that we have the means needed to beat my Democrat opponent and win this thing?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e283b45c2eee4af3b33c8115dab98f50&_e=QhhcJO-Er2fPu4_P_sfQrO0EWHENLxYrgwOrghSUjOfh3j5owGBjKHLOzZQF4v7pjwel0ZcIDn11F6vNEEBNi99aiQggFAXkkxdi4sJKGxESpaezab63lcbSjlMpssSavIeOpK07QrIWdWogstN1Vtn_pRLoGOykBd2c-OKjr-Nabtn39zNjZ-hawYnHYFNOgMks5zTADOlgdb22nCMIrXeTWjT6c1B1ZJCvbnSRpmOsWQt5iAdJ4ZyjrGCCcLRoznSa4VFVH_Q1IHcUWy_lmxlhBi33zzmTIoJ_5wxwMjiZY5AI3g0kdEsheck20sdFFJJ43Sbg8y11gYrhGVoYlmlwFyqRfbrF7TZ4z_HZUCekDsTnw2NQ4Yid-cMpConECYPZ3LKKYfnKbpMBSuovbjB2EySIGEiLSkkJ8mhwc_RLWq3OTlCHjpc4fPVuBQ2a663xcdHeuDPf1_kQKEPt_XaFygjjHVgzgNSIQUiUoy_-TJlQdo5zqFFKK0lLG_Xtasmoa_z83U0l4yEJSyLtyWpLeGcQlgtO0G_z6wrCpn0I9nQYch0VO4rammDflpQHMavM4Zf1TMOMgPtX4rawRm52EFPUsirMdfFR82tH_xBaKQ-Rg2YuXG5nk9vIkTXQN3niZJXMS8IkGzPf7tg6uw%3D%3D) [ CHIP IN HERE >>

[_**So please, chip in if you can today!**_](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e283b45c2eee4af3b33c8115dab98f50&_e=QhhcJO-Er2fPu4_P_sfQrO0EWHENLxYrgwOrghSUjOfh3j5owGBjKHLOzZQF4v7pjwel0ZcIDn11F6vNEEBNi99aiQggFAXkkxdi4sJKGxESpaezab63lcbSjlMpssSavIeOpK07QrIWdWogstN1Vtn_pRLoGOykBd2c-OKjr-Nabtn39zNjZ-hawYnHYFNOgMks5zTADOlgdb22nCMIrYm-ivXl6aoW-nWvpWBnWpxm3D2LfXBZVgS1TSTrMyfmlwsJI4m0h17vbpPCnpxk66o1N5DvVI1dlw5FPrzh92wGp0g4Kd9CxGlfqthHQte1EdQjrcQz4zqFgz73jXI7ot_4U3vntEYx1U26rMqSYzE_ruLDIy2O5eoz4IoIpBa0IJyS7XJQsbOEyUCZnhrK8xnG7yf-jV9ZWyLEFwHp3P-tN3pFhS7IPHO1laFQmZB5M3S7iJhyfrAiMMrUu-kYuYUmBcS7r2Bce0st9B-UQfRcHGSI8ZTxTO-cao6fZKtYnFzgkpZsTARgoKjCSRY6FAAnRIBr3s1dKRgQMbVO38pEJJb9vC3MlIcZ4P6xlbagwoe2-W-AlQ8Yt1fhdRFXE-ZEDe1J7w1K6wNJRhsGIevMd7u6ElXxjzrgdNHsSuW84gr-LhZWmU6MedGECQp0Jg%3D%3D) [ CHIP IN NOW >>

clean_body: I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. Semper Fi. Always faithful. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages: -I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry. I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children. Not on my watch. We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. Thank you & God Bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Candidate for Governor of Virginia * I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Troy Downing
subject: My story’s a little different than most.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Here's 8 photos from the scrapbook.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDFfME4tTjMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/1HNr3Dq7DybxqaBh-4E33g)
---
Never could this young boy have imagined he’d one day be sending an email like this.

Peter, it's Troy Downing.

If you don’t have much time, all you need to know about me is that **I only care about three things: God, family, and country.** **[I’m fighting in Congress to defend those three things for myself and every American.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDFfME4tTjMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/hz5szH1zSzVYfuo-J4Y6Vw)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDFfME4tTjMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/0vWAfq8FEqHi3rII9W1Iyw)
---
Growing up, I was a bit of a nerd. I studied mathematics and computer science in college. Then, I started my own business, which merged with Yahoo!. I started other small businesses in insurance and real estate, but then my life changed forever...

Like millions of Americans, September 11th was a turning point.

**I immediately enlisted in the United States Air Force/ANG.** I served two tours of duty in Afghanistan as part of a Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) squadron.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDFfME4tTjMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/2gYsfpr-VYKhTGyY58w79g)
---
After eight years of service, I was honorably discharged from the Air Force and returned home to Montana with my wife and kids.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDFfME4tTjMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/QIS1n9u2VtWGIw972jAmZA)
---
We are partners in a local distillery in Bozeman, and when the COVID pandemic hit, our company went above and beyond to help our friends and neighbors. There was a shortage of toilet paper, sanitizing wipes, and hand sanitizer in every store.

We quickly turned our whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer production facility to provide free hand sanitizer to families, first responders, and hospitals.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDFfME4tTjMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/MxwtWxih-LzB_6CMfomMBg)
---
In the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) Community, we live by this motto:

**“These things we do, that others may live.”**

I’ve taken this motto with me in everything I do. I’ve taught my kids to live by this. And now, my public service is not finished. **[I’m fighting in Congress to preserve our American way of life, protect our God-given rights, and defend our nation with everything I’ve got.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDFfME4tTjMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/l5to-NktgAODNdtCJRLswg)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDFfME4tTjMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/jVukL8Y8s5VcYJ-nsWXa5w)
---
I’m fighting in Congress for **GOD** so we will never forget that we are one nation UNDER God.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **FAMILIES** so our kids have every opportunity to succeed.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **COUNTRY** so every future generation can still call the United States of America their home and the best country that has ever graced God’s creation.

Peter, defending our conservative House Majority and advancing President Trump’s agenda won’t come cheap. Democrats are chomping at the bit to flip the House BLUE so they can turn every state into the next California! I can’t let that happen, but I’m hoping strong, loyal Patriots like you will help win this fight.

[**If you can spare just $5 or $10, that’s all it takes to make a difference – seriously!**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDFfME4tTjMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/97irMuyNAqAIYHvqtpbccg) I don’t have billionaires on speed dial or Hollywood award winners to campaign for me.

I depend on like-minded friends and neighbors like you to chip in a few bucks. **[If everyone reading this chips in $8, I’ll hit my goal!](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDFfME4tTjMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/B9OSC3t3Btj7NJtwavQ5TQ)**
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[**I appreciate any and all support.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._miQB_8jSR3w)

With your help, Peter, **we can save our country and put God, Family, and Country FIRST. **

God Bless,

Troy Downing (R-MT)
---
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
---

Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.
---

Billings, MT 59104

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.troydowning.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDg4MjgxNTEsImUiOiJtZy1lbmM6NWh6RDRoYmhSOTR0SVViRGFVQXlzUGowaHcxSkVGa0EiLCJyaSI6IjI4OTktZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyNTMwNS03YjQxMGY3Njg0MTM0OGVkOGQ4MzFmZDI2OWI2YTdjMCIsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYwIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90cm95ZG93bmluZy5jb20vcHJpdmFjeS1wb2xpY3k_ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUxMTAxXzBOLU4zLjExMDExN190MTc0MjA5Ny0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTEwMV8wTi1OMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDIwOTctMjg5OSJ9/Tx0K0VyYGtkrkksyaf-9yw)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: It's cruel, and it's stupid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
American families are going hungry.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118478089/579882768/623074613?code=jtk1425-su-nd&refcode=jtk1425-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMwNDUzNGMtNzJiNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BsQrf6sBw1GBJBhFf1Pe8hXpOLVgW1EVmw3WC_-KlgE=&emci=f69705c6-a4b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e304534c-72b7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9329426)
---
Hello friend,

I wish I were exaggerating, but I’m not.
**Today, SNAP benefits lapsed for the nearly 42 million Americans who rely on the program to put adequate food on the table.** It’s not because these funds don’t exist, but because the administration has announced its intentions NOT to tap into its emergency contingency fund of over $6 billion to cover these benefits through November.
Republican Speaker Mike Johnson gave away their game in his interview with CNN: Republicans are trying to make the shutdown as painful as possible to pressure Democrats to accept budget cuts that would make healthcare more expensive and take away jobs.
And while families in America are wondering how to properly feed their children and loved ones, the administration has _suddenly_ found **$20 billion** to send to Argentina for an international bailout.
So let me be clear:
• Republicans are creating empty fridges to manufacture pressure.

• They’re blocking the existing contingency funds that would prevent millions from losing access to food.

• And all of this to make deep cuts to programs that make healthcare affordable, help people find work, and keep our economy strong during a time when it's being battered by tariffs.
I refuse to accept that. No citizen should go hungry just so politicians can strong-arm their way into cutting healthcare.

I’m going to keep fighting to ensure that no one uses hunger or hardship as a means of leverage, because every single person deserves dignity and a fair shot. What is a government for if not to uplift its citizens? But I need your voice to make it clear that common Americans won’t be pawns in a political game. **[Please, sign my petition and make your voice heard.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118478090/579882769/425746509?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1425-su-nd&refcode=jtk1425-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMwNDUzNGMtNzJiNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BsQrf6sBw1GBJBhFf1Pe8hXpOLVgW1EVmw3WC_-KlgE=&emci=f69705c6-a4b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e304534c-72b7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9329426)**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118478091/579882770/425746509?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1425-su-nd&refcode=jtk1425-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMwNDUzNGMtNzJiNy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BsQrf6sBw1GBJBhFf1Pe8hXpOLVgW1EVmw3WC_-KlgE=&emci=f69705c6-a4b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e304534c-72b7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9329426)

body:
On November 4, 2025, MAGA is preparing for a clean sweep: spending millions of dollars to strip Dems of their 5-2 majority on the state supreme court.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lpxNiIuMjFP1RYCNNmDTu43TKBFscNms_k2Rz0REiF70fZw5RcXyFdeF3gYqYo-yHoamhW1RjAW_BXGtCZWJrKdXGZDb7uHtRd74o1nK03R2lLcawqxqbmSQz-YKo4my83EdZy93pCSwcwyMa4sE7A9B0n5JlExhYxIT_BMENh08kylJSwhTk-6QQmVNrpu_XAxTAS83xtqPFitT75pxqqMSQF0QiETu_v-W1o_pEVs=&c=H7_LfTKsbjsyPlWQ9q9qEQnx69OOhoXKVmrUbs5_FD3ozIsCWVrssw==&ch=DV26lUqXHkFab71vfH4xoj46xmqUIeWuzZXCed-kizRV6CZm4qkmjg==)

|
Peter,
Below are just a few selections of the deceptive messages specifically targeted to Democratic voters being mailed and aired on TV by MAGA-funded groups in the all important 2025 battle for control of the PA supreme court.
"You can defend democracy"
"Term limit the Supreme Court"
"Force an election for a new Supreme Court"
They are spreading these lies because Democrats coming out in this election is an existential threat to the GOP's objectives for 2026 and 2028 because if they take the Pennsylvania Supreme Court they guarantee MAGA will win this state in 2026 and in 2028.
The group sharing these messages, Commonwealth Partners, is funded by Pennsylvania's richest man, Jeff Yass. Yass runs the Wall Street firm Susquehanna International Group and has a net worth of $65 billion. He has given huge sums of money to MAGA and now unfortunately owns a part of TikTok.
Now, with only weeks to go before Election Day, spending in this critical race has reached new records, exceeding any previous judicial retention election in Pennsylvania. And there is much, much more yet to come from the billionaires who helped Trump gain power last year.
On Tuesday, November 4, MAGA is preparing to make a clean sweep: spending millions of dollars to strip Dems of their 5-2 majority on the state supreme court by knocking out 3 Democratic justices in one election.
If we lose, MAGA activists will have the clearance they need to institute an extreme abortion ban--against the will of the voters--and to redistrict the PA congressional map to wipe away Democratic-held seats for good. Pennsylvania would become an uphill battle for Dems to win in a good year.
[But if we win, the GOP will have wasted millions of dollars and untold resources here if we do the work to win right now. Can you chip in $50, $25, or even $5 before midnight to help us save Pennsylvania and deliver a crushing blow to MAGA this year?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lpxNiIuMjFP1RYCNNmDTu43TKBFscNms_k2Rz0REiF70fZw5RcXyFdeF3gYqYo-y2jHhhAnqT3rFZ4JhpD9sq4zKeJlAChdP-i83_IrDEV_f7l5GYtqdBxNXXfQA7zXKSlUWEbOUPuRXN9C6Kbp3KBTOC8yx_9ybYYRiVa00UU1iWjbEfyYtJdEmzjmBfCPKX_cdHM6e6Rw7GjSZimgu3mlWr8P5U8UNdw1tsEbfetf__ltYBoVQeg==&c=H7_LfTKsbjsyPlWQ9q9qEQnx69OOhoXKVmrUbs5_FD3ozIsCWVrssw==&ch=DV26lUqXHkFab71vfH4xoj46xmqUIeWuzZXCed-kizRV6CZm4qkmjg==)

clean_body: On November 4, 2025, MAGA is preparing for a clean sweep: spending millions of dollars to strip Dems of their 5-2 majority on the state supreme court. | | | | | == | Peter, Below are just a few selections of the deceptive messages specifically targeted to Democratic voters being mailed and aired on TV by MAGA-funded groups in the all important 2025 battle for control of the PA supreme court. "You can defend democracy" "Term limit the Supreme Court" "Force an election for a new Supreme Court" They are spreading these lies because Democrats coming out in this election is an existential threat to the GOP's objectives for 2026 and 2028 because if they take the Pennsylvania Supreme Court they guarantee MAGA will win this state in 2026 and in 2028. The group sharing these messages, Commonwealth Partners, is funded by Pennsylvania's richest man, Jeff Yass. Yass runs the Wall Street firm Susquehanna International Group and has a net worth of $65 billion. He has given huge sums of money to MAGA and now unfortunately owns a part of TikTok. Now, with only weeks to go before Election Day, spending in this critical race has reached new records, exceeding any previous judicial retention election in Pennsylvania. And there is much, much more yet to come from the billionaires who helped Trump gain power last year. On Tuesday, November 4, MAGA is preparing to make a clean sweep: spending millions of dollars to strip Dems of their 5-2 majority on the state supreme court by knocking out 3 Democratic justices in one election. If we lose, MAGA activists will have the clearance they need to institute an extreme abortion ban--against the will of the voters--and to redistrict the PA congressional map to wipe away Democratic-held seats for good. name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Should I assume we won’t hear back from you?
body:
Peter, is everything OK?

| | | | Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I’ve reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they’ve texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren’t interested in these messages?
That would be truly shocking to me since you’ve always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump’s mission to save America, so I’m giving you one more chance!
[My ONLY request right now is that you complete the Official Trump Voter Profile before the end of the week.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.) Really, that’s it! I just need your feedback, nothing more! | [ SUBMIT MY TRUMP VOTER PROFILE ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-zAqHaQFK-w)

Marsha Blackburn
