clean_body: Claim your 2025 personalized Membership Card now We've reached out a few times Fellow American about the change in your membership status and we really hope you understand what's at stake. According to our records, your 2025 Republican State Leadership Membership Card has NOT been activated. Our team members are working day and night to defend Conservative values nationwide and are fighting to stop the Radical Left from destroying our nation! | Republican State Leadership MEMBERSHIP NOTICE ACCOUNT HOLDER: 2024 MEMBERSHIP: LAPSED 2025 MEMBERSHIP ENROLLMENT: PENDING Republican State Leadership is counting on you to act NOW to stand with us as we put an end to the Left's radical agenda! By renewing your membership, you are sending the loudest possible message to the Radical Left and making it CLEAR that you proudly stand with Republican State Leadership nationwide! Thank you, Republican State Leadership Membership Services * By providing your mobile phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and texts and P2P messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from RSLC and its affiliated PACs. Message frequency may vary. Msg&Data Rates May Apply. Reply STOP to cancel. Reply HELP for help. subject: My biggest regret
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/TarujZVwJeQDbXSbgPNwyxOxMiHOvKIW6Q1qcHim3cQtP2qRjm6oP3R7FTGHfza2pts_BSpneHKWknXH3oQ55RlfIYZauO9urdOHr7xygsLtp_srw-TW8mDhF2Dd_wat0Jpxko0-g0xwFm1vf0z1DR38q0ec-2xew_UBm0QAbQxuXYllwnoC6NvbvivwtD9KUkvKhoGVJp2IZQMxa0o9oZp2_LVofuZeKFTft4JESGUd4e0QdaSghepA48DcSNzA8T8qg6e89iefW8Uxq50gj_ueEVj4bHhk-2oRp3eyItXcOU5X65NmSe6CIAdRXWm3qmbwaIKjqGIAt22xNYjy41-Cisf47v799s_bC0lnyyEmeD0VH5-RgS9-4FqI0qVFRyxc4LOVVRa8w0PBVzJ07j1luPuVT7RGgHwJoJLvcUnCMima8duXq4t-zi2PFpgCMkMTLW5QoZu6nvp04ulckg3ZmdLhLeR9J6TBGc06KJURTwYIVzD6Ghs8F10Uq-okGY6m4IjpfUvuAnbq8LB9XQpy5jUJNRBclt5boRW289QGW9IegnZeOy66rBVynzP909waSD0L1DDG3Cu572S-ADc3JwcKT-JJHzzVXeGE5NH514JzRfDksTt9FZdSO-VhyxDqYiFVA57qjSSNony5w-DaBt_s69uaDiJKxlMumTvObXCxJtlTDBX0Un75TmWbo-LLRtbkpC9KSoZIja7hUtbSIhwoCfM9aqM2Pz-4eXHl78R_FK4dHmrlzy5jkvm1YyWs2dXN7jiZPoCwvT0YYnQJNISRbIr5NmxtNVaXLhI6IWk1zlkZ6gdeMMC_brexasjmJPMeIUdD7JyOz1KemrHRIA/ylBy_H_4YD_1xcKO02EjzA9csTAFDdME/14)Peter,
I'm writing to you today with a thought I wanted to share with you. As I reflect on how far we've come in this campaign, I've realized what my biggest regret would be.
I hate asking for donations; it's one of the worst parts of any campaign. But the support from you and so many patriots across the country are the key to winning this CRUCIAL race.
So the fact is, if I've realize that if we came all this way, and I could look back knowing that I could've done more, that would be my biggest regret. I know that I would always regret if I hadn't taken a chance to ask for your help when it matters most.[DONATE TODAY >>
](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/Wjj5cQJ2rbszyxqVnB7-qS9hAXemrUqnS6AbfjFMGJ6jDUwVGAxdj84IhGQtc7Gf-6WAtWYLS1ksvwbkFwW1FiOU10CzVoP5iBnNH0_EV8WCw_NU_abpapDQhvVB9bru5sZLye82oTLsNgmXuBepVyexdg-sK07c9ZhB65Uxr2NWEeMDjI4B2zhlduLO09A3rn_9I70freSd0tsYL7IMCIaVKFjlIro-_GVqUjBoXI9petG416cNw32eY6CcdqNMoluTAMQgxiAJULaS9Eea6ZUz-R_zef0u7e78JrZ1H6Qu_QTHUhXSor4jzvaCMEUuYubz_11EaGrfEWD5kn_G5M_Vk994If0YHI8A6TmXxFG40bvXV0Y1HY-PryOuY06_8IobsCIncHsEgFL_iGUbt_Nl6resyET68_K5xFvAcIainx-_jBFn_T_cVEiS_YxKDr-paANIxO1JmXiZ3K2PUchk57rrA1TvmU1uZX0hmSYz-cM6sDcSBUOQ0lnbVmzt5tR1yRxJFWaR0YUpOzhgfsACWf5C4fDj3tsUuLjJwAfDfGIG_hXKnEkk_c41jefogTxg1T9P7ulxyUF-MV4mRF7YqjvEmAczxnSF8Shmn-gIPV1X8A6w-4lGAjjxs9kG-t7tBb1QDCUeBSOMBGEvgfMmuzECwAhAJtFPO14ahvK7iQtoM4Vd6ljBP3i1LdUOSyPYMgo5ekpR2VmjjXh8ktNUfjB8mFyFLVgvZGjV30T8ip4e83m6bYB-FSgILRnRvc7D6ozF_Yv4Oe9q03pwV6tv8E5-YHE6ZKnO9ZNhoERv4vTYPJBt1VJPEPJ7bKNhFDgZTCIQY_-_wW-J836kb5JVKg/T8FVL1hDr6ZCMGgoPk4gBcn2TVXQVCgM/14)If I hadn't sent this email, I would regret not giving you the opportunity to stand with me against the liberal agenda that's threatening our nation. I would regret not giving you the chance to make a difference in the fight for our values, our freedom, and our Commonwealth. clean_body: , I'm writing to you today with a thought I wanted to share with you. As I reflect on how far we've come in this campaign, I've realized what my biggest regret would be. I hate asking for donations; it's one of the worst parts of any campaign. But the support from you and so many patriots across the country are the key to winning this CRUCIAL race. So the fact is, if I've realize that if we came all this way, and I could look back knowing that I could've done more, that would be my biggest regret. I know that I would always regret if I hadn't taken a chance to ask for your help when it matters most. I hadn't sent this email, I would regret not giving you the opportunity to stand with me against the liberal agenda that's threatening our nation. I would regret not giving you the chance to make a difference in the fight for our values, our freedom, and our Commonwealth. support will help me continue to fight for what we believe in, and it will give us the resources we need to take on my Democrat opponent and her liberal megadonors. I know that I'm not alone in this fight. I know that there are thousands of conservatives like you who are willing to stand up for what's right. And I know that together, we can make a real difference. But I need your help to make it happen. I need your contribution to help me and my team ensure we have the resources we need to spread our message and win this CLOSE and CRITICAL electionI refuse to look back and regret not doing everything I could to defend our values. Please don't sit on the sidelines, Peter! Sincerely,Winsome Earle-Sears| . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Peter ,
Tonight’s all about tricks and treats, but come Tuesday, the stakes get real.
This is it! The final weekend before Election Day.
Our team is working in three states — Virginia, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania — helping power key races that will decide the direction of our country and set the tone for Democratic momentum going into 2026.
We’re in the home stretch — and every contribution this weekend helps us reach more voters before polls close Tuesday. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=Email1112025]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: Without God, there is no freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
"To have a great nation, you have to have religion. There has to be something after we go through all of this, and that something is God." \- President Trump As a retired Navy SEAL, I've seen my fair share of battles. And let me tell you, I've lost Brothers in the fight for our nation's freedom. But through it all, I've held onto one thing that's kept me going: my faith.
And I'm not alone.
Our nation was founded on Christian values, and it's those values that have made us great. But today, our Christian values are under attack like never before.
The Left wants to take God out of our country, out of our schools, and out of our lives. They want to replace faith with socialism and morality with relativism. But we can't let that happen.
That's why I'm calling on you to stand with me today. We MUST defend our nation's faith and values. We need to show the Left that we won't back down and that we won't give up on the principles that have made America great!

clean_body: "To have a great nation, you have to have religion. There has to be something after we go through all of this, and that something is God." \- President Trump As a retired Navy SEAL, I've seen my fair share of battles. And let me tell you, I've lost Brothers in the fight for our nation's freedom. But through it all, I've held onto one thing that's kept me going: my faith. And I'm not alone. Our nation was founded on Christian values, and it's those values that have made us great. But today, our Christian values are under attack like never before. The Left wants to take God out of our country, out of our schools, and out of our lives. They want to replace faith with socialism and morality with relativism. But we can't let that happen. That's why I'm calling on you to stand with me today. We MUST defend our nation's faith and values. We need to show the Left that we won't back down and that we won't give up on the principles that have made America great! Your support will send a powerful message to Washington's politicians and bureaucrats. It will tell them we're not afraid to stand up for what we believe in and fight for our nation's values! body:
Our rapid-response programs were built assuming we’d keep pace with MAGA spending. We didn’t. And with just 13 days left until the November elections, we are dangerously close to scaling back.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012bvIHw29qShz0XGzeyvyVz1yEvbPF63zKVJPykkyu6eI6-1cou8CHRtrjY5JUEPxcYZNWQNYIsXbJjX_WEF1nYcqSRfS5Br24SXscJtsrhQe6mEGUiHBQfXOTDY2e84u8xPCJRepRcBVZoRklq6X-oOmCd3XZGh726rjx5QWJMNXyWTZze8SIMUhSfW-wtdsf40FtTkT8JNBcmWUwpwVNd-BUeja34okVw7NPwUuk_A=&c=qJ9BTd4c4aQ-frOZgqVH568wEXnyAoUoJxaMUcpZBhqqSvNHuBDH_g==&ch=jLp7hGZPQOEf4rmx7DFB1qf0sRGZVPkEMyKKE5jyOQlYba3ozRgZog==)
---
| Peter,
This is the message we hoped we wouldn't have to send--we're now officially behind budget heading into the final stretch before Pennsylvania votes in their critical November 2025 Supreme Court Election.
If we don't close this gap immediately, we risk running out of resources at the exact moment the far-right is unloading a tidal wave of dark-money ads to steal the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012bvIHw29qShz0XGzeyvyVz1yEvbPF63zKVJPykkyu6eI6-1cou8CHRtrjY5JUEPxcYZNWQNYIsXbJjX_WEF1nYcqSRfS5Br24SXscJtsrhQe6mEGUiHBQfXOTDY2e84u8xPCJRepRcBVZoRklq6X-oOmCd3XZGh726rjx5QWJMNXyWTZze8SIMUhSfW-wtdsf40FtTkT8JNBcmWUwpwVNUPF_7LZEI9K39vjKQIabmM=&c=qJ9BTd4c4aQ-frOZgqVH568wEXnyAoUoJxaMUcpZBhqqSvNHuBDH_g==&ch=jLp7hGZPQOEf4rmx7DFB1qf0sRGZVPkEMyKKE5jyOQlYba3ozRgZog==)
---
| | | | There is no worse time to fall short than right now.
The truth:
Our rapid-response programs were built assuming we'd keep pace with their spending. We didn't. And with just 2 days left until the November elections, we are dangerously close to scaling back -- just as right-wing spending surges.
If MAGA extremists capture this seat, they'll have a runway to contest the 2028 presidential election with a court primed to rule in their favor. They don't need Congress. They don't need a legislature. They just need one judicial majority -- and Pennsylvania is the one they're targeting.
If we fail to hold the line here, we hand them the legal weapon they tried to use in 2020 -- except next time it won't be blocked.
That is exactly why the right is outspending us: because they know the court can decide the presidency.
[We are short right now. We need help today. Rush an emergency donation before midnight to help us close the gap.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012bvIHw29qShz0XGzeyvyVz1yEvbPF63zKVJPykkyu6eI6-1cou8CHRtrjY5JUEPxoT3clQFamv4s7yxwcmIbdtA2LEFXJId_zeH_NiEeR_FRzBharuB1XTc7_5GZ5sG1kGZBUWpA9S-Y_OvsdaG2tcQuUZkN0LY04FhUiXvLQZxpjxZbzds6ZvQhv4eowQqT4zRvTnL2Wts_9ZhHkoF66eAfsCyXa7TuZ1_d0QQujcszMhfAkZWDsw==&c=qJ9BTd4c4aQ-frOZgqVH568wEXnyAoUoJxaMUcpZBhqqSvNHuBDH_g==&ch=jLp7hGZPQOEf4rmx7DFB1qf0sRGZVPkEMyKKE5jyOQlYba3ozRgZog==)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: You may not know this about me:
body:
---
| [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20251101_5081_fr&refcode2=5081_22930333_8eM4ZB&akid=5081%2E22930333%2E8eM4ZB)
---
Derek, it’s Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I’m coming to you directly ahead of Election Day.
[**Will you click here to split a $20 contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC today to help us reach as many voters as we can in the last few days before Election Day?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20251101_5081_fr&refcode2=5081_22930333_8eM4ZB&akid=5081%2E22930333%2E8eM4ZB)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party's Coordinated Campaign and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_

| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?refcode=em_20251101_5081_fr&refcode2=5081_22930333_8eM4ZB&akid=5081%2E22930333%2E8eM4ZB)**
---
****
You may not know this about me: When I first ran for Congress in 2018, my district hadn't elected a Democrat in 50 years.
A lot of people tried to discourage me. They said it was a pipe dream.
_Well, they were wrong._
**Now, I'm running for governor in one of the biggest elections of 2025 — and I'm giving this everything I've got.**
I've seen the momentum on the ground. I've heard the enthusiasm of people all across the country who see our race as a beacon of hope.
And I’ve seen the incredible work of our coordinated campaign, Operation Virginia Victory. Our organizing team is spanning the Commonwealth, doing the crucial work to turn out voters, activate volunteers, and protect access to the ballot box. The DNC has been our key partner through it all.
But all of this work takes sustained resources from people like you, Derek — and we need to scale up our efforts right away.
[**So I’m asking for your help one more time before Election Day. Can you split a $20 contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC today to help Democrats reach and turn out as many voters as we can?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20251101_5081_fr&refcode2=5081_22930333_8eM4ZB&akid=5081%2E22930333%2E8eM4ZB)
Thank you for your support. I am so grateful.
Abigail Spanberger

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
